Genesis1:1 PACIYAMBI Mulungu adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi.
Genesis1:2 Dziko lapansi ndipo linali lopanda kanthu; ndipo mdima unali pamwamba pa nyanja; ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unaliokufungatira pamwamba pa madzi.
Genesis1:3 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:4 Ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kuyerako kunali kwabino: ndipo Mulungu analekanitsa kuyera ndi mdima.
Genesis1:5 Ndipo Mulungu anacha kuyerako Usana
Genesis1:6 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:7 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga thambo
Genesis1:8 Ndipo Mulungu analicha thambolo Kumwamba. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:9 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:10 Ndipo Mulungu adaucha mtundawo Dziko lapansi; kusonkhana kwa madziko ndipo adaucha Nyanja: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino.
Genesis1:11 Mulungu ndipo anati
Genesis1:12 Ndipo dziko lapansi linamera maudzu
Genesis1:13 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:14 Ndipo Mulungu anati
Genesis1:15 zikhale zounikira m'thambo la kumwamba
Genesis1:16 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zounikira zazikuru ziwiri; counikira cacikuru cakulamulira usana
Genesis1:17 Mulungu ndipo adaika zimenezo m'thambo la kumwamba
Genesis1:18 nizilamulire usana ndi usiku
Genesis1:19 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:20 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:21 Mulungu ndipo adalenga zinsomba zazikuru ndi zoyendayenda zamoyo zakucuruka m'madzi mwa mitundu yao
Genesis1:22 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa zimenezo
Genesis1:23 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:24 Ndipo adati Mulungu
Genesis1:25 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zinyama za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao; ndi ng'ombe monga mwa mtundu wace
Genesis1:26 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:27 Mulungu ndipo adalenga munthu m'cifanizo cace
Genesis1:28 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa iwo
Genesis1:29 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:30 ndiponso ndapatsa zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi
Genesis1:31 Ndipo anaziona Mulungu zonse zimene adazipanga
Genesis2:1 Ndipo zinatha kupangidwa zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Genesis2:2 Tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri Mulungu anamariza nchito yonse anaipanga; ndipo anapuma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri ku nchito yace yonse.
Genesis2:3 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri
Genesis2:4 Imeneyo ndiyo mibadwo yao ya zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Genesis2:5 Ndi zomera zonse za m'munda zisanakhale m'dziko lapansi
Genesis2:6 kama inakwera nkhungu yoturuka pa dziko lapansi
Genesis2:7 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba munthu ndi dothi lapansi
Genesis2:8 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anabzala m'munda ku Edene cakum'mawa; momwemo ndipo adaika munthu adamuumbayo.
Genesis2:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anameretsa m'nthaka mitengo yonse yokoma m'maso ndi yabwino kudya; ndiponso mtengo wa moyo pakati pa mundapo
Genesis2:10 Ndipo unaturuka m'Edene mtsinje wakuthirira m'mundamo
Genesis2:11 Dzina la wakuyamba ndi Pisoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Havila
Genesis2:12 golidi wa dziko ali wabwino; ndimonso muli bedola ndi mwala wasohamu.
Genesis2:13 Dzina la mtsinje waciwiri ndi Gihoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Kusi.
Genesis2:14 Dzina la mtsinje wacitatu ndi Hidikeli: umenewo ndiwo wakuyenda ca kum'mawa kwace kwa Asuri. Mtsinje wacinai ndi Pirate.
Genesis2:15 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anatenga munthuyo
Genesis2:16 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anamuuza munthuyo
Genesis2:17 koma mtengo wakudziwitsa zabwino ndi zoipa
Genesis2:18 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anati
Genesis2:19 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba ndi nthaka zamoyo zonse za m'thengo
Genesis2:20 Adamu ndipo anazicha maina zinyama zonse
Genesis2:21 Koma Yehova Mulungu anamgonetsa Adamu tulo tatikuru
Genesis2:22 ndipo nthitiyo anaicotsa Yehova Mulungu mwa Adamu anaipanga mkazi
Genesis2:23 Ndipo anati Adamu
Genesis2:24 Cifukwa cotero mwamuna adzasiya atate wace ndi amace nadzadziphatika kwa mkazi wace: ndipo adzakhala thupi limodzi.
Genesis2:25 Onse awiri ndipo anali amarisece
Genesis3:1 Ndipo njoka inali yakucenjera yoposa zamoyo zonse za m'thengo zimene anazipanga Yehova Mulungu
Genesis3:2 Mkaziyo ndipo anati kwa njoka
Genesis3:3 Koma zipatso za mtengo umene uti m'kati mwa munda
Genesis3:4 Njokayo ndipo inati kwa mkaziyo
Genesis3:5 cifukwa adziwa Mulungu kuti tsiku limene mukadya umenewo
Genesis3:6 Ndipo pamene anaona mkaziyo kuti mtengo unali wabwino kudya
Genesis3:7 Ndipo anatseguka maso ao a onse awiri
Genesis3:8 Ndipo anamva mau a Yehova Mulungu alinkuyendayenda m'munda nthawi yamadzulo: ndipo anabisala Adamu ndi mkazi wace pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu pakati pa mitengo ya m'munda.
Genesis3:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaitana mwamunayo nati kwa iye
Genesis3:10 Ndipo anati
Genesis3:11 Ndipo anati
Genesis3:12 Ndipo anati mwamunayo
Genesis3:13 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anati kwa mkaziyo
Genesis3:14 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu kwa njokayo
Genesis3:15 ndipo ndidzaika udani pakati pa iwe ndi mkaziyo
Genesis3:16 Kwa mkaziyo ndipo anati
Genesis3:17 Kwa Adamu ndipo anati
Genesis3:18 minga ndi mitula idzakubalira iwe; ndipo udzadya therere la m'thengo:
Genesis3:19 m'thukuta la nkhope yako udzadya cakudya
Genesis3:20 Ndipo mwamuna anamucha dzina la mkazi wace
Genesis3:21 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anapangira Adamu ndi mkazi wace maraya azikopa
Genesis3:22 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu
Genesis3:23 Yehova Mulungu anamturutsa iye m'munda wa Edene
Genesis3:24 Ndipo anamuingitsa munthuyo; nakhazika Makerubi ca kum'mawa kwace kwa munda wa Edene
Genesis4:1 Ndipo mwamunayo anadziwa mkazi wace Hava: ndipo anatenga pakati
Genesis4:2 Ndipo anabalanso mphwace Abele. Abele anakhala mbusa wa nkhosa
Genesis4:3 Ndipo panali atapita masiku
Genesis4:4 Ndiponso Abele anatenga iyenso mwana woyamba wa nkhosa zace ndi mafuta omwe. Yehova ndipo anayang'anira Abele ndi nsembe yace:
Genesis4:5 koma sanayang'anira Kaini ndi nsembe yace. Kaini ndipo anakwiya kwambiri
Genesis4:6 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Kaini
Genesis4:7 Ukacita zabwino
Genesis4:8 Kaini ndipo ananena ndi Abele mphwace. Ndipo panali pamene anali kumunda
Genesis4:9 Yehova ndipo anati kwa Kaini
Genesis4:10 Ndipo anati
Genesis4:11 Tsopano ndiwe wotembereredwa kunthaka
Genesis4:12 pamene udzalima panthaka siidzaperekanso kwa iwe mphamvu yace: udzakhala wothawathawa ndi woyendayenda pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis4:13 Ndipo Kaini anati kwa Yehova
Genesis4:14 Taonani
Genesis4:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye
Genesis4:16 Ndipo Kaini anaturuka pamaso pa Yehova
Genesis4:17 Ndipo Kaini anamdziwa mkazi wace; ndipo anatenga pakati
Genesis4:18 Kwa Enoke ndipo kunabadwa Irade; Irade ndipo anabala Mehuyaeli; Mehuyaeli ndipo anabala Metusaeli; Metusaeli ndipo anabala Lameke.
Genesis4:19 Ndipo Lameke anadzitengera yekha akazi awiri: dzina lace la wina ndi Ada
Genesis4:20 Ndipo Ada anabala Yabala; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo okhala m'mahema
Genesis4:21 Ndi dzina la mphwace ndilo Yubala; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo oyimba zeze ndi citoliro.
Genesis4:22 Ndipo Zila
Genesis4:23 Lameke ndipo anati kwa akazi ace: Tamvani mau anga
Genesis4:24 Ngati Kaini adzabwezeredwa kasanu ndi kawiri
Genesis4:25 Ndipo Adamu anadziwanso mkazi wace; ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna
Genesis4:26 Ndiponso kwa Seti
Genesis5:1 Ili ndi buku la mibadwo ya Adamu. Tsiku lomwe Mulungu analenga munthu anamlenga m'cifanizo ca Mulungu;
Genesis5:2 anawalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi
Genesis5:3 Ndipo Adamu anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu
Genesis5:4 Masiku ace Adamu atabala Seti
Genesis5:5 Masiku ace onse anakhala ndi moyo Adamu anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai
Genesis5:6 Ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza zisanu
Genesis5:7 ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:8 masiku ace onse a Seti anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi ndi ziwiri; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:9 Ndipo Enosi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi anai
Genesis5:10 ndipo anakhala ndi moyo Enosi
Genesis5:11 Masiku ace onse a Enosi anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:12 Ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri
Genesis5:13 ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:14 masiku ace onse a Kenani anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:15 Ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu
Genesis5:16 ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:17 masiku ace onse a Mahalalele anali zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi anai ndi zisanu; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:18 Ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri
Genesis5:19 ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:20 masiku ace onse a Yaledi anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza maitumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri: ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:21 Ndipo Enoke anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu
Genesis5:22 ndipo Enoke anayendabe ndi Mulungu
Genesis5:23 masiku ace onse a Enoke anali mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi zisanu;
Genesis5:24 ndipo Enoke anayendabe ndi Mulungu; ndipo panalibe iye; pakuti Mulungu anamtenga.
Genesis5:25 Ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis5:26 ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:27 masiku ace onse a Metusela anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu ndi zinai; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:28 Ndipo Lameke anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi ziwiri
Genesis5:29 namucha dzina lace Nowa
Genesis5:30 ndipo Lameke anakhala ndi moyo atabala Nowa
Genesis5:31 masiku ace onse a Lameke anali zaka mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anamwa lira.
Genesis5:32 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu; ndipo Nowa anabala Semu ndi Hamu ndi Yafeti.
Genesis6:1 Ndipo panali pamene anthu anayamba kucuruka padziko
Genesis6:2 kuti ana amuna a Mulungu anayang'ana ana akazi a anthu
Genesis6:3 Ndipo anati Yehova
Genesis6:4 Pa dziko lapansi panali anthu akurukuru masiku omwewo ndiponso pambuyo pace
Genesis6:5 Ndipo anaona Yehova kuti kuipa kwa anthu kunali kwakukuru pa dziko lapansi
Genesis6:6 Ndipo Yehova anamva cisoni cifukwa anapanga munthu pa dziko lapansi
Genesis6:7 Ndipo anati Yehova
Genesis6:8 Koma Nowa anapeza ufulu pamaso pa Yehova.
Genesis6:9 Mibadwoya Nowandiiyi: Nowa anali munthu wolungama ndi wangwiro m'mibadwo yace; Nowa anayendabe ndi Mulungu.
Genesis6:10 Ndipo Nowa anabala ana amuna atatu
Genesis6:11 Ndipo dziko lapansi linabvunda pamaso pa Mulungu
Genesis6:12 Ndipo Mulungu anaona dziko lapansi
Genesis6:13 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa
Genesis6:14 Udzipangire wekha cingalawa ca mtengo wanjale; upangemo zipinda m'cingalawamo
Genesis6:15 Kupanga kwace ndi kotere: m'litari mwace mwa cingalawa mikono mazana atatu
Genesis6:16 Uike zenera m'ciogalawaco
Genesis6:17 Ndine
Genesis6:18 Koma ndidzakhazikitsa ndi iwe pangano langa; ndipo udzalowa m'cingalawamo iwe ndi ana ako ndi mkazi wako
Genesis6:19 Ndipo zonse zokhala ndi moyo
Genesis6:20 Za mbalame monga mwa mitundu yao
Genesis6:21 Ndipo iwe udzitengereko wekha zakudya zonse zodyedwa
Genesis6:22 Cotero anacita Nowa
Genesis7:1 Ndipo anati Yehova kwa Nowa
Genesis7:2 Nyama zonse zodyedwa udzitengereko wekha zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis7:3 Ndiposo mbalame za kumlengalenga zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis7:4 Pakuti akapita masiku asanu ndi awiri Ine ndidzabvumbitsa mvula pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku; ndi zinthu zamoyo zonse zomwe ndazipanga ndidzaziononga pa dziko lapansi
Genesis7:5 Ndipo anacita Nowa monga mwa zonse anamlamulira iye Yehova.
Genesis7:6 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu ndi limodzi
Genesis7:7 Ndipo analowa Nowa ndi ana ace ndi mkazi wace ndi akazi a ana ace m'cingalawamo
Genesis7:8 Nyama zodyedwa ndi nyama zosadyedwa
Genesis7:9 zinalowa ziwiri ziwiri kwa Nowa m'cingalawamo
Genesis7:10 Ndipo panali pamene anapita masiku asanu ndi awiri
Genesis7:11 Caka ca mazana asanu ndi limodzi ca moyo wa Nowa
Genesis7:12 Ndipo mvula inali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku.
Genesis7:13 Tsiku lomwelo analowa m'cingalawamo Nowa
Genesis7:14 iwo
Genesis7:15 Ndipo zinalowa kwa Nowa m'cingalawamo ziwiri ziwiri zamoyo zonse
Genesis7:16 Zimene zinalowazo
Genesis7:17 Ndipo cigumula cinali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai: ndipo madzi anacuruka natukula cingalawa
Genesis7:18 Ndipo madzi anapambana
Genesis7:19 Ndipo madzi anapambana ndithu pa dziko lapansi; anamizidwa mapiri atari onse amene anali pansi pa thambo lonse.
Genesis7:20 Madzi anapambana ndithu nakwera mikono khumi ndi isanu: namizidwa mapiri
Genesis7:21 Ndipo zinafa zamoyo zonse zoyenda pa dziko lapansi
Genesis7:22 zonse zimene m'mphuno zao munali mpweya wa maimu wa moyo
Genesis7:23 Ndipo zinaonongedwa zamoyo zimene zonse zinali pa dziko lapansi
Genesis7:24 Ndipo anapambana madzi pa dziko lapansi masiku zana kudza makumi asanu.
Genesis8:1 Ndipo Mulungu anakumbukira Nowa ndi zamoyo zonse
Genesis8:2 ndipo anatsekedwa akasupe a madzi akuru ndi mazenera a kumwamba
Genesis8:3 ndipo madzi anaphweraphwerabe pa dziko lapansi: pamene anatha masiku zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu madzi anacepa.
Genesis8:4 Ndipo cingalawa cinaima pa mapiri a Ararati
Genesis8:5 Ndipo madzi analinkucepa kufikira mwezi wakhumi; mwezi wakhumi tsiku loyamba mwezi ndipo padaoneka mitu ya mapiri.
Genesis8:6 Ndipo panali atapita masiku makumi anai
Genesis8:7 ndipo anaturutsa khungubwe
Genesis8:8 Ndipo anaturutsa njiwa imcokere
Genesis8:9 koma njiwayo siinapeza popondapo phazi lace
Genesis8:10 Ndipo analinda masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; naturutsanso njiwayo m'cingalawamo;
Genesis8:11 ndipo njiwa inadza kwa iye madzulo; ndipo
Genesis8:12 Ndipo analindanso masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; naturutsa njiwayo: ndipo siinabweranso konse kwa iye.
Genesis8:13 Ndipo panali caka ca mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza cimodzi
Genesis8:14 Mwezi waciwiri tsiku la makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri la mwezi
Genesis8:15 Mulungu ndipo ananena kwa Nowa
Genesis8:16 Turukamoni m'cingalawamo
Genesis8:17 Turutsa pamodzi ndi iwe zamoyo zonse ziti ndi iwe za nyama zonse
Genesis8:18 Ndipo anaturuka Nowa ndi ana ace
Genesis8:19 zinyama zonse
Genesis8:20 Ndipo Nowa anamanga guwa la nsembe la Yehova; natengapo nyama zodyedwa zonse ndi mbalame zodyedwa zonse napereka nsembe zopsereza paguwapo.
Genesis8:21 Ndipo Yehova anamva conunkhira cakukondweretsa; nati Yehova m'mtima mwace
Genesis8:22 Pakukhalabe masiku a dziko lapansi
Genesis9:1 Ndipo Mulungu anadalitsa Nowa ndi ana ace
Genesis9:2 Kuopsya kwanu
Genesis9:3 Zoyenda zonse zamoyo zidzakhala zakudya zanu; monga therere laliwisi ndakupatsani inu zonsezo.
Genesis9:4 Koma nyama
Genesis9:5 Zoonatu mwazi wanu wa miyoyo yanu ndidzafuna; pa dzanja la zinyama zonse ndidzaufuna: ndi pa dzanja la munthu
Genesis9:6 Amene akhetsa mwazi wa munthu
Genesis9:7 Ndi inu
Genesis9:8 Ndipo Mulungu ananena kwa Nowa ndi kwa ana ace pamodzi naye
Genesis9:9 Ndipo Ine
Genesis9:10 ndi zamoyo zonse ziti pamodzi ndi inu
Genesis9:11 Ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa pangano langa pamodzi ndi inu; zamoyo zonse sizidzamarizidwanso konse ndi madzi a cigumula; ndipo sikudzakhalanso konse cigumula cakuononga dziko lapansi.
Genesis9:12 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis9:13 ndiika Uta-wa-Leza wanga m'mtambomo
Genesis9:14 Ndipo padzakhala popimba ndi mtambo Ine dziko lapansi
Genesis9:15 ndipo ndidzakumbukira pangano langa limene liri ndi Ine ndi inu
Genesis9:16 Ndipo utawo udzakhala m'mtambo; ndipo ndidzauyang'anira kuti ndikumbukire pangano lacikhalire liri ndi Mulungu ndi zamoyo zonse zokhala ndi moyo pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis9:17 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa
Genesis9:18 Ndi ana amuna a Nowa amene anaturuka m'cingalawa ndiwo Semu
Genesis9:19 Amenewa ndiwo ana amuna atatu a Nowa: ndiwo anafalikira dziko lonse lapansi.
Genesis9:20 Ndipo anayamba Nowa kukhala munthu wakulima nthaka
Genesis9:21 namwa vinyo wace
Genesis9:22 Ndipo Hamu atate wace wa Kanani
Genesis9:23 Semu ndi Yafeti ndipo anatenga copfunda
Genesis9:24 Nowa ndipo anauka kwa kuledzera kwace
Genesis9:25 Ndipo anati
Genesis9:26 Ndipo anati: Ayamikike Yehova
Genesis9:27 Mulungu akuze Yafeti
Genesis9:28 Ndipo Nowa anakhala ndi moyo cigumula citapita
Genesis9:29 Ndipo masiku onse a Nowa anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu: ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis10:1 Mibadwo ya ana a Nowa
Genesis10:2 Ana amuna a Yafeti: Gomeri
Genesis10:3 Ndi ana amuna a Gomeri: Asekenazo
Genesis10:4 Ndi ana amuna a Yavani: Elisa
Genesis10:5 Amenewo ndipo anagawa zisi za amitundu m'maiko mwao
Genesis10:6 Ndi ana amuna a Hamu: Kusi
Genesis10:7 Ndi ana amuna a Kusi: Seba
Genesis10:8 Ndipo Kusi anabala Nimrode; ndipo iye anayamba kukhala wamphamvu pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis10:9 Iye ndiye mpalu wamphamvu pamaso pa Yehova: cifukwa cace kunanenedwa
Genesis10:10 Ndipo kuyamba kwace kwa ufumu wace kunali Babele
Genesis10:11 M'dziko momwemo iye anaturuka kunka ku Ashuri
Genesis10:12 ndi Resene pakati pa Nineve ndi Kala: umenewo ndi mudzi waukuru.
Genesis10:13 Mizraimu ndipo anabala Ludimu
Genesis10:14 ndi Patrusimu
Genesis10:15 Ndipo Kanani anabala Sidoni woyamba wace
Genesis10:16 ndi Ajebusi
Genesis10:17 ndi Ahivi
Genesis10:18 ndi Aaravadi
Genesis10:19 Ndipo malire a Akanani anayamba pa Sidoni
Genesis10:20 Amenewa ndi ana amuna a Hamu monga mwa mabanja ao
Genesis10:21 Ndiponso kwa Semu atate wa ana onse a Ebere
Genesis10:22 Ana amuna a Semu; Elamu
Genesis10:23 Ndi ana a Aramu: Uzi ndi Huli
Genesis10:24 Aripakasadi ndipo anabala Sela; ndipo Sela anabala Ebere.
Genesis10:25 Kwa Ebere ndipo kunabadwa ana amuna awiri; dzina la wina ndi Pelege; cifukwa kuti m'masiku ace dziko lapansi linagawanikana; dzina la mphwace ndi Yokitani.
Genesis10:26 Ndipo Yokitani anabala Alamodadi
Genesis10:27 ndi Hadorimu ndi Uzali
Genesis10:28 ndi Obali
Genesis10:29 ndi Ofiri ndi Havila
Genesis10:30 Kwao kunayamba pa Mesa pakunka ku Sefere phiri la kum'mawa.
Genesis10:31 Amenewa ndi ana a Semu
Genesis10:32 Amenewo ndi mabanja a ana a Nowa monga mwa mibadwo yao
Genesis11:1 Ndipo dziko lapansi linali la cinenedwe cimodzi ndi cilankhulidwe cimodzi.
Genesis11:2 Ndipo panali pamene anayendayenda ulendo kum'mawa
Genesis11:3 Ndipo ananenana wina ndi wina
Genesis11:4 Ndipo anati
Genesis11:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsikira kudzaona mudzi ndi nsanja imene analinkumanga ana a anthu.
Genesis11:6 Ndipo Yehova anati
Genesis11:7 Tiyeni
Genesis11:8 Ndipo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi
Genesis11:9 Cifukwa cace anacha dzina lace Babele; pakuti kumeneko Yehova anasokoneza cinenedwe ca dziko lonse lapansi; kuyambira pamenepo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi.
Genesis11:10 Mibadwo ya Semu ndi iyi: Semu anali wa zaka zana limodzi ndipo anabala Aripakasadi
Genesis11:11 ndipo Semu anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana asanu

Genesis41:4 Ndipo ng'ombe zazikazi za maonekedwe oipa ndi zoonda zinadya ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri za maonekedwe abwino ndi zonenepazo. Ndipo Farao anauka.
Genesis41:5 Ndipo anagona nalotanso kaciwiri: ndipo taonani
Genesis41:6 Ndipo
Genesis41:7 Ndipo ngala zoondazo zinameza ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa ndi zodzalazo. Ndipo Farao anauka
Genesis41:8 Ndipo panali m'mamawa mtima wace unabvutidwa; ndipo anatumiza naitana amatsenga onse a m'Aigupto
Genesis41:9 Pamenepo wopereka cikho wamkuru anati kwa Farao
Genesis41:10 Farao anakwiya ndi anyamata ace
Genesis41:11 ndipo tinalota loto usiku umodzi ine ndi iye; tinalota munthu yense monga mwa kumasulira kwa loto lace.
Genesis41:12 Ndipo panali ndi ife mnyamata
Genesis41:13 Ndipo panali monga momwe iye anatimasulira
Genesis41:14 Ndipo Farao anatumiza nakaitana Yosefe; ndipo anamturutsa iye msanga m'dzenjemo: ndipo iye anameta
Genesis41:15 Farao ndipo anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:16 Ndipo Yosefe anayankha Farao kuti
Genesis41:17 Ndipo Farao ananena kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:18 ndipo taona
Genesis41:19 ndipo
Genesis41:20 ndipo ng'ombe zazikazi zoonda ndi za maonekedwe oipa zinadya ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa
Genesis41:21 Ndipo pamene zinadya sizinadziwika kuti zinadya; koma zinaipabe m'maonekedwe ao monga poyamba.
Genesis41:22 Pamenepo ndinauka. Ndipo ndinaona m'kulota kwanga
Genesis41:23 ndipo
Genesis41:24 ndipo ngala zoonda zinameza ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino; ndipo ndinafotokozera amatsenga: koma panalibe wondimasulira ine.
Genesis41:25 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa Farao
Genesis41:26 Ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis41:27 Ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zoonda ndi za maonekedwe oipa zinaturuka pambuyo pao ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis41:28 Ici ndi cinthu cimene ndinena kwa Farao: cimene Mulungu ati acite wasonyeza kwa Farao.
Genesis41:29 Taonani
Genesis41:30 ndipo pambuyo pao zidzauka zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala; ndipo anthu adzaiwala zocuruka zonsezo m'dziko la Aigupto; ndipo njala idzapululutsa dziko;
Genesis41:31 ndipo zocuruka sizidzazindikirika cifukwa ca njala ikudza m'mbuyoyo
Genesis41:32 Ndipo lotolo linabwezedwa kawiri kwa Farao
Genesis41:33 Tsopano
Genesis41:34 Farao acite cotere
Genesis41:35 Iwo asonkhanitse cakudya conse ca zaka zabwino izo zirinkudzazo
Genesis41:36 Ndipocakudyacocidzakhalam'dziko cosonkhera zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala imene idzakhala m'dziko la Aigupto; kuti dziko lisanonongedwe ndi njala.
Genesis41:37 Ndipo cinthuco cinali cabwino m'maso mwa Farao
Genesis41:38 Ndipo Farao anati kwa anyamata ace
Genesis41:39 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:40 Uziyang'anira pa nyumba yanga
Genesis41:41 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:42 Ndipo Farao anacotsa mphete yosindikizira yace pa dzanja lace
Genesis41:43 ndipo anamkweza iye m'gareta wace waciwiri amene anali naye: ndipo anapfuula patsogolo pa iye
Genesis41:44 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:45 Ndipo Farao anamucha dzina la Yosefe Zafenati-Panea; ndipo anampatsa akwatire Asenati mwana wamkazi wa Potifera wansembe wa Oni. Ndipo Yosefe anaturuka wolamulira
Genesis41:46 Ndipo Yosefe anali wa zaka makumi atatu pamene iye anaima pamaso pa Farao mfumu ya Aigupto
Genesis41:47 Ndipo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zakucuruka dzinthu nthaka inabala zambirimbiri.
Genesis41:48 Ndipo anasonkhanitsa cakudya conse ca zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri cimene cinali m'dziko la Aigupto
Genesis41:49 Ndipo Yosefe anasunga tirigu ngati mcenga wa panyanja
Genesis41:50 Ndipo kwa Yosefe anabadwa ana amuna awiri
Genesis41:51 Ndipo Yosefe anamucha dzina la woyamba Manase
Genesis41:52 Ndipo dzina la waciwiri anamucha Efraimu: cifukwa Mulungu anandibalitsa ine m'dziko la kusauka kwanga.
Genesis41:53 Ndipo zaka zakucuruka dzinthu zisanu ndi ziwiri za m'dziko la Aigupto
Genesis41:54 Ndipo zinayamba kufika zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala
Genesis41:55 Ndipo pamene dziko lonse la Aigupto linali ndi njala
Genesis41:56 Ndipo njala inali pa dziko lonse lapansi; ndipo Yosefe anatsegula nkhokwe zonse nagulitsa Aaigupto: ndipo njala inakula m'dziko la Aigupto.
Genesis41:57 Ndipo maiko onse anafika ku Aigupto kudzagula tirigu kwa Yosefe: cifukwa njala inakula m'dziko lonse lapansi.

Genesis49:30 m'phanga liri m'munda wa Makipela

Genesis49:33 Pamene Yakobo anatha kulangiza ana ace amuna
Genesis50:1 Ndipo Yosefe anagwapa nkhope ya atate wace
Genesis50:2 Ndipo Yosefe anauza akapolo ace asing'anga kutiakonze atate wace: ndi mankhwala osungira thupi: ndipo asing'anga anakonza Israyeli.
Genesis50:3 Ndipo anatha masiku ace makumi anai a iye; cifukwa comweco amatsiriza masiku akukonza thupi; ndipo Aaigupto anamlira iye masiki makumi asanu ndi awiri.
Genesis50:4 Atapita masiku akumlira iye Yosefe anati kwa mbumba ya Farao kuti
Genesis50:5 Atate wanga anandilumbi ritsa ine
Genesis50:6 Ndipo Farao anati
Genesis50:7 Ndipo Yosefe anapita kukaika atate wace; ndipo anakwera pamodzi ndi akapolo onse a Farao
Genesis50:8 ndi mbumba yonse ya Yosefe ndi abale ace
Genesis50:9 Ndipo anakwera pamodzi ndi iye magareta ndi apakavalo; ndipo panali khamc lalikuru.
Genesis50:10 Ndipo anafika pa dwale la Atadi
Genesis50:11 Ndipo pamene anthu okhala m'dzikomo; Akanani
Genesis50:12 Ndipo ana ace amuna anamcitira iye monga anawalamulira iwo;
Genesis50:13 cifukwa kuti ana ace amuna anamnyamula iye kulowa naye m'dziko la Kanani
Genesis50:14 Ndipo ataika atate wace
Genesis50:15 Ndipo pamene abale ace a Yosefe anaona kuti atate wao anafa
Genesis50:16 Ndipo anatumiza mthenga kwa Yosefe kuti
Genesis50:17 Muziti cotero kwa Yosefe
Genesis50:18 Ndiponso abale ace anamuka namgwadira pamaso pace; nati
Genesis50:19 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo
Genesis50:20 Koma inu

Genesis50:25 Ndipo Yosefe analumbiritsa ana a Israyeli kuti

Exodus12:2 Mwezi uno uzikhala kwa inu woyamba wa miyezi; muziuyesa mwezi woyamba wa caka.
Exodus12:3 Mulankhule ndi msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli ndi kuti
Exodus12:4 Banja likaperewera mwana wa nkhosa
Exodus12:5 Mwana wa nkhosa wanu azikhala wangwiro
Exodus12:6 Ndipo mukhale naye cisungire kufikira tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mwezi womwe; ndipo bungwe lonse la anthu a Israyeli lizimupha madzulo.
Exodus12:7 Ndipo azitengako mwazi
Exodus12:8 Ndipo azidya nyamayo usiku womwewo
Exodus12:9 Musaidya yaiwisi
Exodus12:10 Ndipo musasiyako kufikira m'mawa; koma yotsalira kufikira m'mawayo muipsereze ndi moto:
Exodus12:11 Ndipo muziidya cotero: okwinda m'cuuno
Exodus12:12 Pakuti ndidzapita pakati pa dziko la Aigupto usiku womwewo
Exodus12:13 Ndipo mwaziwo udzakhala cizindikilo kwa inu pa nyumba zimene mukhalamo; pamene ndiona mwaziwo ndidzapitirira inu
Exodus12:14 Ndipo tsiku lino lidzakhala kwa inu cikumbutso
Exodus12:15 Masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa; lingakhale tsiku loyamba muzicotsa cotupitsa m'nyumba zanu; pakuti ali yense wakudya mkate wa cotupitsa kuyambira tsiku loyamba kufikira tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri
Exodus12:16 Ndipo tsiku loyamba kukhale kusonkhana kopatulika
Exodus12:17 Ndipo muzisunga madyerero a mkate wopanda cotupitsa; pakuti tsiku lomwe lino ndinaturutsa makamu anu m'dziko la Aigupto; cifukwa cace muzisunga tsiku lino m'mibadwo yanu
Exodus12:18 Mwezi woyamba
Exodus12:19 Cisapezeke cotupitsa m'nyumba zanu masiku asanu ndi awiri; pakuti ali yense wakudya kanthu ka cotupitsa
Exodus12:20 Musadye kanthu ka cotupitsa; mokhala inu monse muzidya mkate wopandacotupitsa.
Exodus12:21 Pamenepo Mose anaitana akuru onse a Israyeli
Exodus12:22 Ndipo muzitenga mpukutu wa hisope
Exodus12:23 Pakuti Yehova adzapita pakatipo kukantha Aaigupto; koma pamene adzaona mwaziwo pa mphuthu pamwamba ndi za pambali

Exodus12:34 Ndipo anthu anatenga mtanda wao usanatupe

Exodus12:36 Ndipo Yehova anapatsa anthu cisomo pamaso pa Aaigupto

Exodus22:14 Munthu akabwereka cinthu kwa mnansi wace
Exodus22:15 Akakhalapo mwiniyo
Exodus22:16 Munthu akanyenga namwali wosapalidwa ubwenzi
Exodus22:17 Atate wace akakana konse kumpatsa iye
Exodus22:18 Wanyanga usamlola akhale ndi moyo.
Exodus22:19 Ali yense agona ndi coweta aphedwe ndithu.
Exodus22:20 Wakuphera nsembe mulungu wina
Exodus22:21 Ndipo usasautsa mlendo kapena kumpsinja; pakuti munali alendo m'dziko la Aigupto.
Exodus22:22 Musazunza mkazi wamasiye
Exodus22:23 Ukawazunza ndi kakuti konse
Exodus22:24 ndi mkwiyo wanga idzayaka
Exodus22:25 Ukakongoletsa ndalama anthu anga osauka okhala nanu
Exodus22:26 Ukati ulandire cikole kaya cobvala ca mnansi wako
Exodus22:27 popeza copfunda cace ndi ici cokha
Exodus22:28 Usapeputsa oweruza
Exodus22:29 Usacedwa kuperekako zipatso zako zocuruka
Exodus22:30 Uzitero nazo ng'ombe zako
Exodus22:31 Ndipo muzindikhalira Ine anthu opatulika; cifukwa cace musamadya nyama yojiwa kuthengo; itayireni agaru.
Exodus23:1 Usatola mbiri yopanda pace; usathandizana naye woipa ndi kukhala mboni yocititsa ciwawa.
Exodus23:2 Usatsata unyinji wa anthu kucita coipa; kapena usacita umboni kumlandu
Exodus23:3 kapena usakometsera munthu wosauka pa mlandu wace.
Exodus23:4 Ukakomana ndi ng'ombe kapena buru wa mdani wako zirimkusokera
Exodus23:5 Ukaona buru wa munthuwakudana nawe alikugona pansi ndi katundu wace
Exodus23:6 Usakhotetsa mlandu wa mnzako waumphawi.
Exodus23:7 Uzikhala kutali ndi mlandu wonama; ndipo usapha munthu wosacimwa ndi wolungama; pakuti sindidzayesa wolungama munthu woipa.
Exodus23:8 Usalandira cokometsera mlandu; pakuti cokometsera mlandu cidetsa maso a openya
Exodus23:9 Usampsinia mlendo; pakuti mudziwa mtima wa mlendo popeza munali alendo m'dziko la Aigupto.

Exodus23:11 koma caka cacisanu ndi ciwiri uuleke
Exodus23:12 Uzicita nchito yako masiku asanu ndi limodzi

Exodus23:14 Muzindicitira loe madyerero katatu m'caka.
Exodus23:15 Uzisunga madyerero a mkate wopanda cotupitsa; masiku asanu ndi awiri uzidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa
Exodus23:16 ndi madyerero a masika
Exodus23:17 Katatu m'caka amuna onse azioneka pamaso pa Ambuye Yehova.
Exodus23:18 Usapereka mwazi wa nsembe yanga pamodzi ndi mkate wacotupitsa; ndi mafuta a madyerero anga asagonamo kufikira m'mawa.
Exodus23:19 Uzibweca nazo zoyambayamba za m'munda mwako ku nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wako. Usaphike mwana wa mbuzi mu mkaka wa mace. Mulungu aloniezana nao za Kanani.

Exodus26:1 Ndipo uzipanga kacisi ndi nsaru zophimba khumi

Exodus27:15 Ndi pa mbali yina pakhale nsaru zocingira za mikono khumi ndi isanu; nsici zace zikhale zitatu

Exodus36:4 Ndipo aluso onse
Exodus36:5 nanena ndi Mose

Exodus36:7 Popeza zipangizo zinakwanira nchito yonse icitike
Exodus36:8 Ndipo onse a mtima waluso mwa iwo akucita nchitoyi anapanga kacisi ndi nsaru zophimba khumi; anaziomba ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa
Exodus36:9 Utali wace wa nsaru yophimba imodzi ndiwo mikono makumi awiri kudza isanu ndi itatu
Exodus36:10 Ndipo analumikiza nsaru zisanu yina ndi inzace; nalumikiza nsaru zisanu zina yina ndi inzace.
Exodus36:11 Ndipo anaika magango ansaru yamadzi m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru imodzi ku mkawo wa cilumikizano; nacita momwemo m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru ya kuthungo
Exodus36:12 Anaika magango makumi asanu pa nsaru imodzi

Exodus36:14 Ndipo anaomba nsaru zophimba za ubweya wa mbuzi zikhale hema pamwamba pa kacisi; anaomba nsaru zophimba khumi ndi imodzi.

Exodus36:26 makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi

Exodus37:19 pa mphanda imodzi panali zikho zitatu zopangika ngati katungurume
Exodus37:20 Ndipo pa coikapo nyali comwe panali zikho zinai zopangika ngati katungurume

Exodus38:16 Nsaru zocingira zonse za pabwalo pozungulira zinali za bafuta wa thonje losansitsa.

Exodus38:19 Ndi nsici zace zinali zinai
Exodus38:20 Ndi ziciri zonse za cihema
Exodus38:21 Ici ndi ciwerengo ca zinthu za cihema

Exodus38:23 Ndi pamodzi naye Aholiabu

Exodus38:26 munthu mmodzi anapereka beka

Exodus38:28 Ndipo anapanga zokowera za mizati nsanamira ndi nsici ndi masekeli aja cikwi cimodzi kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu asanu
Exodus38:29 Ndi mkuwa wa coperekaco ndiwo matalente makumi asanu ndi awiri

Exodus38:31 ndi makamwa a pabwalo pozungulira

Exodus40:2 Tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba ukautse kacisi wa cihema cokomanako.
Exodus40:3 Ndipo ukaikemo likasa la mboni
Exodus40:4 Ulongenso gomelo
Exodus40:5 Ndipo ukaike guwa la nsembe lofukizapo lazolidi cakuno ca likasa la mboni
Exodus40:6 Ndipo ukaike guwa la nsembe yopsereza kunja kwa khomo la kacisi wa cihema cokomanako.
Exodus40:7 Ukaikenso mkhate pakati pa cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:8 Ndipo ukamange mpandawo pozungulira
Exodus40:9 Pamenepo ukatenge mafuta odzoza
Exodus40:10 Ndipo udzoze guwa la nsembe yopsereza
Exodus40:11 Udzozenso mkhate ndi tsinde lace
Exodus40:12 Ndipo ubwere nao Aroni ndi ana ace amuna ku khomo la cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:13 Nubveke Aroni cobvala zopatulikazo; ndi kumdzoza
Exodus40:14 Ndipo ubwere nao ana ace amuna ndi kuwabveka maraya am'kati;
Exodus40:15 nuwadzoze
Exodus40:16 Anatero Mose; monga mwa zonse Yehova adamuuza
Exodus40:17 Ndipo kunali
Exodus40:18 Ndipo Mose anautsa kacisi
Exodus40:19 Ndipo anayalika hema pamwamba pa kacisi
Exodus40:20 Ndipo anatenga mboniyo
Exodus40:21 nalowa nalo likasa m'kacisi
Exodus40:22 Ndipo anaika gomelo m'cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:23 Nakonzerapo mkate pamaso pa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose.
Exodus40:24 Ndipo anaika coikapo nyali m'cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:25 Nayatsa nyalizo pamaso pa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose.
Exodus40:26 Ndipo anaika guwa la nsembe lagolidi m'cihema cokomanako cakuno ca nsaru yocinga;
Exodus40:27 nafukizapo cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose.
Exodus40:28 Ndipo anapacika kukacisi nsaru yotsekera pakhomo.
Exodus40:29 Ndipo anaika guwa la nsembe yopsereza pa khomo la kacisi wa cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:30 Ndipo anaika mkhate pakati pa cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:31 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ndi ana ace amuna anasamba manja ao ndi mapazi ao m'menemo;
Exodus40:32 pakulowa iwo m'cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:33 Ndipo anautsa mpanda pozungulira pa cihema ndi guwa la nsembe
Exodus40:34 Pamenepo mtambo unaphimba cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:35 Ndipo Mose sanathe kulowa m'cihema cokomanako
Exodus40:36 Ndipo pakukwera mtambo kucokera kukacisi
Exodus40:37 koma ukapanda kukwera mtambo
Exodus40:38 Pakuti mtambo wa Yehova unakhala pakacisi msana
Leviticus1:1 NDIPO Yehova anaitana Mose
Leviticus1:2 Lankhula ndi ana a lsrayeli
Leviticus1:3 Copereka cace cikakhala nsembe yopsereza ya ng'ombe
Leviticus1:4 Ndipo aike dzanja lace pamutu pa nsembe yopsereza; ndipo idzalandiridwa m'malo mwace
Leviticus1:5 Pamenepo aiphe ng'ombeyo pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo ana a Aroni
Leviticus1:6 Ndipo asende nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus1:7 Ndipo ana a Aroni asonkhe mota pa guwa la nsembe
Leviticus1:8 ndi ana a Aroni
Leviticus1:9 koma atsuke ndi madzi matumbo ace ndi miyendo yace; ndi wansembe atenthe zonsezi pa guwa la nsembe
Leviticus1:10 Ndipo copereka cace cikakhala ca nkhosa
Leviticus1:11 Ndipo aiphere iyo pa mbali ya kumpoto ya guwa la nsembe
Leviticus1:12 Ndipo aikadzule ziwalo zace
Leviticus1:13 Koma atsuke ndi madzi matumbo ndi miyendo; ndi wansembe abwere nazo zonse nazitenthe pa guwa la nsembe; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus1:14 Ndipo copereka cace ca kwa Yehova cikakhala nsembe yopsereza ya mbalame
Leviticus1:15 Ndipo wansembe abwere naco ku guwa la nsembe
Leviticus1:16 nacotse citsokomero
Leviticus1:17 nang'ambe mapiko ace osawacotsa konse ai; ndipo wansembeyo aitenthe pa guwa la nsembe
Leviticus2:1 Ndipo munthu akabwera naco copereka ndico nsembe yaufa ya kwa Yehova
Leviticus2:2 Ndipo abwere nayo kwa ana a Aroni
Leviticus2:3 Ndipo cotsalira ca nsembe yaufa cikhale ca Aroni ndi ana ace; ndico copatulikitsa ca nsembe zamoto za Yehova.
Leviticus2:4 Ndipo ukabwera naco copereka ndico nsembe yaufa
Leviticus2:5 Ndipo nsembe yaufa yako ikakhala yokazinga m'ciwaya
Leviticus2:6 Uphwanye
Leviticus2:7 Ndipo copereka cako cikakhala nsembe yaufa ya mumphika
Leviticus2:8 Ndipo ubwere nayo nsembe yaufa yopangika ndi izi kwa Yehova; ndipo atabwera naco kwa wansembe
Leviticus2:9 Ndipo wansembeyo atengeko cikumbutso pa nsembe yaufa
Leviticus2:10 Ndipo cotsalira ca nsembe yaufa cikhale ca Aroni ndi ana ace; ndico copatulikitsa ca nsembe zamoto za Yehova.
Leviticus2:11 Nsembe iri yonse yaufa
Leviticus2:12 Monga copereka ca zipatso zoyamba muzipereka izi: koma asazifukize pa guwa la nsembe zicite pfungo lokoma.
Leviticus2:13 Ndipo copereka cako ciri conse ca nsembe yaufa uzicikoleretsa ndi mcere; usasowe mcere wa cipangano ca Mulungu wako pa nsembe yako yaufa; pa zopereka zako zonse uzipereka mcere.
Leviticus2:14 Ndipo ukabwera nayo nsembe yaufa ya zipatso zoyamba kwa Yehova
Leviticus2:15 Ndipo uthirepo mafuta
Leviticus2:16 Ndipo wansembe atenthe cikumbutso cace

Leviticus7:2 Pamalo pophera nsembe yopsereza ndipo aziphera nsembe yoparamula; nawaze mwazi wace pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira.
Leviticus7:3 Ndipo acotseko
Leviticus7:4 ndi imso ziwiri
Leviticus7:5 ndipo wansembe atenthe izi pa guwa la nsembe
Leviticus7:6 Amuna onse a mwa ansembe adyeko; adyere m'malo opatulika; ndiyo yopatulikitsa.
Leviticus7:7 Monga nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus7:8 Ndipo cikopa ca nsembe yopsereza cikhale cace cace ca wansembe
Leviticus7:9 Ndipo nsembe zaufa zonse zophika mumcembo
Leviticus7:10 Ndipo nsembe zonse zaufa zosanganiza ndi mafuta
Leviticus7:11 Ndipo cilamulo ca nsembe zoyamika
Leviticus7:12 akabwera nayo kuti ikhale nsembe yolemekeza
Leviticus7:13 Abwere naco copereka cace pamodzi ndi timitanda ta mkate wacotupitsa
Leviticus7:14 Ndipo pa zopereka zonsezi atengepo ndi kubwera nako kamtanda kamodzi
Leviticus7:15 Kunena za nyama ya nsembe volemekeza ya nsembe zoyamika zace
Leviticus7:16 Koma nsembe ya copereka cace ikakhala ya cowinda
Leviticus7:17 koma cotsalira pa nyama ya nsembeyo tsiku lacitatu
Leviticus7:18 Ndipo akadyako nyama ya nsembe zoyamika zace tsiku lacitatu
Leviticus7:19 Ndipo nyama yokhudza kanthu kali konse kodetsa isadyeke; aitenthe ndi moto. Koma za nyama yina

Leviticus7:24 Ndipo mafuta a iyo idafa yokha

Leviticus7:26 Ndipo musamadya mwazi uti wonse
Leviticus7:27 Ali yense akadya mwazi uti wonse

Leviticus7:29 Lankhula ndi ana a Israyeli
Leviticus7:30 adze nazo m'manja mwace nsembe zamoto za Yehova; adze nao mafuta pamodzi ndi nganga
Leviticus7:31 Ndipo wansembeyo atenthe mafutawo pa guwa la nsembe; koma ngangayo ikhale ya Arent ndi ana ace.
Leviticus7:32 Ndipo mwendo wathako wa ku dzanja lamanja muupereke kwa wansembe

Leviticus8:2 Tenga Aroni ndi ana ace pamodzi naye ndi zobvalazo

Leviticus8:4 Ndipo Mose anacita monga Yehova anamuuza; ndi khamulo linasonkhana pa khomo la cihema cokomanako.
Leviticus8:5 Ndipo Mose anati kwa msonkhanowo
Leviticus8:6 Ndipo Mose anabwera nao Aroni ndi ana ace
Leviticus8:7 Ndipo anambveka ndi maraya a m'kati
Leviticus8:8 Ndipo anamuika capacifuwa; naika m'capacifuwa Urimu ndi Tumimu.
Leviticus8:9 Naika nduwirayo pamutu pace; ndi panduwira
Leviticus8:10 Ndipo Mose anatenga mafuta odzoza

Leviticus8:13 Ndipo Mose anatenga ana a Aroni
Leviticus8:14 Ndipo anabwera nayo ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo; ndipo Aroni ndi ana ace amuna anaika manja ao pa mutu wa ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo.
Leviticus8:15 Ndipo anaipha; ndi Mose anatenga mwaziwo
Leviticus8:16 Ndipo anatenga mafuta onse a pamatumbo
Leviticus8:17 Koma ng'ombeyo
Leviticus8:18 Ndipo anabwera nayo nkhosa yamphongo ya nsembe yopsereza; ndipo Aroni ndi ana ace amuna anaika manja ao pamutu pa mphongoyo.
Leviticus8:19 Ndipo anaipha; ndi Mose anawaza mwazi wace pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira.
Leviticus8:20 Ndipo anapadzula mphongoyo ziwalo zace; ndi Mose anatentha mutuwo ndi ziwalo
Leviticus8:21 Koma anatsuka matumbo ndi miyendo ndi madzi; ndi Mose anatentha mphongo yonse pa guwa la nsembe; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza yocita pfungo lokoma; ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya kwa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose.
Leviticus8:22 Ndipo anabwera nayo nkhosa yamphongo yinayo
Leviticus8:23 Ndipo anaipha; ndi Mose anatengako mwazi wace naupaka pa ndewerere ya khutu la ku dzanja lamanja la Aroni
Leviticus8:24 Pamenepo anabwera nao ana amuna a Aroni
Leviticus8:25 Ndipo anatenga mafutawo ndi mcira wamafuta
Leviticus8:26 ndipo mu mtanga wa mkate wopanda cotupitsa wokhala pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus8:27 anaika zonsezi m'manja mwa Aroni
Leviticus8:28 Pamenepo Mose anazicotsa ku manja ao
Leviticus8:29 Ndipo Mose anatenga ngangayo naiweyula
Leviticus8:30 Ndipo Mose anatengako mafuta odzoza
Leviticus8:31 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ace amuna
Leviticus8:32 Koma cotsalira ca nyama ndi mkate mucitenthe ndi moto.
Leviticus8:33 Ndipo musaturuka pa khomo la cihema cokomanako masiku asanu ndi awiri
Leviticus8:34 Monga anacita lero lino
Leviticus8:35 Ndipo mukhale pakhomo pa cihema cokomanako masiku asanu ndi awiri
Leviticus8:36 Ndipo Aroni ndi ana ace amuna anacita zonse zimene Yehova anauza pa dzanja la Mose.

Leviticus10:10 ndi kuti musiyanitse pakati pa copatulika ndi cosapatulika
Leviticus10:11 ndi kuti muphunzitse ana a Israyeli malemba onse amene Yehova analankhula nao ndi dzanja la Mose.

Leviticus10:13 ndipo muziidyera kumalo kopatulika

Leviticus10:15 Mwendo wokweza
Leviticus10:16 Ndipo Mose anafunafuna mbuzi ya nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus10:17 Ndipo anapsa mtima pa Eleazara ndi Itamara
Leviticus10:18 Taonani
Leviticus10:19 Ndipo Aroni analankhula ndi Mose
Leviticus10:20 Pamene Mose adamva ici cidamkomera pamaso pace.
Leviticus11:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni
Leviticus11:2 Nenani ndi ana a Israyeli
Leviticus11:3 Nyama iri yonse yogawanika ciboda
Leviticus11:4 Koma izi zokha simuyenera kuzidya mwa zobzikulazo
Leviticus11:5 Ndi mbira
Leviticus11:6 Ndi kalulu
Leviticus11:7 Ndi nkhumba
Leviticus11:8 Nyama yace musamaidya
Leviticus11:9 Mwa zonse ziri m'madzi muyenera kumadya izi: ziri zonse ziti nazo zipsepse ndi mamba m'madzi
Leviticus11:10 Koma ziti zonse ziribe zipsepse ndi mamba m'nyanja
Leviticus11:11 inde muziyese zonyansa; musamadya nyama zao; mitembo yao zikunyansireni.
Leviticus11:12 Ziri zonse zopanda zipsepse kapena mamba m'madzimo muziyese zonyansa.
Leviticus11:13 Ndipo mwa mbalame muziziyesa zonyansa izi; siziyenera kuzidya
Leviticus11:14 ndi muimba
Leviticus11:15 kungubwi mwa mtundu wace;
Leviticus11:16 ndi nthiwatiwa
Leviticus11:17 ndi nkhutunkhutu ndi nswankhono ndi mancici;
Leviticus11:18 tsekwe
Leviticus11:19 indwa
Leviticus11:20 Zokwawa zonse zakuuluka zokhala ndi miyendo inai
Leviticus11:21 Koma muyenera kudya izi mwa zokwawa zonse zakuuluka
Leviticus11:22 dzombe mwa mtundu wace
Leviticus11:23 Koma zokwawa zonse zakuuluka
Leviticus11:24 Ndipo izi zikudetsani: ali yense akhudza mtembo wace adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo;
Leviticus11:25 ndipo ali yense akanyamulako nyama ya mtembo wace azitsuka zobvala zace
Leviticus11:26 Nyama iri yonse yakugawanika ciboda
Leviticus11:27 Ndipo iri yonse iyenda yopanda ciboda mwa zamoyo zonse za miyendo inai
Leviticus11:28 Ndipo iye amene akanyamula mtembo wace atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus11:29 Ndipo izi ndi zimene muziziyesa zodetsedwa mwa zinthu zokwawa zakukwawa pansi; likongwe
Leviticus11:30 ndi gondwa
Leviticus11:31 Izi ndi zimene muziyese zodetsa
Leviticus11:32 Ndipo ciri conse cakufa ca izi cikagwera kanthu
Leviticus11:33 Ndipo ciri conse ca izi cikagwa m'cotengera ciri conse cadothi
Leviticus11:34 Cakudya ciri conse cokhala m'mwemo
Leviticus11:35 Ndipo kanthu ka mtembo wace kakagwa pa zinthu ziri zonse zidzakhala zodetsedwa; ngakhale mcembo kapena mphika wobvundikika
Leviticus11:36 Koma kasupe kapena citsime muli madzi
Leviticus11:37 Ndipo kanthu ka mtembo wace kakagwa pa mbeu yofesa
Leviticus11:38 Koma akathira madzi pa mbeuyi
Leviticus11:39 Ndipo ikafa nyama yakudya
Leviticus11:40 Ndipo iye wakudya kanthu ka mtembo wace azitsuka zobvala zace
Leviticus11:41 Ndipozokwawazonsezakukwawa pa dziko lapansi zikhale zonyansa; musamazidya.
Leviticus11:42 Zonse zoyenda cafufumimba
Leviticus11:43 Musamadzinyansitsa ndi cokwawa ciri conse cakukwawa
Leviticus11:44 Pakuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu; potero dzipatuleni
Leviticus11:45 Pakuti Ine ndine Yehova amene ndinakukwezani kukuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto
Leviticus11:46 Ici ndi cilamulo ca nyama
Leviticus11:47 kusiyanitsa pakati zodetsa ndi zoyera
Leviticus12:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus12:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli
Leviticus12:3 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu adule khungu la mwanayo.
Leviticus12:4 Ndipo akhale m'mwazi wa kumyeretsa kwace masiku makumi atatu kudza atatu; asakhudze kanthu kopatulika
Leviticus12:5 Koma akabala mwana wamkazi
Leviticus12:6 Ndipo atakwanira masiku a kumyeretsa kwace pa mwana wamwamuna
Leviticus12:7 ndipo iye abwere nayo pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus12:8 Ici ndi cilamulo ca kwa iye wakubala
Leviticus13:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni
Leviticus13:2 Ngati munthu ali naco cotupa
Leviticus13:3 ndipo wansembe aione nthenda pa khungu la thupi; ndipo ngati tsitsi la panthenda lasanduka la mbu
Leviticus13:4 Koma ngati cikanga cikhala cotuwa pa khungu la thupi lace
Leviticus13:5 ndipo wansembe amuonenso tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri; ndipo taonani
Leviticus13:6 ndipo wansembe amuonenso tsikulacisanu ndi ciwiri
Leviticus13:7 koma nkhanambo ikapitirira khungu
Leviticus13:8 ndipo wansembe aone
Leviticus13:9 Pamene nthenda yakhate iri mwa munthu
Leviticus13:10 ndipo wansembe aone
Leviticus13:11 ndilo khate lakale pa khungu la thupi lace
Leviticus13:12 Ndipo ngati khate libukabuka pakhungu
Leviticus13:13 pamenepo wansembe aone
Leviticus13:14 Koma tsiku liri lonse ukaoneka pa iye mnofu wofiira
Leviticus13:15 Ndipo wansembe aone mnofu wofiirawo
Leviticus13:16 Kapena mnofu wofiira ukasandukanso
Leviticus13:17 ndi wansembe amuone
Leviticus13:18 Ndipo pamene thupi liri ndi cironda pakhungu pace
Leviticus13:19 ndipo padali cironda pali cotupa coyera
Leviticus13:20 ndipo taonani
Leviticus13:21 Koma wansembe akaciona
Leviticus13:22 ndipo ngati capitirira khungu
Leviticus13:23 Koma ngati cikanga caima pomwepo
Leviticus13:24 Kapena pamene thupi lidapsya ndi mota pakhungu pace
Leviticus13:25 pamenepo wansembe acione; ndipo taonani
Leviticus13:26 Koma akaonapo wansembe
Leviticus13:27 ndipo wansembe amuone tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri; ngati cakula pakhungu
Leviticus13:28 Ndipo ngati cikanga ciima pomwepo
Leviticus13:29 Ndipo ngati mwamuna kapena mkazi ali ndi nthenda pamutu kapena pandebvu
Leviticus13:30 wansembe aziona nthenda; ndipo taonani
Leviticus13:31 Ndipo wansembe akaona nthenda yamfundu
Leviticus13:32 ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri wansembe aone nthendayi; ndipo taonani
Leviticus13:33 pamenepo azimeta
Leviticus13:34 ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri aone mfunduyo; ndipo taonani
Leviticus13:35 Koma ngati mfundu ikula pakhungu atachedwa woyera;
Leviticus13:36 pamenepo wansembe amuone
Leviticus13:37 Koma monga momwe apenyera iye
Leviticus13:38 Ndipo ngati mwamuna kapena mkazi ali ndi zikanga pa khungu la thupi lace
Leviticus13:39 wansembe aziona; ndipo taonani ngati zikanga ziri pa khungu la thupi lao zikhala zotuwatuwa; ndilo thuza labuka pakhungu; ndiye woyera.
Leviticus13:40 Ndipo ngati tsitsi la munthu lathothoka
Leviticus13:41 Ndipo ngati tsitsi lathothoka pamphumi pace ndiye wa masweswe
Leviticus13:42 Koma ngati pali nthenda yotuuluka pakati pa dazi lace la pamutu
Leviticus13:43 Pamenepo wansembe azimuona
Leviticus13:44 ndiye wakhate
Leviticus13:45 Ndipo azing'amba zobvala zace za wakhate ali ndi nthendayo
Leviticus13:46 Masiku onse nthenda ikali pa iye azikhala wodetsedwa; ali wodetsedwa
Leviticus13:47 Ndiponso ngati nthenda yakhate iri pa cobvala caubweya
Leviticus13:48 ngakhale iri pamuyaro
Leviticus13:49 ngati nthenda iri yobiriwira
Leviticus13:50 ndipo wansembe aone nthendayo
Leviticus13:51 naone nthenda tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri; ngati nthenda yakula pacobvala
Leviticus13:52 Ndipo atenthe cobvalaco ngakhale muyaro wace
Leviticus13:53 Ndipo wansembe akaona
Leviticus13:54 pamenepo wansembe aziuza kuti atsuke cija pali khate
Leviticus13:55 ndipo wansembe aone nthenda ataitsuka
Leviticus13:56 Ndipo wansembe akaona
Leviticus13:57 ndipo ikaonekabe pacobvala
Leviticus13:58 Ndipo ukatsuka cobvalaco
Leviticus13:59 Ici ndi cilamulo ca nthenda yakhate iri pa cobvala caubweya kapena cathonje
Leviticus14:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose nati
Leviticus14:2 Cilamulo ca wakhate tsiku la kumyeretsa kwace ndi ici: azidza naye kwa wansembe;
Leviticus14:3 ndipo wansembe aturuke kumka kunja kwa cigono; ndipo wansembe aone
Leviticus14:4 pamenepo wansembe auze kuti amtengere iye wakuti akonzedwe
Leviticus14:5 ndipo wansembe auze kuti aphe mbalame imodzi m'mbale yadothi pamwamba pa madzi oyenda;
Leviticus14:6 natenge nbalame yamoyo
Leviticus14:7 nawaze kasanu ndi kawiri iye amene akuti amyeretse khate lace
Leviticus14:8 Ndipo iye wakutiayeretsedwe atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus14:9 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri kudzakhala kuti amete tsitsi lace lonse la pamutu pace
Leviticus14:10 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu atenge ana a nkhosa awiri
Leviticus14:11 Ndipo wansembe amene amyeretsayo
Leviticus14:12 ndipo wansembe atenge mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wamwamuna
Leviticus14:13 Ndipo akaphere mwana wa nkhosa wamwamuna paja amapherapo nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus14:14 Ndipo wansembe atengeko mwazi wa nsembe yoparamula
Leviticus14:15 ndipo wansembe atengeko muyeso wa mafuta
Leviticus14:16 ndipo wansembe abviike cala cace ca dzanja lace lamanja ca iye mwini m'mafuta ali m'dzanja lace lamanzere
Leviticus14:17 ndipo wansembe apakeko mafuta okh a ria m'dzanja lace pa ndewerere ya khutu la ku dzanja lamanja la iye wakuti ayeretsedwe
Leviticus14:18 natsitsitize mafuta otsala m'dzanja lace la wansembe
Leviticus14:19 Ndipo wansembe apereke nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus14:20 ndipo wansembe atenthe nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus14:21 Ndipo akakhala waumphawi cosafikana cuma cace azitenga mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wamwamuna akhale nsembe yoparamula
Leviticus14:22 ndi njiwa ziwiri
Leviticus14:23 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu abwere nao kwa wansembe
Leviticus14:24 Ndipo wansembe atenge mwana wa nkhosa wa nsembe yoparamula
Leviticus14:25 naphe mwana wa nkhosa wa nsembe yoparamula
Leviticus14:26 ndipo wansembe athireko mafuta aja m'cikhato cace camanzere ca iye mwini;
Leviticus14:27 ndipo wansembe awazeko mafuta aja ali m'dzanja lace lamanzere ndi cala cace ca dzanja lamanja
Leviticus14:28 ndipo wansembe apakeko mafuta aja ali m'dzanja lace pa ndewerere ya khutu la ku dzanja lamanja la iye wakuti ayeretsedwe
Leviticus14:29 ndipo mafuta otsala m'dzanja la wansembe atsitsitize pa mutu wa iye wakuti ayeretsedwe
Leviticus14:30 Ndipo iye apereke imodzi ya njiwazo
Leviticus14:31 ndipo wansembe amcitire comtetezera pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus14:32 Ici ndi cilamulo ca iye ali ndi nthenda yakhate
Leviticus14:33 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni
Leviticus14:34 Mutakafika m'dziko la Kanani
Leviticus14:35 pamenepo mwini nyumbayo adzauze wansembe
Leviticus14:36 Ndipo wansembe aziuza kuti aturutse zonse za m'nyumba
Leviticus14:37 naone nthendayo
Leviticus14:38 pamenepo wansembe azituruka ku khomo la nyumba
Leviticus14:39 ndipo wansembe abwerenso tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri
Leviticus14:40 pamenepo wansembe auze kuti agumule miyalayi pali nthenda
Leviticus14:41 napalitse nyumba m'kati monsemo
Leviticus14:42 natenge miyala yina
Leviticus14:43 Ndipo ikabweranso nthenda
Leviticus14:44 pamenepo wansembe alowe naonemo
Leviticus14:45 Ndipo apasule nyumbayo
Leviticus14:46 Ndiponso iye wakulowa m'nyumba masiku ace iriyotsekedwa
Leviticus14:47 Ndipo iye wakugona m'nyumbayo atsuke zobvala zace; ndi iye wakudya m'nyumbayo atsuke zobvala zace.
Leviticus14:48 Ndipo wansembe akalowa
Leviticus14:49 Pamenepo atenge mbalame ziwiri
Leviticus14:50 naphe mbalame imodzi m'mbale yadothi
Leviticus14:51 natenge mtengo wamkungudza ndi hisope
Leviticus14:52 nayeretsenyumbandi mwazi wa mbalame
Leviticus14:53 Koma ataye mbalame yamoyo kunja kwa mudzi kuthengo koyera; motero aicitire coitetezera nyumbayo; ndipo idzakhala yoyera.
Leviticus14:54 Ici ndi cilamulo ca nthenda iri yonse yakhate
Leviticus14:55 ndi ya khate la cobvala
Leviticus14:56 ndi yacotupa
Leviticus14:57 kulangiza tsiku loti cikhala codetsa
Leviticus15:1 Mose ndi Aroni
Leviticus15:2 Nenani nao ana a Israyeli
Leviticus15:3 Ndipo kudetsedwa kwa kukha kwace ndiko: ngakhale cakukhaco cituruka m'thupi mwace
Leviticus15:4 Kama ali yense agonapo wakukhayo ali wodetsedwa; ndi cinthu ciri conse acikhalira ciri codetsedwa.
Leviticus15:5 Ndipo munthu ali yense wakukhudza kama wace azitsuka zobvala zace
Leviticus15:6 Ndipo iye wakukhalira cinthu ciri conse adacikhalira wakukhayo atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus15:7 Ndipo iye wakukhudza thupi la uyo wakukhayo atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus15:8 Ndipo wakukhayo akalabvulira wina woyera; pamenepo atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus15:9 Ndipo mbereko iri yonse akwerapo wakukhayo iri yodetsedwa.
Leviticus15:10 Ndipo munthu ali yense akakhudza kanthu kali konse kadali pansi pace adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo; ndipo iye wakunyamula zimenezo atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus15:11 Ndipo munthu ali yense wakukhayo akamkhudza
Leviticus15:12 Ndipo zotengera zadothi wazikhudza wakukhayo
Leviticus15:13 Ndipo wakukhayo atayeretsedwa ku kukha kwace
Leviticus15:14 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu atenge njiwa ziwiri
Leviticus15:15 ndipo wansembe azipereke izo
Leviticus15:16 Ndipo munthu ali yense akagona uipa
Leviticus15:17 Ndipo cobvala ciri conse
Leviticus15:18 Mkazi yemwe
Leviticus15:19 Ndipo ngati mkazi ali ndi nthenda yakukha
Leviticus15:20 Ndipo cinthu ciri conse agonapo pokhala ali padera ncodetsedwa; ndi cinthu ciri conse akhalapo ncodetsa.
Leviticus15:21 Ndipo ali yense akhudza kama wace azitsuka zobvala zace
Leviticus15:22 Ndipo ali yense akhudza cinthu ciri conse akhalapo iye
Leviticus15:23 Ndipo cikakhala pakama
Leviticus15:24 Ndipo ngati mwamuna ali yense agona naye
Leviticus15:25 Ndipo mkazi akakhala ndi kukha mwazi masiku ambiri
Leviticus15:26 Kama ali yense agonapo masiku a kukha kwace akhale ngati kama wa kuoloka kwace; ndi cinthu ciri conse akhalapo ciri codetsedwa
Leviticus15:27 Ndipo munthu ali yense akakhudza zimenezi adzakhala wodetsedwa
Leviticus15:28 Koma akayeretsedwa kukha kwace
Leviticus15:29 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu atenge njiwa ziwiri
Leviticus15:30 Ndipo wansembe apereke limodzi likhale nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus15:31 Motero muzipatula ana a Israyeli kwa kudetsedwa kwao; angafe m'kudetsedwa kwao
Leviticus15:32 Ici ndi cilamulo ca wakukha
Leviticus15:33 ndi ca mkazi alinkudwala ndi kudetsedwa kwace
Leviticus16:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus16:2 ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Leviticus16:3 Aroni azilowa pa bwalo la malo opatulika nazozo: ng'ombe yamphongo ikhale ya nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus16:4 Abvale maraya a m'kati a bafuta wopatulika
Leviticus16:5 Ndipo ku khama la ana a Israyeli atenge atonde awiri akhale a nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus16:6 Ndipo Aroni abwere nayo ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus16:7 Ndipo atenge mbuzi ziwirizo naziimike pamaso pa Yehova pakhomo pa cihema cokomanako.
Leviticus16:8 Ndipo Aroniayesemaere pa mbuzi ziwirizo; maere amodzi kwa Yehova
Leviticus16:9 Ndipo Aroni abwere nayo mbuzi imene adaigwera maere a Yehova
Leviticus16:10 Koma mbuzi imene adaigwera maere a Azazeli
Leviticus16:11 Ndipo Aroni abwere nayo ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus16:12 natenge mbale ya zofukiza yodzala ndi makara amoto
Leviticus16:13 naike cofukizaco pamoto pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus16:14 Ndipo atengeko mwazi wa ng'ombeyo
Leviticus16:15 Pamenepo aiphe mbuzi ya nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus16:16 nacitire cotetezera malo opatulika
Leviticus16:17 Ndipo musakhale munthu m'cihema cokomanako pakulowa iye kucita cotetezera m'malo opatulika
Leviticus16:18 Ndipo aturukire guwa la nsembe lokhala pamaso pa Yehova ndi kulicitira cotetezera; natengeko mwazi wa ng'ombeyo
Leviticus16:19 Ndipo awazepo mwazi wina ndi cala cace kasanu ndi katatu; ndi kuliyeretsa ndi kulipatula kulicotsera zodetsa za ana a Israyeli.
Leviticus16:20 Ndipo atatha kucitira cotetezera malo opatulika
Leviticus16:21 ndipo Aroni aike manja ace onse awiri pamutu pa mbuzi yamoyo
Leviticus16:22 ndi mbuziyo isenze yokha mphulupulu zonsezo kumka nazo ku dziko la pa lokha; ndipo azitaya mbuziyo m'cipululu.
Leviticus16:23 Pamenepo Aroni alowe m'cihema cokomanako
Leviticus16:24 Ndipo asambe thupi lace ndi madzi kumalo kopatulika
Leviticus16:25 Ndipo atenthe mafuta a nsembe yaucimo pa guwa la nsembe.
Leviticus16:26 Ndipo iye amene anacotsa mbuzi ipite kwa Azazeli atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus16:27 Koma ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo
Leviticus16:28 Ndi iye amene anazitentha atsuke zobvala zace
Leviticus16:29 Ndipo lizikhala kwa Inu lemba Ilosatha; mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri
Leviticus16:30 popeza tsikuli adzacitira inu cotetezera
Leviticus16:31 Likhale kwa inu sabata lakupumula
Leviticus16:32 Ndipo wansembe
Leviticus16:33 Ndipo acite cotetezera malo opatulikatu
Leviticus16:34 Ndipo ici cikhale kwa inu lemba losatha
Leviticus17:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus17:2 Nena ndi Aroni
Leviticus17:3 Munthu ali yense wa mbumba ya Israyeli akapha ng'ombe
Leviticus17:4 osadza nayo ku khomo la cihema cokomanako
Leviticus17:5 kotero kuti ana a Israyeli azidza nazo nsembe zao
Leviticus17:6 Ndipo wansembeyo awaze mwaziwo pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova
Leviticus17:7 Ndipo asamapheranso ziwanda nsembe zao
Leviticus17:8 Ndipo uzinena nao
Leviticus17:9 osadza nayo ku khomo la cihema cokomanako
Leviticus17:10 Ndipo munthu ali yense wa mbumba ya Israyeli
Leviticus17:11 Pakuti moyo wa nyama ukhala m'mwazi; ndipo ndakupatsani uwu pa guwa la nsembe
Leviticus17:12 Cifukwa cace ndinanena kwa ana a Israyeli
Leviticus17:13 Ndipo munthu ali yense wa ana a Israyeli
Leviticus17:14 Pakuti ndiwo moyo wa: nyama zonse
Leviticus17:15 Ndipo ali yense wakudya yakufa yokha
Leviticus17:16 Koma akapanda kuzitsuka
Leviticus18:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus18:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli
Leviticus18:3 Musamacita monga mwa macitidwe a dziko la Aigupto muja munakhalamo; musamacita monga mwa macitidwe a dziko la Kanani kumene ndipita nanuko
Leviticus18:4 Muzicita maweruzo anga
Leviticus18:5 Inde
Leviticus18:6 Asasendere mmodzi wa inu kwa mbale wacekumbvula; Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus18:7 Usamabvula atate wako
Leviticus18:8 Usamabvula mkazi wa atate wako; ndiye thupi la atate wako.
Leviticus18:9 Usamabvula mlongo wako
Leviticus18:10 Usamabvula mwana wamkazi wa mwana wamwamuna wako
Leviticus18:11 Usamabvula mwana wamkazi wa mkazi wa atate wako
Leviticus18:12 Usamabvula mlongo wa atate wako; ndiye wa cibale ca atate wako.
Leviticus18:13 Usamabvula mbale wa mai wako; popeza ndiye mbale wa mai wako.
Leviticus18:14 Usamabvula mbale wa atate wako; usamasendera kwa mkazi wace; ndiye mai wako.
Leviticus18:15 Usamabvula mpongozi wako; ndiye mkazi wa mwana wamwamuna wako; usamambvula.
Leviticus18:16 Usamabvula mkazi wa mbale wako; ndiye thupi la mbale wako.
Leviticus18:17 Usamabvula mkazi ndi mwana wamkazi wace; usamatenga mwana wamkazi wa mwana wamwamuna wace
Leviticus18:18 Usamtenga mkazi kumuonjezera kwa mbale wace
Leviticus18:19 Usamasendera kwa mkazi kumbvula pokhala ali padera cifukwa ca kudetsedwa kwace.
Leviticus18:20 Usagona naye mkazi wa mnansi wako
Leviticus18:21 Ndipo usamapereka a mbumba yako kuwapitiriza kumoto cifukwa ca Moleke
Leviticus18:22 Usamagonana ndi mwamuna
Leviticus18:23 Ndipo usamagonana ndi nyama iri yonse
Leviticus18:24 Musamadzidetsa naco cimodzi ca izi; pakuti amitundu amene ndiwapitikitsa pamaso panu amadetsedwa nazo zonsezi;
Leviticus18:25 dziko lomwe lidetsedwa; cifukwa cace ndililanga
Leviticus18:26 Koma inu

Leviticus23:7 Tsiku lace loyamba mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira nchito ya masiku ena.
Leviticus23:8 Koma mubwere nayo kwa Yehova nsembe yamoto masiku asanu ndi awiri; pa tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri pakhale msonkhano wopatulika; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena.

Leviticus23:44 Ndipo Mose anafotokozera ana a Israyeli nyengo zoikika za Yehova.

Leviticus25:51 Zikamtsalira zaka zambiri
Leviticus25:52 Ndipo zikamtsalira zaka pang'ono kufikira caka coliza lipenga amwerengere; monga mwa zaka zace abwezere mtengo wace wakumuombola.

Leviticus26:7 Mudzapitikitsa adani anu
Leviticus26:8 Asanu ainu adzapitikitsa zana limodzi
Leviticus26:9 Ndipo ndidzatembenukira kwa inu
Leviticus26:10 Ndipo mudzadya za sundwe wakale ndi kuturutsa zakale cifukwa ca zatsopano.
Leviticus26:11 Ndidzamanga kacisi wanga pakati pa inu
Leviticus26:12 Ndipo ndidzayendayenda pakati pa inu
Leviticus26:13 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu
Leviticus26:14 Koma mukapanda kundimvera Ine
Leviticus26:15 ndipo mukakaniza malemba anga
Leviticus26:16 ndidzacitira inu icinso; ndidzakuikirani zoopsa
Leviticus26:17 Ndipt nkhope yanga idzatsutsana nanu kuti adani anu adzakukanthani
Leviticus26:18 Ndipo muka panda kundimvera
Leviticus26:19 Popeza ndidzatyola mphamvu yam yodzikuza; ndi kusandutsa thambo lanu likhale ngati citsulo ndi dziko lanu ngati mkuwa;
Leviticus26:20 ndipo mudzacita nayo mphamvu yanu cabe; ndi nthaka yanu siidzapereka zipatse zace
Leviticus26:21 Ndipo mukayenda motsutsana nane
Leviticus26:22 Popeza ndidzatumiza cirombo ca kuthengo pakati pa inu
Leviticus26:23 Ndipo mukapanda kulangika nazo ndi kubwera kwa Ine
Leviticus26:24 Inenso ndidzayenda motsutsana ndi inu; ndipo ndidzakukanthani Inedi kasanu ndi kawiri cifukwa ca zoipa zanu.
Leviticus26:25 Ndipo ndidzadzetsa kwa inu lupanga lakucita cilango ca cipangano; kotero kuti mudzasonkhanidwa m'midzi mwanu; ndipo ndidzatumiza mliri pakati pa inu; ndipo mudzaperekedwa m'manja mwa mdani.
Leviticus26:26 Pamene ndityola mcirikizo wanu wa mkate
Leviticus26:27 Ndipo mukapanda kundimvera Ine
Leviticus26:28 Ine ndidzayenda nanu motsutsana mwa kukuzazirani
Leviticus26:29 Ndipo mudzadya nyama ya ana anu amuna; inde nyama ya ana anu akazi mudzaidya.
Leviticus26:30 Ndipo ndidzaononga malo amsanje anu
Leviticus26:31 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa midzi yanu bwinja
Leviticus26:32 Inde
Leviticus26:33 Ndipo ndidzabalalitsa inu mwa amitundu
Leviticus26:34 Pamenepo dzikoli lidzakondwera nao masabata ace
Leviticus26:35 Masiku onse a kupasuka kwace lipumula; ndiko mpumulo udalisowa m'masabata anu
Leviticus26:36 Kunena za iwo akutsalira
Leviticus26:37 Ndipo adzakhumudwitsana monga pothawa lupanga
Leviticus26:38 Ndipo mudzatayika mwa amitundu
Leviticus26:39 Ndipo otsala mwa inu adzazunzika m'moyo ndi mphulupulu zao m'maiko a adani anu; ndiponso ndi mphulupulu za makolo ao adzazunzika m'moyo.
Leviticus26:40 Pamenepo adzabvomereza mphulupulu zao
Leviticus26:41 Inenso ndinayenda motsutsana nao
Leviticus26:42 pamenepo ndidzakumbukila pangano langa ndi Yakobo; ndiponso pangano langa ndi Isake
Leviticus26:43 Dziko lomwe lidzasiyidwa nao
Leviticus26:44 Ndiponso pali icinso: pokhala iwo m'dziko la adani ao sindidzawakaniza
Leviticus26:45 Koma cifukwa ca iwo ndidzawakumbukila pangano la makolo ao
Leviticus26:46 Awa ndi malemba ndi maweruzo ndi malamulo amene Yehova anaika pakati pa iye ndi ana a Israyeli m'phiri la Sinai
Leviticus27:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus27:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli
Leviticus27:3 Ukayesa wamwamuna wa zaka makumi awiri kufikira wina wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi
Leviticus27:4 Koma akakhala wamkazi
Leviticus27:5 Akakhala munthu wa zaka zisanu kufikira wina wa zaka makumi awiri uwayesere
Leviticus27:6 Akakhala mwana wa mwezi umodzi kufikira zaka zisanu
Leviticus27:7 Akakhala munthu wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi mphambu
Leviticus27:8 Koma cuma cace cikapanda kufikira kuyesa kwako
Leviticus27:9 Ndipo cikakhala ca nyama imene anthu amabwera nayo ikhale copereka ca Yehova
Leviticus27:10 Asaisinthe
Leviticus27:11 Ndipo cikakhala ca nyama yodetsa
Leviticus27:12 ndipo wansembeyo aiyese mtengo wace
Leviticus27:13 Ndipo akaiombola ndithu
Leviticus27:14 Munthu akapatula nyumba yace ikhale yopatulika kwa Yehova
Leviticus27:15 Ndipo iye wakuipatula akaombola nyumba yace
Leviticus27:16 Munthu akapatulirako Yehova munda wace wace
Leviticus27:17 Akapatula munda wace kuyambira caka coliza lipenga
Leviticus27:18 Akaupatula munda wace citapita caka coliza lipenga
Leviticus27:19 Ndipo wakupacula mundayo akauomboladi
Leviticus27:20 Koma akapanda kuombola mundawo
Leviticus27:21 koma poturuka m'caka coliza lipenga
Leviticus27:22 Ndipo akapatulira Yehova munda woti adaugula
Leviticus27:23 pamenepo wansembeyo amwerengere mtengo wace wa kuyesa kwako kufikira caka coliza lipenga; ndipo apereke kuyesa kwako tsiku lomwelo
Leviticus27:24 Caka coliza lipenga mundawo ubwerere kwa iye amene adaugulitsa
Leviticus27:25 Ndipo kuyesa kwako konse kukhale monga mwa sekeli wa malo opatulika; sekeli ndi magera makumi awiri.
Leviticus27:26 Komatu woyamba kubadwa mwa nyama akhale wobadwa woyamba wa Yehova
Leviticus27:27 Koma akakhala wa nyama zodetsa
Leviticus27:28 Koma asacigulitse kapena kuciombola cinthu coperekedwa ciperekere kwa Mulungu
Leviticus27:29 Asamuombole munthu woperekedwa ciperekere kwa Mulungu; amuphe ndithu.
Leviticus27:30 Limodzi mwa magawo khumi la zonse m'dziko
Leviticus27:31 Koma munthu akaombolatu kanthu ka limodzi la magawo khumiwo aonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu.
Leviticus27:32 Ndipo limodzi la magawo khumi lonse la ng'ombe
Leviticus27:33 Asafunse ngati yabwino kapena yoipa
Leviticus27:34 Awa ndi malamulo

Numbers2:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni
Numbers2:2 Ana a Israyeli azimanga mahema ao yense ku mbendera yace
Numbers2:3 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao ku m'mawa koturuka dzuwa ndiwo a mbendera ya cigono ca Yuda
Numbers2:4 Ndipo khamu lace
Numbers2:5 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Isakara; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Isakara ndiye Netandi mwana wa Zuwara.
Numbers2:6 Ndipo khamu lace
Numbers2:7 Ndi pfuko la Zebuloni: kalonga wa ana a Zebuloni ndiye Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni.
Numbers2:8 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:9 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Yuda ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi cimodzi mphambu mazana anai
Numbers2:10 Mbendera ya cigono ca Rubeni ikhale kumwera monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Rubeni ndiye Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri.
Numbers2:11 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:12 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Simeoni; ndi kalonga wa ana a Simeoni ndiye Selumiyeli mwana wa Surisadai.
Numbers2:13 Ndi khamu lace ndi owerengedwa ace
Numbers2:14 Ndi pfuko la Gadi; kalonga wa ana a Gadi ndiye Eliyasafe mwana wa Reueli.
Numbers2:15 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:16 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Rubeni ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi cimodzi kudza mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu
Numbers2:17 Pamenepo khamu la Alevi azimuka naco cihema cokomanako
Numbers2:18 Mbendera ya cigono ca Efraimu izikhala kumadzulo monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Efraimu ndiye Elisama mwana wa Amihudi.
Numbers2:19 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:20 Ndipo oyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Manase; ndi kalonga wa ana a Manase ndiye Gamaliyeli mwana wa Pedazuri.
Numbers2:21 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:22 Ndi pfuko la Benjamini: kalonga wa ana a Benjamini ndiye Abidana mwana wa Gideoni.
Numbers2:23 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:24 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Efraimu ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu kudza zana limodzi
Numbers2:25 Mbendera ya cigono ca Dani izikhala kumpoto monga mwa makamu ao; ndi kalonga wa ana a Dani ndiye Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai.
Numbers2:26 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:27 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Aseri; ndi kalonga wa ana a Aseri ndiye Pagiyeli mwana wa Okirani.
Numbers2:28 Ndi khamu lace
Numbers2:29 Ndi pfuko la Nafitali: ndi kalonga wa ana a Nafitali ndiye Ahira mwana wa Enani.

Numbers2:31 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Dani ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi Hmodzi. Iwo ndiwo aziyenda m'mbuyo paulendo
Numbers2:32 Amenewo ndiwo anawerengedwa a ana a Israyeli monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao; owerengedwa onse a m'zigono
Numbers2:33 Koma sanawerenga Alevi mwa ana a Israyeli; monga Yehova adauza Mose.

Numbers3:22 Owerengedwa ao
Numbers3:23 Mabanja a Agerisoni azimanga mahema ao pambuyo pa kacisi kumadzulo.

Numbers3:25 Ndipo udikiro wa ana a Gerisoni m'cihema cokomanako ndiwo kacisi
Numbers3:26 ndi nsaru zocinga za kubwalo

Numbers3:30 Ndipo kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo ao ya mabanja a Akohati ndiye Elizafana mwana wa Uziyeli.
Numbers3:31 Ndipoudikirowaondiwo likasa
Numbers3:32 Ndipo kalonga wa akalonga a Alevi ndiye Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembeyo; ndiye aziyang'anira osunga udikiro wa pa malo opatulika.

Numbers3:48 nupereke ndarama zimene akuposawo anaomboledwa nazo kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ace amuna.
Numbers3:49 Pamenepo Mose analandira ndarama zaom bola nazo kwa iwo akuposa aja adawaombola Alevi;
Numbers3:50 analandira ndaramazo kwa oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israyeli; masekeli cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu asanu
Numbers3:51 Ndipo Mose anapatsa Aroni ndi ana ace ndarama zaom bola nazo monga mwa mau a Yehova

Numbers4:6 ndi kuikapo cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu; ndi kuyalapo nsaru yamadzi yeni yeni

Numbers4:26 ndi nsaru zocingira za pabwalo

Numbers6:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli

Numbers6:5 Masiku onse a cowinda cace cakusala
Numbers6:6 Masiku onse akudzipatulira kwa Yehova asayandikize mtembo.
Numbers6:7 Asadzidetse ndi atate wace

Numbers6:9 Munthu akafa cikomo pali iye
Numbers6:10 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi citato adze nazo njiwa ziwiri
Numbers6:11 ndipo wansembe akonze imodzi nsembe yaucimo
Numbers6:12 Ndipo awapatulire Yehova masiku a kusala kwace
Numbers6:13 Ndipo cilamulo ca Mnaziri

Numbers6:15 ndi mtanga wa mkate wopanda cotupitsa

Numbers6:20 ndipo wansembe aziweyula nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova; ici ncopatulikira wansembe

Numbers7:1 Ndipo kunali kuti tsiku lomwe Mose anatsiriza kumuutsa kacisi
Numbers7:2 akalonga a Israyeli
Numbers7:3 anadza naco copereka cao pamaso pa Yehova
Numbers7:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers7:5 Uzilandira kwa iwo
Numbers7:6 Ndipo Mose analandira magareta ndi ng'ombe
Numbers7:7 Anapatsa ana a Gerisoni magareta awiri ndi ng'ombe zinai
Numbers7:8 napatsa ana a Merari magareta anai ndi ng'ombe zisanu ndi zitatu
Numbers7:9 Koma sanapatsa ana a Kohati kanthu; popeza nchito yao ndiyo ya zinthu zopatulika
Numbers7:10 Ndipo akalonga anabwera nazo za kupereka ciperekere guwa la nsembe tsiku lodzozedwa ili; inde akalongawo anabwera naco copereka cao pa guwa la nsembelo.
Numbers7:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers7:12 Wakubwera naco copereka cace tsiku loyamba ndiye Nahesoni mwana wa Aminadabu
Numbers7:13 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva
Numbers7:14 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi
Numbers7:15 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi
Numbers7:16 ronde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo;

Numbers8:17 Pakuti a oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israyeli ndi anga
Numbers8:18 Ndipo ndatenga Alevi m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israyeli.

Numbers28:7 Ndi nsembe yace yothira ya mwana wa nkhosa mmodziyo ndiyo limodzi la magawo anai la bini; m'malo opatulika uthirire Yehova nsembe yothira ya cakumwa colimba.
Numbers28:8 Ndi mwana wa nkhosa winayo umpereke madzulo; monga nsembe yaufa ya m'mawa

Numbers35:2 Uza ana a Israyeli
Numbers35:3 Ndipo midzi ndiyo yokhalamo iwowa; ndi mabusa akhale a ng'ombe zao
Numbers35:4 Ndipo mabusa a midziyo
Numbers35:5 Ndipo muyese kunja kwa mudzi
Numbers35:6 Ndipo midziyo muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyd midzi ija isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako; imene muipereke kuti wakupha mnzace athawireko; ndipo pamodzi ndi iyi muperekenso midzi makumi anai ndi iwiri.
Numbers35:7 Midzi yonse muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyo midzi makumi anai ndi isanu ndi itatu
Numbers35:8 Ndipo kunena za midziyo muiperekeyo yao yao ya ana a Israyeli
Numbers35:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers35:10 Nenandi ana a Israyeli
Numbers35:11 muikire midzi ikukhalireni midzi yopulumukirako; kuti wakupha mnzace wosati dala athawireko.
Numbers35:12 Ndipo midziyo ikukhalireni yakupulumuka wolipsa; kuti wakupha mnzace asafe
Numbers35:13 Ndipo midziyo muipereke ikukhalireni midzi isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako.
Numbers35:14 Mupereke midzi itatu tsidya lino la Yordano
Numbers35:15 Midzi isanu ndi umodzi imene ndiyo yopulumukirako ana a Israyeli

Numbers35:19 Wolipsa mwazi mwini wace aphe wakupha munthuyo; pakumkumika amuphe
Numbers35:20 Ndipo akampyoza momkwiyira
Numbers35:21 kapena kumpanda ndi dzanja lace momuda
Numbers35:22 Koma akampyoza modzidzimuka
Numbers35:23 kapena kumponyera mwala wakufetsa munthu
Numbers35:24 pamenepo msonkhano uziweruza pakati pa wokantha mnzaceyo ndi wolipsa mwaziyo monga mwa maweruzo awa;
Numbers35:25 ndipo msonkhano umlanditse wakupha munthu m'dzanja la wolipsa mwazi
Numbers35:26 Koma wakupha munthu akaturuka nthawi iri yonse kulumpha malire a mudzi wace wopulumukirako kumene anathawirako;
Numbers35:27 nakampeza wolipsa mwazi kunja kwa malire a mudzi wace wothawirako
Numbers35:28 popeza wakupha munthu akadakhala m'mudzi wace wopulumukirako kufikira atafa mkulu wa ansembe; koma atafa mkulu wa ansembe wakupha munthuyo abwere ku dziko lace lace.
Numbers35:29 Ndipo izi zikhale kwa inu lemba la ciweruzo mwa mibadwo yanu
Numbers35:30 Ali yense wakantha munthu
Numbers35:31 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola moyo wa iye adapha munthu
Numbers35:32 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola iye amene adathawira ku mudzi wace wopulumukirako
Numbers35:33 Ndipo musamaipsa dziko muli m'mwemo; popeza mwazi uipsa dziko; pakuti kulibe kutetezera dziko cifukwa ca mwazi anaukhetsa m'mwemo
Numbers35:34 Usamadetsa dziko ukhala m'mwemo

Numbers36:2 nati

Deuteronomy21:3 ndipo kudzali kuti mudzi wakukhala kufupi kwa munthu wophedwayo

Deuteronomy22:1 Mukapenya ng'ombe kapena nkhosa ya mbale wako zirikusokera musamazilekerera

Deuteronomy22:5 Mkazi asabvale cobvala ca mwa muna
Deuteronomy22:6 Mukacipeza cisa ca mbalame panjira
Deuteronomy22:7 muloletu mace amuke

Deuteronomy22:12 Mudzipangire mphonje pa ngondya zinai za copfunda canu cimene mudzipfunda naco.

Deuteronomy22:14 namneneza zoutsa mbiri yamanyazi

Deuteronomy22:17 ndipo

Deuteronomy22:19 ndi kumlipitsa masekeli makumi okha okha khumi a siliva

Joshua1:1 NDIPO atafa Mose mtumiki wa Yehova
Joshua1:2 Mose mtumiki wanga wafa; tauka tsono

Joshua1:4 Kuyambira cipululu
Joshua1:5 Palibe munthu adzatha kuima pamaso pako masiku onse a moyo wako; monga ndinakhala ndi Mose momwemo ndidzakhala ndi iwe; sindidzakusowa
Joshua1:6 Khala wamphamvu
Joshua1:7 Komatu khala wamphamvu

Joshua9:19 Koma akalonga onse ananena kwa msonkhano wonse
Joshua9:20 Tidzawacitira ici
Joshua9:21 Ndipo akalonga ananena nao
Joshua9:22 Ndipo Yoswa anawaitana
Joshua9:23 Ndipo tsopano mukhale otembereredwa
Joshua9:24 Ndipo anamyankha Yoswa nati
Joshua9:25 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua9:26 Pamenepo anawacitira cotero
Joshua9:27 Ndipo tsiku lija Yoswa anawasandutsa akutema nkhuni
Joshua10:1 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:2 anaopa kwambiri
Joshua10:3 Cifukwa cace Adoni-Zedeki anatuma kwa Hohamu
Joshua10:4 Kwerani kwanga kuno
Joshua10:5 Pamenepo mafumu asanu a Aamori
Joshua10:6 Ndipo amuna a ku Gibeoni anatumira Yoswa mau kucigono ku Giligala
Joshua10:7 Pamenepo Yoswa anakwera kucokera ku Giligala
Joshua10:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Yoswa
Joshua10:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawadzidzimukitsa; popeza anakwera kucokera ku Giligala usiku wonse.
Joshua10:10 Ndipo Yehova anawamwaza pamaso pa Israyeli
Joshua10:11 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:12 Pomwepo Yoswa ananena kwa Yehova tsiku limene Yehova anapereka Aamori pamaso pa ana a Israyeli; ndipo anati pamaso pa Israyeli
Joshua10:13 Ndipo dzuwa linalinda
Joshua10:14 Ndipo panalibe tsiku lotere kale lonse kapena m'tsogolomo
Joshua10:15 Pamenepo Yoswa anabwerera
Joshua10:16 Ndipo mafumu awa asanu anathawa
Joshua10:17 Ndipo anauza Yoswa ndi kuti
Joshua10:18 Ndipo Yoswa anati
Joshua10:19 koma inu musaime
Joshua10:20 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:21 anthu onse anabwerera kucigono kwa Yoswa pa Makeda ndi mtendere. Palibe munthu anacitira cipongwe mmodzi yense wa ana a Israyeli.
Joshua10:22 Pamenepo Yoswa anati
Joshua10:23 Ndipo anatero
Joshua10:24 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:25 Pamenepo Yoswa ananena nao
Joshua10:26 Ndipo atatero
Joshua10:27 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:28 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira Makeda tsiku lomwe lija ndi kuukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa
Joshua10:29 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisrayeli onse naye anapitirira kucokera ku Makeda kumka ku Libina
Joshua10:30 ndipo Yehova anapereka uwunso
Joshua10:31 Ndipo Yoswa
Joshua10:32 napereka Yehova Lakisi m'dzanja la Israyeli
Joshua10:33 Pamenepo Horamu mfumu ya Gezere anakwera kudzathandiza Lakisi; ndipo Yoswa anamkantha iye ndi anthu ace mpaka sanamsiyira ndi mmodzi yense.
Joshua10:34 Ndipo Yoswa
Joshua10:35 Naulanda tsiku lomwelo
Joshua10:36 Ndipo Yoswa ndi Aisrayeli onse naye anakwera kucokera ku Egiloni mpaka ku Hebroni
Joshua10:37 naulanda
Joshua10:38 Pamenepo Yoswa
Joshua10:39 naulanda
Joshua10:40 Motero Yoswa anakantha dziko lonse
Joshua10:41 Ndipo Yoswa anawakantha kuyambira Kadesi-Barinea mpaka ku Gaza
Joshua10:42 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira mafwnu awa onse ndi dziko lao nthawi yomweyi; cifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli anathirira Israyeli nkhondo.
Joshua10:43 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisrayeli onse naye
Joshua11:1 Ndipo kunali
Joshua11:2 ndi kwa mafwnu akukhala kumpoto kumapiri
Joshua11:3 kwa Akanani kwn'mawa ndi kumadzulo
Joshua11:4 Ndipo anaturuka
Joshua11:5 Ndipo mafwnu awa onse anasonkhana
Joshua11:6 Koma Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua11:7 Ndipo Yoswa
Joshua11:8 Ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja la Israyeli
Joshua11:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawacitira monga Yehova adamuuza: nadula akavalo ao mitsindo
Joshua11:10 Ndipo Yoswa anabwerera m'mbuyo nthawi imeneyi nalanda Hazori nakantha mfumu yace ndi lupanga; pakuti kale Hazori unali waukuru wa maufumu aja onse.
Joshua11:11 Ndipo anakantha amoyo onse anali m'mwemo
Joshua11:12 Ndipo Yoswa analanda midzi yonse ya mafumu awa
Joshua11:13 Koma midzi yonse yomangidwa pa zitunda zao Israyeli sanaitentha
Joshua11:14 Ndi zofunkha zonse za midzi iyi ndi ng'ombe ana a Israyeli anadzifunkhira; koma anakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa anthu onse mpaka adawaononga osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense wopuma mpweya.
Joshua11:15 Monga Yehova adalamulira Mose mtumiki wace
Joshua11:16 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonselo
Joshua11:17 kuyambira phiri la Halaki lokwera kumka ku Seiri
Joshua11:18 Yoswa anathira nkhondo mafwnu awa onse nthawi yaikuru.
Joshua11:19 Palibe mudzi wakupangana mtendere ndi ana a Israyeli
Joshua11:20 Pakuti cidadzera kwa Yehova kulimbitsa mitima yao kuti athirane nao Aisrayeli nkhondo kuti iye awaononge konse
Joshua11:21 Ndipo Yoswa anadza nthawi yomweyo
Joshua11:22 Panalibe Aanaki otsala m'dziko la ana a Israyeli; koma m'Gaza
Joshua11:23 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonse monga mwa zonse Yehova adazinena kwa Mose; ndipo Yoswa analipereka kwa Israyeli
Joshua12:1 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene ana a Israyeli anwakantha
Joshua12:2 Sihoni mfumu ya Aaroori wokhala m'Hesiboni
Joshua12:3 ndi pacidikha mpaka nyanja ya Kineroti kum'mawa
Joshua12:4 Nalandanso malire a Ogi mfumu ya Basana wotsala wa Arefai
Joshua12:5 nacita ufumu m'phiri la Herimoni
Joshua12:6 Mose mtumiki wa Yehova ndi ana a Israyeli anawakantha; ndi Mose mtumiki wa Yehova analipereka kwa Arubeni
Joshua12:7 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene Yoswa ndi ana a Israyeli anawakantha tsidya lija la Yordano kumadzulo
Joshua12:8 kumapiri ndi kucigwa
