Joshua13:1 Ndipo Yoswa anakalamba
Joshua13:2 Dziko lotsala ndilo: malire onse a Afilisti
Joshua13:3 kuyambira Sihoro wokhala cakuno ca Aigupto mpaka malire a Ekironu kumpoto
Joshua13:4 kumwela dziko lonse la Akanani
Joshua13:5 ndi dziko la Agebili
Joshua13:6 nzika zonse za kumapiri kuyambira Lebano
Joshua13:7 Ndipo tsopano uwagawire mapfuko asanu ndi anai
Joshua13:8 Pamodzi ndi iye Arubeni ndi Agadi analandira colowa cao
Joshua13:9 kuyambira pa Aroeri
Joshua13:10 ndi midzi yonse ya Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori
Joshua13:11 ndi Gileadi
Joshua13:12 ufumu wonse wa Ogi m'Basana
Joshua13:13 Koma ana a Israyeli sanainga Agesuri kapena Amaakati; koma Gesuri
Joshua13:14 Koma pfuko la Levi sanalipatsa colowa; nsembe za Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli
Joshua13:15 Ndipo Mose anapatsira pfuko la ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao.
Joshua13:16 Malire ao anayambira ku Aroeri wokhala m'mphepete mwa cigwa ca Arinoni
Joshua13:17 Hesiboni ndi midzi yace yonse yokhala pacidikha; Diboni
Joshua13:18 ndi Yahaza ndi Kedemotu
Joshua13:19 ndi Kinyataimu
Joshua13:20 ndi Beti-peori
Joshua13:21 ndi midzi yonse ya kucidikha
Joshua13:22 Ana a Israyeli anaphanso ndi lupanga Balamu mwana wa Beori
Joshua13:23 Ndipo malire a ana a Rubeni ndiwo Yordano ndi malire ace. Ndico colandira ca ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua13:24 Ndipo Mose anapatsira pfuko la Gadi
Joshua13:25 Ndipo malire ao ndiwo Yazeri
Joshua13:26 ndi kuyambira Hesiboni mpaka Ramati-Mizipe
Joshua13:27 ndipo m'cigwa Betiharamu
Joshua13:28 Ici ndi colowa ca ana a Gadi
Joshua13:29 Mose anaperekanso colowa kwa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati
Joshua13:30 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Mahanaimu
Joshua13:31 ndi Gileadi logawika pakati
Joshua13:32 Izi ndi zolowazi Mose anazigawira m'zidikha za Moabu
Joshua13:33 Koma pfuko la Levi
Joshua14:1 Ndipo awa ndi maiko ana a Israyeli anawalanda m'dziko la Kanani
Joshua14:2 Kulandira kwao kunacitika ndi kulota maere
Joshua14:3 Pakuti Mose adapatsa mapfuko awiri
Joshua14:4 Pakuti ana a Yosefe ndiwo mapfuko awiri
Joshua14:5 Monga Yehova analamulira Mose
Joshua14:6 Pamenepo ana a Yuda anadza kwa Yoswa ku Giligala; ndi Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkenizi ananena naye
Joshua14:7 Ndinali ine wa zaka makumi anai muja Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anandituma kucokera ku Kadesi-Barinea
Joshua14:8 Koma abale anga amene anakwera nane anasungunutsa mitima ya anthu; koma ine ndinamtsata Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi mtima wanga wonse.
Joshua14:9 Ndipo Mose analumbira tsiku lomwelo ndi kuti
Joshua14:10 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua14:11 Koma lero lino ndiri wamphamvu monga tsiku lija anandituma Mose; monga mphamvu yanga pamene paja
Joshua14:12 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua14:13 Pamenepo Yoswa anamdalitsa
Joshua14:14 Cifukwa cace Hebroni likhala colowa cace ca Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkenizi mpaka lero lino; popeza anatsata Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli ndi mtima wonse.
Joshua14:15 Koma kale dzina la Hebroni linali mudzi wa Ariba
Joshua15:1 Ndipo gawo la pfuko la ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao linafikira malire a Edomu
Joshua15:2 Ndi malire ao a kumwera
Joshua15:3 naturuka kumwela kwa cikweza ca Akarabi
Joshua15:4 napitirira ku Azimoni
Joshua15:5 Ndi malire a kum'mawa ndiwo Nyanja ya Mcere
Joshua15:6 nakwera malire kumka ku Beti-hogila
Joshua15:7 nakwera malire kumka ku Dibiri
Joshua15:8 nakwera malire kumka ku cigwa ca mwana wa Hinomu
Joshua15:9 Ndipo analemba malire kuyambira pamwamba pa phiri mpaka citsime ca madzi ca Nefitoa
Joshua15:10 Ndipo malire anazungulira kuyambira ku Baala kumka kumadzulo
Joshua15:11 naturuka malire kumka ku mbali ya Ekroni kumpoto; ndipo analemba malire kumka ku Sikeroni
Joshua15:12 Ndi malire a kumadzulo anali ku Nyanja Yaikuru ndiwo malire ace. Awa ndi malire a ana a Yuda pozungulira monga mwa mabanja ao.
Joshua15:13 Koma Yoswa anampatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune gawo mwa ana a Yuda
Joshua15:14 Ndipo Kalebe anaingitsako ana amuna atatu a Anaki
Joshua15:15 Nakwera komweko kumka kwa nzika za Dibiri; koma kale dzina la Dibiri ndilo Kiriyati-Seferi.

Joshua15:17 Ndipo Otiniyeli mwana wa Kenazi

Joshua15:19 Nati iye
Joshua15:20 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao.

Joshua16:1 Ndipo gawo La ana a Yosefe linaturuka kucokera ku Yordano ku Yeriko
Joshua16:2 naturuka ku Beteli kumka ku Luzi
Joshua16:3 natsikira kumadzulo kumka ku malire a Ayafeleti
Joshua16:4 Motero ana a Yosefe
Joshua16:5 Ndipo malire a ana a Efraimu
Joshua16:6 naturuka malire kumadzulo ku Mikametatu kumpoto; nazungulira malire kum'mawa kumka ku Taanatu-silo
Joshua16:7 natsika kucokera ku Yanoa
Joshua16:8 Kuyambira ku Tapua malire anamuka kumadzulo ku mtsinje wa Kana; ndi maturukiro ace anali kunyanja. Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Efraimu monga mwa mabanja ao;
Joshua16:9 pamodzi ndi midzi adaipatulira ana a Efraimu pakati pa colowa ca ana a Manase
Joshua16:10 Ndipo a sanaingitsa Akanani akukhala m'Gezeri; koma Akanani anakhala pakati pa Efraimu
Joshua17:1 Gawo la pfuko la Manase ndi ili: pakuti anali woyamba wa Yosefe. Makiri mwana woyamba wa Manase
Joshua17:2 Ndipo maere anagwera ana ena otsala a Manase monga mwa mabanja ao; ana a Abiezere ndi ana a Heleki
Joshua17:3 Koma Tselofekadi
Joshua17:4 Ndipo anayandikira pamaso pa Eleazare wansembe
Joshua17:5 Ndipo anamgwera Manase magawo khumi
Joshua17:6 popeza ana akazi a Manase adalandira colowa pakati pa ana ace amuna; ndi dziko la Gileadi linakhala la ana a Manase otsala.
Joshua17:7 Ndipo malire a Manase anayambira ku Aseri
Joshua17:8 Dziko la Tapua linali la Manase; koma Tapua mpaka malire a Manase linakhala la ana a Efraimu.
Joshua17:9 Natsikira malire ku mtsinje wa Kana
Joshua17:10 kumwera nkwa Efraimu ndi kumpoto nkwa Manase
Joshua17:11 Ndipo m'Isakara ndi m'Aseri Manase anali nao Betiseani ndi midzi yace
Joshua17:12 Koma ana a Manase sanatha kuingitsa a m'midzi aja
Joshua17:13 Ndipo kunali pamene ana a lsrayeli atakula mphamvu anasonkhetsa Akanani osawaingitsa onse.
Joshua17:14 Pamenepo ana a Yosefe ananena ndi Yoswa
Joshua17:15 Ndipo Yoswa ananena nao
Joshua17:16 Ndipo ana a Yosefe anati
Joshua17:17 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe
Joshua17:18 koma kuphiriko kudzakhala kwanu pakuti pangakhale mpa mitengo
Joshua18:1 Ndipo msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israyeli unasonkhana ku Silo
Joshua18:2 Ndipo anatsala mwa ana a Israyeli mapfuko asanu ndi awiri osawagawira colowa cao.
Joshua18:3 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ana a Israyeli
Joshua18:4 Mudzifunire amuna
Joshua18:5 Ndipo adzaligawa magawo asanu ndi awiri; Yuda adzakhala m'malire ace kumwela
Joshua18:6 Ndipo muzilemba dziko likhale magawo asanu ndi awiri
Joshua18:7 Pakuti Alevi alibe gawo pakati pa inu; pakuti unsembe wa Yehova ndiwo colowa cao. Koma Gadi
Joshua18:8 Ndipo amunawo ananyamuka
Joshua18:9 Namuka amunawo
Joshua18:10 Ndipo Yoswa anawalotera maere ku Silo pamaso pa Yehova; ndi apo Yoswa anawagawira ana a Israyeli dziko
Joshua18:11 Ndipo maere a ana a Benjamini anakwera monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a gawo lao anaturuka pakati pa ana a Yuda ndi ana a Yosefe.
Joshua18:12 Ndipo malire ao a kumpoto anacokera ku Yordano; ndi malire anakwera ku mbali ya Yeriko kumpoto
Joshua18:13 Ndipo malire anapitirirapo kumka ku Luzi
Joshua18:14 Ndipo malire analembedwa nazungulira ku mbali ya kumadzulo kumka kumwela
Joshua18:15 Ndipo mbali ya kumwela inayambira polekezera Kiriyati-Yearimu; naturuka malire kumka kumadzulo
Joshua18:16 natsikira malire kumka polekezera phiri lokhala patsogolo pa cigwa ca mwana wa Hinomu
Joshua18:17 nalembedwa kumka kumpoto
Joshua18:18 napitirira ku mbali ya pandunji pa Araba kumpoto
Joshua18:19 napitirira malire kumka ku mbali ya Beti-hogila kumpoto; ndi maturukiro ace a malire anali ku nyondo ya kumpoto ya Nyanja ya Mcere; pa kulekezera kwa kumwela kwa Yordano; ndiwo malire a kumwera.
Joshua18:20 Ndipo malireace mbali ya kum'mawa ndiwo Yordano
Joshua18:21 Koma midzi ya pfuko la ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo Yeriko
Joshua18:22 ndi Beti-araba
Joshua18:23 ndi Arimu ndi Para
Joshua18:24 ndi Kefaraamoni
Joshua18:25 Gibeoni ndi Rama
Joshua18:26 ndi Mizipe
Joshua18:27 ndi Rekemu
Joshua18:28 ndi Zela
Joshua19:1 Ndipo maere aciwiri anamturukira Simeoni
Joshua19:2 Ndipo anali naco colowa cao Beeri-seba
Joshua19:3 ndi Hazarasuala
Joshua19:4 ndi Elitoladi
Joshua19:5 ndi Zikilaga
Joshua19:6 ndi Beti-lebaotu
Joshua19:7 Aini
Joshua19:8 ndi miraga yonse yozungulira midzi iyi mpaka Baalata-beeri ndiwo Rama kumwera. Ndico colowa ca pfuko la ana a Simeoni
Joshua19:9 M'gawo la ana a Yuda muli colowa ca ana a Simeoni; popeza gawo la ana a Yuda linawacurukira; cifukwa cace ana a Simeoni anali naco colowa pakati pa colowa coo.
Joshua19:10 Ndipo maere acitatu anakwecera ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a colowa cao anafikira ku Saridi;
Joshua19:11 nakwera malire ao kumka kumadzulo ndi ku Marala nafikira ku Dabeseti
Joshua19:12 ndi kucokera ku Saridi anazungulira kumka kum'mawa kumaturukira dzuwa
Joshua19:13 ndi pocoka pamenepo anapitirira kumka kum'mawa ku Gati-heferi
Joshua19:14 nauzungulira malire kumpoto
Joshua19:15 ndi Kata
Joshua19:16 Ici ndi colowa ca ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua19:17 Maere acinai anamturukira Isakara
Joshua19:18 Ndi malire ao anali ku Yezireeli
Joshua19:19 ndi Hafaraimu
Joshua19:20 ndi Rabiti ndi Kisioni
Joshua19:21 ndi Remeti ndi Eni-ganaimu ndi Eni-hada
Joshua19:22 ndi malire anafikira ku Tabori
Joshua19:23 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Isakara
Joshua19:24 Ndipo maece acisanu analiturukira pfuko la ana a Aseri monga mwa mabanja ao.
Joshua19:25 Ndi malire ao ndiwo Helikati
Joshua19:26 ndi Alameleki
Joshua19:27 nazungulira koturukira dzuwa ku Beti-dagoni
Joshua19:28 ndi Ebroni
Joshua19:29 nazungulira malice kumka ku Rama
Joshua19:30 Uma womwe ndi Afeki
Joshua19:31 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Aseri monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua19:32 Maere acisanu ndi cimodzi anaturukira ana a Nafitali
Joshua19:33 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Helefi
Joshua19:34 nazungulira malire kumka kumadzulo ku Azinotu-tabori
Joshua19:35 Ndipo midzi yamalinga ndiyo Zidimu
Joshua19:36 ndi Adama
Joshua19:37 ndi Kedesi
Joshua19:38 ndi Ironi
Joshua19:39 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Nafitali
Joshua19:40 Maere acisanu ndi ciwiri anaturukira pfuko la ana a Dani
Joshua19:41 Ndipo malire a colowa cao anali Zora
Joshua19:42 Saalabini
Joshua19:43 ndi Eloni ndi Timna ndi Ekroni;
Joshua19:44 ndi Eliteke
Joshua19:45 ndi Yehudi
Joshua19:46 ndi Me-jarikoni
Joshua19:47 Koma malire a ana a Dani anaturuka kupitirira iwowa; pakuti ana a Dani anakwera nathira nkhondo ku Lesemu
Joshua19:48 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Dani
Joshua19:49 Ndipo atatha kuligawa dziko likhale colowa cao monga mwa malire ace
Joshua19:50 monga mwa lamulo la Yehova anampatsa mudzi umene anawapempha
Joshua19:51 Izi ndizo zolowa anazigawa Eleazare wansembe
Joshua20:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua20:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli ndi kuti
Joshua20:3 kuti athawireko wakupha munthu osamupha dala
Joshua20:4 Munthu akathawira umodzi wa midzi iyi
Joshua20:5 Ndipo akamlondola wolipsa mwazi
Joshua20:6 Ndipo azikhala m'mudzimo mpaka adzaima pamaso pa msonkhano anene mlandu wace
Joshua20:7 Ndipo anapatula Kedesi m'Galileya ku mapiri a Nafitali
Joshua20:8 Ndipo tsidya lija la Yordano kum'mawa kwa Yeriko
Joshua20:9 Iyi ndi midzi yoikidwira ana onse a Israyeli
Joshua21:1 Pamenepo akuru a nyumba za atate a Alevi anayandikira kwa Eleazare wansembe
Joshua21:2 nanena nao ku Silo m'dziko la Kanani
Joshua21:3 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anapatsa Alevi
Joshua21:4 Ndipo maere anaturukira mabanja a Akohati; ndipo molota maere ana a Aroni wansembe
Joshua21:5 Ndipo ana otsala a Kohati analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a pfuko la Efraimu
Joshua21:6 Ndipo ana a Gerisoni analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a pfuko la Isakara
Joshua21:7 Ana a Merari
Joshua21:8 Motero ana a Israyeli anapatsa Alevi midzi iyi ndi mabusa ao
Joshua21:9 Ndipo anapatsa motapa pa pfuko la ana a Yuda
Joshua21:10 kuti ikhale ya ana a Aroni a mabanja a Akohati
Joshua21:11 Ndipo anawapatsa mudzi wa Ariba
Joshua21:12 Koma minda ya mudzi ndi miraga yace anapatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune
Joshua21:13 Ndipo kwa ana a Aroni wansembe anapatsa Hebroni ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:14 ndi Yatiri ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:15 ndi Holoni ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:16 ndi Aini ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:17 Ndipo motapira pfuko La Benjamini
Joshua21:18 Anatotu ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:19 Miclzi yonse ya ana a Aroni
Joshua21:20 Ndipo mabanja a ana a Kohati
Joshua21:21 Ndipo anawapatsa Sekemu ndi mabusa ace ku mapiri a Efraimu
Joshua21:22 ndi Kibizaimu ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:23 Ndipo motapira m'pfuko La Dani
Joshua21:24 Aijaloni ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:25 Ndipo motapira pa pfukola Manaselogawika pakati
Joshua21:26 Midzi yonse ya mabanja a ana otsala a Kohati ndiyo khumi ndi mabusa ao.
Joshua21:27 Ndipo anapatsa ana a Gerisoni
Joshua21:28 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko la Isakara
Joshua21:29 Yarimutu ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:30 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko La Aseri
Joshua21:31 Helikati ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:32 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko la Nafitali
Joshua21:33 Midzi yonse ya Agerisoni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo midzi khumi ndi itatu ndi mabusa ao.
Joshua21:34 Ndipo anapatsa kwa mabanja a ana a Merari
Joshua21:35 Dimna ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:36 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko la Rubeni
Joshua21:37 Kedimotu ndi mabusa ace
Joshua21:38 Ndipo motapira m'pfuko la Gadi
Joshua21:39 Hesiboni ndi mabusa ace. Yazeri ndi mabusa ace: yonse pamodzi midzi inai.
Joshua21:40 Yonseyi ndiyo midzi ya ana a Merari monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua21:41 Midzi yonse ya Alevi
Joshua21:42 Midzi iyi yonse inali nao mabusa ao pozungulira pao: inatero midzi iyi yonse.
Joshua21:43 Motero Yehova anawapatsa Israyeli dziko lonse adalumbiralo kuwapatsa makolo ao: ndipo analilandira lao lao
Joshua21:44 Ndipo Yehova anawapatsa mpumulo pozungulira ponse
Joshua21:45 Sikadasowa kanthu konse ka zinthu zokoma zonse Yehova adazinenera nyumba ya Israyeli; zidacitika zonse.
Joshua22:1 Pamenepo Yoswa anaitana Arubeni ndi Agadi
Joshua22:2 nanena nao
Joshua22:3 simunasiya abale anu masiku awa ambiri mpaka lero lino
Joshua22:4 Ndipo tsopano Yehova Mulungu wanu wapumitsa abale anu
Joshua22:5 Koma samalirani bwino kuti mucite cilangizo ndi cilamulo zimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakulamulirani kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua22:6 Momwemo Yoswa anawadalitsa
Joshua22:7 Ndipo gawo limodzi la pfuko la Manase
Joshua22:8 nanena nao ndi kuti
Joshua22:9 Ndipo ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:10 Ndipo pamene anafikira mbali ya ku Yordano
Joshua22:11 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anamva anthu akuti
Joshua22:12 Pamene ana a Israyeli anamva ici msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israyeli anasonkhana ku Silo
Joshua22:13 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anatumiza kwa ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:14 ndi akalonga khumi naye; nyumba imodzi ya atate kalonga mmodzi
Joshua22:15 M'mene anafika kwa ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:16 Utero msonkhano wonse wa Yehova
Joshua22:17 Kodi mphulupulu ya ku Peori iticepera
Joshua22:18 kuti mubwerera lero line kusatsata Yehova? ndipo kudzakhala kuti popeza lero mupikisana ndi Yehova
Joshua22:19 Koma mukayesa dziko La colowa canu ncodetsa
Joshua22:20 Kodi Akani mwana wa Zera sanalakwa m'coperekedwaco
Joshua22:21 Pamenepo ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:22 Yehova Cauta Mulungu
Joshua22:23 tadzimangira guwa la nsembe
Joshua22:24 ndipo ngati ife sitinacita ici cifukwa ca kuopa mlandu
Joshua22:25 pakuti Yehova anaika Yordano ukhale malire pakati pa ife ndi inu
Joshua22:26 Cifukwa cace tinati
Joshua22:27 koma lidzakhala mboni pakati pa ife ndi inu; ndi pakati pa mibadwo yathu ya m'tsogolo
Joshua22:28 Cifukwa cace tinati
Joshua22:29 Sikungatheke kuti tipikisane ndi Yehova ndi kubwerera lero kusatsata Yehova
Joshua22:30 Pamene Pinehasi wansembe
Joshua22:31 Ndipo Pinehasi
Joshua22:32 Ndipo Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazare wansembe
Joshua22:33 Ndipo mauwo anakomera ana a Israyeli pamaso pao; ndi ana a Israyeli analemekeza Mulungu
Joshua22:34 Ndipo ana a Rubeni ndi: ana a Gadi analicha guwa la nsembelo: Ndilo mboni pakati pa ife kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu.
Joshua23:1 Ndipo atapita masiku ambiri
Joshua23:2 Yoswa anaitana Aisrayeli onse
Joshua23:3 ndipo munapenya zonse Yehova Mulungu anacitira mitundu iyi yonse ya anthu cifukwa ca inu; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye anakuthirirani nkhondo.
Joshua23:4 Taonani
Joshua23:5 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu Iyeyu adzawapitikitsa pamaso panu
Joshua23:6 Koma mulimbike mtima kwambiri kusunga ndi kucita zonse zolembedwa m'buku la cilamulo ca Mose
Joshua23:7 osalowa pakati pa amitundu awa otsala mwa inu; kapena kuchula dzina la milungu yao; osalumbiritsa nalo
Joshua23:8 koma muumirire Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua23:9 Pakuti Yehova anaingitsa pamaso panu mitundu yaikuru ndi yamphamvu; koma inu
Joshua23:10 Munthu mmodzi wa inu adzapitikitsa anthu cikwi cimodzi; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amathirira inu nkhondo monga ananena ndi inu.
Joshua23:11 Potero mudzisamalire ndithu kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Joshua23:12 Koma
Joshua23:13 dziwani ndithu kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu sadzalandanso dziko la amitundu awa kuwacotsa pamaso panu; koma adzakhala kwa inu deka ndi msampha ndi mkwapulo m'nthiti mwanu
Joshua23:14 Ndipo taonani
Joshua23:15 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti monga zakugwerani zokoma zonse anakunenerani Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua23:16 Mukalakwira cipangano ca Yehova Mulungu wanu cimene analamulira inu ndi kumuka ndi kutumikira milungu yina ndi kuigwadira
Joshua24:1 Ndipo Yoswa anasonkhanitsa mapfuko onse a Israyeli ku Sekemu
Joshua24:2 Ndipo Yoswa ananena ndi anthu onse
Joshua24:3 Ndipo ndinamtenga kholo lanu Abrahamu tsidya lija la mtsinje
Joshua24:4 Ndi kwa Isake ndinapatsa Yakobo ndi Esau
Joshua24:5 Pamenepo ndinatuma Mose ndi Aroni
Joshua24:6 Ndipo ndinaturutsa atate anu m'Aigupto; ndipo munadzakunyanja; koma Aaigupto analondola atate anu ndi magareta ndi apakavalo mpaka ku Nyanja Yofiira.
Joshua24:7 Ndipo pamene anapfuula kwa Yehova
Joshua24:8 Pamenepo ndinakulowetsani inu m'dziko la Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordano; nagwirana nanu iwowa; ndipo ndinawapereka m'dzanja lanu
Joshua24:9 Pamenepo Balaki mwana wa Zipori
Joshua24:10 koma sindinafuna kumvera Balamu
Joshua24:11 Pamenepo munaoloka Yordano
Joshua24:12 Ndipo ndinatuma mabvu atsogolere inu
Joshua24:13 Ndipo ndinakupatsani dziko limene simunagwiramo nchito
Joshua24:14 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua24:15 Ndipo ngati kutumikira Yehova kukuipirani mudzisankhire lero amene mudzamtumikira
Joshua24:16 Ndipo anthu anayankha
Joshua24:17 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi iye amene anatikweza kutiturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto ku nyumba ya akapolo
Joshua24:18 ndipo Yehova anaingitsa pamaso pathu anthu awa onse

Joshua24:20 Mukasiya Yehova

Joshua24:27 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa anthu onse

Joshua24:33 Eleazarenso mwana wa Aroni anafa; ndipo anamuika pa phiri la Pinehasi mwana wace
Judges1:1 NDIPO atafa Yoswa
Judges1:2 Ndipo Yehova anati
Judges1:3 Ndipo Yuda ananena ndi Simeoni mkuru wace
Judges1:4 Ndipo Yuda atakwera
Judges1:5 Ndipo anapeza Adoni-bezeki m'Bezeki
Judges1:6 Koma Adoni-bezeki anathawa; ndipo anampitikitsa
Judges1:7 Pamenepo anati Adoni-bezeki
Judges1:8 Ndipo ana a Yuda anacita nkhondo pa Yerusalemu
Judges1:9 Ndipo atatero ana a Yuda anatsika kuthirana nao nkhondo Akanani akukhala kumapiri
Judges1:10 Ndipo Yuda anamuka kwa Akanani akukhala m'Hebroni; koma kale dzina la Hebroni ndilo mudzi wa Ariba; ndipo anakantha Sesai
Judges1:11 Pocoka pamenepo anamuka kwa nzika za ku Dibiri
Judges1:12 Ndipo Kalebe anati
Judges1:13 Ndipo Otiniyeli
Judges1:14 Ndipo kunali
Judges1:15 Ndipo anati kwa Iye
Judges1:16 Ndipo ana a Mkeni mlamu wace wa Mose
Judges1:17 Ndipo Yuda anamuka ndi Simeoni mkuru wace
Judges1:18 Yuda analandanso Gaza ndi malire ace
Judges1:19 Ndipo Yehova anali ndi Yuda
Judges1:20 Ndipo anapatsa Kalebe Hebroni monga Mose adanena; iye nawaingitsa komweko ana amuna atatu a Anaki.
Judges1:21 Koma ana a Benjamini sanaingitsa Ayebusi okhala m'Yerusalemu; koma Ayebusi anakhala m'Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi ana a Benjamini
Judges1:22 Ndipo anakwera iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe naonso kumka ku Beteli; ndipo Yehova anakhala nao.
Judges1:23 Ndipo iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe anatumiza ozonda ku Beteli. Koma kale dzina la mudziwo ndilo Luzi.
Judges1:24 Ndipo alonda anaona munthu alikuturuka m'mudzi
Judges1:25 Nawaonetsa polowera m'mudzi iye
Judges1:26 Ndipo munthuyo anamuka ku dziko la Ahiti
Judges1:27 Koma Manase sanaingitsa a ku Betiseani ndi midzi yace kapena a Taanaki ndi midzi yace
Judges1:28 Ndipo kunali
Judges1:29 Ndipo Efraimu sanaingitsa Akanani okhala m'Gezeri; koma Akanani anakhala m'Gezeri pakati pao
Judges1:30 Zebuloni sanaingitsa nzika za ku Kitroni
Judges1:31 Aseri sanaingitsa nzika za ku Ako
Judges1:32 koma Aseri anakhala pakati pa Akanani nzika za kudziko; pakuti sanawaingitsa.
Judges1:33 Nafitali sanaingitsa nzika za ku Beti-semesi
Judges1:34 Ndipo Aamori anakankha ana a Dani akhale kumapiri pakuti sanawalola atsikire kucigwa;
Judges1:35 Aamori anakhumbanso kukhala ku phiri la Heresi
Judges1:36 Ndipo malire a Aamori anayambira pokwerera pa Akrabimu
Judges2:1 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anakwera kucokera ku Giligala kumka ku Bokimu. Ndipo anati
Judges2:2 ndipo inu
Judges2:3 Cifukwa cacenso ndinati
Judges2:4 Ndipo kunali
Judges2:5 Potero analicha dzina la malowo Bokimu: namphera Yehova nsembe pomwepo.
Judges2:6 Pamene Yoswa atawalola anthu amuke
Judges2:7 Ndipo anthuwo anatumikira Yehova masiku onse a Yoswa ndi masiku onse a akulu akulu otsala atafa Yoswa
Judges2:8 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni
Judges2:9 Ndipo anamuika m'malire a colowa cace m'Timinatiheresi
Judges2:10 Ndiponso mbadwo uwu wonse unasonkhanidwa kuikidwa kwa makolo ao; nuuka mbadwo wina pambuyo pao; wosadziwa Yehova kapena nchitoyi adaicitira Israyeli
Judges2:11 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges2:12 nasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao
Judges2:13 Ndipo anasiya Yehova
Judges2:14 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israyeli
Judges2:15 Kuli konse anaturuka
Judges2:16 Ndipo Yehova anautsa oweruza
Judges2:17 Koma sanamvera angakhale oweruza ao
Judges2:18 Ndipo pamene Yehova anawaukitsira oweruza
Judges2:19 Koma kunali atafa woweruzayo anabwerera m'mbuyo
Judges2:20 Ndipo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israyeli; nati Iye
Judges2:21 lnenso sindionjeza kuingitsa pamaso pao a mitundu yina imene Yoswa adaisiya pakufa iyeyu;
Judges2:22 kuti ndiyese nayo Israyeli ngati adzasunga njira ya Yehova kuyendamo monga anaisunga makolo ao
Judges2:23 Motero Yehova analeka mitundu iyi osaiingitsa msanga
Judges3:1 Ndipo iyo ndiyo mitundu ya anthu anaisiyapo Yehova kuyesa nayo Israyeli
Judges3:2 cifukwa cace ndico cokha cakuti adziwitse mibadwo ya ana a Israyeli ndi kuwaphunzitsa nkhondo
Judges3:3 anasiya mafumu asanu a Afilisti ndi Akanani onse
Judges3:4 Amenewo anakhala coyesera Israyeli kuti Yehova adziwe ngati adzamvere malamulo ace
Judges3:5 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anakhala pakati pa Akanani
Judges3:6 nakwatira ana akazi a iwowa
Judges3:7 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges3:8 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Mulungu unayakira Israyeli ndipo anawagulitsa m'dzanja la KusaniRisataimu
Judges3:9 Ndipo pamene ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova
Judges3:10 Ndipo unamdzera mzimu wa Yehova
Judges3:11 Pamenepo dziko linapumula zaka makumi anai; ndi Otiniveli mwana wa Kenazi anafa.
Judges3:12 Koma ana a Israyeli anaonjezanso kucita coipa pamaso pa Yehova; pamenepo Yehova analimbitsa Egiloni mfumu ya Moabu pa Israyeli
Judges3:13 Ndipo anadzisonkanitsira ana a Amoni ndi a Amaleki
Judges3:14 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anatumildra Egiloni mfumu ya Moabu zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu.
Judges3:15 Koma pamene ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova
Judges3:16 Ndipo Ehudi anadzisulira lupanga lakuthwa konse konse utali wace mkono; nalimangirira pansi pa zobvala zace pa ncafu ya kulamanja.
Judges3:17 Ndipo anapereka mtulo kwa Egiloni
Judges3:18 Ndipo atatha kupereka mtulowo
Judges3:19 Koma iye mwini anabwerera pa mafano osema ali ku Giligala
Judges3:20 Ndipo Ehudi anamdzera alikukhala pa yekha m'cipinda cosanja copitidwa mphepo
Judges3:21 Ndipo Ehudi anaturutsa dzanja lace lamanzere nagwira lupanga ku ncafu ya kulamanja nampyoza m'mimba mwace;
Judges3:22 ndi cigumbu cace cinalowa kutsata mpeni wace; ndi mafuta anaphimba mpeniwo
Judges3:23 Pamenepo Ehudi anaturuka kukhonde namtsekera pamakomo pa cipinda cosanja nafungulira.
Judges3:24 Ndipo ataturuka iye
Judges3:25 Ndipo analindirira mpaka anacita manyazi; koma taonani
Judges3:26 Ndipo Ehudi anapulumuka pakucedwa iwo
Judges3:27 Ndipo kunali
Judges3:28 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges3:29 Ndipo anakantha Amoabu nyengo ija anthu zikwi khumi
Judges3:30 Motero anagonjetsa Moabu tsiku lija pansi pa dzanja la Israyeli. Ndipo dziko linapumulazaka makumi asanu ndi atatu.
Judges3:31 Atapita iye kunali Samagara
Judges4:1 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anaonjeza kucita coipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges4:2 Ndipo Yehova anawagulitsa m'dzanja la Yabini mfumu ya Kanani
Judges4:3 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova; pakuti anali nao magareta acitsulo mazana asanu ndi anai; napsinja ana a Israyeli kolimba zaka makumi awiri.
Judges4:4 Ndipo Debora
Judges4:5 Ndipo anakhala patsinde pa mgwalangwa wa Debora pakati pa Rama ndi Beteli ku mapiri a Efraimu; ndi ana a Israyeli anakwera kwa iye awaweruze.
Judges4:6 Ndipo anatuma
Judges4:7 Ndipo ndidzamkoka Sisera
Judges4:8 Ndipo Baraki anati kwa iye
Judges4:9 Nati iye
Judges4:10 Ndipo Baraki anaitana Zebuloni ndi Nafitali asonkhane ku Kedesi; iye nakwera ndi anthu zikwi khumi akumtsata; Deboranso anakwera kumka naye.
Judges4:11 Ndipo Heberi Mkeni anadzisiyanitsa ndi Akeni
Judges4:12 Ndipo anauza Sisera kuti Baraki mwana wa Abinoamu wakwera ku phiri la Tabori.
Judges4:13 Pamenepo Sisera anasonkhanitsa magareta ace onse ndiwo magareta mazana asanu ndi anai acitsulo
Judges4:14 Ndipo Debora anati kwa Baraki
Judges4:15 Ndipo Ambuye anaononga Sisera
Judges4:16 Koma Baraki anatsata magareta ndi gululo mpaka Haroseti wa amitundu; ndi gulu lonse lankhondo la Sisera linagwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa
Judges4:17 Koma Sisera anathawira coyenda pansi ku hema wa Yaeli mkazi wa Heberi Mkeni; pakuti panali mtendere pakati pa Yabini mfumu ya Hazori
Judges4:18 Ndipo Yaeli anaturuka kukomana ndi Sisera
Judges4:19 Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges4:20 Ndipo Sisera ananena naye
Judges4:21 Pamenepo Yaeli mkazi wa Heberi anatenga ciciri ca hema
Judges4:22 Ndipo taonani
Judges4:23 Momwemo Mulungu anagonjetsa tsiku lija Yabini mfumu ya Kanani pamaso pa ana a Israyeli.
Judges4:24 Ndipo dzanja la ana a Israyeli linamkabe ndi kulimbika pa Yabini mfumu ya Kanani mpaka adamuononga Yabini mfumu ya Kanani.

Judges6:2 Pamene dzanja la Midyani linalaka Israyeli
Judges6:3 Ndipo kunali
Judges6:4 nawamangira misasa
Judges6:5 Pakuti anakwera nazo zoweta zao ndi mahema ao
Judges6:6 Ndipo Israyeli anafoka kwambiri cifukwa ca Midyani; ndipo ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova.
Judges6:7 Ndipo kunali
Judges6:8 Yehova anatuma munthu mneneri kwa ana a Israyeli
Judges6:9 ndipo ndinakulanditsani m'dzanja la Aaigupto
Judges6:10 ndipo ndinati kwa inu

Judges6:12 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera
Judges6:13 Ndipo Gideoni ananena naye
Judges6:14 Pamenepo Yehova anamtembenukira
Judges6:15 Ndipo anati kwa iye
Judges6:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye
Judges6:17 Ndipo anati kwa iye
Judges6:18 Musacoke pano
Judges6:19 Ndipo Gideoni analowa

Judges6:21 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anatambasula nsonga ya ndodo inali m'dzanja lace
Judges6:22 Pamenepo Gideoni anaona kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova
Judges6:23 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye
Judges6:24 Pamenepo Gideoni anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe pomwepo; nalicha Yehova-ndiyemtendere; likali m'Ofira wa Abieziri ndi pano pomwe.
Judges6:25 Ndipo kunali
Judges6:26 numangire Yehova Mulungu wako guwa la nsembe pamwamba pa lingali
Judges6:27 Pamenepo Gideoni anatenga amuna khumi mwa anyamata ace
Judges6:28 Ndipo pakuuka mamawa amuna a ku mudziwo
Judges6:29 Nanenana wina ndi mnzace
Judges6:30 Pamenepo amuna a ku mudziwo anati kwa Yoasi
Judges6:31 Koma Yoasi anati kwa onse akumuimirira
Judges6:32 Cifukwa cace anamucha tsiku lija Yerubaala
Judges6:33 Pamenepo Amidyani onse ndi Aamaleki ndi ana a kum'mawa anasonkhana pamodzi naoloka
Judges6:34 Koma mzimu wa Yehova unabvana Gideoni; naomba lipenga iye
Judges6:35 Ndipo anatuma mithenga kwa Manase konse; ndi iwonso analalikidwa kumtsata iye; natuma mithenga kwa Aseri
Judges6:36 Ndipo Gideoni anati kwa Mulungu
Judges6:37 taonani
Judges6:38 Ndipo kunatero; pakuti anauka mamawa
Judges6:39 Ndipo Gideoni ananena ndi Mulungu
Judges6:40 Ndipo Mulungu anatero usiku uja; pakuti panauma pacikopa pokha
Judges7:1 Pamenepo Yerubaala
Judges7:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni. Anthu ali ndi iwe andicurukira kuti ndipereke Midyani m'dzanja lao; angadzitame Israyeli pa Ine
Judges7:3 Ndipo tsopano
Judges7:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Gideoni
Judges7:5 Ndipo anatsikira nao anthu kumadzi; ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges7:6 Ndi kuwerenga kwa iwo akukhatira
Judges7:7 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges7:8 Pamenepo anthu anatenga kamba m'dzanja lao
Judges7:9 Ndipo kunali usiku womwewo
Judges7:10 Koma ngati uopa kutsika
Judges7:11 nudzamva zonena iwo; utatero manja ako adzalimbikitsidwa kutsikira kumisasa. Pamenepo anatsikira ndi Pura mnyamata wace ku cilekezero ca anthu azidaa m'misasa.
Judges7:12 Ndipo Amidyani ndi Aamaleki ndi ana onse a kum'mawa ali gonere m'cigwa
Judges7:13 Ndipo pakufikako Gideoni
Judges7:14 Ndipo mnzace anayankha nati
Judges7:15 Ndipo kunali
Judges7:16 Ndipo anagawa amuna mazana atatu akhale magulu atatu
Judges7:17 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges7:18 Pamene ndiomba lipenga
Judges7:19 Motero Gideoni ndi amuna zana anali naye anafikira ku cilekezero ca misasa poyambira ulonda wa pakati
Judges7:20 Ndi magulu atatuwo anaomba malipenga
Judges7:21 Ndipo anaima yense m'mbuto mwace pozungulira misasa; pamenepo anathamanga a m'misasa onse
Judges7:22 Ndipo mazana atatuwa anaomba malipenga
Judges7:23 Pamenepo anthu a Israyeli analalikidwa kucokera ku Nafitali
Judges7:24 Gideoni anatumanso mithenga ku mapiri onse a Efraimu ndi kuti
Judges7:25 Ndipo anagwira akalonga awiri a Midyani
Judges8:1 Ndipo amuna a Efraimu anati kwa iye
Judges8:2 Koma ananena nao
Judges8:3 Mulungu anapereka m'dzanja lanu akalonga a Midyani
Judges8:4 Ndipo Gideoni anafika ku Yordano
Judges8:5 Ndipo ananena kwa amuna a ku Sukoti
Judges8:6 Koma akalonga a ku Sukoti anati
Judges8:7 Ndipo Gideoni anati
Judges8:8 Ndipo anacokapo kukwera ku Penueli
Judges8:9 Ndipo ananenanso kwa amuna a ku Penueli ndi kuti
Judges8:10 Zeba ndi Tsalimuna ndipo anali m'Karikori
Judges8:11 Ndipo Gideoni anakwerera njira ya iwo okhala m'mahema kum'mawa kwa Noba
Judges8:12 Ndipo Zeba ndi Tsalimuna anathawa; koma anawatsata
Judges8:13 Pamenepo Gideoni mwana wa Yoasi anabwerera kunkhondo pokwerera pa Heresi.
Judges8:14 Ndipo anagwira mnyamata wa anthu a ku Sukoti
Judges8:15 Ndipo anafika kwa amuna a ku Sukoti
Judges8:16 Ndipo anagwira akulu
Judges8:17 Ndipo anagamula nsanja ya Penueli
Judges8:18 Pamenepo anati kwa Zeba ndi Tsalimuna
Judges8:19 Ndipo anati
Judges8:20 Nati kwa Yeteri mwana wace woyamba
Judges8:21 Pamenepo Zeba ndi Tsalimuna anati
Judges8:22 Pamenepo anthu a Israyeli anati kwa Gideoni
Judges8:23 Koma Gideoni ananena nao. Sindidzalamulira inu
Judges8:24 Gideoni anatinso kwa iwo
Judges8:25 Ndipo anayankha
Judges8:26 Ndipo kulemera kwace kwa mapelele agolidi adawapempha ndiko masekeli cikwi cimodzi ndi mazana asanu ndi awiri; osawerenga mphande
Judges8:27 Ndipo Gideoni anawapanga fano
Judges8:28 Motero anagonjetsa Amidyani pamaso pa ana a Israyeli
Judges8:29 Ndipo Yerubaala
Judges8:30 Nakhala nao ana amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri Gideoni
Judges8:31 Ndipo mkazi wace wamng'ono wokhala m'Sekemu
Judges8:32 Ndipo Gideoni mwana wa Yoasi anafa atakalamba bwino
Judges8:33 Ndipo kunali
Judges8:34 Ndi ana a Israyeli sanakumbukila Yehova Mulungu wao
Judges8:35 osacitira cifundo nyumba ya Yerubaala
Judges9:1 Koma Abimeleki mwana wa Yerubaala anamuka ku Sekemu kwa abale a amai wace
Judges9:2 Nenanitu m'makutu mwa eni ace onse a ku Sekemu
Judges9:3 Pamenepo abale a amace anamnenera mau awa onse m'makutu a eni ace onse a Sekemu; ndi mitima yao inalunjika kutsata Abimeleki; pakuti anati
Judges9:4 Ndipo anampatsa ndalama makumi asanu ndi awiri za m'nyumba ya Baala-beriti; ndipo Abimeleki analembera nazo anthu opanda pace ndi opepuka amene anamtsata.
Judges9:5 Ndipo anamuka ku nyumba ya atate wace ku Ofira
Judges9:6 Pamenepo anasonkhana eni ace onse a ku Sekemu
Judges9:7 Ndipo atamuuza Yotamu
Judges9:8 Kumuka inamuka mitengo kudzidzozera mfumu; niti kwa mtengo waazitona
Judges9:9 Koma mtengo waazitona unati kwa iwo
Judges9:10 Pamenepo mitengo inati kwa mkuyu. Tiye iwe
Judges9:11 Koma mkuyu unanena nao
Judges9:12 Pamenepo mitengo inati kwa mpesa
Judges9:13 Koma mpesa unanena nao
Judges9:14 Pamenepo mitengo yonse inati kwa nkandankhuku
Judges9:15 Ndipo nkandankhuku unati kwa mitengo
Judges9:16 Ndipo tsopano
Judges9:17 pakuti atate wanga anakugwirirani nkhondo
Judges9:18 koma mwaukira nyumba ya atate wanga lero lino
Judges9:19 ngati tsono mwacitira Yerubaala ndi nyumba yace zoona ndi zangwiro lero lino
Judges9:20 koma ngati simunatero
Judges9:21 Pamenepo Yotamu anafulumira
Judges9:22 Abimeleki atakhala kalonga wa Israyeli zaka zitatu
Judges9:23 Mulungu anatumiza mzimu woipa pakati pa Abimeleki ndi eni ace a ku Sekemu; ndi eni ace a ku Sekemu anamcitira Abimeleki mosakhulupirika;
Judges9:24 kuti ciwawa adacitira ana amuna makumi asanu ndi awiria Yerubaala cimdzere
Judges9:25 Ndipo eni ace a ku Sekemu anaika omlalira pamwamba pa mapiri; amene anawawanya onse akudzera njirayi; ndipo anamuuza Abimeleki.
Judges9:26 Ndipo Gaala
Judges9:27 Ndipo anaturuka kumka kuminda
Judges9:28 Pamenepo Gaala
Judges9:29 Mwenzi anthu awa akadakhala m'dzanja langa; ndikadamcotsadi Abimeleki. Ndipo anati kwa Abimeleki
Judges9:30 Pamene Zebuli woyang'anira mudzi anamva mau a Gaala mwana wa Ebedi
Judges9:31 Natuma mithenga kwa Abimeleki monyenga nati
Judges9:32 Ndipo tsopano
Judges9:33 ndipo kukhale kuti m'mawa
Judges9:34 Pamenepo Abimeleki anauka ndi anthu onse anali naye
Judges9:35 Ndipo Gaala mwana wa Ebedi anaturuka
Judges9:36 Ndipo pamene Gaala anapenya anthuwo anati kwa Zebuli
Judges9:37 Koma Gaala ananenanso
Judges9:38 Pamenepo Zebuli anati kwa iye
Judges9:39 Ndipo Gaala anaturuka pamaso pao pa eni ace a ku Sekemu
Judges9:40 Koma Abimeleki anampitikitsa
Judges9:41 Ndipo Abimeleki anakhala ku Aruma; ndi Zebuli anafngitsa Gaala ndi abale ace kuti asakhale m'Sekemu.
Judges9:42 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwace
Judges9:43 Pamenepo anatenga anthu
Judges9:44 Ndi Abimeleki ndi magulu okhala naye anathamanga naima polowera pa cipata ca mudzi; ndi magulu awiriwo anagwera onse okhala m'munda
Judges9:45 Ndipo Abimeleki analimbana ndi mudzi tsiku lija lonse; nalanda mudzi nawapha anthu anali m'mwemo; napasula mudzi; nawazapo mcere.
Judges9:46 Ndipo pamene eni ace onse a nsanja ya ku Sekemu anacimva
Judges9:47 Ndipo anauza Abimeleki kuti amuna onse a nsanja ya ku Sekemu asonkhane.
Judges9:48 Pamenepo Abimeleki anakwera kumka ku phiri la Zalimoni
Judges9:49 Ndi anthu onse anadulanso yense nthambi yace
Judges9:50 Pamenepo Abimeleki anamuka ku Tebetsi
Judges9:51 Koma m'mudzimo munali nsanja yolimba nathawira kumeneko amuna ndi akazi onse
Judges9:52 Ndipo Abimeleki anafika kunsania
Judges9:53 Ndipo mkazi wina anaponya mwana wa mphero pamutu pa Abimeleki
Judges9:54 Pamenepo anaitana msanga mnyamata wace wosenza zida zace
Judges9:55 Pamene amuna a Israyeli anaona kuti adafa Abimeleki anamuka yense kumalo kwace.
Judges9:56 Momwemo Mulungu anambwezera Abimeleki coipaco anacitira atate wace ndi kuwapha abale ace makumi asanu ndi awiri.
Judges9:57 Ndipo Mulungu anawabwezera coipa conse ca amuna a ku Sekemu pamitu pao
Judges10:1 Atafa Abimeleki
Judges10:2 Ndipo anaweruza Israyeli zaka makumi awiri ndi zitatu
Judges10:3 Atafa iye
Judges10:4 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi atatu okwera pa ana a aburu makumi atatu
Judges10:5 Nafa Yairi
Judges10:6 Ndipo ana Israyeli a anaonjeza kucita coipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges10:7 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israyeli
Judges10:8 Ndipo anaphwanya napsinja ana a Israyeli caka ciija
Judges10:9 Ndipo ana a Amoni anaoloka Yordano kuthiranso nkhondo Yuda ndi Benjamini
Judges10:10 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova ndi kuti
Judges10:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ana a Israyeli
Judges10:12 Asidoni omwe
Judges10:13 Koma mwandisiya Ine ndi kutumikira milungu yina
Judges10:14 Mukani ndi kupfuulira kwa milungu munaisankha
Judges10:15 Koma ana a Israyeli anati kwa Yehova
Judges10:16 Pamenepo anacotsa milungu yacilendo pakati pao
Judges10:17 Ndipo ana a Amoni analalikiridwa
Judges10:18 Ndipo anthu
Judges11:1 Yefita Mgileadi ndipo anali ngwazi yamphamvu
Judges11:2 Ndipo mkazi wa Gileadi anambalira ana amuna; koma atakula ana amuna a mkaziyo anampitikitsa Yefita
Judges11:3 Pamenepo Yefita anathawa abale ace
Judges11:4 Ndipo kunali
Judges11:5 ndipo kunatero
Judges11:6 nati kwa Yefita
Judges11:7 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa akulu a Gileadi
Judges11:8 Ndipo akuru a Gileadi ananena ndi Yefita
Judges11:9 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa akuru a Gileadi
Judges11:10 Ndipo akuru a Gileadi anati kwa Yefita
Judges11:11 Pamenepo Yefita anamuka ndi akuru a Gileadi
Judges11:12 Ndipo Yefita anatuma mithenga kwa mfumu ya ana a Amoni
Judges11:13 Ndipo mfumu ya ana a Amoni inati kwa mithenga ya Yefita
Judges11:14 Ndipo Yefita anatumanso mithenga kwa mfumu ya ana a Amoni;
Judges11:15 nanena naye
Judges11:16 pakuti pakukwera iwo kucokera ku Aigupto Israyeli anayenda m'cipululu mpaka Nyanja Yofiira
Judges11:17 pamenepo Israyeli anatuma mithenga kwa mfumu ya Edomu
Judges11:18 Pamenepo anayenda m'cipululu
Judges11:19 Ndipo Israyeli anatuma mithenga kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori
Judges11:20 Koma Sihoni sanakhulupirira Israyeli kuti apitire pakati pa malire ace; koma Sihoni anamemeza anthu ace onse
Judges11:21 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli anapereka Sihoni ndi anthu ace onse m'dzanja la Israyeli
Judges11:22 Ndipo analandira akhale colowa cao
Judges11:23 Motero Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli anaingitsa Aamori
Judges11:24 Cimene akulandiritsani Kemosi mulungu wanu
Judges11:25 Ndipo tsopano kodi inu ndinu wabwino woposa Balaki mwana wa Zipori
Judges11:26 Pokhala Israyeli m'Hesiboni ndi midzi yace
Judges11:27 Potero sindinakucimwirani ine
Judges11:28 Koma mfumu ya ana a Amoni sanamvera mau a Yefita anamtumizirawo.
Judges11:29 Pamenepo mzimu wa Yehova unamdzera Yefita
Judges11:30 Ndipo Yefita anawindira Yehova cowinda
Judges11:31 
Judges11:32 Potero Yefita anapita kwa ana a Amoni kuwathira nkhondo; ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja lace;
Judges11:33 nawakantha kuyambira ku Aroeri mpaka ufika ku Miniti
Judges11:34 Pofika Yefita ku Mizipa ku nyumba yace
Judges11:35 Ndipo kunali
Judges11:36 Ndipo anati kwa iye
Judges11:37 Ndipo anati kwa atate wace
Judges11:38 Nati iye
Judges11:39 Ndipo kunali pakutha miyezi iwiri
Judges11:40 kuti ana akazi a Israyeli akamuka caka ndi caka kumliririra mwana wa Yefita wa ku Gileadi
Judges12:1 Pamenepo amuna a Efraimu analalikidwa
Judges12:2 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa iwo
Judges12:3 Ndipo pakuona ine kuti simunandipulumutsa
Judges12:4 Pamenepo Yefita anamemeza amuna onse a m'Gileadi nalimbana naye Efraimu; ndipo amuna a Gileadi anakantha Efraimu
Judges12:5 Ndipo Agileadi anatsekereza madooko a Yordano a Efraimu; ndipo kunatero kuti
Judges12:6 pamenepo anati kwa iye
Judges12:7 Ndipo Yefita anaweruza Israyeli zaka zisanu ndi cimodzi; nafa Yefita Mgileadi
Judges12:8 Ndi pambuyo pace Ibzani wa ku Betelehemu anaweruza Israyeli.
Judges12:9 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi atatu; ndi ana akazi makumi atatu anawakwatitsa kwina
Judges12:10 Nafa Ibzani naikidwa ku Betelehemu.
Judges12:11 Ndi pambuyo pace Eloni Mzebuloni anaweruza Israyeli; naweruza Israyeli zaka khumi.
Judges12:12 Nafa Eloni Mzebuloni naikidwa m'Aijaloni m'dziko la Zebuloni.
Judges12:13 Ndi pambuyo pace Abidonf mwana wa Hilele wa ku Piratoni anaweruza Israyeli.
Judges12:14 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi anai ndi zidzukulu zazimuna makumi atatu
Judges12:15 Nafa Abidoni mwana wa Hilele wa ku Piratoni
Judges13:1 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anaonjeza kucita coipa pamaso pa Yehova; nawapereka Yehova m'dzanja la Afilisti zaka makumi anai.
Judges13:2 Ndipo panali munthu wina wa Zora wa banja la Adani
Judges13:3 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera mkaziyo nanena naye
Judges13:4 Cifukwa cace udzisamalire
Judges13:5 pakuti taona
Judges13:6 Pamenepo anadza mkaziyo
Judges13:7 koma anati kwa ine
Judges13:8 Pamenepo Manowa anapembedza Yehova
Judges13:9 Ndipo Mulungu anamvera mau a Manowa; ndi mthenga wa Mulungu anamdzeranso mkaziyo
Judges13:10 Ndipo mkaziyo anafulumira nathamanga
Judges13:11 Nanyamuka Manowa natsata mkazi wace
Judges13:12 Nati Manowa
Judges13:13 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Manowa
Judges13:14 Ciri conse cicokera kumpesa asadyeko
Judges13:15 Ndipo Manowa anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova
Judges13:16 Koma mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Manowa
Judges13:17 Ndipo Manowa anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova
Judges13:18 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye
Judges13:19 Pamenepo Manowa anatenga mwana wa mbuzi pamodzi ndi nsembe yaufa
Judges13:20 Pakuti kunali
Judges13:21 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova sanaonekeranso kwa Manowa kapena kwa mkazi wace. Pamenepo anadziwa Manowa kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova.
Judges13:22 Nati Manowa kwa mkazi wace
Judges13:23 Koma mkazi wace ananena naye
Judges13:24 Ndipo mkaziyo anabala mwana wamwamuna namucha dzina lace Samsoni; nakula mwanayo
Judges13:25 Ndipo mzimu wa Yehova unayamba kumfulumiza mtima ku misasa ya Dani pakati pa Zora ndi Esitaoli.
Judges14:1 Ndipo Samsoni anatsikira ku Timna
Judges14:2 Nakwera iye
Judges14:3 Koma atate wace ndi amai wace ananena naye
Judges14:4 Koma atate wace ndi amai wace sanadziwa kuti cidacokera kwa Yehova ici; popeza analikufuna kutola cifukwa ndi Afilisti. Ndipo nthawi ija Afilisti analamulira Israyeli.
Judges14:5 Pamenepo anatsikira Samsoni
Judges14:6 Ndipo unamgwera iye kolimba mzimu wa Yehova
Judges14:7 Ndipo anatsika nakamba ndi mkazi
Judges14:8 Atapita masiku ndipo anabweranso kudzamtenga
Judges14:9 Ndipo anaufula ndi dzanja lace
Judges14:10 Ndipo atate wace anatsikira kwa mkazi; ndi Samsoni anakonzerapo madyerero; pakuti amatero anyamata.
Judges14:11 Ndipo kunali
Judges14:12 Nanena nao Samsoni
Judges14:13 koma ngati simukhoza kunditanthauzira uwu mudzandipatsa ndinu Malaya a nsaru yabafuta makumi atatu ndi zobvala zosinthanitsa makumi atatu. Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges14:14 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges14:15 Koma kunali
Judges14:16 Ndipo mkazi wa Samsoni analira pamaso pace
Judges14:17 Ndipo analira pamaso pace masiku asanu ndi awiriwo pocitika madyerero ao; koma kunali kuti tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri anamuuza
Judges14:18 Ndipo amuna a pamudzi anati kwa Samsoni tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri
Judges14:19 Ndipo mzimu wa Yehova unamgwera Samsoni
Judges14:20 Ndipo mkazi wace wa Samsoni anakhala wa mnzace

Judges15:2 Nati atate wace
Judges15:3 Koma Samsoni ananena nao
Judges15:4 Namuka Samsoni
Judges15:5 Nayatsa miuni
Judges15:6 Pamenepo Afilisti anati
Judges15:7 Ndipo Samsoni ananena nao
Judges15:8 Ndipo anawakantha nyung'unyu ndi ncafu
Judges15:9 Pamenepo Afilisti anakwera
Judges15:10 Ndipo anthu a Yuda anati
Judges15:11 Pamenepo anatsikira ku phanga la Etamu amuna zikwi zitatu
Judges15:12 Ndipo ananena naye
Judges15:13 Ndipo anati kwa iye

Judges16:1 Ndipo Samsoni anamuka ku Gaza
Judges16:2 Koma wina anauza a ku Gala
Judges16:3 Koma Samsoni anagona mpaka pakati pa usiku
Judges16:4 Ndipo pambuyo pace kunali kud anakonda mkazi m'cigwa ca Soreki
Judges16:5 Ndipo akalonga a Atilisti anamkwerera mkaziyo
Judges16:6 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samsoni
Judges16:7 Nanena naye Samsoni
Judges16:8 Pamenepo akalonga a Afilisti anakwera nazo kwa mkaziyo nsinga zatsopano zisanu ndi ziwiri zosauma; ndipo iye anammanga nazo.
Judges16:9 Koma anali nao omlalira m'cipinda ca m'kati. Nanena naye
Judges16:10 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samsoni
Judges16:11 Nanena naye
Judges16:12 Ndipo Delila anatenga nsinga zatsopano
Judges16:13 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samsoni
Judges16:14 Ndipo anacimanga ndi phanga
Judges16:15 Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges16:16 Ndipo kunali
Judges16:17 Pomwepo anamfotokozera mtima wace wonse
Judges16:18 Ndipo pamene Delila anaona kuti adamfotokozera mtima wace wonse
Judges16:19 Pamenepo anamgonetsa pa mabondo ace
Judges16:20 Ndipo anati
Judges16:21 Pamenepo Afilisti anamgwira
Judges16:22 Koma atammeta tsitsi la pamutu pace linayamba kumeranso.
Judges16:23 Ndipo anasonkhana akalonga a Afilisti kuperekera Dagoni mulungu wao nsembe yaikuru
Judges16:24 Ndipo pakumuona anthu analemekeza mulungu wao
Judges16:25 Ndipo kunali
Judges16:26 Ndipo Samsoni anati kwa mnyamata womgwira dzanja
Judges16:27 Koma nyumbayi inadzala ndi amuna ndi akazi; ndi akalonga onse a Afilisti anali momwemo ndi patsindwi panali amuna ndi akazi ngati zikwi zitatu akuyang'ana pakusewera Samsoni.
Judges16:28 Pamenepo Samsoni anaitana kwa Yehova
Judges16:29 Ndipo Samsoni anagwira mizati iwiri ya pakati imene nyumba inakhazikikapo
Judges16:30 Nati Samsoni
Judges16:31 Pamenepo anatsika abale ace ndi banja lonse la atate wace
Judges17:1 Ndipo ku mapiri a Efraimu kunali munthu dzina lace ndiye Mika.
Judges17:2 Ndipo iye anati kwa amai wace
Judges17:3 Nabwezera amace ndarama zija mazana khumi ndi limodzi; nati amai wace
Judges17:4 Ndipo pamene anambwezera mai wace ndaramazo
Judges17:5 Koma munthuyu Mika anali nayo nyumba ya milungu
Judges17:6 Masikuwa panalibe mfumu m'Israyeli
Judges17:7 Ndipo panali mnyamata wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda wa banja la Yuda
Judges17:8 Adacokera munthuyo m'mudzi m'Betelehemu-Yuda
Judges17:9 Ndipo Mika ananena naye
Judges17:10 Nanena naye Mika
Judges17:11 Ndi Mleviyo anabvomera kukhalitsa ndi munthuyo; ndi mnyamatayo anamkhalira ngati mmodzi wa ana ace.
Judges17:12 Ndipo Mika anamninkha zansembe Mleviyo
Judges17:13 Nati Mika
Judges18:1 Masiku ajawo panalibe mfumu m'Israyeli; masiku ajanso pfuko la Adani anadzifunira colowa cakukhalako; pakuti kufikira tsiku lija sicinawagwera colowa cao pakati pa mapfuko a Israyeli.
Judges18:2 Ndipo ana a Dani anatuma a banja lao amuna asanu a mwa iwo onse
Judges18:3 Pokhala iwo m'nyumba ya Mika
Judges18:4 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges18:5 Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges18:6 Nanena nao wansembeyo
Judges18:7 Pamenepo amuna asanuwa anacoka
Judges18:8 Ndipo asanuwo anafikanso kwa abale ao ku Zora ndi Esitaoli; ndi abale ao ananena nao
Judges18:9 Nati iwo
Judges18:10 Pomuka inu mudzafikira anthu okhazikika mtima ndi dziko ladtando; pakuti Mulungu walipereka m'dzanja lanu; pamenepo mposasowa kanthu kali konse kali pa dziko lapansi.
Judges18:11 Pamenepo amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi
Judges18:12 Nakwera namanga misasa m'Kiriyati-yearimu
Judges18:13 Ndipo anapiririra komweko kumka ku mapiri a Efraimu
Judges18:14 Pamenepo anayankha amuna asanu anamukawo kukazonda dziko la Laisi
Judges18:15 Napambuka iwo kumkako
Judges18:16 Ndipo amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi omangira zida zao za nkhondo m'cuuno
Judges18:17 koma amuna asanu omukawo kukazonda dziko anakwera nalowako
Judges18:18 Atalowa iwo m'nyumba ya Mika
Judges18:19 Ndipo ananena naye
Judges18:20 Nukondwera mtima wa wansembeyo
Judges18:21 Atatero anabwerera
Judges18:22 Atafika kutari ndi nyumba ya Mika
Judges18:23 Ndipo anapfuula kwa ana a Dani. Naceuka iwo nati kwa Mika
Judges18:24 Nati iye
Judges18:25 Koma ana a Dani anati kwa iye
Judges18:26 Nayenda ulendo wao ana a Dani; ndipo Mika pakuona kuti anamposa mphamvu
Judges18:27 M'mwemo anatenga zimene Mika adacipanga
Judges18:28 Ndipo panalibe wolanditsa
Judges18:29 Ndipo analicha dzina la mudziwo Dani
Judges18:30 Ndipo ana a Dani anadziimitsira fane losemalo; ndi Yonatani mwana wa Gerisomu mwana wa Manase
Judges18:31 Motero anadziikira fane losema la Mika
Judges19:1 Ndipo kunali
Judges19:2 Koma mkazi wace wamng'ono anacita cigololo akali naye
Judges19:3 Koma anauka mwamuna wace namtsata kukamba naye zamtima
Judges19:4 Ndipo mpongozi wace
Judges19:5 Ndipo kunali
Judges19:6 Nakhala pansi nadya namwa onse awiri pamodzi; nati kwa munthuyo atate wa mkaziyo
Judges19:7 Ndipo munthuyo ananyamuka kuti amuke; koma mpongozi waceyo anamkakamiza
Judges19:8 Nalawirira mamawa tsiku lacisanu kuti amuke
Judges19:9 Pamenepo munthuyo ananyamuka kucoka
Judges19:10 Koma munthuyo anakana kugonako usiku
Judges19:11 Pofika iwo pa Yebusi linalimkulowa dzuwa
Judges19:12 Koma mbuye wace ananena naye
Judges19:13 Nati kwa mnyamata wace
Judges19:14 Napitiriraiwo
Judges19:15 Napambukirako
Judges19:16 Ndipo taonani
Judges19:17 Pamene anakweza maso ace anaona munthu wa pa ulendoyo m'khwalala la mudzi; ndi nkhalambayo inati
Judges19:18 Ndipo ananena nayo
Judges19:19 Ngakhale maudzu ndi cakudya ca aburu athu ziriko; ndi mkate ndi vinyo zirikonso kwa ine ndi kwa mdzakazi wako ndi kwa mnyamata wokhala ndi aka polo ako; kosasowa kanthu.
Judges19:20 Ndipo nkhalambayo inati
Judges19:21 Pamenepo anamlonga m'nyumba yace
Judges19:22 Pokondweretsa iwo mitima yao
Judges19:23 Ndipo munthu mwini nyumba anawaturukira nanena nao
Judges19:24 Taonani
Judges19:25 Koma amunawo sanafuna kumvera; motero munthuyu anagwira mkazi wace wamng'ono
Judges19:26 Nadza mkaziyo kutaca
Judges19:27 Pamene mbuye wace anauka mamawa
Judges19:28 Ndipo ananena naye
Judges19:29 Ndipo pofika iye kunyumba kwace
Judges19:30 Ndipo kunali kuti onse amene anaciona anati
Judges20:1 Pamenepo anaturuka ana onse a Israyeli
Judges20:2 Ndipo akuru a anthu onse a mapfuko onse a Israyeli anadziimika mu msonkhano wa anthu a Mulungu
Judges20:3 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anamva kuti ana a Israyeli adakwera kumka ku Mizipa
Judges20:4 Ndipo Mlevi
Judges20:5 Nandiukira eni ace a Gibeya
Judges20:6 Pamenepo ndinagwira mkazi wanga wamng'ono ndi kumgawa ndi kumtumiza m'dziko lonse la colowa ca Israyeli
Judges20:7 Taonani
Judges20:8 Ndipo anthu onse anauka ngati munthu mmodzi
Judges20:9 koma tsopano ici ndico tidzacitira Gibeya: tidzaukwerera ndi kulota maere.
Judges20:10 Ndipo tidzatapa amuna khumi limodzi pa zana limodzi
Judges20:11 Potero amuna onse a Israyeli anasonkhanira mudziwo
Judges20:12 Ndipo mapfuko a Israyeli anatuma anthu mwa pfuko lonse la Benjamini
Judges20:13 Ndipo tsopano perekani amunawo otama zopanda pace
Judges20:14 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anasonkhana kucokera ku midzi kumka ku Gibeya
Judges20:15 Ndipo anawerenga ana a Benjamini a m'midzi tsiku lija amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi akusolola lupanga; osawerenga okhala m'Gibeya
Judges20:16 Mwa anthu awa onse munali amuna osankhika mazana asanu ndi awiri amanzere
Judges20:17 Ndipo anawerenga amuna a Israyeli
Judges20:18 Nauka ana a Israyeli
Judges20:19 Nauka ana a Israyeli m'mawa
Judges20:20 Ndipo amuna a Israyeli anaturuka kulimbana ndi Benjamini; ndi amuna a Israyeli anawandandalikira nkhondo ku Gibeya.
Judges20:21 Pamenepo ana a Benjamini anaturuka m'Gibeya
Judges20:22 Koma anthu
Judges20:23 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anakwera nalira misozi pamaso pa Yehova mpaka madzulo; nafunsira kwa Yehova ndi kuti
Judges20:24 Potero ana a Israyeli anayandikira ana a Benjamini m'mawa mwace.
Judges20:25 Ndipo Benjamini anawaturukira ku Gibeya m'mawa mwace
Judges20:26 Pamenepo ana onse a Israyeli ndi anthu onse anakwera nafika ku Beteli
Judges20:27 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anafunsira kwa Yehova; pakuti likasa la cipangano la Mulungu linakhala komweko masiku aja
Judges20:28 namaima ku likasalo Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazare mwana wa Aroni
Judges20:29 Ndipo Israyeli anaika olalira Gibeya pozungulira pace.
Judges20:30 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anakwerera ana a Benjamini tsiku lacitatu
Judges20:31 Naturuka ana a Benjamini kukomana ndi anthuwo
Judges20:32 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anati
Judges20:33 Nauka amuna onse a Israyeli m'malo ao nanika ku Baalatamari; naturuka Aisrayeli olalira aja m'malo mwao
Judges20:34 Ndipo anadza pandunji pa Gibeya amuna osankhika m'Israyeli monse zikwi khumi
Judges20:35 Ndipo Yehova anakantha Benjamini pamaso pa Israyeli; ndi ana a Israyeli anawaononga a Benjamini tsiku lija amuna zikwi makumi awiri ndi zisanu
Judges20:36 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anaona kuti takanthidwa; popeza amuna a Israyeli anawapatsa Abenjamini malo
Judges20:37 Nafulumira olalirawo nathamangira Gibeya
Judges20:38 Koma kunali cizindikilo coikika pakati pa amuna a Israyeli ndi olalirawo
Judges20:39 Ndi nkhondo ya Israyeli inathawa
Judges20:40 Koma pamene mtambo unayamba kukwera m'mudzi ngati utsi uti tolo
Judges20:41 Natembenuka amuna a Israyeli; nadabwa amuna a Benjamini; popeza anaona kuti cidawagwera coipa.
Judges20:42 Nabwerera iwo pamaso pa amuna a Israyeli kumka njira ya cipululu; koma nkhondo inawaloodetsa; ndi aja oturuka m'mudzi anawaononga pakati pao.
Judges20:43 Anawazinga Abenjamini
Judges20:44 Ndipo adagwa a Benjamini amuna zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu; iwo onse ndiwo ngwazi.
Judges20:45 Natembenuka iwo
Judges20:46 Potero onse amene adagwa a Benjamini tsiku lija
Judges20:47 Koma amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi anabwerera nathawira kucipululu
Judges20:48 Ndipo amuna a Israyeli anabwereranso kwa ana a Benjamini
Judges21:1 Koma amuna a Israyeli adalumbira ku Mizipa
Judges21:2 Ndipo anthu anadza ku Beteli
Judges21:3 Nati iwo
Judges21:4 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwace
Judges21:5 Nati ana a Israyeli
Judges21:6 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anamva cifundo cifukwa ca Benjamini mbale wao
Judges21:7 Tidzatani kuwafunira otsalawo akazi
Judges21:8 Nati iwo
Judges21:9 Pakuti pamene anawerenga anthu
Judges21:10 Ndipo msonkhano unatumizako amuna zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri
Judges21:11 Ndipo cimene mukacite ndi ici: mukaononge konse mwamuna ali yense
Judges21:12 Ndipo anapeza mwa anthu a Yabesi-gileadi anamwali mazana anai osadziwa mwamuna mogona naye; nabwera nao kumisasa ku Silo
Judges21:13 Ndipo msonkhano wonse unatumiza mau kwa ana a Benjamini okhala m'thanthwe la Rimoni
Judges21:14 Nakwera Abenjamini nthawi ija
Judges21:15 Ndipo anthu anamva cifundo pa Benjamini
Judges21:16 Pamenepo akuru a msonkhano anati
Judges21:17 Nati iwo
Judges21:18 Koma sitikhoza ife kuwapatsa ana athu akazi akhale akazi ao; pakuti ana a Israyeli adalumbira ndi kuti
Judges21:19 Natiiwo
Judges21:20 Ndipo analamulira ana a Benjamini ndi kuti
Judges21:21 nimuyang'ane
Judges21:22 Ndipo kudzali
Judges21:23 Nacita cotere ana a Benjamini
Judges21:24 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacokako nthawi ija yense kumka ku pfuko lace
Judges21:25 Panalibe mfumu m'Israyeli masiku aja; a yense anacita comkomera pamaso pace.
Ruth1:1 NDIPO masiku akuweruza oweruzawo munali njala m'dziko. Ndipo munthu wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda anamuka nakagonera m'dziko la Moabu
Ruth1:2 Dzina la munthuyo ndiye Elimeleki
Ruth1:3 Ndipo Elimeleki mwamuna wace wa Naomi anamwalira; natsala iye ndi ana ace awiri.
Ruth1:4 Nadzitengera iwo akazi a ku Moabu; wina dzina lace ndiye Olipa
Ruth1:5 Koma Maloni ndi Kilioni anamwalira onse awiri; motero ana ace amuna awiri ndi mwamuna wace anamsiya mkaziyo.
Ruth1:6 Pamenepo ananyamuka iyeyu ndi apongozi ace kuti abwerere kucoka m'dziko la Moabu; pakuti adamva m'dziko la Moabu kuti Yehova adasamalira anthu ace ndi kuwapatsa cakudya.
Ruth1:7 Naturuka iye kumene anakhalako ndi apongozi ace awiri pamodzi naye; namka ulendo wao kubwererakudzikola Yuda.
Ruth1:8 Ndipo Naomi anati kwa apongozi ace awiri
Ruth1:9 Yehova akuloleni mupeze mpumulo yense m'nyumba ya mwamuna wace. Nawapsompsona
Ruth1:10 Ndipo ananena naye
Ruth1:11 Nati Naomi
Ruth1:12 Bwererani
Ruth1:13 kodi mudzawalindirira akakula? mudzadziletsa osakwatibwa? Iai
Ruth1:14 Nakweza iwo mau ao
Ruth1:15 Pamenepo anati
Ruth1:16 Nati Rute
Ruth1:17 kumene mudzafera inu ine ndidzafera komweko
Ruth1:18 Ndipo pakuona kuti analimbika kumuka naye
Ruth1:19 Namuka iwo awiriwo mpaka anafika ku Betelehemu. Ndipo kunali pakufika iwo ku Betelehemu
Ruth1:20 Koma ananena nao
Ruth1:21 Ndinacoka pane wolemera
Ruth1:22 Momwemo anabwera Naomi ndi Rute Mmoabu mpongozi wace pamodzi naye
Ruth2:1 Ndipo Naomi anali nave mbale wa mwamuna wace
Ruth2:2 Nati Rute Mmoabu kwa Naomi
Ruth2:3 Namuka iye
Ruth2:4 Ndipo taona
Ruth2:5 Nati Boazi kwa mnyamata wace woyang'anira ocekawo
Ruth2:6 Ndipo mnyamata woyang'anira ocekawo anayankha nati
Ruth2:7 ndipo anati
Ruth2:8 Pamenepo Boazi ananena ndi Rute
Ruth2:9 Maso ako akhale pa munda acekawo
Ruth2:10 Potero anagwa nkhope yace pansi
Ruth2:11 Ndipo Boazi anayankha nanena naye
Ruth2:12 Yehova akubwezere nchito yako
Ruth2:13 Nati iye
Ruth2:14 Ndipo pa nthawi ya kudya Boazi ananena naye
Ruth2:15 Ndipo ataumirira kukatola khunkha
Ruth2:16 Ndiponso mumtayire za m'manja
Ruth2:17 Natola khunka iye m'munda mpaka madzulo; naomba khunkhalo napeza ngati licero la barele
Ruth2:18 nalisenza nalowa kumudzi; ndipo mpongozi wace anaona khunkhalo; Rute naturutsanso nampatsa mkute uja anausiya atakhuta.
Ruth2:19 Ndipo mpongozi wace ananena naye
Ruth2:20 Nati Naomi kwa mpongozi wace
Ruth2:21 Ndipo Rute Mmoabu anati
Ruth2:22 Nati Naomi kwa Rute mpongozi wace
Ruth2:23 Momwemo anaumirira adzakazi a Boazi kuti atole khunkha kufikira atatha kuceka barele ndi tirigu; ndipo anakhala iye kwao kwa mpongozi wace.

Ruth4:2 Ndipo anatenga amuna khumi a akulu a mudzi

1Samuel1:1 NDIPO panali munthu wina wa ku Ramatayimu Zofimu
1Samuel1:2 Iyeyu anali nao akazi awiri; winayo dzina lace ndi Hana
1Samuel1:3 Ndipo munthuyu akakwera caka ndi caka kuturuka m'mudzi mwace kukalambira ndi kupereka nsembe kwa Mulungu wa makamu m'Silo. Ndipo pomwepo panali ana amuna awiri a Eli
1Samuel1:4 Ndipo pofika tsiku lakuti Elikana akapereka nsembe
1Samuel1:5 koma anapatsa Hana magawo awiri
1Samuel1:6 Ndipo womnyodolayo anamputa kwakukuru
1Samuel1:7 Ndipo popeza munthuyo adatero caka ndi caka
1Samuel1:8 Ndipo mwamuna wace Elikana anati kwa iye
1Samuel1:9 Comweco Hana anauka atadya m'Silo
1Samuel1:10 Ndipo mkaziyo anali ndi mtima wowawa
1Samuel1:11 nalonjeza cowinda
1Samuel1:12 Ndipo panali
1Samuel1:13 Koma Hana ananena mu mtima; milomo yace inatukula
1Samuel1:14 Ndipo Eli anati kwa iye
1Samuel1:15 Ndipo Hana anayankha
1Samuel1:16 Musamandiyesa mdzakazi wanu mkazi woipa; cifukwa kufikira lero ndinalankhula mwa kucuruka kwa kudandaula kwanga ndi kubvutika kwanga.
1Samuel1:17 Pamenepo Eli anayankha nati
1Samuel1:18 Ndipo iye anati
1Samuel1:19 Ndipo iwo anauka mamawa
1Samuel1:20 Ndipo panali pamene nthawi yace inafika
1Samuel1:21 Ndipo munthuyo Elikana
1Samuel1:22 Koma Hana sadakwera
1Samuel1:23 Ndipo Elikana mwamuna wace anati
1Samuel1:24 Ndipo atamletsa kuyamwa anakwera naye
1Samuel1:25 Ndipo iwo anapha ng'ombe
1Samuel1:26 Ndipo mkaziyo ananena
1Samuel1:27 Ndinampempha mwanayu; ndipo Yehova anandipatsa copemphacanga ndinacipempha kwa iye;
1Samuel1:28 cifukwa cace inenso ndinampereka kwa Yehova; masiku onse a moyo wace aperekedwa kwa Yehova. Ndipo analambira Yehova pomwepo.
1Samuel2:1 Ndipo Hana anapemphera
1Samuel2:2 Palibe wina woyera ngati Yehova; Palibe wina koma Inu nokha; Palibenso thanthwe longa Mulungu wathu.
1Samuel2:3 Musalankhulenso modzikuza kwambiri motero; M'kamwa mwanu musaturuke zolulutsa; Cifukwa Yehova ali Mulungu wanzeru
1Samuel2:4 Mauta a amphamvu anathyoka
1Samuel2:5 Amene anakhuta anakasuma cakudya; Koma anjalawo anacira; Inde cumba cabala asanu ndi awiri: Ndipo iye amene ali ndi ana ambiri acita liwondewonde.
1Samuel2:6 Yehova amapha
1Samuel2:7 Yehova asaukitsa
1Samuel2:8 Amuutsa waumphawi m'pfumbi
1Samuel2:9 Adzasunga mapazi a okoodedwaace
1Samuel2:10 Otsutsana ndi Yehova adzaphwanyika; Kumwamba iye adzagunda pa iwo: Yehova adzaweruza malekezero a dziko: Ndipo adzapatsa mphamvu mfumuyace
1Samuel2:11 Ndipo Elikana anauka kwao ku Rama
1Samuel2:12 Koma ana a Eli anali oipa; sanadziwa Yehova.
1Samuel2:13 Ndipo macitidwe a ansembe akucitira anthu ndiwo
1Samuel2:14 nacipisa m'cimphuli
1Samuel2:15 Ngakhale asanayambe kupsereza mafuta
1Samuel2:16 Ndipo ngati munthu akanena naye
1Samuel2:17 Ndipo zoipa za anyamatawo zinali zazikuru ndithu pamaso pa Yehova; pakuti anthu anaipidwa ndi nsembe ya Yehova.
1Samuel2:18 Koma Samueli anatumikira pamaso pa Yehova akali mwana
1Samuel2:19 Ndiponso amace akamsokera mwinjiro waung'ono
1Samuel2:20 Ndipo Eli anadalitsa Elikana ndi mkazi wace
1Samuel2:21 Ndipo Yehova anakumbukila Hana
1Samuel2:22 Ndipo Eli anali wokalamba ndithu; namva zonse ana ace anacitira Aisrayeli onse
1Samuel2:23 Ndipo iye ananena nao
1Samuel2:24 Iai
1Samuel2:25 Munthu akacimwira munthu mnzace oweruza adzaweruza mrandu wace; koma ngati munthu acimwira Yehova
1Samuel2:26 Ndipo mwanayo Samueli anakulakula
1Samuel2:27 Ndipo anafika kwa Eli munthu wa Mulungu
1Samuel2:28 Kodi sindinasankhula iye pakati pa mafuko onse a Israyeli
1Samuel2:29 Nanga umaponnderezeranji nsembe yanga ndi copereka canga
1Samuel2:30 Cifukwa cace Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli akuti
1Samuel2:31 Ona
1Samuel2:32 Ndipo udzaona masautso a mokhalamo Mulungu
1Samuel2:33 Ndipo munthu wako
1Samuel2:34 Ndipo ici cimene cidzafikira ana ako awiri Hofeni ndi Pinehasi
1Samuel2:35 Ndipo ndidzadziukitsira wansembe wokhulupirika
1Samuel2:36 Ndipo kudzali kuti yense wakusiyidwa wa m'banja lako adzabwera kwa iye nadzawerama ndi kupempha ndalama ndi cakudya
1Samuel3:1 Ndipo mwanayo Samueli anatumikira Yehova pamaso pa Eli. Ndipo masiku aja mau a Yehova anamveka kamodzi kamodzi; masomphenya sanaoneka-oneka.
1Samuel3:2 Ndipo kunali nthawi yomweyo Eli atagona m'malo mwace (maso ace anayamba cizirezire osatha kupenya bwino);
1Samuel3:3 ndi nyali ya Mulungu isanazime
1Samuel3:4 Pamenepo Yehova anaitana Samueli; ndipo iye anayankha kuti
1Samuel3:5 Ndipo anathamangira kwa Eli nati
1Samuel3:6 Ndipo Yehova anabwereza kumuitana
1Samuel3:7 Koma Samueli sanadziwe Yehova
1Samuel3:8 Ndipo Yehova anabwereza kumuitana Samueli nthawi yacitatu. Ndipo iye anauka napita kwa Eli
1Samuel3:9 Cifukwa cace Eli anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel3:10 Ndipo Yehova anabwera
1Samuel3:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Samueli
1Samuel3:12 Tsiku lija udidzamcitira Eli zonse ndinaneneratu za pa banja lace
1Samuel3:13 Popeza ndinamuuza kuti ndidzaweruza nyumba yace kosatha cifukwa ca zoipa anazidziwa
1Samuel3:14 Cifukwa cace ndinalumbira kwa banja la Eli
1Samuel3:15 Ndipo Samueli anagona kufikira m'mawa
1Samuel3:16 Pamenepo Eli anaitana Samueli
1Samuel3:17 Ndipo anati
1Samuel3:18 Ndipo Samueli anamuuza zonse
1Samuel3:19 Ndipo Samueli anakula
1Samuel3:20 Ndipo Aisrayeli onse
1Samuel3:21 Ndipo Yehova anaonekanso m'Silo
1Samuel4:1 Ndipo mau a Samueli anafikira kwa Aisrayeli onse. Ndipo Aisrayeli anaturuka kukaponyana nkhondo ndi Afilisti
1Samuel4:2 Ndipo Afilistiwo anandandalitsa nkhondo yao pa Aisrayeli; ndipo pokomana nkhondo Aisrayeli anakanthidwa ndi Afilisti. Ndipo anapha kuthengoko anthu zikwi zinai a khamu lao.
1Samuel4:3 Ndipo pamene anthu anafika ku zithandozo
1Samuel4:4 Cifukwa cace anatumiza ku Silo kuti akatenge kumeneko likasalo la cipangano la Yehova wa makamu
1Samuel4:5 Pakufika likasalo la cipangano la Yehova kuzithando
1Samuel4:6 Ndipo Afilistiwo pakumva kubuma pa kupfuula kwao
1Samuel4:7 Ndipo Afilisti anaopa
1Samuel4:8 Tsoka kwa ife! adzatilanditsa ndani m'manja a milungu yamphamvu imeneyi? Milungu ija inakantha Aaigupto ndi masautso onse m'cipululu ndi yomweyi.
1Samuel4:9 Limbikani
1Samuel4:10 Ndipo Afilisti anaponyana nao
1Samuel4:11 Ndipo likasa la Mulungu linalandidwa
1Samuel4:12 Ndipo munthu wa pfuko la Benjamini anathamanga kucokera ku khamu la ankhondo
1Samuel4:13 Pakufika iye
1Samuel4:14 Ndipo Eli
1Samuel4:15 Koma Eli anali ndi zaka makumi asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu ndi zitatu; ndipo maso ace anangokhala tong'o osapenya
1Samuel4:16 Ndipo munthuyo anati kwa Eli
1Samuel4:17 Ndipo wakubwera ndi mauyo anayankha
1Samuel4:18 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel4:19 Ndipo mpongozi wace
1Samuel4:20 Ndipo pamene adati amwalire
1Samuel4:21 Ndipo iye anamucha dzina la mwanayo Ikabodi
1Samuel4:22 Ndipo iye anati
1Samuel5:1 Ndipo Afilisti anatenga likasa la Mulungu
1Samuel5:2 Ndipo Afilistiwo anatenga likasa la Mulungu
1Samuel5:3 Ndipo pakuuka a ku Asidodi mamawa
1Samuel5:4 Ndipo m'mawa mwace polawirira
1Samuel5:5 Cifukwa cace angakhale ansembe
1Samuel5:6 Koma Yehova anabvuta iwo a ku Asidodi ndi dzanja lace
1Samuel5:7 Ndipo pamene anthu a ku Asidodi anaona kuti ncomweco
1Samuel5:8 Cifukwa cace anatumiza mithenga
1Samuel5:9 Ndipo kunali atafika nalo
1Samuel5:10 Cifukwa cace anatumiza likasa la Mulungu ku Ekroni. Ndipo kunali pofika likasalo ku Ekroni
1Samuel5:11 Cifukwa cace anatumiza
1Samuel5:12 Ndipo amene anapanda kufa anagwidwa ndi mafundowo; ndi kulira kwa mudziwo kunakwera kumwamba.
1Samuel6:1 Ndipo likasa la Yehova linakhala ku dziko la Afilisti miyezi isanu ndi iwiri.
1Samuel6:2 Ndipo Afilistiwo anaitana ansembe ndi oombeza
1Samuel6:3 Ndipo iwo anati
1Samuel6:4 Ndipo iwo aja anati
1Samuel6:5 Cifukwa cace muzipanga zifanizo za mafundo anu
1Samuel6:6 Mulikuumitsiranji mitima yanu
1Samuel6:7 Cifukwa cace tsono
1Samuel6:8 ndipo mutenge likasa la Yehova
1Samuel6:9 Ndipo muyang'anire
1Samuel6:10 Ndipo anthuwo anatero; natenga ng'ombe ziwiri zamkaka
1Samuel6:11 naika likasa la Yehova pagaretapo
1Samuel6:12 Ndipo ng'ombezo zinatsata njira yolunjika ku Betisemesi
1Samuel6:13 Ndipo a ku Betisemesi analikumweta tirigu wao m'cigwamo; natukula maso ao
1Samuel6:14 Ndipo garetalo linafika m'munda wa Yoswa wa ku Betisemesi
1Samuel6:15 Ndipo Alevi anatsitsa likasa la Yehova
1Samuel6:16 Ndipo pamene mafumu asanu a Afilisti anaonerako
1Samuel6:17 Ndipo amenewa ndiwo mafundo agolidi amene anabwezera kwa Yehova akhale nsembe yoparamula
1Samuel6:18 ndiponso mbewa zagolidi
1Samuel6:19 Ndipo Mulungu anakantha anthu a ku Betisemesi
1Samuel6:20 Ndipo a ku Betisemesi anati
1Samuel6:21 Ndipo anatumiza mithenga kwa anthu a ku Kiriati-yearimu
1Samuel7:1 Ndipo anthu a ku Kiriati-yearimu anabwera
1Samuel7:2 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel7:3 Ndipo Samueli analankhula ndi banja lonse la Israyeli nati
1Samuel7:4 Pomwepo ana a Israyeli anacotsa. Abaala ndi Asitaroti
1Samuel7:5 Ndipo Samueli anati
1Samuel7:6 Ndipo anaunjikana ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:7 Ndipo pamene Afilisti anamva kuti Aisrayeli anasonkhana pamodzi ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:8 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel7:9 Ndipo Samueli anatenga mwana wa nkhosa woyamwa
1Samuel7:10 Ndipo pamene Samueli analikupereka nsembe yopserezayo
1Samuel7:11 Ndipo Aisrayeli anaturuka ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:12 Pamenepo Samueli anatenga mwala nauimika pakati pa Mizipa ndi Seni
1Samuel7:13 Comweco anagonjetsa Afilisti
1Samuel7:14 Ndipo midzi ya Israyeli imene Afilisti adailanda kale inabwezedwa kwa Aisrayeli
1Samuel7:15 ndipo Samueli anaweruza Israyeli masiku onse a moyo wace.
1Samuel7:16 Ndipo anayenda cozungulira caka ndi caka ku Beteli
1Samuel7:17 Ndipo anabwera ku Rama
1Samuel8:1 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel8:2 Dzina la mwana wace woyamba ndiye Yoeli
1Samuel8:3 Ndipo ana ace sanatsanza makhalidwe ace
1Samuel8:4 Pamenepo akuru onse a Israyeli anasonkhana
1Samuel8:5 nanena naye
1Samuel8:6 Koma cimeneci sicinakondweretsa Samueli
1Samuel8:7 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Samueli
1Samuel8:8 Monga nchito zao zonse anazicita kuyambira tsiku lija ndinawaturutsa ku Aigupto
1Samuel8:9 Cifukwa cace tsono umvere mau ao koma uwacenjeze kolimba
1Samuel8:10 Ndipo Samueli anauza anthu akumpempha iye mfumu mau onse a Yehova
1Samuel8:11 Nati
1Samuel8:12 idzawaika akhale otsogolera cikwi
1Samuel8:13 Ndipo idzatenga ana anu akazi apange zonunkhira
1Samuel8:14 Ndipo idzalanda minda yanu
1Samuel8:15 Ndipo idzatenga limodzi la magawo khumi la mbeu zanu
1Samuel8:16 Ndipo idzatenga akapolo anu
1Samuel8:17 Idzatenga limodzi la magawo khumi la zoweta zanu; ndipo inu mudzakhala akapoloace.
1Samuel8:18 Ndipotsiku lija mudzapfuula cifukwa ca mfumu yanu munadzisankhira nokha; koma Yehova sadzayankha inu tsiku lijalo.
1Samuel8:19 Koma anthu anakana kumvera mau a Samueli; nati
1Samuel8:20 kuti ifenso tikafanane nao anthu a mitundu yonse; kuti mfumu yathuyo ikatiweruzire
1Samuel8:21 Ndipo Samueli anamva mau onse a anthuwo
1Samuel8:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel9:1 Ndipo panali munthu Mbenlamlni
1Samuel9:2 Iye anali ndi mwana wamwamuna dzina lace Sauli
1Samuel9:3 Ndipo aburu a Kisi
1Samuel9:4 Ndipo anapyola dziko lamapiri la Efraimu
1Samuel9:5 Pamene anafika ku dziko la Zufi
1Samuel9:6 Koma ananena naye
1Samuel9:7 Ndipo Sauli ananena ndi mnyamata wace
1Samuel9:8 Ndipo mnyamatayo anayankhanso kwa Sauli nati
1Samuel9:9 Kale m'Israyeli
1Samuel9:10 Pamenepo Sauli anati kwa mnyamata wace
1Samuel9:11 Pakukwera kumudziko anapeza anthu akazi alikuturuka kuti akatunge madzi
1Samuel9:12 Ndipo anawayankha nati
1Samuel9:13 mutafika m'mudzi
1Samuel9:14 Ndipo iwowa anakwera kumudzi; ndipo m'mene analowa m'mudzimo
1Samuel9:15 Ndipo Yehova anaululiratu m'khutu la Samueli dzulo lace la tsiku limene Sauli anabwera
1Samuel9:16 Mawa
1Samuel9:17 Ndipo pamene Samueli anaona Sauli
1Samuel9:18 Pomwepo Sauli anayandikira kwa Samueli pakati pa cipata
1Samuel9:19 Ndipo Samueli anayankha Sauli nati
1Samuel9:20 Za aburu ako atatayika adapita masiku atatu
1Samuel9:21 Ndipo Sauli anayankha nati
1Samuel9:22 Ndipo Samueli anatenga Sauli ndi mnyamata wace
1Samuel9:23 Ndipo Samueli ananena ndi wophika
1Samuel9:24 Ndipo wophikayo ananyamula mwendo ndi mnofu wace
1Samuel9:25 Ndipo pamene anatsika kumsanje kulowanso kumudzi
1Samuel9:26 Ndipo anauka mamawa; ndipo kutaca
1Samuel9:27 Ndipo pamene analikutsika polekeza mudzi
1Samuel10:1 Pamenepo Samueli anatenga nsupa ya mafuta
1Samuel10:2 M'mene talekana lero
1Samuel10:3 Mukapitirira pamenepo tsono ndi kufika ku mtengo wathundu wa ku Tabori
1Samuel10:4 Iwowa adzakulankhulani
1Samuel10:5 Ndipo m'tsogolo mwace mudzafika ku phiri la Mulungu
1Samuel10:6 ndipo Mzimu wa Yehova udzagwera inu kolimba
1Samuel10:7 Ndipo zitakufikirani zizindikilo izi mudzacita monga mudzaona pocita
1Samuel10:8 Ndipo mudzatsika patsogolo pa ine kunka ku Giligala; ndipo
1Samuel10:9 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel10:10 Ndipo pamene anafika kucitunda kuja
1Samuel10:11 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel10:12 Ndipo munthu wina wa komweko anayankha nati
1Samuel10:13 Ndipo pamene adatha kunenera anafika kumsanjeko.
1Samuel10:14 Ndipo mbale wa atate wace wa Sauli ananena kwa iye ndi mnyamata wace
1Samuel10:15 Ndipo mbale wa atate wa Sauli anati
1Samuel10:16 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa mbale wa atate wace
1Samuel10:17 Ndipo Samueli anaitana anthu onse asonkhane kwa Yehova ku Mizipa;
1Samuel10:18 nanena ndi ana a Israyeli
1Samuel10:19 koma lero inu mwakana Mulungu wanu amene anakupulumutsani yekha m'matsoka anu onse
1Samuel10:20 Comweco Samueli anayandikizitsa mafuko onse a Israyeli
1Samuel10:21 Nayandikizitsa pfuko la Benjamini
1Samuel10:22 Cifukwa cace anaonjeza kufunsa Yehova
1Samuel10:23 Ndipo anathamanga
1Samuel10:24 Ndipo Samueli ananena ndi anthu onse
1Samuel10:25 Pamenepo Samueli anafotokozera anthu macitidwe a ufumu
1Samuel10:26 Ndi Sauli yemwe anamuka ku nyumba yace ku Gibeya; ndipo am'khamu anatsagana naye iwo amene Mulungu adakhudza mitima yao.
1Samuel10:27 Koma oipa ena anati
1Samuel11:1 Pamenepo Nahasi M-amoni anakwera
1Samuel11:2 Ndipo Nahasi Mamoni ananena nao
1Samuel11:3 Ndipo akuru a ku Yabezi ananena naye
1Samuel11:4 Tsono mithengayo inafika ku Gibeya kwa Sauli
1Samuel11:5 Ndipo
1Samuel11:6 Ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unamgwera Sauli mwamphamvu
1Samuel11:7 Natenga ng'ombe ziwiri nazidula nthuli nthuli
1Samuel11:8 Ndipo anawawerenga ku Bezeki; ndipo ana a Israyeli anali zikwi mazana atatu
1Samuel11:9 Ndipo anati kwa mithenga inadzayi
1Samuel11:10 Cifukwa cace anthu a ku Yabezi anati
1Samuel11:11 Ndipo m'mawa mwace Sauli anagawa anthu magulu atatu; ndipo iwowa anafika pakati pa zithandozo m'ulonda wa mamawa
1Samuel11:12 Ndipo anthu anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel11:13 Koma Sauli anati
1Samuel11:14 Ndipo Samueli ananena kwa anthuwo
1Samuel11:15 Ndipo anthu onse anapita ku Giligala; ndi kumeneko analonga Sauli mfumu pamaso pa Yehova m'Giligala; ndi pamenepo anaphera nsembe zoyamika pamaso pa Yehova; ndi pomwepo Sauli ndi anthu onse a Israyeli anakondwera kwakukuru.
1Samuel12:1 Ndipo Samueli anauza Aisrayeli onse
1Samuel12:2 Ndipo tsopano
1Samuel12:3 Ndikalipo ine; citani umboni wonditsutsa pamaso pa Yehova
1Samuel12:4 Ndipo iwo anati
1Samuel12:5 Ndipo iye ananena nao
1Samuel12:6 Ndipo Samueli ananena ndi anthuwo
1Samuel12:7 Cifukwa cace tsono
1Samuel12:8 Pamene Yakobo anafika ku Aigupto
1Samuel12:9 Koma iwowa anaiwala Yehova Mulungu wao
1Samuel12:10 Ndipo anapemphera kwa Yehova
1Samuel12:11 Ndipo Yehova anatumiza Yerubaala
1Samuel12:12 Ndipo pamene munaona kuti Nahasi mfumu ya ana a Amoni inadza kuponyana nanu
1Samuel12:13 Cifukwa cace siyi mfumu imene munaisankha
1Samuel12:14 Mukaopa Yehova ndi kumtumikira ndi kumvera mau ace
1Samuel12:15 Koma mukapanda kumvera mau a Yehova
1Samuel12:16 Cifukwa cace tsono
1Samuel12:17 Si nyengo yakumweta tirigu lero kodi? Ndidzaitana kwa Yehova
1Samuel12:18 Momwemo Samueli anaitana kwa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anatumiza bingu ndi mvula tsiku lomwelo; ndipo anthu onse anaopa kwambiri Yehova ndi Samueli.
1Samuel12:19 Ndipo anthu onse ananena ndi Samueli
1Samuel12:20 Ndipo Samueli ananena kwa anthuwo
1Samuel12:21 musapambukire inu kutsata zinthu zacabe
1Samuel12:22 Pakuti Yehova sadzasiya anthu ace cifukwa ca dzina lace lalikuru; pakuti kudamkomera Yehova kukuyesani inu anthu a iye yekha.
1Samuel12:23 Ndipo inenso
1Samuel12:24 Koma mumuope Yehova
1Samuel12:25 Koma mukaumirirabe kucita coipa
1Samuel13:1 Sauli anali ndi zaka makumi atatu pamene anayamba ufumu wace; nakhala mfumu ya Israyeli zaka ziwiri.
1Samuel13:2 Pamenepo Sauli anadzisankhira anthu zikwi zitatu a Israyeli; zikwi ziwiri za iwowa zinali ndi Sauli ku Mikimasi
1Samuel13:3 Ndipo Jonatani anathyola kaboma ka Afilisti lokhala ku Geba
1Samuel13:4 Ndipo Aisrayeli onse anamva kunena kuti Sauli anathyola kaboma ka Afilisti
1Samuel13:5 Ndipo Afilisti anasonkhana kuti akamenyane ndi Aisrayeli
1Samuel13:6 Pamene anthu a Israyeli anazindikira kuti ali m'kupsinjika
1Samuel13:7 Ndipo Ahebri ena anaoloka Yordano nafika ku dziko la Gadi ndi Gileadi; koma Sauli akali ku Giligala
1Samuel13:8 Ndipo iye anatsotsa masiku asanu ndi awiri
1Samuel13:9 Pamenepo Sauli anati
1Samuel13:10 Ndipo kunali kuti pakutsiriza iye kupereka nsembe yopserezayo
1Samuel13:11 Ndipo Samueli anati
1Samuel13:12 cifukwa cace ndinati
1Samuel13:13 Ndipo Samueli ananena ndi Sauli
1Samuel13:14 Koma tsopano ufumu wanu sudzakhala cikhalire; Yehova wadzifunira munthu wa pamtima pace; ndipo Yehova wamuika iye akhale mtsogoleri wa anthu ace
1Samuel13:15 Ndipo Samueli anauka nacoka ku Giligala kunka ku Gibeya wa ku Benjamini. Ndipo Sauli anawerenga anthu amene anali naye
1Samuel13:16 Ndipo Sauli
1Samuel13:17 Ndipo owawanya anaturuka ku zithando za Afilisti magulu atatu; gulu limodzi linalowa njira yonka ku Ofra
1Samuel13:18 gulu lina linalowa njira yonka ku Betihoroni; ndi gulu linanso linalowa ku njira ya kumalire
1Samuel13:19 Ndipo m'dziko lonse la Israyeli simunapezeka wosula; popeza Afilisti adati
1Samuel13:20 koma Aisrayeli onse adafotsikira kwa Afilisti
1Samuel13:21 koma analf nao matupa kukonza makasu
1Samuel13:22 Comweco kunali kuti tsiku lankhondolo sunapezeka mkondo kapena lupanga m'manja a anthu onse anali ndi Sauli ndi Jonatani; koma Sauli yekha ndi Jonatani mwana wace anali nazo.
1Samuel13:23 Ndipo a ku kaboma ka Afilisti anaturuka kunka ku mpata wa ku Mikimasi.
1Samuel14:1 Ndipo kunali tsiku lina kuti Jonatani mwana wa Sauli ananena ndi mnyamata wonyamula zida zace
1Samuel14:2 Ndipo Sauli analikukhala m'matsekerezo a Gibeya patsinde pa mtengo wankhangaza uli ku Migroni; ndipo panali naye anthu monga mazana asanu ndi limodzi;
1Samuel14:3 ndi Ahiya mwana wa Ahitubi mbale wace wa Ikabodi
1Samuel14:4 Ndipo pakati pa mipata imene Jonatani anafuna kupitapo kunka ku kaboma ka Afilisti
1Samuel14:5 Phiri lija linaimirira kuyang'ana kumpoto pandunji pa Mikimasi
1Samuel14:6 Ndipo Jonatani ananena ndi mnyamata wonyamula zida zace
1Samuel14:7 Ndipo wonyamula zida zace ananena naye
1Samuel14:8 Ndipo Jonatani anati
1Samuel14:9 Akatero ndi ife kuti
1Samuel14:10 Koma akatero kuti
1Samuel14:11 Ndipo onse awiri anadziulula kwa a ku kaboma ka Afilistiwo; ndipo Afilistiwo anati
1Samuel14:12 Ndipo a ku kabomawo anayankha Jonatani ndi wonyamula zida zace
1Samuel14:13 Ndipo Jonatani anakwera cokwawa
1Samuel14:14 Kuwapha koyambako
1Samuel14:15 Ndipo kunali kunthunthumira kuzithando
1Samuel14:16 Ndipo ozonda a Sauli ku Gibeya wa ku Benjamini anayang'ana; ndipo
1Samuel14:17 Pamenepo Sauli ananena ndi anthu amene anali naye
1Samuel14:18 Ndipo Sauli ananena ndi Ahiya
1Samuel14:19 Ndipo kunali m'mene Sauli anali cilankhulire ndi wansembeyo
1Samuel14:20 Ndipo Sauli ndi anthu onse amene anali naye anaunjikana pamodzi
1Samuel14:21 Ndiponso Ahebri akukhala nao Afilisti kale
1Samuel14:22 Anateronso Aisrayeli onse akubisala m'phiri la Efraimu
1Samuel14:23 Comweco Yehova anapulumutsa Israyeli tsiku lija; ndipo nkhondo inapitirira pa Betaveni.
1Samuel14:24 Ndipo Aisrayeli anasauka tsiku lija; pakuti Sauli anawalumbirira
1Samuel14:25 Ndipo anthu onsewo analowa munkhalango
1Samuel14:26 Ndipo pakufika anthuwo m'nkhalangomo
1Samuel14:27 Koma Jonatani sanamva m'mene atate wace analumbirira anthu; cifukwa cace iye ana tam balitsa ndodo ya m'dzanja lace
1Samuel14:28 Ndipo wina wa anthuwo anayankha
1Samuel14:29 Ndipo Jonatani anati
1Samuel14:30 Koposa kotani nanga
1Samuel14:31 Ndipo anakantha Afilisti tsiku lija kuyambira ku Mikimasi kufikira ku Ajaloni
1Samuel14:32 Ndipo anthuwo anathamangira zowawanyazo
1Samuel14:33 Pamenepo anauza Sauli
1Samuel14:34 Ndipo Sauli anati
1Samuel14:35 Ndipo Sauli anamangira Yehova guwa la nsembe; limenelo ndilo guwa loyamba iye anamangira Yehova.
1Samuel14:36 Ndipo Sauli anati
1Samuel14:37 Ndipo Sauli anafunsira uphungu kwa Mulungu
1Samuel14:38 Ndipo Sauli anati
1Samuel14:39 Pakuti
1Samuel14:40 Ndipo iye ananena ndi Aisrayeli onse
1Samuel14:41 Cifukwa cace Sauli ananena ndi Yehova
1Samuel14:42 Ndipo Sauli anati
1Samuel14:43 Pamenepo Sauli ananena ndi Jonatani
1Samuel14:44 Pamenepo Sauli anati
1Samuel14:45 Ndipo anthuwo ananena ndi Sauli
1Samuel14:46 ndi Afilistiwo anamuka ku malo a iwo okha.
1Samuel14:47 Ndipo pamene Sauli atakhazikitsa ufumu wa pa Israyeli
1Samuel14:48 Ndipo iye anakula mphamvu
1Samuel14:49 Ndipo ana a Sauli ndiwo Jonatani
1Samuel14:50 ndi dzina la mkazi wa Sauli ndi Ahinamu mwana wa Ahimazi; ndi dzina la kazembe wa khamu lankhondo lace ndiye Abineri mwana wa Neri
1Samuel14:51 Ndipo atate wa Sauli ndiye Kisi; ndipo Neri atate wa Abineri ndiye mwana wa Abiyeli.
1Samuel14:52 Ndipo panali nkhondo yowawa ndi Afilisti masiku onse a Sauli; ndipo Sauli pakuona munthu wamphamvu

1Samuel15:2 Atero Yehova wa makamu
1Samuel15:3 Muka tsopano
1Samuel15:4 Ndipo Sauli anamemeza anthu

1Samuel15:6 Ndipo Sauli anauza Akeni kuti
1Samuel15:7 Ndipo Sauli anakantha Aamaleki
1Samuel15:8 Namtenga wamoyo Agagi
1Samuel15:9 Koma Sauli ndi anthu anamsunga wamoyo Agagi
1Samuel15:10 Pamenepo mau a Yehova anafika kwa Samueli
1Samuel15:11 Kundicititsa cisoni kuti ndinaika Sauli akhale mfumu; pakuti wabwerera wosanditsata Ine
1Samuel15:12 Ndipo Samueli analawirira m'mawa kuti akakomane ndi Sauli; ndipo munthu anamuuza Samueli kuti
1Samuel15:13 Ndipo Samueli anadza kwa Sauli; ndipo Sauli anati kwa iye
1Samuel15:14 Ndipo Samueli anati
1Samuel15:15 Ndipo Sauli anati

1Samuel15:17 Nati Samueli
