1Samuel15:19 Cifukwa ninji tsono simunamvera mau a Yehova
1Samuel15:20 Ndipo Sauli ananena ndi Samueli
1Samuel15:21 Koma anthuwo anatengako zowawanya
1Samuel15:22 Ndipo Samueli anati
1Samuel15:23 Pakuti kupanduka kuli ngati coipa ca kucita nyanga
1Samuel15:24 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel15:25 Cifukwa cace tsono
1Samuel15:26 Ndipo Samueli ananena ndi Sauli
1Samuel15:27 Ndipo pakupotoloka Samueli kuti acoke
1Samuel15:28 Ndipo Samueli ananena naye
1Samuel15:29 Ndiponso Wamphamvu wa Israyeli sanama kapena kulapa; popeza iye sali munthu kuti akalapa.
1Samuel15:30 Pomwepo iye anati
1Samuel15:31 Comweco Samueli anabwerera natsata Sauli; ndi Sauli analambira Yehova.
1Samuel15:32 Ndipo Samueli anati
1Samuel15:33 Ndipo Samueli anati
1Samuel15:34 Pamenepo Samueli ananka ku Rama; ndi Sauli anakwera kunka ku nyumba yace ku Gibeya wa Sauli.
1Samuel15:35 Ndipo Samueli sanadzanso kudzaona Sauli kufikira tsiku la imfa yace; koma Samueli analira cifukwa ca Sauli; ndipo Yehova anali ndi cisoni kuti anamlonga Sauli mfumu ya Israyeli.
1Samuel16:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Samueli
1Samuel16:2 Ndipo Samueli anati
1Samuel16:3 Ndipo uitane Jese abwere kunsembeko
1Samuel16:4 Ndipo Samueli anacita cimene Yehova ananena
1Samuel16:5 Nati iye
1Samuel16:6 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel16:7 Koma Yehova ananena ndi Samueli
1Samuel16:8 Pamenepo Jese anaitana Abinadabu nampititsa pa Samueli. Ndipo iye adati
1Samuel16:9 Pamenepo Jese anapititsapo Sama. Ndipo anati
1Samuel16:10 Ndipo Jese anapititsapo ana ace amuna asanu ndi awiri. Koma Samueli anati kwa Jese
1Samuel16:11 Ndipo Samueli anati kwa Jese
1Samuel16:12 Ndipo anatumiza munthu
1Samuel16:13 Pamenepo Samueli anatenga nyanga ya mafuta
1Samuel16:14 Koma mzimu wa Yehova unamcokera Sauli
1Samuel16:15 Ndipo anyamata a Sauli ananena naye
1Samuel16:16 Tsono inu mbuye wathu muuze anyamata anu
1Samuel16:17 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa anyamata ace
1Samuel16:18 Ndipo mnyamata wace wina anayankha
1Samuel16:19 Cifukwa cace Sauli anatumiza mithenga kwa Jese
1Samuel16:20 Ndipo Jese anatenga buru namsenza mkate
1Samuel16:21 Ndipo Davide anafika kwa Sauli
1Samuel16:22 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza kwa Jese
1Samuel16:23 Ndipo kunali kuti pamene mzimu woipawo wocokera kwa Mulungu unali pa Sauli
1Samuel17:1 Pamenepo Afilisti anasonkhanitsa makamu ao a nkhondo
1Samuel17:2 Ndipo Sauli ndi anthu a Israyeli anasonkhana
1Samuel17:3 Ndipo Afilisti anaima paphiri tsidya lija
1Samuel17:4 Ndipo ku zithando za Afilisti kunaturuka ciwinda
1Samuel17:5 Ndipo anali ndi cisoti camkuwa pamutu pace
1Samuel17:6 nakuta msongolo wace ndi cobvala camkuwa
1Samuel17:7 Ndipo mtengo wa mkondo wace unali ngati mtanda woombera nsaru; ndi khali la mkondowo linalemera ngati masekeli mazana asanu ndi limodzi a citsulo; ndipo womnyamulira cikopa anamtsogolera.
1Samuel17:8 Naima iye naitana makamu a nkhondo a Israyeli
1Samuel17:9 Akakhoza iyeyo kuponyana ndi ine ndi kundipha
1Samuel17:10 Nati Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:11 Ndipo pamene Sauli ndi Aisrayeli onse anamva mau ao a Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:12 Tsono Davide anali mwana wa M-efrati uja wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda
1Samuel17:13 Ndipo ana atatu akuru a Jese anatsata Sauli kunkhondoko; ndi maina ao a ana ace atatuwo adapita ku nkhondowo ndiwo Eliabu woyambayo
1Samuel17:14 Ndipo Davide anali wotsiriza; ndi akuru atatuwo anamtsata Sauli.
1Samuel17:15 Koma Davide akamuka kwa Sauli
1Samuel17:16 Ndipo Mfilistiyo anayandikira m'mawa ndi madzulo
1Samuel17:17 Ndipo Jese anati kwa Davide mwana wace
1Samuel17:18 nunyamule ncinci izi khumi zamase ukapatse mtsogoleri wa cikwi cao
1Samuel17:19 Tsono Sauli
1Samuel17:20 Ndipo Davide anauka m'mamawa
1Samuel17:21 Ndipo Israyeli ndi Afilisti anandandalitsa nkhondo zao
1Samuel17:22 Ndipo Davide anasiya akatundu ace m'dzanja la wosungira akatundu
1Samuel17:23 Ndipo m'mene iye anali cilankhulire nao
1Samuel17:24 Ndipo Aisrayeli onse
1Samuel17:25 Nati Aisrayeli
1Samuel17:26 Ndipo Davide analankhula ndi anthu akuima pafupi ndi iye
1Samuel17:27 Ndipo anthuwo anamyankha motero
1Samuel17:28 Ndipo Eliabu mkuru wace anamumva iye alikulankhula ndi anthu; ndipo Eliabu anapsa mtima ndi Davide
1Samuel17:29 Ndipo Davide anati
1Samuel17:30 Napotolokera iye kwa munthu wina
1Samuel17:31 Ndipo pamene mau adanena Davide anamveka
1Samuel17:32 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Sauli
1Samuel17:33 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:34 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Sauli
1Samuel17:35 ndinacithamangira
1Samuel17:36 Ine kapolo wanu ndinapha mkango ndi cimbalangondo zonse ziwiri; ndipo Mfilisti uyu wosadulidwa adzakhala ngati mmodzi wa izo
1Samuel17:37 Nati Davide
1Samuel17:38 Ndipo Sauli anabveka Davide zobvala zace za iye yekha
1Samuel17:39 Ndipo Davide anamanga lupanga lace pamwamba pa zobvala zace
1Samuel17:40 Natenga ndodo yace m'dzanja lace nadzisankhira miyala isanu yosalala ya mumtsinje
1Samuel17:41 Ndipo Mfilistiyo anadza
1Samuel17:42 Ndipo Mfilisti pakumwazamwaza maso
1Samuel17:43 Ndipo Mfilisti anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:44 Ndipo Mfilistiyo anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:45 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:46 Lero lino Yehova adzakupereka iwe m'dzanja langa
1Samuel17:47 Ndi msonkhano wonse uno udzazindikira kuti Yehova sapulumutsa ndi lupanga
1Samuel17:48 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel17:49 Ndipo Davide anapisa dzanja lace m'thumba mwace
1Samuel17:50 Comweco Davide anapambana Mfilistiyo ndi mwala wa coponyera cace
1Samuel17:51 Potero Davide anathamanga naima pa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:52 Ndipo anthu a Israyeli ndi Ayuda ananyamuka
1Samuel17:53 Ndipo ana a Israyeli atathamangira Afilisti
1Samuel17:54 Ndipo Davide anatenga mutu wa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:55 Ndipo pamene Sauli anaona Davide alikuturukira kwa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:56 Ndipo mfumu inati
1Samuel17:57 Ndipo pamene Davide anabwera
1Samuel17:58 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa iye
1Samuel18:1 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel18:2 Ndipo Sauli anamtenga tsiku lomwelo
1Samuel18:3 Pamenepo Jonatani ndi Davide anapangana pangano
1Samuel18:4 Ndipo Jonatani anabvula maraya ace anali nao
1Samuel18:5 Ndipo Davide anaturuka kunka kuli konse Sauli anamtumako
1Samuel18:6 Ndipo kunali pakudza iwo
1Samuel18:7 Ndipo akazi anathirirana mang'ombe m'kuyimba kwao
1Samuel18:8 Koma Sauli anakwiya ndithu
1Samuel18:9 Ndipo kuyambira tsiku lomwelo ndi m'tsogolo mwace
1Samuel18:10 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwace
1Samuel18:11 Ndipo Sauli anaponya mkondowo; pakuti anati
1Samuel18:12 Ndipo Sauli anaopa Davide
1Samuel18:13 Cifukwa cace Sauli anamcotsa kuti asakhale naye
1Samuel18:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala wocenjera m'mayendedwe ace onse; ndipo Yehova anali naye.
1Samuel18:15 Ndipo pamene Sauli anaona kuti analikukhala wocenjera ndithu anamuopa.
1Samuel18:16 Koma Aisrayeli onse ndi Ayuda onse anamkonda Davide pakuti anawatsogolera kuturuka ndi kulowa nao.
1Samuel18:17 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa Davide
1Samuel18:18 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Sauli
1Samuel18:19 Koma kunali nthawi imene akadapatsa Merabi mwana wamkazi wa Sauli kwa Davide
1Samuel18:20 Ndipo Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Sauli anakonda Davide; ndipo pakumva Sauli
1Samuel18:21 Nati Sauli
1Samuel18:22 Ndipo Sauli analamulira anyamata ace
1Samuel18:23 Ndipo anyamata a Sauli analankhula mau awa m'makutu a Davide. Nati Davide
1Samuel18:24 Ndipo anyamata a Sauli anamuuza
1Samuel18:25 Nati Sauli
1Samuel18:26 Ndipo pamene anyamata ace anauza Davide mau awa
1Samuel18:27 Ndipo asanathe masikuwo
1Samuel18:28 Ndipo Sauli anaona
1Samuel18:29 Sauli nayamba kumuopa Davide kopambana; ndi Sauli anali mdani wa Davide masiku onse.
1Samuel18:30 Pomwepo mafumu a Afilisti anaturuka; ndipo nthawi zonse anaturuka iwo
1Samuel19:1 Ndipo Sauli analankhula kwa Jonatani mwana wace
1Samuel19:2 Koma Jonatani mwana wa Sauli anakondwera kwambiri ndi Davide. Ndipo Jonatani anauza Davide
1Samuel19:3 ndipo ine ndidzaturuka ndi kuima pa mbali ya atate wanga kumunda kumene kuli iwe
1Samuel19:4 Ndipo Jonatani analankhula ndi atate wace mobvomereza Davide
1Samuel19:5 popeza iye anataya moyo wace nakantha Mfilistiyo
1Samuel19:6 Ndipo Sauli anamvera mau a Jonatani; nalumbira
1Samuel19:7 Pamenepo Jonatani anaitana Davide
1Samuel19:8 Ndipo kunalinso nkhondo; ndipo Davide anaturuka
1Samuel19:9 Ndipo mzimu woipa wocokera kwa Yehova unali pa Sauli
1Samuel19:10 Ndipo Sauli anayesa kupyoza Davide kumphatikiza kukhoma ndi mkondowo; koma iye anadzilanditsa kucoka pamaso pa Sauli; ndipo analasa khoma; ndipo Davide anathawa napulumuka usiku uja.
1Samuel19:11 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza mithenga ku nyumba ya Davide imdikire
1Samuel19:12 Comweco Mikala anamtsitsira Davide pazenera
1Samuel19:13 Ndipo Mikala anatenga cifanizo naciika pakama
1Samuel19:14 Ndipo pamene Sauli anatumiza mithenga kuti ikamgwire Davide
1Samuel19:15 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza mithengayo kuti ikaone Davide
1Samuel19:16 Ndipopakulowamithengayo
1Samuel19:17 Nati Sauli kwa Mikala
1Samuel19:18 Comweco anathawa Davide
1Samuel19:19 Ndipo wina anauza Sauli
1Samuel19:20 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza mithenga kuti igwire Davide
1Samuel19:21 Ndipo pamene anauza Sauli
1Samuel19:22 Pamenepo iyenso anamuka ku Rama
1Samuel19:23 Ndipo anapita komweko ku Nayoti m'Rama; ndi mzimu wa Mulungu unamgwera iyenso; ndipo anapitirira
1Samuel19:24 Ndiponso anabvula zobvala zace
1Samuel20:1 Ndipo Davide anathawa ku Nayoti m'Rama
1Samuel20:2 Namyankha
1Samuel20:3 Ndipo Davide analumbiranso nati
1Samuel20:4 Ndipo Jonatani anati kwa Davide
1Samuel20:5 Nati Davide kwa Jonatani
1Samuel20:6 Atate wako akandifuna pang'ono ponse
1Samuel20:7 Tsono akati
1Samuel20:8 Cifukwa cace ucitire kapolo wako zokoma mtima; popeza wamcititsa kapolo wako kupangana nawe pangano la kwa Yehova; koma ngati mwa ine muli coipa ciri conse
1Samuel20:9 Ndipo Jonatani anati
1Samuel20:10 Tsono Davide anati kwa Jonatani
1Samuel20:11 Nati Jonatani kwa Davide
1Samuel20:12 Ndipo Jonatani anati kwa Davide
1Samuel20:13 Mulungu alange Jonatani
1Samuel20:14 Ndipo undionetsere cifundo ca Yehova
1Samuel20:15 komanso usaleke kucitira cifundo a m'nyumba yanga nthawi zonse; mungakhale m'tsogolomo Yehova atathera adani onse a Da vide pa dziko lapansi.
1Samuel20:16 Comweco Jonatani anapangana pangano ndi nyumba ya Davide
1Samuel20:17 Ndipo Jonatani anamlumbiritsa Davide kaciwiri
1Samuel20:18 Tsono Jonatani ananena kwa Davide
1Samuel20:19 Ndipo atapita masiku atatu
1Samuel20:20 Ndipo ine ndidzaponya mibvi itatu pambali pace
1Samuel20:21 Ndipo taona
1Samuel20:22 Koma ndikati kwa mnyamatayo
1Samuel20:23 Ndipo za cija tinakambirana iwe ndi ine
1Samuel20:24 Comweco Davide anabisala kuthengo; ndipo pakukhala mwezi
1Samuel20:25 Mfumu nikhala pa mpando wace
1Samuel20:26 Koma Sauli sananena kanthu tsiku lomwelo; cifukwa anaganizira
1Samuel20:27 Ndipo kunali tsiku laciwiri mwezi utakhala
1Samuel20:28 Ndipo Jonatani anayankha Sauli
1Samuel20:29 nati
1Samuel20:30 Pamenepo Sauli anapsa mtima ndi Jonatani
1Samuel20:31 Popeza nthawi yonse mwana wa Jeseyo akhala ndi moyo padziko
1Samuel20:32 Ndipo Jonatani anayankha Sauli atate wace
1Samuel20:33 Ndipo Sauli anamponyera mkondo kuti amgwaze; momwemo Jonatani anazindikira kuti atate wace anatsimikiza mtima kupha Davide.
1Samuel20:34 Pamenepo Jonatani anauka pagome wolunda ndithu
1Samuel20:35 Ndipo m'mawa
1Samuel20:36 Ndipo anauza mnyamata waceyo
1Samuel20:37 Ndipo mnyamatayo atafika pa malo a mubvi umene Jonatani anauponya
1Samuel20:38 Ndipo Jonatani anapfuulira mnyamatayo
1Samuel20:39 Koma mnyamatayo sanadziwa kanthu; Davide ndi Jonatani okha anadziwa za mranduwoo.
1Samuel20:40 Ndipo Jonatani anapatsa mnyamata wace zida zace
1Samuel20:41 Pomwepo pocoka mnyamatayo
1Samuel20:42 Ndipo Jonatani ananena kwa Davide
1Samuel20:43 Ndipo iye ananyamuka nacoka; koma Jonatani anamuka kumudzi.
1Samuel21:1 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Nobi kwa! Ahimeleki wansembeyo; ndipo Ahimeleki anadza kukomana ndi Davide alikunjenjemera
1Samuel21:2 Nati Davide kwa Ahimeleki wansembeyo
1Samuel21:3 Cifukwa cace tsono muli ndi ciani? mundipatse m'dzanja langa mikate isanu
1Samuel21:4 Ndipo wansembeyo anayankha Davide nati
1Samuel21:5 Ndipo Davide anayankha wansembeyo
1Samuel21:6 Comweco wansembeyo anampatsa mkate wopatulika
1Samuel21:7 Tsono munthu wina wa anyamata a Sauli anali komweko
1Samuel21:8 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Ahimeleki
1Samuel21:9 Nati wansembeyo
1Samuel21:10 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka
1Samuel21:11 Ndipo anyamata a Akisi ananena naye
1Samuel21:12 Ndipo Davide anasunga mau awa mumtima mwace
1Samuel21:13 Nasanduliza makhalidwe ace pamaso pao
1Samuel21:14 Tsono Akisi ananena ndi anyamata ace
1Samuel21:15 Kodi ndisowa anthu amisala kuti mwabwera ndi uyu kuti akhale wamisala pamaso panga? Kodi uyu adzalowa m'nyumba mwanga?
1Samuel22:1 Motero Davide anacoka kumeneko
1Samuel22:2 Ndipo yense wosautsidwa
1Samuel22:3 Ndipo Davide anacoka kumeneko kunka ku Mizipa wa ku Moabu; nati kwa mfumu ya Moabu
1Samuel22:4 Ndipo anawatenga kumka nao pamaso pa mfumu ya Moabu; ndipo iwo anakhala naye nthawi yonse Davide anali ku lingalo.
1Samuel22:5 Ndipo mneneri Gadi anati kwa Davide
1Samuel22:6 Pakumva Sauli kuti anadziwika Davide
1Samuel22:7 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa anyamata ace akuima comzinga
1Samuel22:8 kuti inu nonse munapangana dwembu pa ine
1Samuel22:9 Pamenepo Doegi wa ku Edomu
1Samuel22:10 Ndipo iye anamfunsira kwa Yehova
1Samuel22:11 Pamenepo mfumu anatuma mthenga kukaitana Ahimeleki wansembeyo
1Samuel22:12 Ndipo Sauli anati
1Samuel22:13 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa iye
1Samuel22:14 Ndipo Ahimeleki anayankha mfumu
1Samuel22:15 Kodi ndayamba lero kumfunsira kwa Mulungu? Musatero iai; mfumu asanenera mnyamata wace kanthu
1Samuel22:16 Ndipo mfumu inati
1Samuel22:17 Mfumu niuza asilikari akuima comzinga iye
1Samuel22:18 Pamenepo mfumu inati kwa Doegi
1Samuel22:19 Ndipo anakantha Nobi ndiwo mudzi wa ansembe ndi lupanga lakuthwa
1Samuel22:20 Ndipo mmodzi wa ana a Ahimeleki
1Samuel22:21 Ndipo Abyatara anadziwitsa Davide kuti Sauli anapha ansembe a Yehova.
1Samuel22:22 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Abyatara
1Samuel22:23 Ukhale ndi ine
1Samuel23:1 Tsono anauza Davide
1Samuel23:2 Cifukwa cace Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova
1Samuel23:3 Ndipo anyamata a Davide ananena naye
1Samuel23:4 Tsono Davide anafunsiranso kwa Yehova. Ndipo Yehova anamyankha iye
1Samuel23:5 Comweco Davide ndi anthu ace anamuka ku Keila
1Samuel23:6 Ndipo kunali kuti Abyatara mwana wa Ahimeleki pakuthawira kwa Davide ku Keila
1Samuel23:7 Ndipo anthu anauza Sauli kuti Davide wafika ku Keila. Ndipo Sauli anati
1Samuel23:8 Ndipo Sauli anamemeza anthu onse kunkhondo
1Samuel23:9 Ndipo Davide anadziwa kuti Sauli analikulingalira zomcitira zoipa; nati kwa Abyatara wansembe
1Samuel23:10 Nati Davide
1Samuel23:11 Kodi amuna a ku Keila adzandipereka m'dzanja lace? Kodi Sauli adzatsikira ndithu
1Samuel23:12 Tsono Davide anati
1Samuel23:13 Potero Davide ndi anyamata ace
1Samuel23:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'cipululu m'ngaka
1Samuel23:15 Ndipo Davide anaona kuti Sauli adaturuka kudzafuna moyo wace; Davide nakhala m'cipululu ca Ziti m'nkhalango.
1Samuel23:16 Ndipo Jonatani mwana wa Sauli ananyamuka
1Samuel23:17 Ndipo iye ananena naye
1Samuel23:18 Ndipo awiriwo anapangana pangano pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo Davide anakhala kunkhalango
1Samuel23:19 Ndipo a ku Zifi anakwera kwa Sauli ku Gibeya

1Samuel23:21 Sauli nati
1Samuel23:22 Mukanitu kuti mukadziwitse ndithu
1Samuel23:23 Cifukwa cace yang'anirani
1Samuel23:24 Ndipo iwo ananyamuka
1Samuel23:25 Ndipo Sauli ndi anthu ace anamuka kukamfuna. Koma wina anauza Davide; cifukwa cace anatsikira kuthanthweko
1Samuel23:26 Ndipo Sauli anamuka mbali yina ya phiri
1Samuel23:27 Koma mthenga unafika kwa Sauli ndi kuti
1Samuel23:28 Comweco Sauli anabwerera polondola Davide
1Samuel23:29 Ndipo Davide anakwera kucokera kumeneko
1Samuel24:1 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel24:2 Tsono Sauli anatenga anthu zikwi zitatu osankhika pakati pa Aisrayeli onse
1Samuel24:3 Ndipo panjira anafika ku makola a nkhosa
1Samuel24:4 Ndipo anyamata a Davide ananena naye
1Samuel24:5 Ndipo kunali m'tsogolo mwace kuti a mtima wa Davide unamtsutsa cifukwa adadula mkawo wa mwinjiro wa Sauli.
1Samuel24:6 Nati kwa anyamata ace
1Samuel24:7 Comweco Davide analetsa anyamata ace ndi mau awa
1Samuel24:8 Bwino lace Davide yemwe ananyamuka
1Samuel24:9 Davide nanena ndi Sauli
1Samuel24:10 Onani
1Samuel24:11 Ndiponso atate wanga
1Samuel24:12 Yehova aweruze pakati pa ine ndi inu; ndipo Yehova adzandibwezera cilango kwa inu; koma dzanja langa silidzakhala pa inu.
1Samuel24:13 Monga umanena mwambi wa makolo
1Samuel24:14 Nanga mfumu ya Israyeli inaturukira yani; inu mulikupitikitsa yani? Garu wakufa
1Samuel24:15 Cifukwa cace Yehova akhale woweruza
1Samuel24:16 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel24:17 Nati kwa Davide
1Samuel24:18 Ndipo unatsimikiza lero lino kuti wandicitira zabwino cifukwa sunandipha pamene Yehova anandipereka m'dzanja lako.
1Samuel24:19 Pakuti munthu akapeza mdani wace
1Samuel24:20 Ndipo tsono taona ndidziwa kuti udzakhala mfumu ndithu
1Samuel24:21 Cifukwa cace tsono undilumbirire ndi Yehova
1Samuel24:22 Ndipo Davide analumbirira Sauli. Sauli namuka kwao; koma Davide ndi anthu ace anakwera kumka kungaka.
1Samuel25:1 Ndipo Samueli anamwalira; ndi Aisrayeli onse anaunjikana pamodzi nalira maliro ace
1Samuel25:2 Ndipo panali munthu ku Maoni
1Samuel25:3 Tsono dzina la munthuyo ndiye Nabala
1Samuel25:4 Ndipo Davide anamva kucipululu kuti Nabala alinkusenga nkhosa zace.
1Samuel25:5 Davide natuma anyamata khumi
1Samuel25:6 ndipo muzitero kwa wodalayo
1Samuel25:7 Ndipo tsono ndamva kuti muli nao osenga nkhosa; abusa anu amene anali ndi ife
1Samuel25:8 Mufunse anyamata anu
1Samuel25:9 Ndipo pakufika anyamata a Davide
1Samuel25:10 Koma Nabala anayankha anyamata a Davide nati
1Samuel25:11 Kodi ndidzatenga mkate wanga
1Samuel25:12 Comweco anyamata a Davide anatembenukira ku njira yao
1Samuel25:13 Ndipo Davide anati kwa anthu ace
1Samuel25:14 Koma mnyamata wina anauza Abigayeli
1Samuel25:15 Koma anthu aja anaticitira zabwino ndithu
1Samuel25:16 iwo anatikhalira ngati linga usana ndi usiku
1Samuel25:17 Cifukwa cace tsono mudziwe ndi kulingalira cimene mudzacita; popeza anatsimikiza mtima kucitira coipa mbuye wathu
1Samuel25:18 Pomwepo Abigayeli anafulumira
1Samuel25:19 Nati kwa anyamataace
1Samuel25:20 Ndipo kudatero pakuberekeka iye pa buru wace
1Samuel25:21 Koma Davide adanena
1Samuel25:22 Mulungu alange adani a Davide
1Samuel25:23 Ndipo Abigayeli pakuona Davide
1Samuel25:24 Ndipo atagwadira pa mapazi ace anati
1Samuel25:25 Mbuye wanga
1Samuel25:26 Cifukwa cace tsono
1Samuel25:27 Ndipo mphatso iyi mdzakazi wanu ndatengera mbuye wanga
1Samuel25:28 Mukhululukire kulakwa kwa mdzakazi wanu; pakuti Yehova adzapatsadi mbuye wanga banja lokhazikika
1Samuel25:29 Ngakhale anauka anthu kukulondolani
1Samuel25:30 Ndipo kudzali
1Samuel25:31 mudzakhala opanda cakudodoma naco
1Samuel25:32 Ndipa Davide anati kwa Abigayeli
1Samuel25:33 ndipo
1Samuel25:34 Pakuti ndithu
1Samuel25:35 Comweco Davide analandira m'dzanja lace zimene iye anamtengera; nanena naye
1Samuel25:36 Ndipo Abigayeli anafika kwa Nabala; ndipo
1Samuel25:37 Tsono m'mawa vinyo atamcokera Nabala
1Samuel25:38 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel25:39 Ndipo pamene Davide anamva kuti Nabala adamwalira

1Samuel25:41 Ndipo iye ananyamuka
1Samuel25:42 Ndipo Abigayeli anafulumira nanyamuka
1Samuel25:43 Davide anatenganso Ahinoamu wa ku Yezreeli
1Samuel25:44 Pakuti Sauli anapatsa Mikala
1Samuel26:1 Ndipo Azifi anafika kwa Sauli ku Gibeya
1Samuel26:2 Ndipo Sauli ananyamuka
1Samuel26:3 Sauli namanga zithando m'phiri la Hagila kupenya kucipululu kunjira
1Samuel26:4 Cifukwa cace Davide anatumiza ozonda
1Samuel26:5 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka nafika pamalo pala Sauli anamangapo; ndipo Davide adaona pogona Sauli
1Samuel26:6 Pamenepo Davide anayankha nati kwa Ahimeleki Mhiti
1Samuel26:7 Comweco Davide ndi Abisai anafika kwa anthuwo usiku; ndipo onani
1Samuel26:8 Ndipo Abisai anati kwa Davide
1Samuel26:9 Koma Davide ananena ndi Abisai
1Samuel26:10 Nati Davide
1Samuel26:11 Yehova andiletse ine kusamula dzanja langa pa wodzozedwa wa Yehova; koma utenge mkondowo uli kumutu kwace
1Samuel26:12 Comweco Davide anatenga mkondowo
1Samuel26:13 Ndipo Davide anaolokera kutsidya
1Samuel26:14 ndipo Davide anaitana anthuwo

1Samuel26:16 Ici unacicita siciri cabwino. Pali Yehova
1Samuel26:17 Ndipo Sauli anazindikira mau ace a Davide
1Samuel26:18 Nati iye
1Samuel26:19 Cifukwa cace mbuye wanga mfumu amvere mau a kapolo wace. Ngati ndi Yehova anakuutsirani inu kutsutsana ndi ine

1Samuel26:22 Davide nayankha

1Samuel27:5 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Akisi
1Samuel27:6 Ndipo Akisi anampatsa Zikilaga tsiku lomweli; cifukwa cace Zikilaga ndi wa mafumu a Yuda kufikira lero lomwe.

1Samuel28:19 Ndiponso Yehova adzapereka Israyeli pamodzi ndi iwe m'dzanja la Afilisti; ndipo mawa iwe ndi ana ako mudzakhala kuli ine; Yehova adzaperekanso khamu la Aisrayeli m'dzanja la Afilisti.

1Samuel29:1 Tsono Afilisti anasonkhanitsa makamu ao onse ku Afeki; ndipo Aisrayeli anamanga ku citsime ca m'Jezreeli.
1Samuel29:2 Ndipo akalonga a Afilisti ananyamuka ndi mazana ao ndi zikwi zao; ndipo Davide ndi anthu ace ananyamuka ndi a pambuyo pamodzi ndi Akisi.

1Samuel31:12 ngwazi zonse zinanyamuka ndi kucezera usiku kuyenda

2Samuel1:8 Nanena
2Samuel1:9 Ndipo anati kwa ine
2Samuel1:10 M'mwemo ndinakhala pambali pace ndi kumtsiriza cifukwa ndinadziwa kuti sangakhalenso ndi moyo wace
2Samuel1:11 Pomwepo Davide anagwira zobvala zace nazing'amba; nateronso anthu onse okhala naye.
2Samuel1:12 Nabuma
2Samuel1:13 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi mnyamata wakumuuzayo

2Samuel1:15 Davide naitana wina wa anyamatawo
2Samuel1:16 Koma asanafe

2Samuel1:24 Ana akazi inu a Israyeli
2Samuel1:25 Ha! amphamvuwo anagwa pakati pa nkhondo! Jonatani anaphedwa pamisanje pako.

2Samuel2:1 Ndipo zitatha izi Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova nati
2Samuel2:2 Comweco Davide anakwera kunka kumeneko pamodzi ndi akazi ace awiri
2Samuel2:3 Ndipo Davide anakwera nao anyamata ace okhala naye
2Samuel2:4 Ndipo anthu Ayuda anabwera namdzoza Davide pomwepo akhale mfumu ya nyumba ya Yuda. Ndipo wina anauza Davide kuti
2Samuel2:5 Pamenepo Davide anatumiza mithenga kwa anthu a ku Jabezi Gileadi
2Samuel2:6 Ndipo tsopano Yehova acitire inu cokoma ndi coonadi; inenso ndidzakubwezerani cokoma ici
2Samuel2:7 Cifukwa cace tsono manja anu alimbike
2Samuel2:8 Koma Abineri
2Samuel2:9 namlonga ufumu wa pa Gileadi ndi Aasuri ndi Jezreeli ndi Efraimu ndi Benjamini ndi Aisrayeli onse.
2Samuel2:10 Ndipo Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli anali ndi zaka makumi anai pakuyamba iye kukhala mfumu ya Israyeli
2Samuel2:11 Ndipo Davide anali mfumu ya nyumba ya Yuda ku Hebroni zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi.
2Samuel2:12 Ndipo Abineri mwana wa Neri ndi anyamata a Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli anaturuka ku Mahanaimu kunka ku Gibeoni.
2Samuel2:13 Ndi Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya
2Samuel2:14 Ndipo Abineri ananena ndi Yoabu
2Samuel2:15 Pomwepo iwo anaimirira naoloka owerengedwa
2Samuel2:16 Ndipo anagwirana munthu yense kugwira mutu wa mnzace
2Samuel2:17 Ndipo tsikulo nkhondo inakula ndithu. Ndi Abineri ndi anthu a Israyeli anathawa pamaso pa anyamata a Davide.
2Samuel2:18 Ndipo analipo ana atatu a Zeruya
2Samuel2:19 Ndipo Asaheli anapitikitsa Abineri. Ndipo m'kuthamanga kwace sanapambukira kulamanja
2Samuel2:20 Pomwepo Abineri anaceuka nati
2Samuel2:21 Ndipo Abineri ananena naye
2Samuel2:22 Ndipo Abineri anabwereza kunena kwa Asaheli
2Samuel2:23 Koma iye anakana kupambuka; cifukwa cace Abineri anamkantha ndi khali la mkondo m'mimba mwace
2Samuel2:24 Koma Yoabu ndi Abisai anampitikitsa Abineri; ndipo dzuwa linawalowera pofika ku citunda ca Ama
2Samuel2:25 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anaunjikana pamodzi kutsata Abinen
2Samuel2:26 Pomwepo Abineri anaitana Yoabu nati
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu nati
2Samuel2:28 Comweco Yoabu anaomba Gpenga
2Samuel2:29 Ndipo Abineri ndi anthu ace anacezera usiku wonse kupyola cidikha
2Samuel2:30 Ndipo Yoabu anabwerera pakutsata Abineri. Ndipo pamene anasonkhanitsa pamodzi anthu onse anasowa anthu a Davide khumi ndi asanu ndi anai ndi Asaheli.
2Samuel2:31 Koma anyamata a Davide anakantha anthu a Benjamini ndi a Abineri
2Samuel2:32 Ndipo ananyamula Asaheli namuika m'manda a atate wace ali ku Betelehemu. Ndipo Yoabu ndi anthu ace anacezera kuyenda usiku wonse
2Samuel3:1 Ndipo panali nkhondo nthawi yaitali pakati pa nyumba ya Sauli ndi nyumba ya Davide. Koma Davide analimba cilimbire
2Samuel3:2 Ndipo ana a Davide anabadwira ku Hebroni. Mwana woyamba ndiye Amnoni
2Samuel3:3 waciwiri Kileabu
2Samuel3:4 ndi wacinai Adoniya mwana wa Hagiti; ndi wacisanu Sefatiya mwana wa Abitali;
2Samuel3:5 ndi wacisanu ndi cimodzi Itireamu wa Egila mkazi wa Davide. Awa anambadwira Davide ku Hebroni.
2Samuel3:6 Ndipo panali
2Samuel3:7 Ndipo Sauli adali ndi mkazi wamng'ono
2Samuel3:8 Pomwepo Abineri anapsa mtima kwambiri pa mau a Isiboseti
2Samuel3:9 Mulungu alange Abineri
2Samuel3:10 kucotsa ufumu ku nyumba ya Sauli ndi kukhazika mpando wadfumu wa Davide pa Israyeli ndi pa Yuda
2Samuel3:11 Ndipo iye sanakhoza kuyankha Abineri mau amodzi cifukwa ca kumuopa iye.
2Samuel3:12 Ndipo Abineri anatuma mithenga imnenere kwa Davide
2Samuel3:13 Nati iye
2Samuel3:14 Ndipo Davide anatumiza mithenga kwa Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli
2Samuel3:15 Pomwepo Isiboseti anatumiza namcotsera kwa mwamuna wace
2Samuel3:16 Ndipo mwamuna waceyo anapita naye
2Samuel3:17 Ndipo Abineri analankhula nao akuru a Israyeli nanena nao
2Samuel3:18 citani tsono
2Samuel3:19 Ndipo Abineri analankhulanso m'kumva kwa Abenjamini; Abineri anamukanso ku Hebroni kulankhula m'makutu a Davide zonse zakukomera Aisrayeli ndi a nyumba yonse ya Benjamini.
2Samuel3:20 Abineri nafika kwa Davide ku Hebroni
2Samuel3:21 Pomwepo Abined anati kwa Davide
2Samuel3:22 Ndipo taonani
2Samuel3:23 Tsono pofika Yoabu ndi khamu lonse anali nalo
2Samuel3:24 Pomwepo Yoabu anadza kwa mfumu
2Samuel3:25 Mumdziwa Abineri mwana wa Neri kuti anadza kuti akunyengeni
2Samuel3:26 Ndipo Yoabu anaturuka kwa Davide
2Samuel3:27 Pofikanso Abineri ku Hebroni
2Samuel3:28 Ndipo pambuyo pace
2Samuel3:29 cilango cigwere pa mutu wa Yoabu ndi pa nyumba yonse ya atate wace; ndipo kusasoweke ku nyumba ya Yoabu munthu wakukhala nayo nthenda yakukha
2Samuel3:30 Motero Yoabu ndi Abisai mbale wace adapha Abineri
2Samuel3:31 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Yoabu ndi kwa anthu onse okhala naye
2Samuel3:32 Ndipo anaika Abineri ku Hebroni; ndi mfumu inakweza mau ace nilira ku manda a Abineri
2Samuel3:33 Ndipo mfumu inanenera Abineri nyimbo iyi ya maliro
2Samuel3:34 Manja anu sanamangidwa
2Samuel3:35 Ndipo anthu onse anadza kudzadyetsa Davide cakudya kukali msana; koma Davide analumbira nati
2Samuel3:36 Ndipo anthu onse anacisamalira
2Samuel3:37 Momwemo anthu onse ndi Aisrayeli onse anazindikira tsiku lija kuti sikunafumira kwa mfumu kupha Abineri mwana wa Neri.
2Samuel3:38 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa anyamata ace
2Samuel3:39 Ndipo ndikali wofoka ine lero
2Samuel4:1 Ndipo pamene Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli
2Samuel4:2 Ndipo Isiboseti
2Samuel4:3 ndi Abeeroti anathawira ku Gitaimu; kumeneko amakhalira kufikira lero lino.
2Samuel4:4 Ndipo Jonatani mwana wa Sauli
2Samuel4:5 Ndipo Rekabu ndi Baana ana a Rimoni wa ku Beeroti
2Samuel4:6 Ndipo iwo analowanso kufikira m'kati mwa nyumba
2Samuel4:7 Koma polowa iwo m'nyumbamo iye ali cigonere pakama pace m'cipindamo

2Samuel4:9 Ndipo Davide anayankha Rekabu ndi Baana mbale wace
2Samuel4:10 muja munthu wina anandiuza kuti
2Samuel4:11 Koposa kotani nanga
2Samuel4:12 Ndipo Davide analamulira anyamata ace
2Samuel5:1 Pomwepo mafuko onse a Israyeli anabwera kwa Davide ku Hebroni
2Samuel5:2 Masiku anapitawo
2Samuel5:3 Comweco akuru onse a Israyeli anadza kwa mfumu ku Hebroni; ndipo mfumu Davide anapangana nao pangano ku Hebroni pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo anamdzoza Davide mfumu ya Israyeli.
2Samuel5:4 Davide anali ndi zaka makumi atatu polowa iye ufumu wace
2Samuel5:5 Ku Hebroni anacita ufumu pa Yuda zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi; ndi ku Yerusalemu anacita ufumu pa Aisrayelionse ndi Ayuda omwe zaka makumi atatu mphambu zitatu.
2Samuel5:6 Ndipo mfumu ndi anthu ace anamuka ku Yerusalemu kuyambana nao Ajebusi
2Samuel5:7 Cinkana anatero Davide anathyola linga la Ziyoni
2Samuel5:8 Ndipo tsiku lija Davide anati
2Samuel5:9 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'linga mula
2Samuel5:10 Ndipo Davide anakula cikulire cifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa makamu anali naye.
2Samuel5:11 Ndipo Hiramu mfumu ya Turo anatumiza mithenga kwa Davide ndi mitengo yamkungudza
2Samuel5:12 Ndipo Davide anazindikira kuti Yehova anamkhazikitsa mfumu ya Israyeli
2Samuel5:13 Ndipo Davide anadzitengera akazi ang'ono ena ndi akazi a ulemu ena a ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel5:14 Maina a iwo anambadwira m'Yerusalemu ndi awa: Samua
2Samuel5:15 ndi Ibara ndi Elisua
2Samuel5:16 ndi Elisama ndi Eliada ndi Elifeleti.
2Samuel5:17 Koma pamene Afilisti anamva kuti adamdzoza Davide mfumu ya Israyeli
2Samuel5:18 Tsono Afilisti anafika natanda m'cigwa ca Refaimu.
2Samuel5:19 Ndipo Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova nati
2Samuel5:20 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Baalaperazimu
2Samuel5:21 Ndipo iwo anasiya kumeneko mafano ao; Davide ndi anyamata ace nawacotsa.
2Samuel5:22 Ndipo Afilisti anakweranso kaciwiri
2Samuel5:23 Ndipo pamene Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova
2Samuel5:24 Ndipo kudzali
2Samuel5:25 Ndipo Davide anatero
2Samuel6:1 Pambuyo pace Davide anamemezanso osankhika onse a m'Israyeli
2Samuel6:2 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka
2Samuel6:3 Ndipo iwo ananyamulira likasa la Mulungu pa gareta watsopano
2Samuel6:4 Poturuka nalo tsono pamodzi ndi likasa la Mulungu m'nyumba ya Abinadabu iri pacitunda
2Samuel6:5 Ndipo Davide ndi a nyumba yonse ya Israyeli anasewera pamaso pa Yehova
2Samuel6:6 Ndipo pofika iwo ku dwale la Nakoni
2Samuel6:7 Pomwepo mkwiyo wa Yehova udayaka pa Uza
2Samuel6:8 Ndipo kudaipira Davide
2Samuel6:9 Ndipo Davide anaopa Yehova tsiku lomwelo; nati
2Samuel6:10 Momwemo Davide sanafuna kudzitengera likasa la Yehova lidze ku mudzi wa Davide; koma Davide analipambutsira ku nyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Mgiti.
2Samuel6:11 Ndipo a likasa la Yehova linakhala m'nyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Mgiti miyezi itatu; ndipo Yehova anadalitsa Obedi-Edomu ndi banja lace lonse.
2Samuel6:12 Pamenepo anthu anauza mfumu Davide
2Samuel6:13 Ndipo kunali
2Samuel6:14 Ndipo Davide anabvina ndi mphamvu yace yonse pamaso pa Yehova; Davide nadzimangirira efodi wabafuta.
2Samuel6:15 Comweco Davide ndi a nyumba yonse ya Israyeli anakwera nalo likasa la Yehova
2Samuel6:16 Ndipo kunali pamene likasa la Yehova tinafika m'mudzi wa Davide
2Samuel6:17 Ndipo pamene adalowa nalo likasa la Mulungu analgka pamalo pace pakati pa hema amene Davide adaliutsira; ndipo Davide anapereka nsembe zopsereza
2Samuel6:18 Pamene Davide adatsiriza kupereka nsembe yopsereza ndi zoyamika
2Samuel6:19 Ndipo anagawira anthu onse
2Samuel6:20 Pamenepo Davide anabwerera kudalitsa nyumba yace. Ndipo Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Sauli anaturukira kwa Davide
2Samuel6:21 Koma Davide ananena ndi Mikala
2Samuel6:22 Ndipo ndidzaonjezanso kukhala ngati munthu woluluka
2Samuel6:23 Ndipo Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Sauli sanaona mwana kufikira tsiku la imfa yace.
2Samuel7:1 Ndipo kunali pakukhala mfumuyo m'nyumba mwace
2Samuel7:2 mfumuyo inanena ndi Natani mneneriyo
2Samuel7:3 Ndipo Natani anati kwa mfumuyo
2Samuel7:4 Ndipo kunali usiku womwewo mau a Yehova anafika kwa Natani
2Samuel7:5 Kauze mtumiki wanga Davide
2Samuel7:6 pakuti sindinakhala m'nyumba kuyambira tsiku lija ndinaturutsa ana a Israyeli ku Aigupto kufikira lero lomwe
2Samuel7:7 M'malo monse ndinayendamo limodzi ndi ana onse a Israyeli kodi ndinanena ndi pfuko limodzi la Aisrayeli
2Samuel7:8 Cifukwa cace tsono udzatero kwa mtumiki wanga Davide
2Samuel7:9 Ndipo ndinali nawe kuli konse unamukako
2Samuel7:10 Ndipo ndidzaikira anthu anga Israyeli malo
2Samuel7:11 monga kuyambira tsiku lija ndinalamulira oweruza kuyang'anira anthu anga Israyeli; ndipo ndidzakupumulitsa kwa adani ako onse. Yehova akuuzanso kuti Yehova adzakumangira banja.
2Samuel7:12 Pamene masiku ako akadzakwaniridwa
2Samuel7:13 Iye adzamangira dzina langa nyumba
2Samuel7:14 Ndidzakhala atate wace
2Samuel7:15 koma cifundo canga sicidzamcokera iye
2Samuel7:16 Ndipo nyumba yako ndi ufumu wako zidzakhazikikadi ku nthawi zonse pamaso pako; mpando wacifumu wako udzakhazikika ku nthawi zonse.
2Samuel7:17 Monga mwa mau onse awa ndi monga mwa masomphenya onse awa
2Samuel7:18 Pomwepo Davide mfumu analowa
2Samuel7:19 Ndipo icinso cinali pamaso panu cinthu cacing'ono
2Samuel7:20 Ndipo Davide adzaonjezanso kunenanso ndi Inuj pakuti mudziwa mnyamata wanu
2Samuel7:21 Cifukwa ca mau anu
2Samuel7:22 Cifukwa cace wamkuru ndi Inu Yehova. Mulungu
2Samuel7:23 Ndiponso mtundu uti wa pa dziko lapansi ufanana ndi anthu anu
2Samuel7:24 Ndipo mwadzikhazikira anthu anu Aisrayeli
2Samuel7:25 Ndipo tsopano
2Samuel7:26 Ndipo dzina lanu likulitsidwe ku nthawi zonse
2Samuel7:27 Pakuti inu
2Samuel7:28 Ndipo tsopano
2Samuel7:29 cifukwa cace tsono cikukomereni kudalitsa nyumba ya mnyamata wanu kuti ikhale pamaso panu cikhalire; pakuti Inu
2Samuel8:1 Ndipo m'tsogolo mwace Davide anakantha Afilisti
2Samuel8:2 Ndipo anakantha Amoabu nawayesa ndi cingwe
2Samuel8:3 Davide anakanthanso Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:4 Ndipo Davide anatenga apakavalo ace cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri
2Samuel8:5 Ndipo pakufika Aaramu a ku Damasiko kudzathandiza Hadadezeri mfumu ya ku Zoba
2Samuel8:6 Pamenepo Davide anaika maboma m'Aramu wa Damasiko
2Samuel8:7 Ndipo Davide anatenga zikopa zagolidi zinali ndi anyamata a Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:8 Ndipo ku Beta ndi ku Berotai midzi ya Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:9 Ndipo pamene Toi mfumu ya ku Hamati anamva kuti Davide adakantha khamu lonse la Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:10 Toi anatumiza mwana wace Joramu kwa mfumu Davide
2Samuel8:11 Izi zomwe mfumu Davide anazipatula zikhale za Yehova
2Samuel8:12 za Aaramu
2Samuel8:13 Ndipo Davide anamveketsa dzina lace pamene anabwera uko adakantha Aaramu m'cigwa ca mcere
2Samuel8:14 Ndipo anaika maboma m'Edomu; m'dziko lonse la Edomu anaika maboma
2Samuel8:15 Ndipo Davide anakhala mfumu ya Aisrayeli onse
2Samuel8:16 Ndipo Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya anayang'anira ankhondo
2Samuel8:17 ndi Zadoki mwana wa Ahitubi
2Samuel8:18 Ndipo Benaya mwana wa Jehoyada anayang'anira Akereti ndi Apeleti. Ndipo ana a Davide anali nduna zace.
2Samuel9:1 Ndipo Davide anati
2Samuel9:2 Ndipo panali mnyamata wa m'nyumba ya Sauli dzina lace Ziba; ndipo anamuitana iye afike kwa Davide; ndi mfumuyo inanena naye
2Samuel9:3 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel9:4 Ndipo mfumu inanena naye
2Samuel9:5 Pamenepo Davide anatumiza anthu nakatenga iye ku nyumba ya Makiri mwana wa Amiyeli ku Lodebara.
2Samuel9:6 Ndipo Mefiboseti mwana wa Jonatani
2Samuel9:7 Ndipo Davide ananena naye
2Samuel9:8 Ndipo iye anamlambira
2Samuel9:9 Pomwepo mfumu inaitana Ziba
2Samuel9:10 Ndipo uzimlimira munda wace
2Samuel9:11 Pomwepo Ziba anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel9:12 Ndipo Mefiboseti anali ndi mwana wamwamuna wamng'ono
2Samuel9:13 Comweco Mefiboseti anakhala ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel10:1 Ndipo kunali zitapita izi
2Samuel10:2 Ndipo Davide anati
2Samuel10:3 Koma akalonga a ana a Amoni anati kwa Hanuni mbuye wao
2Samuel10:4 Comweco Hanuni anatenga anyamata a Davide nawameta ndebvu zao mbali imodzi
2Samuel10:5 Pamene anaciuza Davide iye anatumiza anthu kukakomana nao; pakuti amunawo anacita manyazi akuru. Niti mfumu
2Samuel10:6 Ndipo pamene ana a Amoni anazindikira kuti anadzinunkhitsa kwa Davide
2Samuel10:7 Ndipo pamene Davide anacimva
2Samuel10:8 Ndipo ana a Amoni anaturuka
2Samuel10:9 Ndipo pamene Yoabu anaona kuti nkhondo inamdzera kumaso ndi kumbuyo
2Samuel10:10 Koma anthu otsalawo anawapereka kwa Abisai mbale wace
2Samuel10:11 Ndipo iye anati
2Samuel10:12 Ulimbike mtima
2Samuel10:13 Comweco Yoabu ndi anthu amene anali naye anayandikira kuponyana nkhondo ndi Aaramu. Ndipo iwowa anathawa pamaso pace.
2Samuel10:14 Ndipo pamene ana a Amoni anaona kuti Aaramu anathawa
2Samuel10:15 Ndipo pamene Aaramu anaona kuti Aisrayeli anawathyola
2Samuel10:16 Ndipo Hadarezeri anatumiza mthenga nakatenga Aaramu a ku tsidya la cimtsinje; iwo nafika ku Helamu
2Samuel10:17 Ndipo wina anauza Davide; iye nasonkhanitsa Aisrayeli onse
2Samuel10:18 Ndipo Aaramu anathawa pamaso pa Israyeli; Davide naphapo Aaramu apamagareta mazana asanu ndi awiri
2Samuel10:19 Ndipo pamene mafumu onse
2Samuel11:1 Ndipo kunali pofikanso caka
2Samuel11:2 Ndipo kunali pa madzulo Davide anauka pa kama wace nayenda pa tsindwi la nyumba ya mfumu. Ndipo iye ali patsindwipo anaona mkazi alinkusamba; ndi mkaziyo anali wocititsa kaso pomuyang'ana.
2Samuel11:3 Ndipo Davide anatumiza munthu nafunsa za mkaziyo. Ndipo wina anati
2Samuel11:4 Ndipo bavide anatumiza mithenga
2Samuel11:5 Ndipo mkaziyo anaima
2Samuel11:6 Davide natumiza kwa Yoabu
2Samuel11:7 Ndipo pakufika kwa iye Uriya uja
2Samuel11:8 Ndipo Davide anauza Uriya
2Samuel11:9 Koma Uriya anagona pa khomo la nyumba ya mfumu pamodzi ndi anyamata onse a mbuye wace
2Samuel11:10 Ndipo pamene anauza Davide kuti
2Samuel11:11 Uriya nanena ndi Davide
2Samuel11:12 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Uriya
2Samuel11:13 Ndipo pakumuitana Davide
2Samuel11:14 Ndipo m'mawa Davide analembera Yoabu kalata
2Samuel11:15 Ndi m'kalatamo analemba kuti
2Samuel11:16 Ndipo Yoabu atayang'anira mudziwo
2Samuel11:17 Ndipo akumudziwo anaturuka
2Samuel11:18 Pamenepo Yoabu anatumiza munthu nauza Davide zonse za nkhondoyi;
2Samuel11:19 nauza mthengawo kuti
2Samuel11:20 kudzali kuti ukapsa mtima wa mfumu nikati kwa iwe
2Samuel11:21 Ndani anakantha Abimeleki mwana wa Jerubeseti? Sadamponyera kodi mphero mkazi wa palinga nafa iye ku Tebezi? Munasendera bwanji pafupi potere pa lingalo? Tsono udzanena
2Samuel11:22 Comweco mthengawo unamuka
2Samuel11:23 Ndipo mthengawo unati kwa Davide
2Samuel11:24 Ndipo akuponyawo amene anali palinga anaponya anyamata anu; ndipo anyamata ena a mfumu anafa
2Samuel11:25 Pomwepo Davide ananena ndi mthengawo
2Samuel11:26 Ndipo pamene mkazi wa Uriya anamva kuti Uriya mwamuna wace adamwalira
2Samuel11:27 Ndipo pakuturuka malirowo
2Samuel12:1 Ndipo Yehova anatumiza Natani kwa Davide. Ndipo anafika kwa iye nanena naye
2Samuel12:2 Wolemerayo anali nazo zoweta zazing'ono ndi zazikuru zambiri ndithu;
2Samuel12:3 koma wosaukayo analibe kanthu kena koma kamwana kakakazi ka nkhosa
2Samuel12:4 Ndipo kwa wolemerayo kunafika mlendo
2Samuel12:5 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Davide unayaka ndithu pa munthuyo
2Samuel12:6 ndipo adzabwezera mwa mwana wa nkhosayo ena anai
2Samuel12:7 Ndipo Natani ananena kwa Davide
2Samuel12:8 ndinakupatsa nyumba ya mbuye wako
2Samuel12:9 Cifukwa ninji unapeputsa mau a Yehova ndi kucita cimene ciri coipa pamaso pace? Unakantha Uriya Mhiti ndi lupanga ndi kutenga mkazi wace akhale mkazi wako; ndipo unamupha iye ndi lupanga la ana a Amoni.
2Samuel12:10 Cifukwa cace tsono lupanga silidzacoka pa nyumba yako nthawi zonse
2Samuel12:11 Atero Yehova
2Samuel12:12 Pakuti iwe unacicita m'tseri; koma Ine ndidzacita cinthu ici pamaso pa Aisrayeli onse
2Samuel12:13 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Natani
2Samuel12:14 Koma popeza pakucita ici munapatsa cifukwa cacikuru kwa adani a Yehova ca kucitira mwano
2Samuel12:15 Ndipo Natani anamuka kwao. Ndipo Yehova anadwaza mwana amene mkazi wa Uriya anambalira Davide
2Samuel12:16 Cifukwa cace Davide anapempherera mwanayo kwa Mulungu; Davide nasala kudya
2Samuel12:17 Ndipo akuru a m'nyumba yace ananyamuka
2Samuel12:18 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri mwanayo anamwalira. Ndipo anyamata a Davide anaopa kumuuza kuti mwanayo wafa
2Samuel12:19 Koma pamene Davide anaona anyamata ace alikunong'onezana
2Samuel12:20 Pamenepo Davide ananyamuka pansi
2Samuel12:21 Pamenepo anyamata ace ananena naye
2Samuel12:22 Nati iye
2Samuel12:23 Koma tsopano wafa
2Samuel12:24 Ndipo Davide anasangalatsa Bateseba mkazi wace
2Samuel12:25 natumiza ndi dzanja la Natani mneneriyo
2Samuel12:26 Ndipo Yoabu anathira nkhondo pa Raba wa ana a Amoni
2Samuel12:27 Yoabu natumiza mithenga kwa Davide nati
2Samuel12:28 Cifukwa cace tsono musonkhanitseanthu otsalawo
2Samuel12:29 Ndipo Davide anasonkhanitsa anthu onse
2Samuel12:30 Nacotsa korona pa mutu wa mfumu yao; kulemera kwace kunali talente wa golidi; ndipo m'menemo munali miyala ya mtengo wapatali; ndipo anamuika pa mutu wa Davide. Iye naturutsa zofunkha za mudziwo zambirimbiri.
2Samuel12:31 Naturutsa anthu a m'mudzimo
2Samuel13:1 Ndipo kunali citapita ici
2Samuel13:2 Ndipo Amnoni anapsinjikadi nayamba kudwala cifukwa ca mlongo wace Tamara
2Samuel13:3 Koma Amnoni anali ndi bwenzi lace
2Samuel13:4 Nanena naye
2Samuel13:5 Ndipo Jonadabu ananena naye
2Samuel13:6 Comweco Amnoni anagona
2Samuel13:7 Ndipo Davide anatumiza mau kwao kwa Tamara
2Samuel13:8 Comweco Tamara anapita ku nyumba ya mlongo wace Amnoni; ndipo iye anali cigonere. Ndipo anatenga ufa naukanda naumba timitanda pamaso pace
2Samuel13:9 Ndipo anatenga ciwaya natiturutsa pamaso pace; koma anakana kudya. Ndipo Amnoni anati
2Samuel13:10 Ndipo Amnoni anati kwa Tamara
2Samuel13:11 Ndipo pamene anabwera nato pafupi kuti adye
2Samuel13:12 Koma iye anamyankha nati
2Samuel13:13 Ndipo ine
2Samuel13:14 Koma iye sadafuna kumvera mau ace
2Samuel13:15 Atatero Amnoni anadana naye ndi cidani cacikuru kopambana; pakuti cidani cimene anamuda naco
2Samuel13:16 Koma iye ananena naye
2Samuel13:17 Pomwepo anaitana mnyamata wace amene anamtumikira
2Samuel13:18 Ndipo iye anabvala cobvala ca mawanga mawanga
2Samuel13:19 Ndipo Tamara anathira phulusa pamutu pace
2Samuel13:20 Ndipo Abisalomu mlongo wace ananena nave
2Samuel13:21 Koma pamene mfumu Davide anamva zonsezi
2Samuel13:22 Ndipo Abisalomu sanalankhula ndi Arononi cabwino kapena coipa
2Samuel13:23 Ndipo zitapita zaka ziwiri zathunthu
2Samuel13:24 Abisalomu nafika kwa mfumu nati
2Samuel13:25 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel13:26 Pomwepo Abisalomu anati
2Samuel13:27 Koma Abisalomu anaiumirira iyo
2Samuel13:28 Ndipo Abisalomu anakamulira anyamata ace
2Samuel13:29 Ndipo anyamata a Abisalomu anamcitira Amnoni monga umo Abisalomu anawalamulira. Pomwepo ana amuna onse a mfumu ananyamuka
2Samuel13:30 Ndipo kunali akali panjira
2Samuel13:31 Pamenepo mfumu inanyamuka ning'amba zobvala zace nigona pansi
2Samuel13:32 Ndipo Jonadabu mwana wa Simeya mbale wa Davide anayankha nati
2Samuel13:33 Cifukwa cace tsono mfumu mbuye wanga asasauke mtima ndi cinthuci
2Samuel13:34 Koma Abisalomu anathawa. Ndipo mnyamata wakudikira anatukula maso ace nayang'ana
2Samuel13:35 Ndipo Jonadabu ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel13:36 Ndipo kunali pakutsiriza iye kulankhula
2Samuel13:37 Koma Abisalomu anathawa
2Samuel13:38 Comweco anathawa Abisalomu
2Samuel13:39 Ndipo mfumu Davide analira kunka kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel14:1 Ndipo Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya anazindikira kuti mtima wa mfumu unalunjika kwa Abisalomu.
2Samuel14:2 Ndipo Yoabu anatumiza ku Tekowa
2Samuel14:3 Nulowe kwa mfumu
2Samuel14:4 Ndipo pamene mkazi wa ku Tekowayo anati alankhule ndi mfumuyo
2Samuel14:5 Ndipo mfumuyo inanena naye
2Samuel14:6 Ndipo mdzakazi wanu ndinali nao ana amuna awiri
2Samuel14:7 Ndipo onani
2Samuel14:8 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi mkaziyo
2Samuel14:9 Ndipo mkazi wa ku Tekowayo ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel14:10 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel14:11 Nati iye
2Samuel14:12 Pamenepo mkaziyo anati
2Samuel14:13 Ndipo mkaziyo anati
2Samuel14:14 Pakuti kufa tidzafa
2Samuel14:15 Cifukwa cace tsono cakuti ndadzanena mau awa ndi mbuye wanga mfumu
2Samuel14:16 Pakuti mfumu idzamvera ndi kupulumutsa mdzakazi wace m'dzanja la munthu wakufuna kundiononga ine pamodzi ndi mwana wanga
2Samuel14:17 Ndipo mdzakazi wanu ndinati
2Samuel14:18 Pamenepo mfumu inayankha
2Samuel14:19 Ndipo mfumuyo inati
2Samuel14:20 Mnyamata wanu Yoabu anacita cinthu ici kuti asandulize mamvekedwe a mranduwo. Ndipo mbuye wanga ali wanzeru
2Samuel14:21 Ndipo mfumuyo inanena ndi Yoabu
2Samuel14:22 Ndipo Yoabu anagwa nkhope yace pansi
2Samuel14:23 Comweco Yoabu ananyamuka namka ku Gesuri
2Samuel14:24 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel14:25 Ndipo m'lsrayeli monse munalibe wina anthu anamtama kwambiri cifukwa ca kukongola kwace monga Abisalomu; kuyambira ku mapazi kufikira pakati pa mutu wace mwa iye munalibe cirema.
2Samuel14:26 Ndipo pometa tsitsi lace amameta potsiriza caka
2Samuel14:27 Ndipo kwa Abisalomu kunabadwa ana amuna atatu ndi mwana wamkazi mmodzi
2Samuel14:28 Ndipo Abisalomu anakhala ku Yerusalemu zaka ziwiri zathunthu
2Samuel14:29 Pamenepo Abisalomu anaitana Yoabu kuti akamtumize iye kwa mfumu; koma anakana kubwera kwa iye; ndipo anamuitananso nthawi yaciwiri
2Samuel14:30 Cifukwa cace iye anati kwa anyamata ace
2Samuel14:31 Pamenepo Yoabu ananyamuka nafika kwa Abisalomu ku nyumba yace
2Samuel14:32 Abisalomu nayankha Yoabu
2Samuel14:33 Comweco Yoabu anadza kwa mfumu namuuza; ndipo pamene iye adaitana Abisalomu
2Samuel15:1 Ndipo kunali
2Samuel15:2 Ndipo Abisalomu analawirira
2Samuel15:3 Abisalomu nanena naye
2Samuel15:4 Abisalomu anatinso
2Samuel15:5 Ndipo kunatero kuti pakusendera munthu ali yense kudzamlambira
2Samuel15:6 Abisalomu anacitira zotero Aisrayeli onse akudza kwa mfumu kuti aweruze mrandu wao; comweco Abisalomu anakopa mitima ya anthu a Israyeli.
2Samuel15:7 Ndipo kunali pakutha zaka zinai Abisalomu ananena kwa mfumu
2Samuel15:8 Pakuti mnyamata wanu ndinawinda pakukhala ine ku Gesuri m'Aramu
2Samuel15:9 Ndipo mfumu inanena naye
2Samuel15:10 Koma Abisalomu anatumiza ozonda ku mafuko onse a Israyeli
2Samuel15:11 Ndipo pamodzi ndi Abisalomu panapita anthu mazana awiri a ku Yerusalemu ndiwo oitanidwa
2Samuel15:12 Ndipo Abisalomu anaitana Ahitofeli Mgiloni
2Samuel15:13 Ndipo mthenga unafika kwa Davide nuti
2Samuel15:14 Ndipo Davide ananena nao anyamata ace onse akukhala naye ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel15:15 Ndipo anyamata a mfumu ananena kwa mfumu
2Samuel15:16 Mfumu nituruka
2Samuel15:17 Ndipo mfumu inaturuka
2Samuel15:18 Ndipo anyamata ace onse anapita naye limodzi; ndi Akereri ndi Apeleti
2Samuel15:19 Pomwepo mfumu inanena kwa Itai Mgiti
2Samuel15:20 Popeza unangofika dzulo lokha
2Samuel15:21 Itai nayankha mfumu nuti
2Samuel15:22 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Itai
2Samuel15:23 Ndipo dziko lonse linalira ndi mau okweza; ndipo anthu onse anaoloka
2Samuel15:24 Ndipo onani
2Samuel15:25 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Zadoki
2Samuel15:26 Koma iye akatero kuti
2Samuel15:27 Ndipo mfumu inanenanso ndi Zadoki wansembeyo
2Samuel15:28 Ona ndidzaima pa madooko a m'cipululu kufikira afika mau ako akunditsimikizira ine.
2Samuel15:29 Cifukwa cace Zadoki ndi Abyatara ananyamulanso likasa la Mulungu nafika nalo ku Yerusalemu. Ndipo iwo anakhala kumeneko.
2Samuel15:30 Ndipo Davide anakwera pa cikweza ca ku Azitona nakwera nalira misozi; ndipo anapfunda mutu wace nayenda ndi mapazi osabvala; ndi anthu onse amene anali naye anapfunda munthu yense mutu wace
2Samuel15:31 Ndipo wina anauza Davide nati
2Samuel15:32 Ndipo kunali pakufika Davide ku mutu wa phiri
2Samuel15:33 Ndipo Davide ananena naye
2Samuel15:34 koma ukabwerera kumudzi
2Samuel15:35 Ndipo suli nao kumeneko Zadoki ndi Abyatara ansembewo kodi? motero ciri conse udzacimva ca m'nyumba ya mfumu uziuza Zadoki ndi Abyatara ansembewo.
2Samuel15:36 Onani
2Samuel15:37 Comweco Husai bwenzi la Davide anadza m'mudzimo; ndipo Abisalomu anafika ku Yerusalemu.
2Samuel16:1 Ndipo pamene Davide anapitirira pang'ono pamutu pa phiri
2Samuel16:2 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Ziba
2Samuel16:3 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel16:4 Pomwepo mfumu inanena ndi Ziba
2Samuel16:5 Ndipo pakufika mfumu Davide ku Bahurimu
2Samuel16:6 Ndipo iye anaponya miyala Davide ndi anyamata onse a mfumu Davide
2Samuel16:7 Ndipo anatero Simeyi pakutukwana
2Samuel16:8 Yehova wabwezera pa iwe mwazi wonse wa nyumba ya Sauli
2Samuel16:9 Pomwepo Abisai mwana wa Zeruya ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel16:10 Mfumu niti
2Samuel16:11 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Abisai ndi anyamata ace onse
2Samuel16:12 Kapena Yehova adzayang'anira cosayeneraci alikundicitira ine
2Samuel16:13 Comweco Davide ndi anthu ace anapita m'ngra
2Samuel16:14 Ndipo mfumu ndi anthu onse amene anali naye anafika olema; ndipo iye anadzitsitsimutsa kumeneko.
2Samuel16:15 Ndipo Abisalomu
2Samuel16:16 Ndipo kunali pakudza kwa Abisalomu Husai M-ariki
2Samuel16:17 Ndipo Abisalomu ananena ndi Husai
2Samuel16:18 Husai nanena ndi Abisalomu
2Samuel16:19 Ndiponso ndidzatumikira yani? si pamaso pa mwana wace nanga? monga ndinatumikira pamaso pa atate wanu
2Samuel16:20 Pomwepo Abisalomu ananena ndi Ahitofeli
2Samuel16:21 Ndipo Ahitofeli ananena ndi Abisalomu
2Samuel16:22 Comweco iwo anayalira Abisalomu hema pamwamba pa nyumba; ndipo Abisalomu analowa kwa akazi ang'ono a atate wace pamaso pa Aisrayeli onse.
2Samuel16:23 Ndipo uphungu wa Ahitofeli anaupangira masiku aja
2Samuel17:1 Abisalomu
2Samuel17:2 ndipo ndidzamgwera ali wolema ndi wofoka
2Samuel17:3 ndipo anthu onsewo ndidzabwera nao kwa inu; munthu mumfunayo ali ngati onse obwerera; momwemo anthu onse adzakhala mumtendere.
2Samuel17:4 Ndipo mauwa anamuyenerera Abisalomu
2Samuel17:5 Pomwepo Abisalomu anati
2Samuel17:6 Ndipo pakufika Husai kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel17:7 Ndipo Husai ananena ndi Abisalomu
2Samuel17:8 Husai anatinso
2Samuel17:9 Onani
2Samuel17:10 Ndipo ngakhale ngwazi imene mtima wace ukunga mtima wa mkango idzasungunuka konse
2Samuel17:11 Koma uphungu wanga ndiwo kuti musonkhanitse Aisrayeli onse kwa inu kuyambira ku Dani kufikira ku Beereseba
2Samuel17:12 Comweco tidambvumbulukira pa malo akuti adzapezeka
2Samuel17:13 Ndiponso ngati walowa ku mudzi wina
2Samuel17:14 Ndipo Abisalomu ndi anthu onse a Israyeli anati
2Samuel17:15 Pomwepo Husai ananena ndi Zadoki ndi Abyatara ansembewo
2Samuel17:16 Cifukwa cace tsono mutumize msanga nimuuze Davide kuti
2Samuel17:17 Ndipo Jonatani ndi Ahimaazi anakhala ku Enirogeli; mdzakazi adafopita kuwauza; ndipo iwo anapita nauza mfumu Davide
2Samuel17:18 Koma mnyamata wina anawaona nauza Abisalomu; ndipo ajawo anacoka msanga onse awiri
2Samuel17:19 Ndipo mkazi anatenga cibvundikilo naciika pakamwa pa citsime
2Samuel17:20 Ndipo anyamata a Abisalomu anafika kunyumba kwa mkaziyo; nati
2Samuel17:21 Ndipo kunali
2Samuel17:22 Pomwepo Davide ananyamuka ndi anthu onse amene anali naye
2Samuel17:23 Ndipo Ahitofeli
2Samuel17:24 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Mahanaimu. Abisalomu naoloka Yordano
2Samuel17:25 Ndipo Abisalomu anaika Amasa
2Samuel17:26 Ndipo Israyeli ndi Abisalomu anamanga zithando m'dziko la Gileadi.
2Samuel17:27 Ndipo kunali pakufika Davide ku Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:28 iwo anabwera nao makama
2Samuel17:29 ndi uci ndi mafuta
2Samuel18:1 Ndipo Davide anawerenga anthu amene anali naye
2Samuel18:2 Davide natumiza anthu atawagawa magulu atatu
2Samuel18:3 Koma anthuwo anati
2Samuel18:4 Ndipo mfumu inanena nao
2Samuel18:5 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira Yoabu nd Abisai ndi ltai
2Samuel18:6 Comweco anthuwo anaturukira kuthengo kukamenyana ndi Israyeli; nalimbana ku nkhalango ya ku Efraimu.
2Samuel18:7 Ndipo anthu a Israyeli anakanthidwa pamenepo pamaso pa anyamata a Davide
2Samuel18:8 Pakuti nkhondo inatanda pa dziko lonse
2Samuel18:9 Ndipo Abisalomu anakomana ndi anyamata a Davide. Abisalomu naberekeka pa nyuru yace
2Samuel18:10 Ndipo munthu wina anamuona
2Samuel18:11 Ndipo Yoabu ananena ndi womuuzayo
2Samuel18:12 Munthuyo nanena ndi Yoabu
2Samuel18:13 Ndikadacita conyenga pa moyo wace
2Samuel18:14 Pomwepo Yoabu anati
2Samuel18:15 Ndipo anyamata khumi onyamula zida zace za Yoabu anamzungulira Abisalomu namkantha namupha.
2Samuel18:16 Ndipo Yoabu analiza lipenga
2Samuel18:17 Ndipo anatenga Abisalomu namponya m'cidzenje cacikuru kunkhalangoko; naunjika pamwamba pace mulu waukuru ndithu wamiyala; ndipo Aisrayeli onse anathawa yense ku hema wace.
2Samuel18:18 Koma Abisalomu akali moyo adatenga nadziutsira coimiritsaco ciri m'cigwa ca mfumu; pakuti anati
2Samuel18:19 Pomwepo Ahimaazi mwana wa Zadoki anati
2Samuel18:20 Ndipo Yoabu ananena naye
2Samuel18:21 Pamenepo Yoabu ananena ndi Mkusi
2Samuel18:22 Ndipo Ahimaazi mwana wa Zadoki ananena kaciwiri kwa Yoabu
2Samuel18:23 Koma ngakhale kotero
2Samuel18:24 Koma Davide anakhala pakati pa zipata ziwiri; ndipo mlonda anakwera pa tsindwi la cipata ca kulinga
2Samuel18:25 Pamenepo mlondayo anapfuula
2Samuel18:26 Ndipo mlondayo anaona munthu wina wothamanga; mlonda naitana wakucipata nanena
2Samuel18:27 Mlondayo nati
2Samuel18:28 Ndipo Ahimaazi anapfuula
2Samuel18:29 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel18:30 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel18:31 Ndipo onani
2Samuel18:32 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Mkusiyo
2Samuel18:33 Ndipo mfumuyo inagwidwa cisoni
2Samuel19:1 Ndipo anauza Yoabu
2Samuel19:2 Ndipo cipulumutso ca tsiku lila cinasandulika maliro kwa anthu onse; pakuti anthu anamva kuti
2Samuel19:3 Ndipo tsiku lija anthu analowa m'mudzi kacetecete
2Samuel19:4 Ndipo mfumu inapfunda nkhope yace
2Samuel19:5 Ndipo Yoabu anafika ku nyumba ya mfumu
2Samuel19:6 m'mene mukonda awo akudana nanu
2Samuel19:7 Cifukwa cace tsono nyamukani
2Samuel19:8 Pamenepo mfumu inanyamuka
2Samuel19:9 Ndipo anthu onse a m'mafuko onse a Israyeli analikutsutsana
2Samuel19:10 Ndipo Abisalomu amene tinamdzoza mfumu yathu anafa kunkhondo. Cifukwa cace tsono mulekeranji kunena mau akuti abwere nayo mfumuyo?
2Samuel19:11 Ndipo mfumu Davide anatumiza kwa Zadoki ndi Abyatara ansembewo
2Samuel19:12 Inu ndinu abale anga
2Samuel19:13 Ndipo munene ndi Amasa
2Samuel19:14 Ndipo iye anakopa mitima ya anthu onse a Yuda
2Samuel19:15 Comweco mfumu inabwera nifika ku Yordano. Ndipo Ayuda anadza ku Giligala
2Samuel19:16 Ndipo Simeyi
2Samuel19:17 Ndipo anali nao anthu cikwi cimodzi Abenjamini
2Samuel19:18 Ndipo ngalawa yakuolotsera inaoloka kuti akatenge banja la mfumu ndi kucita comkomera. Ndipo Simeyi mwana wa Gera anagwa pansi pamaso pa mfumu pakuoloka iye pa Yordano.
2Samuel19:19 Nati kwa mfumu
2Samuel19:20 Pakuti mnyamata wanu ndidziwa kuti ndinacimwa; cifukwa cace
2Samuel19:21 Koma Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anayankha nati
2Samuel19:22 Koma Davide anati
2Samuel19:23 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Simeyi
2Samuel19:24 Ndipo Mefiboseti mwana wa Sauli anatsika kukakomana ndi mfumu; ndipo sadasamba mapazi ace
2Samuel19:25 Ndipo kunali pakufika iye ku Yerusalemu kukakomana ndi mfumu
2Samuel19:26 Ndipo anayankha
2Samuel19:27 Ndipo iye anandinamizira mnyamata wanu kwa mbuye wanga mfumu; koma mbuye wanga mfumu ali ngati mthenga wa Yehova; cifukwa cace citani cimene cikukomerani.
2Samuel19:28 Pakuti nyumba yonse ya atate wanga inali anthu oyenera imfa pamaso pa mbuye wanga mfumu; koma inu munaika mnyamata wanu pakati pa iwo akudya pa gome lanu. Kuyenera kwanga nkutaninso kuti ndikaonjeze kudandaulira kwa mfumu?
2Samuel19:29 Ndipo mfumu inanena naye
2Samuel19:30 Ndipo Mefiboseti anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel19:31 Ndipo Barizilai
2Samuel19:32 Ndipo Barizilai anali nkhalamba
2Samuel19:33 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Barizilai
2Samuel19:34 Koma Barizilai ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel19:35 Lero ndiri nazo zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu; kodi ndikhoza kuzindikiranso kusiyanitsa zabwino ndi zoipa? Mnyamata wanu ndikhoza kodi kuzindikira cimene ndidya kapena kumwa? Kodi ndikhozanso kumva mau a amuna ndi akazi oyimba? Cifukwa ninji tsono mnyamata wanu ndidzakhalanso wolemetsa mbuye wanga mfumu.
2Samuel19:36 Mnyamata wanu angofuna kuoloka Yordano pamodzi ndi mfumu; ndipo afuniranji mfumu kundibwezerapo mphothoyotere?
2Samuel19:37 Mulole mnyamata wanu ndibwererenso
2Samuel19:38 Ndipo mfumu inayankha
2Samuel19:39 Ndipo anthu onse anaoloka Yordano
2Samuel19:40 Comweco mfumu inaoloka nifika ku Giligala
2Samuel19:41 Ndipo onani
2Samuel19:42 Ndipo anthu onse a Yuda anayankha anthu a Israyeli. Cifukwa mfumu iri ya cibale cathu; tsono mulikukwiyiranji pa mrandu umenewu? tinadya konse za mfumu kodi? kapena kodi anatipatsa mtulo uli wonse?
2Samuel19:43 Ndipo anthu a Israyeli anayankha anthu a Yuda
2Samuel20:1 Ndipo kudangotero kuti pamenepo panali munthu woipa
2Samuel20:2 Comweco anthu onse a Israyeli analeka kutsata Davide
2Samuel20:3 Ndipo Davide anafika kunyumba kwace ku Yerusalemu. Mfumuyo nitenga akazi khumi ang'onowo amene adawasiya asunge nyumbayo
2Samuel20:4 Pamenepo mfumu inati kwa Amasa
2Samuel20:5 Comweco Amasa anamuka kukaitana anthu a Yuda asonkhane; koma anacedwa
2Samuel20:6 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Abisai
2Samuel20:7 Ndipo anaturuka namtsata anthu a Yoabu
2Samuel20:8 Pamene anafika iwo pa mwala waukuru uli ku Gibeoni
2Samuel20:9 Ndipo Yoabu ananena ndi Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Koma Amasa sanasamalira lupanga liri m'dzanja la Yoabu; comweco iye anamgwaza nalo m'mimba; nakhuthula matumbo ace pansi
2Samuel20:11 Ndipo mnyamata wina wa Yoabu anaima pali iye
2Samuel20:12 Ndipo Amasa analikukunkhulira m'mwazi wace pakati pa mseu. Ndipo pamene munthuyo anaona kuti anthu onse anaima
2Samuel20:13 Atamcotsa iye mumseu
2Samuel20:14 Ndipo anapyola mapfuko onse a Israyeli kufikira ku Abeli ndi ku Betimaaka
2Samuel20:15 Ndipo anadza nammangira misasa m'Abeli wa Betimaaka
2Samuel20:16 Pamenepo mkazi wanzeru wa m'mudzimo anapfuula
2Samuel20:17 Ndipo anayandikira kwa mkaziyo; ndi mkaziyo anati
2Samuel20:18 Ndipo iye analankhula
2Samuel20:19 Inendine wa awo amene ali amtendere ndi okhulupirika m'Israyeli; inu mulikufuna kuononga mudzi ndi mai wa m'Israyeli; mudzamezerang colowa ca Yehova?
2Samuel20:20 Ndipo Yoabu anayankha nati
2Samuel20:21 Mranduwo soli wotere ai
2Samuel20:22 Pomwepo mkaziyo anapita kwa anthu onse mwa nzeru yace. Ndipo iwo anadula mutu wa Seba mwana wa Bikri
2Samuel20:23 Ndipo Yoabu anali woyang'anira khamu lonse la Israyeli; ndi Benaya
2Samuel20:24 ndi Adoramu anayang'anira msonkho; ndi Jehosafati mwana wa Ahiludi anali wolemba mbiri;
2Samuel20:25 ndi Seva anali mlembi; ndi Zadoki ndi Abyatara anali ansembe;
2Samuel20:26 ndiponso Ira Mjairi anali nduna ya Davide.
2Samuel21:1 Ndipo m'masiku a Davide munali odala
2Samuel21:2 Ndipo mfumu inaitana Agibeoni
2Samuel21:3 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Agibeoni
2Samuel21:4 Ndipo Agibeoni ananena naye
2Samuel21:5 Ndipo anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel21:6 mutipatse ana ace amuna asanu ndi awiri
2Samuel21:7 Koma mfumu inaleka Mefiboseti mwana wa Jonatani
2Samuel21:8 Koma mfumu inatenga ana amuna awiri a Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aya
2Samuel21:9 niwapereka m'manja a Agibeoni
2Samuel21:10 Ndipo Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aya anatenga ciguduli
2Samuel21:11 Ndipo anauza Davide cimene Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aya
2Samuel21:12 Ndipo Davide ananka natenga mafupa a Sauli ndi mafupa a Jonatani mwana wace kwa anthu a ku Jabezi Gileadi amene anawaba m'khwalala la Betisani
2Samuel21:13 nacotsa kumeneko mafupa a Sauli ndi mafupa a Jonatani mwana wace; nasonkhanitsa iwo mafupa a iwo aja adapacikidwa.
2Samuel21:14 Naika mafupa a Sauli ndi Jonatani mwana wace ku dziko la Benjamini m'Zela
2Samuel21:15 Ndipo Afilisti anaponyananso nkhondo ndi Aisrayeli; ndipo Davide anatsika ndi anyamata ace pamodzi naye naponyana ndi Afilisti; nafuna kukomoka Davide.
2Samuel21:16 Ndipo Isibenobi
2Samuel21:17 Koma Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anamthandiza namkantha Mfliistiyo
2Samuel21:18 Ndipo kunali citapita ici
2Samuel21:19 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ndi Afilisti ku Gobu; ndipo Elhanani mwana wa Jare-oregimu wa ku Betelehemu anapha Goliate Mgiti
2Samuel21:20 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ku Gati
2Samuel21:21 Ndipo pakutonza Israyeli iyeyu
2Samuel21:22 Awa anai anawabala ndi Rafa
2Samuel22:1 Ndipo Davide analankhula kwa Yehova mau a nyimbo iyi tsikuli Yehova anampulumutsa m'dzanja la adani ace onse
2Samuel22:2 Ndipo anati:- Yehova ndiye thanthwe langa
2Samuel22:3 Mulungu wa thanthwe langa
2Samuel22:4 Ndidzaitanakwa Yehovaamene ayenera timtamande; Comweco ndidzapulumutsidwa kwa adani anga.
2Samuel22:5 Pakuti mafunde a imfa anandizinga
2Samuel22:6 Zingwe za kumanda zinandizingira; Misampha ya imfa inandifikira ine.
2Samuel22:7 M'kusauka kwanga ndinaitana kwa Yehova
2Samuel22:8 Pomwepo dziko linagwedezeka ndi kunthunthumira. Maziko a dziko la kumwamba anasunthika Nagwedezeka
2Samuel22:9 M'mphuno mwace munaturuka utsi
2Samuel22:10 Anaweramitsa miyambanso
2Samuel22:11 Ndipo iye anaberekeka pa Kerubi nauluka; Inde anaoneka pa mapiko a mphepo
2Samuel22:12 Ndipo anayesa mdimawo ngati mahema omzungulira iye
2Samuel22:13 Ceza ca pamaso pace Makala a mota anayaka
2Samuel22:14 Yehova anagunda kumwamba; Ndipo Wam'mwambamwamba ananena mau ace.
2Samuel22:15 Ndipo iye anatumiza mibvi
2Samuel22:16 Pamenepo m'munsi mwa nyanja munaoneka
2Samuel22:17 Iye anatumiza kucokera kumwamba nanditenga; Iye ananditurutsa m'madzi akuru;
2Samuel22:18 Iye anandipulumutsa kwa mdani wanga wamphamvu
2Samuel22:19 Anandifikira ine tsiku la tsoka langa; Koma Yehova anali mcirikizo wanga
2Samuel22:20 Iye ananditurutsanso ku malo akuru; Iye anandipulumutsa
2Samuel22:21 Yehova anandibwezera monga mwa colungama canga; Monga mwa kuvera kwa manja anga anandipatsa mphotho.
2Samuel22:22 Pakuti ndinasunga njira za Yehova
2Samuel22:23 Pakuti maweruzo ace onse anali pamaso panga; Ndipo za malemba ace
2Samuel22:24 Ndinakhalanso wangwiro kwa iye
2Samuel22:25 Cifukwa cace Yehova anandibwezera monga mwa colungama canga; Monga mwa kuyera kwanga pamaso pace.
2Samuel22:26 Ndi acifundo Inu mudzadzionetsa wacifundo
2Samuel22:27 Ndi oyera mtima mudzadzionetsa woyera mtima; Ndi otsutsatsutsa mudzadzionetsa wopotoza.
2Samuel22:28 Ndipo mudzapulumutsa anthu osautsidwa; Koma maso anu ali pa odzikuza kuti muwacepetse.
2Samuel22:29 Pakuti Inu ndinu nyali yanga
2Samuel22:30 Pakuti ndi Inu ndithamangira gulu; Ndi Mulungu wanga ndilumphira linga.
2Samuel22:31 Kunena za Mulungu
2Samuel22:32 Pakuti Mulungu ndani
2Samuel22:33 Mulungu ndiye Gnga langa lamphamvu; Ndipo iye ayendetsa angwiro mu njira yace.
2Samuel22:34 Iye asandutsa mapazi ace akunga mapazi a mbawala; Nandiika pa misanje yanga.
2Samuel22:35 Iye aphunzitsa manja anga nkhondo; Kotero kuti manja anga alifula uta wamkuwa.
2Samuel22:36 Ndiponso munandipatsa cikopa ca cipulumutso canu; Ndi kufatsa kwanu kunandikulitsa.
2Samuel22:37 Munakulitsa kulunza kwanga pansi panga
2Samuel22:38 Ndinapitikitsa adani anga
2Samuel22:39 Ndinawatha ndi kuwapyoza
2Samuel22:40 Pakuti Inu munandimanga m'cuuno ndi mphamvu ya kunkhondo; Munandigonjetsera akundiukira.
2Samuel22:41 Munatembenuzitsanso adani anga andipatse mbuyo
2Samuel22:42 Anayang'ana iwo
2Samuel22:43 Pomwepo ndinawasansantha asalale ngati pfumbi la padziko
2Samuel22:44 Inunso munandipulumutsa ine pa kulimbana kwa anthu anga; Munandisunga ndikhale mutu wa amitundu; Anthu amene sindinawadziwa adzanditsumikira ine.
2Samuel22:45 Alendo adzandigonjera ine
2Samuel22:46 Alendo adzafota
2Samuel22:47 Yehova ali ndi moyo; ndipo lidalitsike thanthwe langa; Ndipo akulitsidwe Mulungu wa thanthwe la cipulumutso canga;
2Samuel22:48 Inde Mulungu wakundibwezera cilango ine
2Samuel22:49 Amene anditurutsa kwa adani anga; Inde mundikweza ine pamwamba pa iwo akundiukira; Mundipulumutsa kwa munthu waciwawa.
2Samuel22:50 Cifukwa cace ndidzakuongani Yehova
2Samuel22:51 Iye apatsa mfumu yace cipulumutso cacikuru; Naonetsera cifundo wodzozedwa wace
2Samuel23:1 Ndipo mau otsiriza a Davide ndi awa:— Atero Davide mwana wa Jese
2Samuel23:2 Mzimu wa Yehova unalankhula mwa ine
2Samuel23:3 Mulungu wa Israyeli anati
2Samuel23:4 Iye adzakhala ngati kuunika kwa m'mawa
2Samuel23:5 Zoonadi nyumba yanga siikhala yotere ndi Mulungu; Koma iye anapangana ndi ine pangano losatha
2Samuel23:6 Koma oipa onse adzakhala ngati minga yoyenera kuitaya
2Samuel23:7 Koma wakukhudza iyo adzikonzeratu citsulo ndi luti la mkondo; Ndipo idzatenthedwa konse ndi mota m'malo mwao.
2Samuel23:8 Maina a ngwazi Davide anali nazo ndiwo: Josebu-basebete Mtakemoni
2Samuel23:9 Ndipo wotsatana naye Eleazeri mwana wa Dodai mwana wa M-akohi
2Samuel23:10 iye ananyamuka
2Samuel23:11 Ndipo wotsatana naye ndiye Sama mwana wa Age Mharario Ndipo Afilisti anasonkhana ali gulu pamene panali munda wamphodza; anthu nathawa Afilistiwo.
2Samuel23:12 Koma iyeyoanaima pakati pa mundawo
2Samuel23:13 Ndipo atatu a mwamakumi atatu opambanawo
2Samuel23:14 Pamenepo Davide anali m'linga
2Samuel23:15 Ndipo Davide analakalaka nati
2Samuel23:16 Ndipongwazi zitatuzo zinapyola khamu la Afilisti
2Samuel23:17 Nati
2Samuel23:18 Ndipo Abisai
2Samuel23:19 Kodi iye sindiye waulemu mwa atatuwa? cifukwa cace anali kazembe wao; ngakhale iyenso sadafikana ndi atatu oyamba.
2Samuel23:20 Ndipo Benaya
2Samuel23:21 ndipo anapha M-aigupto munthu wokongola
2Samuel23:22 Izi anacita Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada
2Samuel23:23 Iye ndiye waulemu koposa makumi atatuwo
2Samuel23:24 Asaheli mbale wa Yoabu anali wa makumi atatuwo; Elihanani mwana wa Dodo wa ku Betelehemu;
2Samuel23:25 Sama Mharodi
2Samuel23:26 Helezi Mpaliti
2Samuel23:27 Abiyezeri M-anetori
2Samuel23:28 Zalimoni M-ahohi
2Samuel23:29 Helebi mwana wa Baana Mnetofati
2Samuel23:30 Benaya Mpiratoni
2Samuel23:31 Abialiboni M-aribati
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba Mshaliboni wa ana a Jaseni
2Samuel23:33 Sama Mharari
2Samuel23:34 Elifaleti mwana wa Ahasibai
2Samuel23:35 Hezra wa ku Karimeli
2Samuel23:36 Igali mwana wa Natani wa ku Zoba
2Samuel23:37 Zeleki M-amoni
2Samuel23:38 Ira M-itri
2Samuel23:39 Uriya Mhiti; onse pamodzi anali makumi atatu mphambu asanu ndi awiri.
2Samuel24:1 Ndipo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakanso pa Israyeli
2Samuel24:2 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Yoabu kazembe wa khamu
2Samuel24:3 Ndipo Yoabu ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel24:4 Koma mau a mfumu anapambana Yoabu ndi atsogoleri a khamulo. Ndipo Yoabu ndi atsogoleri a khamulo anaturuka pamaso pa mfumu kuti akawerenge anthu a Israyeli.
2Samuel24:5 Naoloka Yordano
2Samuel24:6 nafika ku Gileadi ndi ku dera la Tatimuhodisi; nafika ku Dani-Jaana ndi kuzungulira
2Samuel24:7 nafika ku linga la Turo ndi ku midzi yonse ya Ahivi ndi ya Akanani; naturukira kumwera kwa Yuda ku Beereseba.
2Samuel24:8 Comweco pamene atayenda dziko lonse anafika ku Yerusalemu pakutha miyezi isanu ndi inai
2Samuel24:9 Ndipo Yoabu anapereka kwa mfumu kucuruka kwa anthu adawawerenga; ndipo m'lsrayeli munali anthu zikwi mazana asanu ndi atatu
2Samuel24:10 Pamenepo mtima wa Davide unamtsutsa
2Samuel24:11 Ndipo pouka Davide m'mawa mau a Yehova anafika kwa mneneri Gadi
2Samuel24:12 Kalankhule ndi Davide
2Samuel24:13 Comweco Gadi anafika kwa Davide
2Samuel24:14 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Gadi
2Samuel24:15 Comweco Yehova anatumiza mliri pa Israyeli kuyambira m'mawa kufikira nthawi yoikika; ndipo anafapo anthu zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri kuyambira ku Dani kufikira ku Beereseba.
2Samuel24:16 Ndipo pamene mthenga anatambasulira dzanja lace ku Yerusalemu kuuononga
2Samuel24:17 Ndipo Davide analankhula ndi Yehova pamene anaona mthenga wakudwalitsa anthu
2Samuel24:18 Ndipo Gadi anafika tsiku lomwelo kwa Davide nanena naye
2Samuel24:19 Ndipo Davide anakwerako monga mwa kunena kwa Gadi
2Samuel24:20 Ndipo Arauna anayang'ana naona mfumuyo ndi anyamata ace alikubwera kwa iye; naturuka Arauna naweramira pamaso pa mfumu nkhope yace pansi.
2Samuel24:21 Arauna nati
2Samuel24:22 Arauna nati kwa Davide
2Samuel24:23 zonsezi
2Samuel24:24 Koma mfumu inati kwa Arauna
2Samuel24:25 Ndipo Davide anamangirapo Yehova guwa la nsembe
1Kings1:1 NDIPO mfumu Davide anakalamba nacuruka masiku ace; ndipo iwo anampfunda ndi zopfunda
1Kings1:2 Pamenepo anyamata ace ananena naye
1Kings1:3 Tsono anafunafuna m'malire monse a Israyeli namwali wokongola
1Kings1:4 Ndipo namwaliyo anali wokongola ndithu
1Kings1:5 Pamenepo Adoniya mwana wa Hagiti anadzikuza
1Kings1:6 Ndipo atate wace sadambvuta masiku ace onse
1Kings1:7 Ndipo anapangana ndi Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya
1Kings1:8 Koma Zadoki wansembe
1Kings1:9 Ndipo Adoniya anapha nkhosa ndi ng'ombe ndi nyama zonona pamwala pa Zoheleti
1Kings1:10 koma Natani mneneriyo
1Kings1:11 Pamenepo Natani ananena ndi Batiseba amace wa Solomo
1Kings1:12 Ubwere tsono
1Kings1:13 Muka nulowe kwa mfumu Davide
1Kings1:14 Taona
1Kings1:15 Pamenepo Batiseba analowa kwa mfumu kucipinda; ndipo mfumuyo inali yokalamba ndithu; ndipo Abisagi wa ku Sunamu anali kutumikira mfumu.
1Kings1:16 Ndipo Batiseba anawerama nalambira mfumu
1Kings1:17 Ndipo iye ananena nayo
1Kings1:18 Ndipo tsopano taonani
1Kings1:19 Ndipo iye anapha ng'ombe ndi nyama zonona ndi nkhosa zaunyinji
1Kings1:20 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings1:21 Mukapanda kutero
1Kings1:22 Ndipo taona
1Kings1:23 Ndipo anauza mfumu
1Kings1:24 Ndipo Natani anati
1Kings1:25 Popeza iye watsika lero
1Kings1:26 Koma ine
1Kings1:27 Cinthu ici cacitika ndi mbuye wanga mfumu kodi
1Kings1:28 Tsono mfumu Davide anayankha
1Kings1:29 Ndipo mfumu inalumbira
1Kings1:30 zedi monga umo ndinalumbirira iwe pa Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli
1Kings1:31 Pamenepo Batiseba anaweramitsa pansi nkhope yace
1Kings1:32 Ndipo mfumu Davide anati
1Kings1:33 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa iwo
1Kings1:34 Ndipo Zadoki wansembe ndi Natani mneneri akamdzoze kumeneko akhale mfumu ya Israyeli; ndipo muombe lipenga
1Kings1:35 Pamenepo mumtsate iye
1Kings1:36 Ndipo Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anayankha mfumu
1Kings1:37 Monga umo Yehova anakhalira ndi mbuye wanga mfumu
1Kings1:38 Pamenepo Zadoki wansembe
1Kings1:39 Ndipo Zadoki wansembe anatenga nyanga ya mafuta inali m'Cihema
1Kings1:40 Ndipo anthu onse anakwera namtsata
1Kings1:41 Ndipo Adoniya ndi oitanidwa onse anali ndi iye analimva atatha kudya. Ndipo Yoabu
1Kings1:42 iye akali cilankhulire
1Kings1:43 Ndipo Yonatani anayankha
1Kings1:44 ndipo mfumu yatumanso Zadoki wansembe
1Kings1:45 Ndipo Zadoki wansembe ndi Natani mneneri anamdzoza mfumu ku Gihoni
1Kings1:46 Ndiponso Solomo wakhala pa cimpando ca ufumu.
1Kings1:47 Ndiponso akapolo a mfumu anadzadalitsa Davide mbuye wathu mfumu
1Kings1:48 Ndiponso watero mfumu
1Kings1:49 Pamenepo oitanidwa onse a Adoniya anacita mantha
1Kings1:50 Ndipo Adoniya anaopa cifukwa ca Solomo
1Kings1:51 Ndipo anthu anakauza Solomo
1Kings1:52 Ndipo Solomo anati
1Kings1:53 Tsono mfumu Solomo anatuma anthu nakamtsitsa ku guwa la nsembe. Iye nadza
1Kings2:1 Pakuyandikira masiku ace a Davide akuti amwalire
1Kings2:2 Ndimuka ine njira ya dziko lonse: limba mtima tsono
1Kings2:3 nusunge cilangizo ca Yehova Mulungu wako
1Kings2:4 kuti Yehova akakhazikitse mau ace adanenawo za ine
1Kings2:5 Ndiponso udziwa cimene Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya anandicitira
1Kings2:6 Cita mwa nzeru yako tsono
1Kings2:7 Koma ucitire zokoma ana amuna aja a Barizilai wa ku Gileadi
1Kings2:8 Ndipo taona uli naye Simeyi mwana wa Gera wa pfuko la Benjamini wa ku Bahurimu
1Kings2:9 Ndipo tsono
1Kings2:10 Ndipo Davide anagona pamodzi ndi makolo ace
1Kings2:11 Ndipo masiku ace akukhala Davide mfumu ya Israyeli anali zaka makumi anai; zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri anakhala mfumu ku Hebroni
1Kings2:12 Tsono Solomo anakhala pa mpando wacifumu wa Davide atate wace
1Kings2:13 Pomwepo Adoniya mwana wa Hagati anadza kwa Batiseba amai wace wa Solomo
1Kings2:14 Anatinso
1Kings2:15 Nati iye
1Kings2:16 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings2:17 Nati iye
1Kings2:18 Ndipo Batiseba anati
1Kings2:19 Tsono Batiseba ananka kwa mfumu Solomo kukanenera Adoniya kwa iye. Ndipo mfumu inanyamuka kukomana naye
1Kings2:20 Pamenepo mkaziyo anati
1Kings2:21 Ndipo iye anati
1Kings2:22 Ndipo mfumu Solomo anayankha
1Kings2:23 Pomwepo mfumu Solomo analumbira pa Yehova
1Kings2:24 Ndipo tsono
1Kings2:25 Ndipo mfumu Solomo anatuma dzanja la Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada
1Kings2:26 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Abyatara wansembeyo
1Kings2:27 Motero Solomo anacotsa Abyatara asakhalenso wansembe wa Yehova
1Kings2:28 Ndipo mbiriyi inamfika Yoabu
1Kings2:29 Ndipo anamuuza mfumu Solomo
1Kings2:30 Nafika Benaya ku cihema ca Yehova
1Kings2:31 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa iye
1Kings2:32 Ndipo Yehova adzambwezera mwazi wace pa mutu wace wa iye yekha
1Kings2:33 Motero mwazi wao udzabweranso pa mutu wace wa Yoabu
1Kings2:34 Pomwepo Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anakwera namkantha iye
1Kings2:35 Ndipo mfumu inaika Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada m'malo mwace kutsogolera khamu la nkhondo
1Kings2:36 Ndipo mfumu inatuma munthu kukaitana Simeyi
1Kings2:37 Popeza tsiku lomwelo lakuturuka iwe ndi kuoloka mtsinje Kidroni

1Kings2:44 Tsono mfumu inanenanso ndi Simeyi
1Kings2:45 Koma mfumu Solomo adzadalitsika
1Kings2:46 Pamenepo mfumu inalamulira Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada
1Kings3:1 Ndipo Solomo anapalana ubwenzi ndi Farao mfumu ya Aigupto
1Kings3:2 Koma anthu anaphera nsembe pamisanje
1Kings3:3 Ndipo Solomo anakondana ndi Yehova
1Kings3:4 Ndipo mfumu inapita ku Gibeoni kukaphera nsembe kumeneko; popeza msanje waukuru unali kumeneko
1Kings3:5 Ku Gibeoni Yehova anaonekera Solomo m'kulota usiku
1Kings3:6 Ndipo Solomo anati
1Kings3:7 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings3:8 Ndipo kapolo wanu ndiri pakati pa anthu anu amene Inu munawasankha
1Kings3:9 Patsani tsono kapolo wanu mtima womvera wakuweruza anthu anu; kuti ndizindikire pakati pa zabwino ndi zoipa; pakuti akutha ndani kuweruza anthu anu ambiri amene?
1Kings3:10 Ndipo mau amenewa anakondweretsa Yehova kuti Solomo anapempha cimeneci.
1Kings3:11 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa iye
1Kings3:12 taona
1Kings3:13 Ndiponso zimene sunazipempha adakupatsa
1Kings3:14 Ndipo ukadzayenda m'njira zanga kusunga malemba anga ndi malamulo anga
1Kings3:15 Ndipo Solomo anauka
1Kings3:16 Pamenepo analowa kwa mfumu akazi awiri
1Kings3:17 Ndipo mkazi mmodzi anati
1Kings3:18 Ndipo kunacitika kuti tsiku lacitatu nditaona ine mwana
1Kings3:19 Ndipo mwana wa mnzangayu anamwalira usiku
1Kings3:20 Ndipo iye anauka pakati pa usiku
1Kings3:21 Ndipo pouka ine m'mawa kuyamwitsa mwana wanga ndaona ngwakufa
1Kings3:22 Ndipo mkazi winayo anati
1Kings3:23 Tsono mfumu inati
1Kings3:24 Niti mfumu
1Kings3:25 Mfumu niti
