1Kings3:27 Pamenepo mfumu inayankha
1Kings3:28 Ndipo Aisrayeli onse anamva maweruzidwe ace idaweruza mfumu
1Kings4:1 Ndipo mfumu Solomo anali mfumu ya Israyeli yense.
1Kings4:2 Ndipo akuru a mfumu ndi awa: Azariya mwana wa Zadoki anali nduna
1Kings4:3 Elihorepa ndi Ahiya ana a Sisa alembi
1Kings4:4 ndi Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anali kazembe wa nkhondo
1Kings4:5 ndi Azariya mwana wa Natani anayang'anira akapitao
1Kings4:6 ndi Ahisara anayang'anira banja la mfumu
1Kings4:7 Ndipo Solomo anali nao akapitao khumi ndi awiri akuyang'anira Aisrayeli onse
1Kings4:8 Ndipo maina ao ndiwo: Benhuri anatengetsa ku mapiri a Efraimu;
1Kings4:9 Bendekeri ku Makazi ndi Saalibimu ndi Betsemesi ndi Elonibetanani;
1Kings4:10 Benhesedi ku Aruboti ndi Soko ndi dziko lonse la Heferi;
1Kings4:11 Benabinadabu ku mtunda wa Dori
1Kings4:12 Baana mwana wa Ahiludi ku Tanaki ndi Megido ndi Betseani konse
1Kings4:13 Benigeheri ku Ramoti Gileadi
1Kings4:14 Abinadabu mwana wa Ido ku Nahanaimu;
1Kings4:15 Ahimazi ku Nafitali
1Kings4:16 Baana mwana wa Husayi ku Aseri ndi ku Aloti;
1Kings4:17 Yehosafati mwana wa Paruwa ku Isakara;
1Kings4:18 Simeyi mwana wa Ela ku Benjamini;
1Kings4:19 Geberi mwana wa Uri ku dziko la Gileadi
1Kings4:20 Ayuda ndi Aisrayeli anacuruka ngati mcenga wa kunyanja
1Kings4:21 Ndipo Solomo analamulira maiko onse
1Kings4:22 Ndipo zakudya za Solomo zofikira tsiku limodzi zinalr miyeso makumi atatu ya ufa wosalala
1Kings4:23 ng'ombe zonenepa khumi
1Kings4:24 Pakuti analamulira dziko lonse liri tsidya lino la Firate
1Kings4:25 Ndipo Ayuda ndi Aisrayeli anakhala mosatekeseka
1Kings4:26 Ndipo Solomo anali nazo zipinda za akavalo a magareta ace zikwi makumi anai
1Kings4:27 Ndipo akapitao aja anatengetsera cakudya Solomo ndi anthu onse akudya ku gome la mfumu Solomo
1Kings4:28 Barelenso ndi udzu wa akavalo ndi ngamila anabwera nazo kumalo kwao
1Kings4:29 Ndipo Mulungu anampatsa Solomo nzeru ndi luntha lambiri
1Kings4:30 Ndipo nzeru ya Solomo inaposa nzeru za anthu onse a kum'mawa
1Kings4:31 Pakuti anali wanzeru woposa anthu onse
1Kings4:32 Ndipo ananena miyambo zikwi zitatu
1Kings4:33 Nakamba za mitengo
1Kings4:34 Ndipo anafikako anthu a mitundu yonse kudzamva nzeru ya Solomo
1Kings5:1 Ndipo Hiramu mfumu ya ku Turo anatuma anyamata ace kwa Solomo
1Kings5:2 Ndipo Solomo anatumiza mau kwa Hiramu
1Kings5:3 Mudziwa inu kuti atate wanga Davide sanathe kumangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wace nyumba
1Kings5:4 Koma tsopano Yehova Mulungu wanga wandipumulitsa ku mbali zonse; palibe wotsutsana nane
1Kings5:5 Ndipo taonani
1Kings5:6 Ndipo tsono
1Kings5:7 Ndipo kunacitika
1Kings5:8 Ndipo Hiramu anatumiza kwa Solomo
1Kings5:9 Akapolo anga adzatsika nayo ku Lebano kufika nayo ku nyanja yamcere
1Kings5:10 Tsono Hiramu anapatsa Solomo mitengo yamkungudza ndi mitengo yamlombwa monga momwe anafuniramo.
1Kings5:11 Ndipo Solomo anapatsa Hiramu miyeso ya tirigu zikwi makumi awiri ndiyo zakudya za banja lace
1Kings5:12 Ndipo Yehova anapatsa Solomo nzeru monga momwe adamlonjezera; ndipo panali mtendere pakati pa Hiramu ndi Solomo
1Kings5:13 Ndipo mfumu Solomo anasonkhetsa athangata mwa Aisrayeli onse
1Kings5:14 Ndipo anawatuma ku Lebano mwezi umodzi zikwi khumi kuwasintha
1Kings5:15 Ndipo Solomo anawasenzetsa akatundu anthu zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri
1Kings5:16 osawerenga akapitao a Solomo akuyang'anira nchito
1Kings5:17 Ndipo mfumu inalamula iwo
1Kings5:18 Ndipo omanga nyumba a Solomo ndi omanga nyumba a Hiramu ndi anthu a ku Gebala anaisema
1Kings6:1 Ndipo kunacitika zitapita zaka mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu ataturuka ana a Israyeli m'dziko la Aigupto
1Kings6:2 Ndipo nyumbayo mfumu Solomo anaimangira Yehova
1Kings6:3 Ndipo anamanga likole pakhomo pa nyumba ya kacisiyo
1Kings6:4 Ndipo m'nvumbamo anamanga mazenera a made okhazikika.
1Kings6:5 Ndipo anamanga zipinda zosanjikizana zogundana ndi khoma
1Kings6:6 Cipinda capansico kupingasa kwace kunali mikono isanu
1Kings6:7 Ndipo nyumbayo pomangidwa inamangidwa ndi miyala yokonzeratu asanaitute; ndipo m'nyumbamo simunamveka: kulira nyundo
1Kings6:8 Khomo lolowera m'zipinda za pakati linali ku mbali ya ku dzanja lamanja ya nyumba; ndipo anthu amakwerera pa makwerero ozunguniza
1Kings6:9 Momwemo anamanga nyumbayo naitsiriza
1Kings6:10 Ndipo anamanga zipindazo zogundana ndi nyumba yonseyo
1Kings6:11 Ndipo mau a Yehova anafika kwa Solomo
1Kings6:12 Kunena za nyumba yino ulikuimanga
1Kings6:13 Ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pa ana a Israyeli osawasiya anthu anga a Israyeli.
1Kings6:14 Tsono Solomo anamanga nyumbayo naitsiriza.
1Kings6:15 Ndipo anacinga makoma a nyumba m'katimo ndi matabwa amkungudza
1Kings6:16 Ndipo anadulitsa ndi matabwa amkungudza mikono makumi awiri m'kati mwa nyumba m'tsogolo mwace
1Kings6:17 Ndipo nyumbayo
1Kings6:18 Ndipo m'kati mwa nyumba munali mikungudza yosemasema
1Kings6:19 Ndipo anakonza monenera m'kati mwa nyumba m'tsogolo mwace
1Kings6:20 Ndipo m'kati mwa monenera m'menemo
1Kings6:21 Momwemo Solomo anakuta m'kati mwa nyumba ndi golidi woyengetsa
1Kings6:22 Ndipo nyumba yonse anaikuta ndi golidi mpaka adatha nyumba yonse
1Kings6:23 Ndipo m'moneneramo anasema mitengo yaazitona akerubi awiri
1Kings6:24 Ndipo phiko limodzi la kerubi linali la mikono isanu
1Kings6:25 Ndi kerubi winayo msinkhu wace unali mikono khumi; akerubi onse awiri anafanana muyeso wao ndi msinkhu wao.
1Kings6:26 Msinkhu wa kerubi mmodzi unali mikono khumi
1Kings6:27 Ndipo anaika akerubiwo m'cipinda ca m'katimo
1Kings6:28 Ndipo anawakuta akerubi ndi golidi.
1Kings6:29 Nalemba m'makoma onse akuzinga cipinda mafano olemba ngati akerubi ndi migwalangwa ndi maluwa oti gada
1Kings6:30 Ndipo anakuta ndi golidi pansi pace pa nyumba m'katimo ndi kunja.
1Kings6:31 Ndipo pa khomo la monenera anapanga zitseko za mtengo waazitona
1Kings6:32 Zitseko ziwiri zomwe zinali za mtengo waazitona
1Kings6:33 Momwemo anapanganso mphuthu zaazitona za pa khomo la Kacisi
1Kings6:34 ndi zitseko ziwiri za mitengo yamlombwa pa khomo lina; panali citseko copatukana
1Kings6:35 Ndipo analembapo ngati akerubi ndi migwalangwa ndi maluwa oti gada
1Kings6:36 Ndipo bwalo la m'kati analimanga mizere itatu ya miyala yosemasema
1Kings6:37 Maziko ace a nyumba ya Mulungu anaikidwa m'caka cacinai m'mwezi wa Zivi.
1Kings6:38 Ndipo m'caka cakhumi ndi cimodzi m'mwezi wa Buli ndiwo mwezi wacisanu ndi citatu anatsiriza nyumba konse konse monga mwa mamangidwe ace onse. Momwemo anaimanga zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri.
1Kings7:1 Koma nyumba ya iye yekha Solomo anaimanga zaka khumi mphambu zitatu
1Kings7:2 Anamanganso nyumba yochedwa Nkhalango ya Lebano
1Kings7:3 Ndipo inayalidwa ndi mkungudza pamwamba pa zipinda makumi anai mphambu zisanu zolongosoledwa pa mapanda
1Kings7:4 Ndipo panali mazenera m'mizere itatuyo
1Kings7:5 Ndipo makomo onse ndi mphuthu zonse zinali zamphwamphwa maonekedwe ace
1Kings7:6 Ndipo anamanga khumbi la nsanamira
1Kings7:7 Ndipo anamanga khumbi la mpando wacifumu loweruziramo iye
1Kings7:8 Ndipo nyumba yace yakukhalamo iye
1Kings7:9 Izi zonse zinali za miyala ya mtengo wapatali yosemasema
1Kings7:10 Ndipo maziko ace anali a miyala ya mtengo wapatali
1Kings7:11 Ndi pamwamba pace panali miyala ya mtengo wapatali
1Kings7:12 Ndipo bwalo lalikuru lozingapo linali ndi mizere itatu ya miyala yosemasema
1Kings7:13 Ndipo mfumu Solomo anatuma anthu kukatenga Hiramu ku Turo.
1Kings7:14 Iyeyo anali mwana wace wa mkazi wamasiye wa pfuko la Nafitali
1Kings7:15 Popeza iyeyu anaunda nsanamira ziwiri zamkuwa
1Kings7:16 Ndipo anapanga mitu iwiri ya mkuwa wosungunula
1Kings7:17 Ndipo panali maukonde olukaluka ndi zoyangayanga
1Kings7:18 M'mwemo anapanga nsanamira
1Kings7:19 Ndipo mituyi inali pamwamba pa nsanamira za pa likole inali ngati akakombo malembedwe ace
1Kings7:20 Ndipo panalinso mitu pamwamba pa nsanamira ziwirizo
1Kings7:21 Ndipo anaimiritsa nsanamirazi pa likole la Kacisi; naimiritsa nsanamira ya ku dzanja lamanja
1Kings7:22 Ndipo pamwamba pa nsanamirazo panali ngati akakombo malembedwe ace; motero anaitsiriza nchito ya nsanamirazo.
1Kings7:23 Ndipo anayenganso thawale lamkuwa
1Kings7:24 Ndipo m'khosi mwace munali ngati zikho zozinganiza m'mkono umodzi zikho khumi zakuzinganiza thawalelo; zikhozo zinayengedwa m'mizere iwiri poyengedwa thawalelo.
1Kings7:25 Linasanjikika pa ng'ombe khumi mphambu ziwiri
1Kings7:26 Ndipo kucindikira kwace kunali ngati m'manja mwa munthu
1Kings7:27 Ndipo anapanga maphaka khumi amkuwa
1Kings7:28 Ndipo mapangidwe a maphakawo anali otere: anali nao matsekerezo ao
1Kings7:29 Ndipo pa matsekerezo a pakati pa mbano panali ngati mikango ndi ng'ombe ndi akerubi
1Kings7:30 Ndipo phaka lid lonse linali ndi njinga zamkuwa zinai ndi mitanda yamkuwa
1Kings7:31 Ndipo pakamwa pace m'katimo pamwamba pa cosanjikira
1Kings7:32 Ndipo njinga zinai zinali pansi pa matsekerezo
1Kings7:33 Ndipo mapangidwe a njinga analingana ndi mapangidwe a njinga za gareta
1Kings7:34 Ndipo panali ngati mapewa anai pansi pa ngondya zinai za phaka limodzi
1Kings7:35 Ndipo pamwamba pa phaka panali khoma lozunguniza
1Kings7:36 Ndipo m'mapanthi mwa mbano zace ndi pa matsekerezo ace analemba ngati akerubi ndi mikango ndi migwalangwa
1Kings7:37 Motero anapanga maphaka khumiwo
1Kings7:38 Ndipo anapanga mbiya zamphwamphwa khumi zamkuwa; m'mbiya imodziyo munalowamo madzi a mitsuko yaikuru makumi anai
1Kings7:39 Ndipo anaika maphaka asanu ku dzanja lamanja la nyumba
1Kings7:40 Ndipo Hiramu anayenga mbiyazo ndi zoolera ndi mbale zowazira. Motero Hiramu anatsiriza kupanga nchito yonse anaicitira mfumu Solomo ya m'nyumba ya Yehova.
1Kings7:41 Nsanamira ziwirizo
1Kings7:42 ndi makangaza mazana anai a maukonde awiriwo
1Kings7:43 ndi maphaka khumiwo ndi mbiya khumi ziri pa maphakawo
1Kings7:44 ndi thawale limodzilo
1Kings7:45 ndi miphikayo
1Kings7:46 Mfumu inaziyenga pa cidikha ca ku Yordano
1Kings7:47 Ndipo Solomo anazileka zipangizo zonse osaziyesa
1Kings7:48 Ndipo Solomo anapanga zipangizo zonse za m'nyumba ya Mulungu: guwa la nsembe lagolidi
1Kings7:49 ndi zoikapo nyali za golidi woyengetsa
1Kings7:50 ndi zikho
1Kings7:51 Motero nchito zonse zinatsirizika
1Kings8:1 Pamenepo Solomo anasonkhanitsa akulu a Israyeli
1Kings8:2 Ndipo anthu onse a Israyeli anasonkhana kwa mfumu Solomo kukadyereram'mwezi wa Etanimu
1Kings8:3 Ndipo akulu onse a Israyeli anadza
1Kings8:4 Ndipo anatenga likasa la Yehova
1Kings8:5 Ndipo mfumu Solomo ndi msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli wosonkhana kwa iye anali naye kulikasa
1Kings8:6 Ndipo ansembe analonga likasa la cipangano ca Yehova kumalo kwace
1Kings8:7 Popeza akerubiwo anatambasula mapiko ao awiri pamwamba pa likasa
1Kings8:8 Ndipo mphikozo zinatalika kuti nsonga za mphiko zidaoneka ku malo opatulika cakuno ca monenera; koma sizinaoneka kubwalo; ndipo zikhala pomwepo mpaka lero lino.
1Kings8:9 Munalibe kanthu m'likasamo koma magome awiri aja amwala Mose anawalongamo pa Horebu
1Kings8:10 Ndipo kunacitika ataturuka ansembe m'malo opatulika
1Kings8:11 ndipo ansembe sanakhoza kuimirira kurumikira cifukwa ca mtambowo
1Kings8:12 Pamenepo Solomo anati
1Kings8:13 Ine ndakumangirani ndithu nyumba yokhalamo Inu
1Kings8:14 Ndipo mfumu inapotoloka nkhope yace
1Kings8:15 Nati iye
1Kings8:16 Kuyambira tsiku lakuturutsa Ine anthu anga Aisrayeli m'dziko la Aigupto
1Kings8:17 Ndipo Davide atate wanga anafuna m'mtima mwace kumangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli nyumba.
1Kings8:18 Koma Yehova ananena ndi Davide atate wanga
1Kings8:19 Koma usamange ndiwe nyumbayo
1Kings8:20 Ndipo Yehova wakhazikitsa mau ace analankhulawo
1Kings8:21 Ndipo ndakonzera malo likasalo
1Kings8:22 Ndipo Solomo anaimirira ku guwa la nsembe la Yehova pamaso pa msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli
1Kings8:23 Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli
1Kings8:24 wakusungira mtumild wanu Davide atate wanga cimene mudamlonjezaco; munalankhulanso m'kamwa mwanu ndi kukwaniritsa ndi dzanja lanu monga lero lino.
1Kings8:25 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings8:26 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings8:27 Kodi Mulungu adzakhala ndithu pa dziko lapansi? Taonani
1Kings8:28 Koma muceukire pemphero la kapolo wanu
1Kings8:29 kuti maso anu atsegukire nyumba yino usiku ndi usana
1Kings8:30 Ndipo mverani pembedzero la kapolo wanu ndi la anthu anu Aisrayeli
1Kings8:31 Ngati munthu akacimwira mnzace
1Kings8:32 mverani Inu pamenepo m'mwambamo
1Kings8:33 Ndipo anthu anu Aisrayeli akawakantha adani ao cifukwa ca kucimwira Inu
1Kings8:34 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwambamo
1Kings8:35 Pamene kumwamba kwatsekeka
1Kings8:36 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwamba
1Kings8:37 M'dziko mukakhala odala
1Kings8:38 tsono pempho ndi pembedzero liri lonse akalipempha munthu ali yense
1Kings8:39 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inu
1Kings8:40 kuti aope Inu masiku onse akukhala iwowo m'dziko limene Inu munapatsa makolo ao.
1Kings8:41 Ndiponso kunena za mlendo
1Kings8:42 popeza adzamva za dzina lanu lalikuru ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu ndi mkono wanu wotambasuka; akabwera iyeyo nadzapemphera molunjika ku nyumba yino;
1Kings8:43 mverani Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inu
1Kings8:44 Akaturuka anthu anu kukayambana nkhondo ndi adani ao
1Kings8:45 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwamba pempho ndi pembedzero lao
1Kings8:46 Akacimwira Inu
1Kings8:47 ndipo akakumbukila mitima yao
1Kings8:48 ndipo akabwerera kwa Inu ndi mtima wao wonse ndi moyo wao wonse
1Kings8:49 pamenepo mverani Inu pemphero ndi pembedzero lao m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo
1Kings8:50 ndi kukhululukira anthu anu adacimwira Inu ndi mphulupulu zao zonse adaparamula nazo kwa Inu; ndipo muwacititsire cifundo iwo amene anawagwira ndende
1Kings8:51 pakuti awa ndi anthu anu ndithu
1Kings8:52 kuti maso anu akatsegukire pembedzero la kapolo wanu ndi pembedzero la anthu anu Aisrayeli
1Kings8:53 Popeza Inu munawapatula pa anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi akhale colowa canu
1Kings8:54 Ndipo kunali kuti atatsiriza Solomo kupemphera kwa Yehova pemphero ndi pembedzero lino lonse
1Kings8:55 Naimirira
1Kings8:56 Wolemekezeka ndi Yehova amene anapumulitsa anthu ace Aisrayeli
1Kings8:57 Yehova Mulungu wathu akhale nafe monga umo anakhalira nao makolo athu
1Kings8:58 kuti atitembenuzire kwa iye yekha mitima yathu iyende m'njira zace zonse
1Kings8:59 Ndipo mau anga amenewa ndapembedzera nao pamaso pa Yehova akhale pafupi ndi Yehova Mulungu wathu usana ndi usiku
1Kings8:60 kuti anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi akadziwe kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu
1Kings8:61 Mitima yanu ikhale yangwiro ndi Yehova Mulungu wathu
1Kings8:62 Ndipo mfumu ndi anthu onse a Israyeli pamodzi naye anaphera nsembe pamaso pa Yehova.
1Kings8:63 Ndipo Solomo anaphera nsembe yamtendere
1Kings8:64 Tsiku lomwelo mfumu inapatulira Mulungu pakati pace pa bwalo la ku khomo la nyumba ya Yehova; pakuti pomwepo anapereka nsembe yopsereza ndi nsembe yaufa
1Kings8:65 Ndipo nthawi yomweyo Solomo anacita madyerero pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu
1Kings8:66 Tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu anawauza anthu apite; ndipo iwo anadalitsa mfumu

1Kings10:5 ndi zakudya za pa gome lace
1Kings10:6 Ndipo anati kwa mfumu
1Kings10:7 Koma sindinakhulupira mau amenewo mpaka ndafika ine kuno

1Kings10:9 Wolemekezeka Yehova Mulungu wanu amene anakondwera nanu

1Kings10:12 Ndipo mfumu inasema mitengo yambawayo

1Kings10:15 osawerenganso winayo wa anthu a malonda oyendayenda

1Kings15:1 Ndipo caka cakhumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu ca mfumu Yerobiamu mwana wa Nebati
1Kings15:2 Anakhala mfumu zaka zitatu m'Yerusalemu
1Kings15:3 Nayenda iye m'zoipa zonse za atate wace
1Kings15:4 Koma cifukwa ca Davideyo Yehova Mulungu wace anampatsa nyali m'Yerusalemu
1Kings15:5 cifukwa kuti Davide adacita colungama pamaso pa Yehova
1Kings15:6 Ndipo panali nkhondo pakati pa Abiya ndi Yerobiamu masiku onse a moyo wace.
1Kings15:7 Ndipo macitidwe ace ena a Abiya
1Kings15:8 Nagona Abiya ndi makolo ace
1Kings15:9 Ndipo caka ca makumi awiri ca Yerobiamu mfumu ya Israyeli
1Kings15:10 Nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi anai mphambu cimodzi
1Kings15:11 Ndipo Asa anacita zabwino pamaso pa Yehova monga Davide kholo lace.
1Kings15:12 Nacotsa m'dziko anyamata aja adama
1Kings15:13 Ndipo anamcotsera Maaka amace ulemu wa mace wa mfumu
1Kings15:14 Koma misanje sanaicotsa
1Kings15:15 Ndipo analonga m'nyumba ya Yehova zinthu zija atate wace adazipereka; napereka zinthu zina iye mwini zasiliva ndi zagolidi ndi zotengera.
1Kings15:16 Ndipo panali nkhondo pakati pa Asa ndi Basa mfumu ya Israyeli masiku ao onse.
1Kings15:17 Ndipo Basa mfumu ya Israyeli anakwera ndi nkhondo ku Yuda
1Kings15:18 Tsono Asa anatenga siliva yense ndi golidi yense anatsala pa cuma ca nyumba ya Yehova
1Kings15:19 Pakhale pangano pakati pa ine ndi inu
1Kings15:20 Ndipo Benihadadi anamvera mfumu Asa
1Kings15:21 Tsono Basa atamva izi
1Kings15:22 Pamenepo mfumu Asa anamemeza Ayuda onse
1Kings15:23 Ndipo macitidwe onse ena a Asa
1Kings15:24 Nagona Asa ndi makolo ace
1Kings15:25 Ndipo Nadabu mwana wa Yerobiamu analowa ufumu wa Israyeli caka caciwiri ca Asa mfumu ya Yuda
1Kings15:26 Nacita zoipa pamaso pa Yehova
1Kings15:27 Ndipo Basa mwana wa Akiya
1Kings15:28 Inde Basa anamupha caka cacitatu ca Asa mfumu ya Yuda
1Kings15:29 Tsonokunacitika
1Kings15:30 cifukwa ca macimo a Yerobiamu
1Kings15:31 Ndipo macitidwe ena a Nadabu

2Chronicles1:1 NDIPO Solomo mwana wa Davide analimbikitsidwa m'ufumu wace
2Chronicles1:2 Ndipo Solomo analankhula ndi Aisrayeli onse
2Chronicles1:3 Ndipo Solomo ndi khamu lonse pamodzi naye anamuka ku msanje wa ku Gibeoni; pakuti kumeneko kunali cihema cokomanako ca Mulungu adacimanga Mose mtumiki wa Yehova m'cipululu.
2Chronicles1:4 Koma likasa la Mulungu Davide adakwera nalo kucokera ku Kiriyati Yearimu kumka kumene Davide adalikonzeratu malo; pakuti adaliutsiratu hema ku Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles1:5 Guwa la nsembe lomwe lamkuwa

2Chronicles1:14 Ndipo Solomo anasonkhanitsa magareta ndi apakavalo

2Chronicles1:17 Ndipo anatenga naturuka nalo gareta ku Aigupto mtengo wace masekeli a siliva mazana asanu ndi limodzi

2Chronicles35:27 ndi zocita iye
2Chronicles36:1 Pamenepo anthu a m'dziko anatenga Yehoahazi mwana wa Yosiya
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoahazi anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zitatu polowa ufumu wace
2Chronicles36:3 Ndipo mfumu ya Aigupto anamcotsera ufumu wace m'Yerusalemu
2Chronicles36:4 Ndi mfumu ya Aigupto anamlonga Eliyakimu mng'ono wace mfumu ya Yuda ndi Yerusalemu
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimu anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zisanu polowa ufumu wace
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babulo anakwera kuyambana naye
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinezara anatenganso zipangizo za nyumba ya Yehova kumka nazo ku Babulo
2Chronicles36:8 Macitidwe ena tsono a Yehoyakimu
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakini anali wa zaka zisanu ndi zitatu polowa ufumu wace
2Chronicles36:10 Ndipo pofikanso nyengo
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu cimodzi polowa ufumu wace
2Chronicles36:12 nacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wace; sanadzicepetsa kwa Yeremiya mneneri wakunena zocokera pakamwa pa Yehova.
2Chronicles36:13 Ndiponso anapandukana naye mfumu Nebukadinezara
2Chronicles36:14 Ndiponso ansembe akulu onse ndi anthu anacurukitsa zolakwa zao
2Chronicles36:15 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao anatumiza kwa iwo
2Chronicles36:16 koma ananyodola mithenga ya Mulungu
2Chronicles36:17 Pakuti Iye anawakweretsera mfumu ya Akasidi
2Chronicles36:18 Ndi zipangizo zonse za nyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles36:19 Ndipo anatentha nyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles36:20 Ndi iwo amene adapulumuka kulupanga anamuka nao ku Babulo
2Chronicles36:21 kuti akwaniridwe mau a Yehova pakamwa pa Yeremiya
2Chronicles36:22 Caka coyamba tsono ca Koresi mfumu ya Perisiya
2Chronicles36:23 Atero Koresi mfumu ya Perisiya
Ezra1:1 CAKA coyamba tsono ca Koresi mfumu ya ku Perisiya
Ezra1:2 Atero Koresi mfumu ya ku Perisiya
Ezra1:3 Ali yense mwa inu a anthu ace onse
Ezra1:4 Ndipo ali yense wotsala pamalo pali ponse agonerapo iye

Ezra1:7 Koresi mfumu anaturutsanso zipangizo za nyumba ya Yehova

Ezra1:10 zikho zagolidi makumi atatu
Ezra1:11 Zipangizo zonse zagolidi ndi zasiliva ndizo zikwi zisanu ndi mazana anai. Izi zonse Sezibazara anakwera nazo

Ezra3:1 Utakhala tsono mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri
Ezra3:2 Nanyamuka Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki
Ezra3:3 Ndipo anakhazika guwa la nsembe patsinde pace cifukwa ca kuopa iwo anthu a m'maikomo; nakwezera Yehova nsembe zopsereza pamenepo
Ezra3:4 Nacita madyerero a misasa monga kwalembedwa
Ezra3:5 atatero anaperekanso nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza
Ezra3:6 Ciyambire tsiku loyamba la mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri anapereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova; koma sanamange maziko a Kacisi wa Yehova.
Ezra3:7 Anaperekanso ndarama kwa amisiri a miyala
Ezra3:8 Caka caciwiri tsono cakufika iwo ku nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu

Ezra3:11 Ndipo anathirirana mang'ombe
Ezra3:12 Koma ansembe ambiri
Ezra3:13 Potero anthu sanazindikira phokoso la kupfuula mokondwera kulisiyanitsa ndi phokoso la kulira kwa anthu; pakuti anthu anapfuulitsa kwakukuru

Ezra4:8 Rehumu ciwinda ca malamulo

Ezra4:12 Adziwe mfumu kuti
Ezra4:13 Adziwe tsono mfumu
Ezra4:14 Popeza tsono timadya mcere wa m'nyumba ya mfumu
Ezra4:15 kuti afunefune m'buku la cikumbutso la makolo anu; momwemo mudzapeza m'buku la cikumbutso
Ezra4:16 Tirikudziwitsa mfumu kuti ukamangidwa mudziwu
Ezra4:17 Mfumu nibweza mau kwa Rehumu ciwinda ca malamulo

Ezra4:19 Ndipo ndinalamulira anthu

Ezra4:22 Cenjerani mungadodomepo

Ezra4:24 Momwemo inalekeka nchito ya nyumba ya Mulungu yokhala ku Yerusalemu; nilekeka mpaka caka caciwiri ca ufumu wa Dariyo mfumu ya Perisiya.

Ezra6:11 Ndalamuliranso kuti ali yense adzasintha mau awa

Ezra6:18 Naika ansembe m'magawo mwao
Ezra6:19 Ndipo ana a ndende anacita Paskha tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mwezi woyamba.
Ezra6:20 Pakuti ansembe ndi Alevi anadziyeretsa pamodzi
Ezra6:21 Ndipo ana a Israyeli obwera kundende

Ezra7:12 Aritasasta mfumu ya mafumu kwa Ezara wansembe
Ezra7:13 Ndilamulira kuti onse a ana a Israyeli
Ezra7:14 Popeza utumidwa wocokera pamaso pa mfumu ndi aphungu ace asanu ndi awiri
Ezra7:15 ndi kumuka nazo siliva ndi golidi
Ezra7:16 pamodzi ndi siliva ndi golidi ziri zonse ukazipeza m'dziko lonse la ku Babulo
Ezra7:17 m'mwemo uzifulumira kugula ndi ndalama iyi ng'ombe

Ezra7:20 Ndi zina zotsala zakusowa nyumba ya Mulungu wako

Ezra7:22 mpaka matalente a siliva zana limodzi
Ezra7:23 Ciri conse Mulungu wa Kumwamba acilamulire cicitikire mwacangu nyumba ya Mulungu wa Kumwamba; pakuti padzakhaliranji mkwiyo pa ufumu wa mfumu ndi ana ace?

Ezra8:19 ndi Hasabiya
Ezra8:20 ndi a Anetini

Ezra8:25 ndi kuwayesera siliva
Ezra8:26 Ndipo ndinawayesera m'dzanja mwao matalente a siliva mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu
Ezra8:27 ndi zikho zagolidi makumi awiri za madariki cikwi cimodzi
Ezra8:28 Ndipo ndinanena nao
Ezra8:29 Mukhale maso ndi kuzisunga mpaka muziyesera pamaso pa akulu a ansembe ndi Alevi
Ezra8:30 Potero ansembe ndi Alevi analandira kulemera kwace kwa siliva ndi golidi ndi zipangizo
Ezra8:31 Pamenepo tinacoka ku mtsinje wa Ahava tsiku lakhumi ndi ciwiri la mwezi woyamba
Ezra8:32 Ndipo tinafika ku Yerusalemu ndi kukhalako masiku atatu.
Ezra8:33 Ndi pa tsiku lacinai siliva ndi golidi ndi zipangizo zinayesedwa m'nyumba ya Mulungu wathu
Ezra8:34 zonsezi anaziwerenga ndi kuziyesa; ndi kulemera kwace konse kunalembedwa nthawi yomweyo.
Ezra8:35 Otengedwa ndende
Ezra8:36 Ndipo anapereka malamulo a mfumu kwa akazembe a mfumu
Ezra9:1 Zitatha izi tsono anandiyandikira akalonga
Ezra9:2 Pakuti anadzitengera okha ndi ana amuna ao ana akazi ao; nisokonezeka mbeu yopatulika ndi mitundu ya maikowa; inde dzanja la akalonga ndi olamulira linayamba kulakwa kumene.
Ezra9:3 Ndipo pakumva mau awa ndinang'amba cobvala canga
Ezra9:4 Nandisonkhanira ali yense wakunjenjemera pa mau a Mulungu wa Israyeli
Ezra9:5 Ndi pa nsembe yamadzulo ndinanyamuka m'kuzunzika kwanga
Ezra9:6 ndipo ndinati
Ezra9:7 Ciyambire masiku a makolo athu taparamula kwakukuru mpaka lero lino; ndi cifukwa ca mphulupulu zathu ife
Ezra9:8 Ndipo tsopano
Ezra9:9 Popeza ife ndife akapolo
Ezra9:10 Ndipo tsopano

Ezra9:12 Cifukwa cace tsono
Ezra9:13 Ndipo zitatigwera zonsezi cifukwa ca nchito zathu zoipa ndi kuparamula kwathu kwakukuru; popeza inu Mulungu wathu mwatilanga moticepsera mphulupulu zathu
Ezra9:14 kodi tidzabwereza kuphwanya malamulo anu

Ezra10:5 Nanyamuka Ezara

Ezra10:8 ndi kuti ali yense wosafikako atapita masiku atatu

Ezra10:12 Ndipo unayankha msonkhano wonse
Ezra10:13 Koma anthu ndiwo ambiri
Ezra10:14 Ayang'anire ici tsono akalonga athu a msonkhano wonse
Ezra10:15 Yonatani mwana wa Asaheli ndi Yazeya mwana wa Tikiva okha anatsutsana naco
Ezra10:16 Pamenepo anthu otengedwa ndende anacita cotero. Ndi Ezara wansembe
Ezra10:17 Natsiriza nao amuna onse adadzitengera akazi acilendo tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba.
Ezra10:18 Ndipo anapeza mwa ana a ansembe odzitengera akazi acilendo
Ezra10:19 Ndipo anaimika dzanja lao kuti adzacotsa akazi ao; ndipo popeza adaparamuladi

Nehemiah1:2 anafika Hanani
Nehemiah1:3 Nanena nane iwo
Nehemiah1:4 Ndipo kunali
Nehemiah1:5 ndi kuti
Nehemiah1:6 muchere khutu
Nehemiah1:7 Tacita mwamphulupulu pa Inu
Nehemiah1:8 Mukumbukile mau mudalamulira mtumiki wanu Mose
Nehemiah1:9 koma mukabwerera kudza kwa Ine
Nehemiah1:10 Ndipo awa ndi akapolo anu ndi anthu anu
Nehemiah1:11 Yehova
Nehemiah2:1 Koma kunacitika mwezi wa Nisana
Nehemiah2:2 Ninena nane mfumu
Nehemiah2:3 Ndipo ndinati kwa mfumu
Nehemiah2:4 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa ine
Nehemiah2:5 Ndipo ndinati kwa mfumu
Nehemiah2:6 Ninena nane mfumu
Nehemiah2:7 Ndinanenanso kwa mfumu
Nehemiah2:8 ndi kalata kwa Asafu wosunga misitu ya mfumu
Nehemiah2:9 Ndinafika tsono kwa ziwanga za tsidya lino la mtsinje
Nehemiah2:10 Atamva Sanibalati Mhoroni
Nehemiah2:11 Motero ndinafika ku Yerusalemu
Nehemiah2:12 Ndipo ndinauka usiku
Nehemiah2:13 Ndipo ndinaturuka usiku pa cipata ca kucigwa
Nehemiah2:14 Ndipo ndinapitima kumka ku cipata cacitsime
Nehemiah2:15 Ndipo ndinakwera usiku kumtsinje
Nehemiah2:16 Koma olamulira sanadziwa uko ndinamuka
Nehemiah2:17 Pamenepo ndinanena nao
Nehemiah2:18 Ndinawauzanso za dzanja la Mulungu wanga londikhalira mokoma
Nehemiah2:19 Koma Sanibalati Mhoroni
Nehemiah2:20 Koma ndinawabwezera mau
Nehemiah3:1 Pamenepo Eliasibu mkuru wa ansembe ananyamuka pamodzi ndi abale ace ansembe
Nehemiah3:2 Ndi pambali pace anamanga amuna a ku Yeriko. Ndi pambali pao anamanga Zakuri mwana wa Imri.
Nehemiah3:3 Ndi cipata cansomba anacimanga ana a Hasenaa; anamanga mitanda yace
Nehemiah3:4 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Meremoti mwana wa Uliya
Nehemiah3:5 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Atekoa; koma omveka ao sanapereka makosi ao ku nchito ya Mbuye wao.
Nehemiah3:6 Ndi cipata cakale anacikonza Yoyada mwana wa Paseya; ndi Mesulamu mwana wa Besodeya anamanga mitanda yace
Nehemiah3:7 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Melatiya Mgibeoni
Nehemiah3:8 Pambali pace anakonza Uziyeli mwana wa Haraya
Nehemiah3:9 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Refaya mwana wa Huri
Nehemiah3:10 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Yedaya mwana wa Harumafi
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya mwana wa Harimu
Nehemiah3:12 Ndi pambali pace anakonza Salumu mwana wa Halohesi
Nehemiah3:13 Cipata ca kucigwa anacikonza Hanini; ndi okhala m'Zanowa anacimanga
Nehemiah3:14 Ndi cipata ca kudzala anacikonza Malikiya mwana wa Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Ndi cipata ca kukasupe anacikonza Saluni mwana wa Koli
Nehemiah3:16 Potsatizana naye anakonza Nehemiya mwana wa Azibuki
Nehemiah3:17 Potsatizana naye anakonza Alevi
Nehemiah3:18 Potsatizana naye anakonza abale ao
Nehemiah3:19 Ndi pa mbali pace Ezeri mwana wa Yesuwa
Nehemiah3:20 Potsatizana naye Baruki mwana wa Zabai anafulumira kukonza gawo lina kuyambira popindirira mpaka ku khomo la nyumba ya Eliasibu mkuru wa ansembe.
Nehemiah3:21 Potsatizana naye Meremoti mwana wa Uliya mwana wa Hakozi anakonza gawo lina
Nehemiah3:22 Ndi potsatizana naye anakonza ansembe okhala kucidikha.
Nehemiah3:23 Potsatizana nao anakonza Benjamini ndi Hasubi pandunji pa nyumba pao
Nehemiah3:24 Potsatizana naye Binui mwana wa Henadadi anakonza gawo lina
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mwana wa Uzai anakonza pandunji popindirira
Nehemiah3:26 Koma Anetini okhala m'Ofeli anakonza kufikira ku malo a pandunji pa cipata ca kumadzi kum'mawa
Nehemiah3:27 Potsatizana nao Atekoa anakonza gawo lina
Nehemiah3:28 Kumtunda kwa cipata ca akavalo anakonza ansembe
Nehemiah3:29 Potsatizana nao anakonza Zadoki mwana wa Imeri pandunji pa nyumba yace. Ndi potsatizana naye anakonza Semaya mwana wa Sekaniya
Nehemiah3:30 Potsatizana naye Hananiya mwana wa Selemiya
Nehemiah3:31 Potsatizana naye anakonza Malikiya wina wa osula golidi kufikira ku nyumba ya Anetini
Nehemiah3:32 Ndi pakati pa cipinda cosanja ca kungondya ndi cipata cankhosa anakonza osula golidi ndi ocita malonda.

Nehemiah4:10 Ndipo Ayuda anati
Nehemiah4:11 Nati adani athu

Nehemiah4:14 Ndipo ndinapenya

Nehemiah6:19 Anachulanso nchito zace zokoma pamaso panga namfotokozera iye mau anga. Ndipo Tobiya anatumiza akalata kuti andiopse ine.

Nehemiah8:1 Ndipo anthu onse anasonkhana ngati munthu mmodzi ku khwalala liri ku cipata ca kumadzi

Nehemiah8:3 Nawerenga m'menemo pa khwalala liri ku cipata ca kumadzi kuyambira mbanda kuca kufikira msana
Nehemiah8:4 Ndipo Ezara mlembi anaima pa ciunda ca mitengo adacimangira msonkhanowo; ndi pambali: pace padaima Matitiya
Nehemiah8:5 Ndipo Ezara anafunyulula bukulo pamaso pa anthu onse
Nehemiah8:6 Pamenepo Ezara analemekeza Yehova Mulungu wamkuru. Nabvomereza anthu onse

Nehemiah11:1 Ndipo akuru anthu anakhala m'Yerusalemu; anthu otsala omwe anacita maere
Nehemiah11:2 Ndipo anthu anadalitsa amuna onse a akudzinenera mwaufulu kuti adzakhala m'Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah11:3 Awa tsono ndi akulu a dziko okhala m'Yerusalemu; koma m'midzi ya Yuda yense anakhala pa colowa cace m'midzi mwao
Nehemiah11:4 Ndipo m'Yerusalemu munakhala ena a ana a Yuda ndi a ana a Benjamini. Mwa ana a Yuda: Ataya mwana wa Uziya
Nehemiah11:5 ndi Maaseya mwana wa Baruki
Nehemiah11:6 Ana onse a Perezi okhala m'Yerusalemu ndiwo ngwazi mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi atatu.
Nehemiah11:7 Ndi ana a Benjamini ndi awa: Salu mwana wa Mesulamu
Nehemiah11:8 Ndi wotsatananaye Gabai
Nehemiah11:9 Ndi Yoeli mwana wa Zikiri ndiye woyang'anira wao
Nehemiah11:10 Mwa ansembe: Yedaya mwana wa Yoyaribi
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya mwana wa Hilikiya
Nehemiah11:12 ndi abale ao ocita nchito ya m'nyumbayi ndiwo mazana asanu ndi atatu mphambu makumi awiri kudza awiri; ndi Adaya mwana wa Yerohamu
Nehemiah11:13 ndi abale ace akulu a nyumba za makolo awiri mphambu makumi anai kudza awiri
Nehemiah11:14 ndi abale ao
Nehemiah11:15 Ndi mwa Alevi: Semaya mwana wa Hasubu
Nehemiah11:16 ndi Sabetai
Nehemiah11:17 ndi Mataniya mwana wa Mika
Nehemiah11:18 Alevi onse m'mudzi wopatulikawo ndiwo mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza anai.

Nehemiah11:20 Ndi Aisrayeli otsala

Job6:1 Koma Yobu anayankha
Job6:2 Mwenzi atayesa bwino cisoni canga
Job6:3 Pakuti zikadalemera tsopano koposa mcenga wa kunyanja; Cifukwa cace mau anga ndasonthokera kunena.
Job6:4 Pakuti mibvi ya Wamphamvuyonse yandilowa
Job6:5 Kodi mbidzi ilira pokhala nao msipu? Ilira kodi ng'ombe pa cakudya cace?
Job6:6 Kodi cinthu cosakolera cidyeka copanda mcere? Coyera ca dzira cikolera kodi?
Job6:7 Zimene moyo wanga ukana kuzikhudza Zikunga cakudya cosakolera kwa ine.
Job6:8 Ha! ndikadakhala naco cimene ndicipempha
Job6:9 Cimkomere Mulungu kundiphwanya
Job6:10 Pamenepo ndidzasangalala
Job6:11 Mphamvu yanga njotani kuti ndiyembekeze? Mathedwe anga ndi otani kuti ndipirire?
Job6:12 Kodi mphamvu yanga ndiyo mphamvu ya miyala? Mnofu wanga ndi mkuwa kodi?
Job6:13 Mulibe thandizo mwa ine ndekha; cipulumutso candithawa.
Job6:14 Iye amene akadakomoka
Job6:15 Abale anga anacita monyenga ngati kamtsinje
Job6:16 Amada cifukwa ca madzi oundana. M'menemo cipale cofewa cibisika;
Job6:17 Atafikira mafundi

Job21:2 Mvetsetsani mau anga; Ndi ici cikhale citonthozo canu.
Job21:3 Mundilole
Job21:4 Kodi ine
Job21:5 Ndiyang'anireni
Job21:6 Ndikangokumbukila ndibvutika mtima
Job21:7 Oipa akhaliranji ndi moyo
Job21:8 Mbeu zao zikhazikika pamodzi nao pankhope pao
Job21:9 Nyumba zao sizitekeseka ndi mantha
Job21:10 Ng'ombe yao yamphongo imakwera
Job21:11 Aturutsa makanda ao ngati gulu
Job21:12 Ayimbira lingaka ndi zeze
Job21:13 Atsekereza masiku ao ndi zokoma
Job21:14 Koma adati kwa Mulungu
Job21:15 Wamphamvuyonse ndiye yani kuti timtumikire? Ndipo tidzapindulanji pakumpemphera Iye?
Job21:16 Taonani
Job21:17 Ngati nyali za oipa zizimidwa kawiri kawiri? Ngati tsoka lao liwagwera? Ngati Mulungu awagawira zowawa mu mkwiyo wace?
Job21:18 Ngati akunga ziputu zomka ndi mphepo
Job21:19 Mukuti
Job21:20 Aone yekha cionongeko cace m'maso mwace
Job21:21 Pakuti comsamalitsa nyumba yace nciani
Job21:22 Ngati pali munthu wakumphunzitsa Mulungu nzeru? Popeza Iye aweruza mlandu iwo okwezeka.
Job21:23 Wina akufa
Job21:24 Mbale zace zidzala ndi mkaka; Ndi wongo wa m'mafupa ace uli momwe.
Job21:25 Koma mnzace akufa ali nao mtima wakuwawa
Job21:26 Iwo agona cimodzimodzi kupfumbi
Job21:27 Taonani
Job21:28 Pakuti munena
Job21:29 Simunawafunsa kodi opita m'njira? Ndipo simusamalira zotsimikiza zao?
Job21:30 Zakuti munthu woipa asungika tsiku la tsoka? Naturutsidwa tsiku la mkwiyo?
Job21:31 Adzamfotokozera ndani njira yace pamaso pace? Nadzamlipitsa ndani pa ici anacicita?
Job21:32 Potsiriza pace adzapita naye kumanda
Job21:33 Zibuma za kucigwa zidzamkomera. Adzakoka anthu onse amtsate
Job21:34 Potero munditonthozeranji nazo zopanda pace
Job22:1 Pamenepo Elifazi wa ku Temani anayankha
Job22:2 Kodi munthu apindulira Mulungu? Koma wanzeru angodzipindulira yekha.
Job22:3 Kodi Wamphamvuyonse akondwera nako kuti iwe ndiwe wolungama? Kapena kodi apindula nako kuti ukwaniritsa njira zako?
Job22:4 Kodi akudzudzula
Job22:5 Zoipa zako sizicuruka kodi? Ndi mphulupulu zako sizikhala zosawerengeka kodi?
Job22:6 Pakuti wamtenga cikole kwa mbale wako wopanda cifukwa
Job22:7 Sunampatsa wolema madzi amwe
Job22:8 Koma munthu mwini mphamvu
Job22:9 Unabweza akazi amasiye osawaninkha kanthu
Job22:10 Cifukwa cace misampha ikuzinga. Ndi mantha akubvuta modzidzimutsa
Job22:11 Kapena mdima kuti ungaone
Job22:12 Kodi Mulungu sakhala m'mwamba m'tali? Ndipo penyani kutalika kwace kwa nyenyezi
Job22:13 Ndipo ukuti
Job22:14 Mitambo ndiyo comphimba
Job22:15 Udzasunga kodi njira yakale
Job22:16 Amene anakwatulidwa isanafike nyengo yao
Job22:17 Amene anati kwa Mulungu
Job22:18 Angakhale Iye adadzaza nyumba zao ndi zabwino; Koma uphungu wa oipa unditalikira.
Job22:19 Olungama aciona nakondwera; Ndi osalakwa awaseka pwepwete
Job22:20 Ndi kuti
Job22:21 Uzolowerane ndi Iye
Job22:22 Landira tsono cilamulo pakamwa pace
Job22:23 Ukabweranso kwa Wamphamvuyonse

Job22:26 Pakuti pamenepo udzakondwera naye Wamphamvuyonse

Job23:1 Koma Yobu anayankha
Job23:2 Lero lomwe kudandaula kwanga kumawawa; Kulanga kwanga kuposa kubuula kwanga m'kulemera kwace.
Job23:3 Ha! ndikadadziwa kumene ndikampeza Mulungu
Job23:4 Ndikadalongosola mlandu wanga pamaso pace
Job23:5 Ndikadadziwa mau akadandiyankha ine
Job23:6 Akadatsutsana nane kodi mwa mphamvu yace yaikuru? Iai
Job23:7 Apo woongoka mtima akadatsutsana naye; Ndipo ndikadapulumuka cipulumukire kwa Woweruza wanga.
Job23:8 Taonani

Job23:10 Koma adziwa njira ndilowayi; Atandiyesa ndidzaturuka ngati golidi.
Job23:11 Phazi langa lagwiratu moponda Iye
Job23:12 Sindinabwerera kusiya malamulo a pa milomo yace; Ndasungitsa mau a pakamwa pace koposa lamulo langa langa.

Job23:14 Pakuti adzacita condiikidwiratu; Ndipo zambiri zotere ziri ndi Iye.

Job23:17 Popeza sindinalikhidwa usanafike mdimawo
Job24:1 Wamphamvuyonse alekeranji kuikiratu nyengo? Ndi iwo omdziwa alekeranji kudziwa masiku ace?

Job24:3 Akankhizira kwao buru wa amasiye
Job24:4 Apambukitsa aumphawi m'njira; Osauka a padziko abisala pamodzi.
Job24:5 Taonani
Job24:6 Atema dzinthu zao m'munda; Natola khunkha m'munda wampesa wa woipa.

Job24:9 Akwatula wamasiye kubere

Job24:19 Cirala ndi dzuwa zitha madzi a cipale cofewa
Job24:20 M'mimba mudzamuiwala; mphutsi zidzamudya mokondwera. Sadzamkumbukilanso; Ndipo cosalungama cidzatyoledwa ngati mtengo.

Job34:27 Popeza anapambuka

Job41:1 Kodi ukhoza kukoka ng'ona ndi mbedza? Kapena kukanikiza kalandira wace ndi cingwe?

Job41:4 Kodi idzapangana ndi iwe

Psalms1:1 WODALA munthuyo wosayenda mu uphungu wa oipa
Psalms1:2 Komatu m'cilamulo ca Yehova muli cikondwerero cace; Ndipo m'cilamulo cace amalingima usana ndi usiku.
Psalms1:3 Ndiye akunga mtengo wooka pa mitsinje ya madzi; Wakupatsa cipatso cace pa nyengo yace
Psalms1:4 Oipa satero ai; Koma akunga mungu wouluka ndi mphepo.
Psalms1:5 Cifukwa cace oipa sadzaimirira pa mlanduwo
Psalms1:6 Pakuti Yehova adziwa mayendedwe a olungama; Koma mayendedwe a oipa adzatayika.

Psalms2:5 Pomwepo adzalankhula nao mu mkwiyo wace

Psalms10:2 Podzikuza woipa apsereza waumphawi; Agwe m'ciwembu anapanganaco.
Psalms10:3 Pakuti woipa adzitamira cifuniro ca moyo wace
Psalms10:4 Woipa
Psalms10:5 Mayendedwe ace alimbika nthawi zonse; Maweruzo anu ali pamwamba posaona iye; Adani ace onse awanyodola.
Psalms10:6 Ati mumtima mwace
Psalms10:7 M'kamwa mwace mwadzala kutemberera ndi manyengo ndi kucenjerera; Pansi pa lilime lace pali cibvutitso copanda pace.
Psalms10:8 Akhala m'molalira midzi; Mobisalamo akupha munthu wosacimwa: Ambisira waumphawi nkhope yace
Psalms10:9 Alalira monga mkango m'ngaka mwace; Alalira kugwira wozunzika: Agwira wozunzika

Psalms10:11 Anena m'mtima mwace
Psalms10:12 Ukani
Psalms10:13 Woipa anyozeranii Mulungu
Psalms10:14 Mwapenya; pakuti mumayang'anira cibvutitso ndi cisoni kuti acipereke m'manja mwanu; Waumphawi adzipereka kwa Inu; Wamasiye mumakhala mthandizi wace.
Psalms10:15 Thyolani mkono wa woipa; Ndipo wocimwa
Psalms10:16 Yehova ndiye Mfumu ku nthawi yamuyaya; Aonongeka amitundu m'dziko lace.
Psalms10:17 Yehova
Psalms10:18 Kuti muweruze mlandu wa amasiye ndi wokhalira mphanthi

Psalms18:2 Yehova ndiye thanthwe langa

Psalms18:4 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga

Psalms18:7 Pamenepo linagwedezeka
Psalms18:8 Unakwera utsi woturuka m'mphuno mwace: Ndi moto wa m'kamwa mwace unanyeka: Nuyakitsa makara.

Psalms18:10 Ndipo anaberekeka pa kerubi

Psalms18:17 Anandipulumutsa ine kwa mdani wanga wamphamvu

Psalms18:22 Pakuti maweruzo ace onse anali pamaso panga
Psalms18:23 Ndipo ndinakhala wangwiro ndi iye

Psalms18:25 Pa wacifundo mukhala wacifundo Pa mumthu wangwiro mukhala wangwiro;
Psalms18:26 Pa woyera mtima mukhala woyera mtima; Pa wotsutsatsutsa mukhala wotsutsana naye.
Psalms18:27 Pakuti Inu muwapulumutsa anthu aumphawi; Koma maso okweza muwatsitsa.
Psalms18:28 Pakuti Inu muyatsa nyali yanga; Yehova
Psalms18:29 Pakuti mwa Inu ndipyola khamu la anthu; Ndipo mwa Mulungu wanga ndilumphira linga.
Psalms18:30 Mulungu ndiyewangwiro m'njira zace; Mau a Yehova ngoyengeka; Ndiye cikopa ca onse okhulupirira Iye.
Psalms18:31 Pakuti Mulungu ndani wosati Yehova? Ndipo thanthwe ndani wosati Mulungu wathu?
Psalms18:32 Mulungu ndiye wondizingiza mphamvu m'cuuno
Psalms18:33 Alinganiza mapazi anga ngati a nswala: Nandiimitsa pamsanje panga.
Psalms18:34 Aphunzitsa manja anga agwire nkhondo; Kuti walifuka uta wamkuwa ndi manja anga.
Psalms18:35 Ndipo mwandipatsa cikopa ca cipulumutso canu: Ndipo dzanja lamanja lanu landigwiriziza
Psalms18:36 Mwandipondetsa patali patali
Psalms18:37 Ndidzalondola adani anga
Psalms18:38 Ndidzawapyoza kuti sangakhoze kuuka: Adzagwa pansi pa mapazi anga
Psalms18:39 Pakuti mwaudizingiza mphamvu m'cuuno ku nkhondoyo: Mwandigonjetsera amene andiukira.
Psalms18:40 Ndipo adani anga mwawalozetsa m'mbuyo kwa ine
Psalms18:41 Anapfuula
Psalms18:42 Pamenepo ndinawapera ngati pfumbi la kumphepo; Ndinawakhuthula ngati matope a pabwalo.
Psalms18:43 Mwandipulumutsa pa zolimbana nane za anthu; Mwandiika mutu wa amitundu; Mtundu wa anthu sindinaudziwa udzanditumikira.
Psalms18:44 Pakumva m'khutu za ine adzandimvera: Alendo adzandigonjera monyenga.
Psalms18:45 Alendo adzafota
Psalms18:46 Yehova ngwa moyo; ndipo lidalitsike thanthwe langa; Nakwezeke Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga:

Psalms18:49 Cifukwa cace Yehova ndidzakuyamikani mwa amitundu

Psalms22:23 Inu akuopa Yehova

Psalms22:27 Malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzakumbukila nadzatembenukira kwa Yehova: Ndipo mafuko onse a amitundu adzagwadira pamaso panu.
Psalms22:28 Pakuti ufumuwo ngwa Yehova; Iye acita ufumu mwa amitundu.

Psalms29:1 Perekani kwa Yehova
Psalms29:2 Perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lace: Gwadirani Yehova moyera ndi mokometsetsa.
Psalms29:3 Liu la Yehova liri pamadzi; Mulungu wa ulemerero agunda
Psalms29:4 Liu la Yehova ndi lamphamvu; Liu la Yehova ndi lalikurukuru.
Psalms29:5 Liu la Yehova lithyola mitengo yamkungudza; Inde Yehova athyola mikungudza ya ku Lebano.
Psalms29:6 Aitumphitsa monga mwana wa ng'ombe; Lebano ndi Sirio monga msona wa njati.
Psalms29:7 Liu la Yehova ligawa malawi a moto.
Psalms29:8 Liu la Yehova ligwedeza cipululu; Yehova agwedeza cipululu ca Kadese.
Psalms29:9 Liu la Yehova liswetsa nyama zazikazi
Psalms29:10 Yehova anakhala pa Cigumula: Inde Yehova akhala mfumu ku nthawi yomka muyaya.
Psalms29:11 Yehova adzapatsa anthu ace mphamvu: Yehova adzadalitsa anthu ace ndi mtendere.

Psalms30:3 Yehova munabweza moyo wanga kumanda: Munandisunga ndi moyo
Psalms30:4 Yimbirani Yehova
Psalms30:5 Pakuti mkwiyo wace ukhala kanthawi kokha; Koma kuyanja kwace moyo wonse: Kulira kucezera
Psalms30:6 Ndipo ine
Psalms30:7 Inu
Psalms30:8 Ndinapfuulira kwa Inu
Psalms30:9 M'mwazi mwanga muli phindu lanji
Psalms30:10 Mverani
Psalms30:11 Munasanduliza kulira kwanga kukhale kusekera; Munandibvula ciguduli canga
Psalms30:12 Kuti ulemu wanga uyimbire Inu
Psalms31:1 Ndakhulupirira Inu
Psalms31:2 Mundicherere khutu lanu; ndipulumutseni msanga: Mundikhalire ine thanthwe lolimba
Psalms31:3 Pakuti Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa; Ndipo cifukwa ca dzina lanu ndiyendetseni bwino
Psalms31:4 Mundionjole m'ukonde umene anandichera mobisika. Pakuti Inu ndinu mphamvu yanga.
Psalms31:5 Ndipereka mzimu wanga m'dzanja lanu: Mwandiombola
Psalms31:6 Ndikwiya nao iwo akusamala zacabe zonama: Koma ndikhulupirira Yehova.
Psalms31:7 Ndidzakondwera ndi kusangalala m'cifundo canu: Pakuti mudapenya zunzo langa; Ndipo mudadziwa mzimu wanga mu nsautso yanga:
Psalms31:8 Ndipo simunandipereka m'dzanja la mdani; Munapondetsa mapazi anga pali malo.
Psalms31:9 Mundicitire cifundo
Psalms31:10 Pakuti moyo wanga watha ndi cisoni
Psalms31:11 Ndakhala cotonza cifukwa ca akundisautsa onse
Psalms31:12 Ndaiwalika m'mtima monga wakufa: Ndikhala monga cotengera cosweka.
Psalms31:13 Pakuti ndamva ugogodi wa ambiri
Psalms31:14 Koma ine ndakhulupirira Inu
Psalms31:15 Nyengo zanga ziri m'manja mwanu: Mundilanditse m'manja a adani anga
Psalms31:16 Walitsani nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu: Mundipulumutse ndi cifundo canu.
Psalms31:17 Yehova
Psalms31:18 Ikhale yosalankhula milomo ya mabodza
Psalms31:19 Ha! kukoma kwanu ndiko kwakukuru nanga
Psalms31:20 Pobisalira pamaso panu mudzawabisa kwa ciwembu ca munthu: Mudzawabisa iwo mumsasa kuti muwalanditse pa kutetana kwa malilime.
Psalms31:21 Wolemekezeka Yehova: Pakuti anandicitira cifundo cace codabwiza m'mudzi walinga.
Psalms31:22 Ndipo ine
Psalms31:23 Kondani Yehova
Psalms31:24 Limbikani
Psalms32:1 Wodala munthuyo wokhululukidwa chimo lace; Wokwiriridwa coipa cace.
Psalms32:2 Wodala munthuyu Yehova samwerengera mphulupulu zace; Ndimo mumzimu mwace mulibe cinyengo.
Psalms32:3 Pamene ndinakhala cete mafupa anga anakalamba Ndi kubuula kwanga tsiku lonse.
Psalms32:4 Cifukwa usana ndi usiku dzanja lanu linandilemera ine; Uwisi wanga unasandulika kuuma kwa malimwe.
Psalms32:5 Ndinabvomera coipa canga kwa Inu; Ndipo mphulupulu yanga sindinaibisa. Ndinati
Psalms32:6 Cifukwa cace oyera mtima onse apemphere kwa Inu
Psalms32:7 Inu ndinu mobisalira mwanga; M'nsautso mudzandisunga; Mudzandizinga ndi Nyimbo za cipulumutso.
Psalms32:8 Ine ndidzakulangiza ndi kuphunzitsa iwe za njira ukayendayo; Ndidzakupangira ndi diso langa lakuyang'ana iwe.
Psalms32:9 Musakhale monga kavalo
Psalms32:10 Zisoni zambiri zigwera woipa: Koma cifundo cidzamzinga iye wakukhulupirira Yehova.
Psalms32:11 Sekerani mwa Yehova
Psalms33:1 Pfuulani mokondwera mwa Yehova
Psalms33:2 Yamikani Yehova ndi zeze: Myimbireni ndi cisakasa ca zingwe khumi.
Psalms33:3 Mumyimbire Iye Nyimbo yatsopano; Muyimbe mwaluso kumveketsa mau.
Psalms33:4 Pakuti mau a Yehova ali olunjika; Ndi nchito zace zonse zikhulupirika.
Psalms33:5 Iye ndiye wakukonda cilungamo ndi ciweruzo: Dziko lapansi ladzala ndi cifundo ca Yehova.
Psalms33:6 Zakumwamba zinalengedwa ndi mau a Yehova; Ndipo ndi mpweya wa m'kamwa mwace khamu lao lonse.
Psalms33:7 Amaunjika madzi a m'nyanja monga mulu: Amakundika zakudya mosungiramo.
Psalms33:8 Dziko lonse lapansi liope Yehova: Ponse pali anthu acite mantha cifukwa ca Iye
Psalms33:9 Pakuti ananena
Psalms33:10 Yehova aphwanya upo wa amitundu: Asandutsa cabe zolingirira za mitundu ya anthu.
Psalms33:11 Ciweruzo ca Yehova cikhazikika cikhazikikire
Psalms33:12 Wodalitsika mtundu wa anthu umene Yehova ndiye Mulungu wao; Mtundu womwe anausankha ukhale colandira ca iye yekha.
Psalms33:13 Yehova apenyerera m'mwamba; Aona ana onse a anthu.
Psalms33:14 M'malo akhalamo Iye
Psalms33:15 Iye amene akonza mitima ya iwo onse
Psalms33:16 Palibe mfumu yoti gulu lalikuru limpulumutsa: Mphamvu yaikuru siicilanditsa ciphona
Psalms33:17 Kavalo safikana kupulumuka naye: Cinkana mphamvu yace njaikuru sapulumutsa.
Psalms33:18 Taonani
Psalms33:19 Kupulumutsa moyo wao kwa imfa
Psalms33:20 Moyo wathu walindira Yehova: Iye ndiye thandizo lathu ndi cikopa cathu.
Psalms33:21 Pakuti mtima wathu udzakondwera mwa Iye
Psalms33:22 Yehova
Psalms34:1 Ndidzalemekeza Yehova nyengo zonse; Kumlemekeza kwace kudzakhala m'kamwa mwanga kosalekeza.
Psalms34:2 Moyo wanga udzatamanda Yehova; Ofatsa adzakumva nadzakondwera.
Psalms34:3 Bukitsani pamodzi ndine ukuru wa Yehova
Psalms34:4 Ndinafuna Yehova ndipo anandibvomera
Psalms34:5 Iwo anayang'ana Iye nasanguruka; Ndipo pankhope pao sipadzacita manyazi
Psalms34:6 Munthu uyu wozunzika anapfuula
Psalms34:7 Mngelo wa Yehova azinga kuwacinjiriza iwo akuopa Iye
Psalms34:8 Talawani
Psalms34:9 Opani Yehova
Psalms34:10 Misona ya mkango isowa nimva njala: Koma iwo akufuna Yehova sadzasowa kanthu kabwino.
Psalms34:11 Idzani ananu ndimvereni ine: Ndidzakulangizani zakumuopa Yehova.
Psalms34:12 Munthu wokhumba moyo ndani
Psalms34:13 Uletse lilime lako lisachule zoipa
Psalms34:14 Pfutuka pazoipa
Psalms34:15 Maso a Yehova ali pa olungama mtima
Psalms34:16 Nkhopeya Yehovaitsutsananao akucita zoipa
Psalms34:17 Iwowo anaitana
Psalms34:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi iwo a mtimawosweka
Psalms34:19 Masautso a wolungama mtima acuruka: Koma Yehova amlanditsa mwa onsewa.
Psalms34:20 Iye asunga mafupa ace onse: Silinatyoka limodzi lonse.
Psalms34:21 Mphulupulu idzamupha woipa: Ndipo adzawatsutsa kumlandu iwo akudana naye wolungama.
Psalms34:22 Yehova aombola moyo wa anyamata ace
Psalms35:1 Tsutsanani nao iwo akutsutsana nane
Psalms35:2 Gwirani cikopa cocinjiriza
Psalms35:3 Sololani nthungo
Psalms35:4 Athe nzeru nacite manyazi iwo akufuna moyo wanga: Abwezedwe m'mbuyo nasokonezeke iwo akundipangira ciwembu.
Psalms35:5 Akhale monga mungu kumphepo
Psalms35:6 Njira yao ikhale ya mdima ndi yoterera
Psalms35:7 Pakuti anandichera ukonde wao m'mbunamo kopanda cifukwa
Psalms35:8 Cimgwere modzidzimutsa cionongeko; Ndipo ukonde wace umene anaucha umkole yekha mwini: Agwemo
Psalms35:9 Ndipo moyo wanga udzakondwera mwa Yehova: Udzasekera mwa cipulumutso cace.
Psalms35:10 Mafupa anga onse adzanena
Psalms35:11 Mboni za ciwawa ziuka
Psalms35:12 Andibwezera coipa m'malo mwa cokoma
Psalms35:13 Koma ine
Psalms35:14 Ndakhala ine monga ngad iye anali bwenzi langa
Psalms35:15 Ndipo pakutsimphina ine anakondwera
Psalms35:16 Pakati pa onyodola pamadyerero
Psalms35:17 Ambuye
Psalms35:18 Ndidzakuyamikanimumsonkhano waukuru: M'cikhamu ca anthu ndidzakulemekezani.
Psalms35:19 Adani anga asandikondwerere ine monyenga; Okwiya nane kopanda cifukwa asanditsinzinire.
Psalms35:20 Pakuti salankhula zamtendere: Koma apangira ciwembu odekha m'dziko.
Psalms35:21 Ndipo andiyasamira m'kamwa mwao; Nati
Psalms35:22 Yehova
Psalms35:23 Galamukani
Psalms35:24 Mundiweruze monga mwa cilungamo canu
Psalms35:25 Asanene mumtima mwao
Psalms35:26 Acite manyazi
Psalms35:27 Apfuule mokondwera nasangalale iwo akukondwera naco cilungamo canga: Ndipo anene kosalekeza
Psalms35:28 Ndipo lilime langa lilalikire cilungamo canu
Psalms36:1 Colakwa ca woipayo cimati m'kati mwa mtima wanga
Psalms36:2 Pakud adzidyoletsa yekha m'kuona kwace
Psalms36:3 Mau a pakamwa pace ndiwo opanda pace ndi onyenga: Waleka kuzindikira ndi kucita bwino.
Psalms36:4 Alingirira zopanda pace pakama pace; Adziika panjira posad pabwino; Coipa saipidwa naco.
Psalms36:5 Yehova
Psalms36:6 Cilungamo canu cikunga mapiri a Mulungu; Maweruzo anu akunga cozama cacikuru: Yehova
Psalms36:7 Ha! cifundo canu
Psalms36:8 Adzakhuta kwambiri ndi zonona za m'nyumba mwanu: Ndipo mudzawamwetsa mu mtsinje wa zokondweretsa zanu.
Psalms36:9 Pakuti citsime ca moyo ciri ndi Inu: M'kuunika kwanu tidzaona kuunika.
Psalms36:10 Tanimphitsani cifundo canu pa iwo akudziwa Inu; Ndi cilungamo canu pa oongoka mtima.
Psalms36:11 Phazi la akudzikuza lisandifikire ine
Psalms36:12 Pomwepo padagwera ocita zopanda pace: Anawalikha
Psalms37:1 Usabvutike mtima cifukwa ca ocita zoipa
Psalms37:2 Pakuti adzawamweta msanga monga udzu
Psalms37:3 Khulupirira Yehova
Psalms37:4 Udzikondweretsenso mwa Yehova; Ndipo iye adzakupatsa zokhumba mtima wako.
Psalms37:5 Pereka njira yako kwa Yehova; Khulupiriranso Iye
Psalms37:6 Ndipo adzaonetsa cilungamo cako monga kuunika
Psalms37:7 Khala cete mwa Yehova
Psalms37:8 Leka kupsa mtima
Psalms37:9 Pakuti ocita zoipa adzadulidwa: Koma iwo akuyembekeza Yehova
Psalms37:10 Katsala kanthawi ndipo woipa adzatha psiti: Inde
Psalms37:11 Koma ofatsa adzalandira dziko lapansi; Nadzakondwera nao mtendere wocuruka.
Psalms37:12 Woipa apangira ciwembu wolungama
Psalms37:13 Ambuye adzamseka: Popeza apenya kuti tsiku lace likudza.
Psalms37:14 Oipa anasolola lupanga
Psalms37:15 Lupanga lao lidzalowa m'mtima mwao momwe
Psalms37:16 Zocepa zace za wolungama zikoma Koposa kucuruka kwao kwa oipa ambiri.
Psalms37:17 Pakuti manja a oipa adzatyoledwa: Koma Yehova acirikiza olungama.
Psalms37:18 Yehova adziwa masiku a anthu angwiro: Ndipo cosiyira cao cidzakhala cosatha.
Psalms37:19 Sadzacita manyazi m'nyengo yoipa: Ndipo m'masiku a njala adzakhuta.
Psalms37:20 Pakuti oipa adzatayika
Psalms37:21 Woipa akongola
Psalms37:22 Pakuti iwo amene awadalitsa adzalandira dziko lapansi; Koma iwo amene awatemberera adzadulidwa.
Psalms37:23 Yehova akhazikitsa mayendedwe a munthu; Ndipo akondwera nayo njira yace.
Psalms37:24 Angakhale akagwa
Psalms37:25 Ndinali mwana ndipo ndakalamba: Ndipo sindinapenya wolungama wasiyidwa
Psalms37:26 Tsiku lonse acitira cifundo
Psalms37:27 Siyana naco coipa
Psalms37:28 Pakuti Yehova akonda ciweruzo
Psalms37:29 Olungama adzalandira dziko lapansi
Psalms37:30 Pakamwa pa wolungama palankhula zanzeru
Psalms37:31 Malamulo a Mulungu wace ali mumtima mwace; Pakuyenda pace sadzaterereka.
Psalms37:32 Woipa aunguza wolungama
Psalms37:33 Yehova sadzamsiya m'dzanja lace: Ndipo sadzamtsutsa poweruzidwa iye.
Psalms37:34 Yembekeza Yehova
Psalms37:35 Ndapenya woipa
Psalms37:36 Koma anapita ndipo taona
Psalms37:37 Tapenya wangwiro
Psalms37:38 Koma olakwa adzaonongeka pamodzi: Matsiriziro a oipa adzadutidwa.
Psalms37:39 Koma cipulumutso ca olungama cidzera kwa Yehova
Psalms37:40 Ndipo Yehova awathandiza

Psalms38:2 Pakuti mibvi yanu yandilowa
Psalms38:3 Mumnofu mwanga mulibe camoyo cifukwa ca ukali wanu; Ndipo m'mafupa anga simuzizira

Psalms39:13 Ndiloleni
Psalms40:1 Kuyembekeza ndayembekeza Yehova; Ndipo anandilola
Psalms40:2 Ndipo anandikweza kunditurutsa m'dzenje la citayiko
Psalms40:3 Ndipo anapatsa Nyimbo yatsopano m'kamwa mwanga

Psalms40:5 Inu
Psalms40:6 Nsembe ndi copereka simukondwera nazo; Mwanditsegula makutu: Nsembe yopsereza ndi yamacimo simunapempha.
Psalms40:7 Pamenepo ndinati
Psalms40:8 Kucita cikondwero canu kundikonda
Psalms40:9 Ndalalikira cilungamo mu msonkano waukuru; Onani
Psalms40:10 Cilungamo canu sindinacibisa m'kati mwamtima mwanga; Cikhulupiriko canu ndi cipulumutso canu ndinacinena; Cifundo canu ndi coonadi canu sindinacibisira msonkhano waukuru.
Psalms40:11 Inu Yehova
Psalms40:12 Pakuti zoipa zosawerengeka zandizinga
Psalms40:13 Ndikupemphani

Psalms41:13 Wodalitsika Yehova
Psalms42:1 Monga nswala ipuma wefuwefu kukhumba mitsinje; Motero moyo wanga upuma wefuwefu kukhumba Inu

Psalms42:4 Ndizikumbukila izi ndipo nditsanulira moyo wanga m'kati mwa ine

Psalms42:6 Mulungu wanga
Psalms42:7 Madzi akuya aitanizana ndi madzi akuya
Psalms42:8 Koma usana Yehova adzalamulira cifundo cace

Psalms42:11 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu: pakuti ndidzamlemekeza tsopanonso
Psalms43:1 Mundiweruzire
Psalms43:2 Pakuti Inu ndinu Mulungu wa mphamvu yanga; mwanditayiranji? Ndimayenderanji woliralira cifukwa ca kundipsinja mdani?
Psalms43:3 Tumizirani kuunika kwanu ndi coonadi canu zinditsogolere: Zindifikitse ku phiri lanu loyera
Psalms43:4 Kuti ndipite kufikira guwa la nsembe la Mulungu
Psalms43:5 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu: pakuti ndidzamyamikanso
Psalms44:1 Mulungu
Psalms44:2 Inu munapitikitsa amitundu ndi dzanja lanu
Psalms44:3 Pakuti sanalanda dziko ndi lupanga lao
Psalms44:4 Inu ndinu mfumu yanga
Psalms44:5 Mwa Inu tidzakankhira pansi otsutsana nafe: M'dzina lanu tidzapondereza akutiukira ife.
Psalms44:6 Pakuti sinditama uta wanga
Psalms44:7 Koma Inu munatipulumutsa kwa iwo akutsutsana nafe
Psalms44:8 Mwa Mulungu tidzitamanda tsiku lonse
Psalms44:9 Koma mwatitaya
Psalms44:10 Mutibwereretsa kuthawa otisautsa: Ndipo akudana nafe adzifunkhira okha.
Psalms44:11 Mwatipereka ngati nkhosa zoyenera kuzidya; Ndipo mwatibalalitsa mwa amitundu.
Psalms44:12 Mugulitsa anthu anu kwacabe
Psalms44:13 Mutisandutsa cotonza kwa anzathu
Psalms44:14 Mutiika tikhale onyozeka mwa amitundu
Psalms44:15 Tsiku lonse cimpepulo canga cikhala pamaso panga
Psalms44:16 Cifukwa ca mau a wotonza wocitira mwano; Cifukwa ca mdani ndi wobwezera cilango
Psalms44:17 Zonsezi zatigwera; koma sitinakuiwalani
Psalms44:18 Mtima wathu sunabwerera m'mbuyo
Psalms44:19 Mungakhale munatityola mokhala zirombo
Psalms44:20 Tikadaiwala dzina la Mulungu wathu
Psalms44:21 Mulungu sakadasanthula ici kodi? Pakuti adziwa zinsinsi za mtima.
Psalms44:22 Koma
Psalms44:23 Galamukani
Psalms44:24 Mubisiranji nkhope yanu
Psalms44:25 Pakuti moyo wathu waweramira kupfumbi: Pamimba pathu pakangamira dziko lapansi.
Psalms44:26 Ukani
Psalms45:1 Mtima wanga usefukira naco cinthu cokoma: Ndinena zopeka ine za mfumu: Lilime langa ndilo peni yofulumiza kulemba.
Psalms45:2 Inu ndinu wokongola ndithu kuposa ana a anthu; Anakutsanulirani cisomo pa milomo yanu: Cifukwa cace Mulungu anakudalitsani kosatha.
Psalms45:3 Dzimangireni lupanga lanu m'cuuno mwanu
Psalms45:4 Ndipo pindulani
Psalms45:5 Mibvi yanu njakuthwa; Mitundu ya anthu igwa pansi pa Inu: Iwalasa mumtima adani a mfumu.
Psalms45:6 Mpando wacifumu wanu
Psalms45:7 Mukonda cilungamo
Psalms45:8 Zobvala zanu zonse nza mure
Psalms45:9 Mwa omveka anu muli ana akazi amafumu: Ku dzanja lamanja lanu aima mkazi wa mfumu wobvala golidi wa ku Ofiri.
Psalms45:10 Tamvera
Psalms45:11 Potero mfumuyo adzakhumba kukoma kwako: Pakuti ndiye mbuye wako; ndipo iwe umgwadire iye.
Psalms45:12 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Turo adzafika nayo mphatso; Acuma a mwa anthu adzapempha kudziwika nanu.
Psalms45:13 Mwana wamkazi wa mfumu ngwa ulemerero wonse m'kati mwa nyumba: Zobvala zace nza made agolidi.
Psalms45:14 Adzamtsogolera kwa mfumu wabvala zamawanga-mawanga: Anamwali anzace omtsata adzafika nao kwa inu.
Psalms45:15 Adzawatsogolera ndi cimwemwe ndi kusekerera: Adzalowa m'nyumba ya mfumu.
Psalms45:16 M'malo mwa makolo ako mudzakhala ana ako
Psalms45:17 Ndidzawakumbutsa dzina lanu m'mibadwo mibadwo: Cifukwa cace mitundu ya anthu idzayamika Inu ku nthawi za nthawi.

Psalms68:6 Mulungu amangitsira banjaanthu a pa okha; Aturutsa am'ndende alemerere; Koma opikisana naye akhala m'dziko lopanda madzi.
Psalms68:7 Pakuturuka paja
Psalms68:8 Dziko lapansi linagwedezeka
Psalms68:9 Inu
Psalms68:10 Gulu lanu linakhala m'dziko muja: Mwa ukoma wanu munalikonzera ozunzika
Psalms68:11 Ambuye anapatsa mau: Akazi akulalikira uthengawo ndiwo khamu lalikuru.
Psalms68:12 Mafumu a magulu a ankhondo athawathawa: Ndipo mkazi amene akhala kwao agawa zofunkha.
Psalms68:13 Pogona inu m'makola a zoweta
Psalms68:14 Pamene Wamphamvuyonse anabalalitsa mafumu m'dzikomo
Psalms68:15 Phiri la Basana ndilo phiri la Mulungu; Phiri la Basana ndilo phiri la mitu mitu.
Psalms68:16 Mucitiranji nsanje mapiri inu a mitu mitu
Psalms68:17 Magareta a Mulungu ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri
Psalms68:18 Munakwera kumka kumwamba
Psalms68:19 Wolemekezeka Ambuye
Psalms68:20 Mulungu akhala kwa ife Mulungu wa cipulumutso; Ndipo Yehova Ambuye ali nazo zopulumutsira kuimfa.
Psalms68:21 Indedi Mulungu adzaphwanya mutu wa adani ace
Psalms68:22 Ambuye anati
Psalms68:23 Kuti ubviike phazi lako m'mwazi
Psalms68:24 Anapenya mayendedwe anu
Psalms68:25 Oyimbira anatsogolera
Psalms68:26 Lemekezani Mulungu m'masonkhano
Psalms68:27 Apo pali Benjamini wamng'ono
Psalms68:28 Mulungu wako analamulira mphamvu yako: Limbitsani
Psalms68:29 Cifukwa ca Kacisi wanu wa m'Yerusalemu Mafumu adzabwera naco caufulu kukupatsani.
Psalms68:30 Dzudzulani cirombo ca m'bango
Psalms68:31 Akulu adzafumira ku Aigupto; Kushi adzafulumira kutambalitsa manja ace kwa Mulungu.
Psalms68:32 Yimbirani Mulungu
Psalms68:33 Kwa Iye wakuberekeka pamwambamwamba
Psalms68:34 Bvomerezani kuti mphamvu nja Mulungu; Ukulu wace uli pa Israyeli
Psalms68:35 Inu Mulungu
Psalms69:1 Ndipulumutseni Mulungu; Pakuti madzi afikira moyo wanga.
Psalms69:2 Ndamira m'thope lozama
Psalms69:3 Ndalema ndi kupfuula kwanga; kum'mero kwauma gwa: M'maso mwanga mwada poyembekeza Mulungu wanga.
Psalms69:4 Ondida kopanda cifukwa acuruka koposa tsitsi la pamutu panga; Ofuna kunditha
Psalms69:5 Mulungu
Psalms69:6 Iwo akuyembekeza Inu
Psalms69:7 Pakuti ndalola cotonza cifukwa ca Inu: Cimpepulo cakuta nkhope yanga
Psalms69:8 Abale anga andiyesa mlendo
Psalms69:9 Pakuti cangu ca pa nyumba yanu candidya; Ndi zotonza za iwo otonza Inu zandigwera ine.
Psalms69:10 Ndipo ndinalira pa kusala kwa moyo wanga
Psalms69:11 Ndipo cobvala canga ndinayesa ciguduli
Psalms69:12 Okhala pacipata akamba za ine; Ndipo oledzera andiyimba.
Psalms69:13 Koma ine
Psalms69:14 Mundilanditse kuthope
Psalms69:15 Cigumula cisandifotsere
Psalms69:16 Mundiyankhe Yehova; pakuti cifundo canu ncokoma; Munditembenukire monga mwa unyinji wa nsoni zokoma zanu.
Psalms69:17 Ndipo musabisire nkhope yanu mtumiki wanu; Pakuti ndisautsika ine; mundiyankhe msanga.
Psalms69:18 Yandikizani moyo wanga
Psalms69:19 Mudziwa cotonza canga
Psalms69:20 Cotonza candiswera mtima
Psalms69:21 Ndipo anandipatsa ndulu ikhale cakudya canga; Nandimwetsa vinyo wosasa pomva ludzu ine.
Psalms69:22 Gome lao likhale msampha pamaso pao; Pokhala ndi mtendere iwo
Psalms69:23 M'maso mwao mude
Psalms69:24 Muwatsanulire mkwiyo wanu
Psalms69:25 Pokhala pao pakhale bwinja; M'mahema mwao musakhale munthu.
Psalms69:26 Pakuti alondola amene Inu munampanda; Ndipo akambirana za zowawa zao za iwo amene munawalasa.
Psalms69:27 Onjezani mphulupulu pa mphulupulu zao; Ndipo asafikire cilungamo canu.
Psalms69:28 Afafanizidwe m'buku lamoyo
Psalms69:29 Koma ine ndine wozunzika ndi womva zowawa; Cipulumutso canu
Psalms69:30 Ndidzalemekeza dzina la Mulungu ndi kuliyimbira
Psalms69:31 Ndipo cidzakomera Yehova koposa ng'ombe
Psalms69:32 Ofatsa anaciona
Psalms69:33 Pakuti Yehova amvera aumphawi
Psalms69:34 Zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zimlemekeze
Psalms69:35 Pakuti Mulungu adzapulumutsa Ziyoni
Psalms69:36 Ndipo mbumba ya atumiki ace idzalilandira; Ndipo iwo akukonda dzina lace adzakhalam'mwemo.

Psalms71:1 Ndikhulupirira Inu
Psalms71:2 Ndikwatuleni m'cilungamo canu
Psalms71:3 Mundikhalire thanthwe lokhalamo
Psalms71:4 Ndilanditseni
Psalms71:5 Pakuti Inu ndinu ciyembekezo canga
Psalms71:6 Inu munandigwirizizakuyambira ndisanabadwe: Kuyambira pa thupi la mai wanga wondicitira zokoma ndinu; Ndidzakulemekezani kosalekeza.
Psalms71:7 Ndikhala codabwiza kwa ambiri; Koma Inu ndinu pothawira panga polimba.
Psalms71:8 M'kamwa mwanga mudzadzala lemekezo lanu
Psalms71:9 Musanditaye mu ukalamba wanga; Musandisiye

Psalms71:19 Cilungamo canunso

Psalms72:1 Patsani mfumu maweruzo anu
Psalms72:2 Potero adzanenera anthu anu mlandu ndi m'cilungamo
Psalms72:3 Mapiri adzatengera anthu mtendere
Psalms72:4 Adzaweruza ozunzika a mwa anthu
Psalms72:5 Adzakuopani momwe likhalira dzuwa ndi mwezi
Psalms72:6 Adzanga mvula yakugwa pa udzu wosenga: Monga mvula yothirira dziko.
Psalms72:7 Masiku ace wolungama adzakhazikika; Ndi mtendere wocuruka
Psalms72:8 Ndipo adzacita ufumu kucokera kunyanja kufikira kunyanja
Psalms72:9 Okhala m'cipululu adzagwadira pamaso pace; Ndi adani ace adzaluma nthaka.
Psalms72:10 Mafumu a ku Tarisi ndi ku Zisumbuzo adzabwera naco copereka; Mafumu a ku Sheba ndi Seba adzadza nazo mphatso
Psalms72:11 Inde mafumu onse adzamgwadira iye: Amitundu onse adzamtumikira.
Psalms72:12 Pakuti adzapulumutsa waumphawi wopfuulayo; Ndi wozunzika amene alibe mthandizi.
Psalms72:13 Adzacitira nsoni wosauka ndi waumphawi
Psalms72:14 Adzaombola moyo wao ku cinyengo ndi ciwawa; Ndipo mwazi wao udzakhala wa mtengo pamaso pace:
Psalms72:15 Ndipo iye adzakhala ndi moyo; ndipo adzampatsa golidi wa ku Sheba; Nadzampempherera kosalekeza; Adzamlemekeza tsiku lonse.
Psalms72:16 M'dzikomo mudzakhala dzinthu dzocuruka pamwamba pa mapiri; Zipatso zace zidzati waa
Psalms72:17 Dzina lace lidzakhala kosatha: Momwe likhalira dzuwa dzina lace lidzamvekera zidzukulu: Ndipo anthu adzadalitsidwa mwa Iye; Amitundu onse adzamucha wodala.
Psalms72:18 Wolemekezeka Yehova Mulungu
Psalms72:19 Ndipo dzina lace la ulemerero lidalitsike kosatha; Ndipo dziko lonse lapansi lidzale nao ulemerero wace. Amen
Psalms73:1 Indedi Mulungu acitira Israyeli zabwino
Psalms73:2 Koma ine
Psalms73:3 Pakuti ndinacitira nsanje odzitamandira
Psalms73:4 Pakuti palibe zomangira pakufa iwo: Ndi mphamvu yao niolimba
Psalms73:5 Sabvutika monga anthu ena; Sasautsika monga anthu ena.
Psalms73:6 Cifukwa cace kudzikuza kunga unyolo pakhosi pao; Acibvala ciwawa ngati malaya.
Psalms73:7 Kunenepa kwao kutuzulitsa maso ao: Malingaliro a mitima yao asefukira.
Psalms73:8 Acita zaphwete nalankhula moipa za kusautsa: Alankhula modzitama.
Psalms73:9 Pakamwa pao anena zam'mwamba
Psalms73:10 Cifukwa cace anthu ace amabwera kudza kuno: Ndipo cikho codzala ndi madzi acigugudiza.

Psalms73:12 Tapenyani
Psalms73:13 Indedi

Psalms73:18 Indedi muwaika poterera: Muwagwetsa kuti muwaononge.
Psalms73:19 Ha! m'kamphindi ayesedwa bwinja; Athedwa konse ndi zoopsya.
Psalms73:20 Monga anthu atauka
Psalms73:21 Pakuti mtima wanga udawawa
Psalms73:22 Ndinali wam'thengo

Psalms74:1 Mulungu
Psalms74:2 Kumbukilani msonkhano wanu
Psalms74:3 Nyamulani mapazi anu kukapenya mapasukidwe osatha
Psalms74:4 Otsutsana ndi Inu abangula pakati pa msonkhano wanu; Aika mbendera zao zikhale zizindikilo.
Psalms74:5 Anaoneka ngati osamula nkhwangwa kunkhalango.
Psalms74:6 Ndipo tsopano aphwanya zosemeka zace zonse Ndi nkhwangwa ndi nyundo
Psalms74:7 Anatentha malo anu opatulika; Anaipsa ndi kugwetsa pansi mokhalamo dzina lanu.
Psalms74:8 Ananena mumtima mwao
Psalms74:9 Sitiziona zizindikilo zathu; Palibenso mneneri; Ndipo mwa ife palibe wina wakudziwa mpaka liti.
Psalms74:10 Wotsutsanayo adzatonza kufikira liti
Psalms74:11 Mubwezeranji dzanja lanu
Psalms74:12 Koma Mulungu ndiye mfumu yanga kuyambira kale
Psalms74:13 Mudagawa nyanja ndi mphamvu yanu; Mudaswa mitu ya zoopsa za m'madzi.
Psalms74:14 Mudaphwanya mitu ya livyatanu; Mudampereka akhale cakudya ca iwo a m'cipululu.
Psalms74:15 Mudagawa kasupe ndi mtsinje; Mudaphwetsa mitsinje yaikuru.
Psalms74:16 Usana ndi wanu
Psalms74:17 Munaika malekezero onse a dziko lapansi; Munalenga dzinja ndi malimwe.
Psalms74:18 Mukumbukile ici
Psalms74:19 Musapereke moyo wa njiwa yanu kwa cirombo; Musamaiwala moyo wa ozunzika anu nthawi yonse.
Psalms74:20 Samalirani cipanganoco; Pakuti malo amdima a m'dziko adzala ndi zokhalamo ciwawa.
Psalms74:21 Okhalira mphanthi asabwere nao manyazi; Wozunzika ndi waumphawi alemekeze dzina lanu.
Psalms74:22 Nyamukani
Psalms74:23 Musaiwale mau a iwo otsutsana ndi Inu; Kusokosera kwa iwo akuukirani Inu kumakweca kosaleka.

Psalms77:1 Ndidzapfuulira kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga; Kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga

Psalms77:6 Ndikumbukila Nyimbo yanga

Psalms78:64 Ansembe ao anagwa ndi lupanga; Ndipo amasiye ao sanacita maliro.
Psalms78:65 Pamenepo Ambuye anauka ngati wam'tulo; Ngati ciphona cakucita nthungululu ndi vinyo.
Psalms78:66 Ndipo anapanda otsutsana naye kumbuyo; Nawapereka akhale otonzeka kosatha.

Psalms78:69 Ndipo anamanga malo oyera ace ngati kaphiri

Psalms78:71 Anamtenga kuja anatsata zoyamwitsa
Psalms78:72 Potero anawaweta monga mwa mtima wace wangwiro; Nawatsogolera ndi luso la manja ace.
Psalms79:1 Mulungu
Psalms79:2 Anapereka mitembo ya atumiki anu ikhale cakudya ca mbalame za mlengalenga
Psalms79:3 Anakhetsa mwazi wao ngati madzi pozungulira Yerusalemu; Ndipo panalibe wakuwaika.
Psalms79:4 Takhala cotonza ca anansi athu
Psalms79:5 Yehova
Psalms79:6 Thirirani mkwiyo wanu pa akunja osadziwa Inu
Psalms79:7 Pakuti anathera Yakobo
Psalms79:8 Musakumbukile moritsutsa mphulupulu za makolo athu; Nsoni zokoma zanu zitikumike msanga: Pakuti tafoka kwambiri.
Psalms79:9 Tithandizeni Mulungu wa cipulumutso cathu
Psalms79:10 Anenerenji amitundu
Psalms79:11 Kubuula kwa wandende kufike kuli Inu; Monga mwa mphamvu yanu yaikuru lolani ana a imfa atsale;
Psalms79:12 Ndipo anansi athu amene anatonza Inu muwabwezere cotonza cao
Psalms79:13 Potero ife anthu anu ndi nkhosa za pabusa panu Tidzakuyamikani kosatha; Tidzafotokozera cilemekezo canu ku mibadwo mibadwo.
