Psalms98:6 Pfuulani pamaso pa Mfumu Yehova
Psalms98:7 Nyanja Ipfuule ndi kudzala kwace; Dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi iwo okhalamo;
Psalms98:8 Mitsinje iombe manja; Mapiri apfuule pamodzi mokondwera;
Psalms98:9 Pamaso pa Yehova
Psalms99:1 Yehova ndiye mfumu; mitundu ya anthu injenjemere; Iye akhala pakati pa akerubi; dziko lapansi ligwedezeke.
Psalms99:2 Yehova ndiye wamkuru m'Ziyoni; Ndipo akwezeka pamwamba pa mitundu yonse ya anthu.
Psalms99:3 Alemekeze dzina lanu lalikuru ndi loopsa; Ili ndilo loyera.
Psalms99:4 Ndipo mphamvu ya mfumu ikonda ciweruzo; Inu mukhazikitsa zolunjika
Psalms99:5 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu
Psalms99:6 Mwa ansembe ace muli Mose ndi Aroni
Psalms99:7 Iye analankhula nao mumtambo woti njo: Iwo anasunga mboni zace ndi malembawa anawapatsa
Psalms99:8 Munawayankha
Psalms99:9 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu
Psalms100:1 Pfuulirani kwa Yehova
Psalms100:2 Tumikirani Yehova ndi cikondwerero: Idzani pamaso pace ndi kumyimbira mokondwera
Psalms100:3 Dziwani kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu; Iyeyu anatilenga
Psalms100:4 Lowani ku zipata zace ndi ciyamiko
Psalms100:5 Pakuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; cifundo cace cimamka muyaya; Ndi cikhulupiriko cace ku mibadwo mibadwo.
Psalms101:1 Ndidzayimba za cifundo ndi ciweruzo; Ndidzayimba zakukulemekezani Inu
Psalms101:2 Ndidzacita mwanzeru m'njira yangwiro; Mudzandidzera liti? Ndidzayenda m'nyumba mwanu ndi mtima wangwiro.
Psalms101:3 Sindidzaika cinthu coipa pamaso panga; Cocita iwo akupatuka padera cindiipira; Sicidzandimamatira.
Psalms101:4 Mtima wopulukira udzandicokera; Sindidzadziwana naye woipa.
Psalms101:5 Wakuneneza mnzace m'tseri ndidzamdula; Wa maso odzikuza ndi mtima wodzitama sindidzamlola.
Psalms101:6 Maso anga ayang'ana okhulupirika m'dziko
Psalms101:7 Wakucita cinyengo sadzakhala m'kati mwa nyumba yanga; Wakunena mabodza sadzakhazikika pamaso panga.
Psalms101:8 Mamawa onse ndidzadula oipa onse a m'dziko; Kuduliratu onse akucita zopanda pace ku mudzi wa Yehova.
Psalms102:1 Yehova
Psalms102:2 Musandibisire nkhope yanu tsiku la nsautso yanga; Mundichereze khutu lanu; Tsiku limene ndiitana ine mundiyankhe msanga
Psalms102:3 Popeza masiku anga akanganuka ngati utsi
Psalms102:4 Mtima wanga ukunga udzu wamweta
Psalms102:5 Cifukwa ca liu la kubuula kwanga Mnofu wanga umamatika ku mafupa anga.
Psalms102:6 Ndikunga bvuwo m'cipululu; Ndikhala ngati kadzidzi wa kumabwinja.
Psalms102:7 Ndidikira
Psalms102:8 Adani anga anditonza tsiku lonse; Akundiyarukirawo alumbirira ine.
Psalms102:9 Pakuti ndadya mapulusa ngati mkate
Psalms102:10 Cifukwa ca ukali wanu ndi kuzaza kwanu; Popeza munandinyamula ndipo munandigwetsa.
Psalms102:11 Masiku anga akunga mthunzi womka m'tali; Ndipo ine ndauma ngati udzu.
Psalms102:12 Koma Inu
Psalms102:13 Inu mudzauka
Psalms102:14 Pakuti atumiki anu akondwera nayo miyala yace
Psalms102:15 Pamenepo amitundu adzaopa dzina la Yehova
Psalms102:16 Pakuti Yehova anamanga Ziyoni
Psalms102:17 Anasamalira pemphero la iwo akusowa konse
Psalms102:18 Ici adzacilembera mbadwo ukudza; Ndi mtundu wa anthu umene udalengedwa udzamlemekeza Yehova.
Psalms102:19 Pakuti anapenya pansi ali kumwamba kuli malo ace opatulika; Yehova pokhala kumwamba anapenya dziko lapansi;
Psalms102:20 Kuti amve kubuula kwa wandende; Namasule ana a imfa
Psalms102:21 Kuti anthu alalikire dzina la Yehova m'Ziyoni
Psalms102:22 Posonkhana pamodzi mitundu ya anthu
Psalms102:23 Iye analanda mphamvu yanga panjira; Anacepsa masiku anga.
Psalms102:24 Ndinati
Psalms102:25 Munakhazika dziko lapansi kalelo; Ndipo zakumwamba ndizo nchito ya manja anu.
Psalms102:26 Zidzatha izi
Psalms102:27 Koma Inu ndinu yemweyo
Psalms102:28 Ana a atumiki anu adzakhalitsa
Psalms103:1 Lemekeza Yehova
Psalms103:2 Lemekeza Yehova
Psalms103:3 Amene akhululukira mphulupulu zako zonse; Naciritsa nthenda zako zonse;
Psalms103:4 Amene aombola moyo wako ungaonongeke; Nakubveka korona wa cifundo ndi nsoni zokoma:
Psalms103:5 Amene akhutitsa m'kamwa mwako ndi zabwino; Nabweza ubwana wako unge mphungu.
Psalms103:6 Yehova acitira onse osautsidwa Cilungamo ndi ciweruzo.
Psalms103:7 Analangiza Mose njira zace
Psalms103:8 Yehova ndiye wa nsoni zokoma ndi wacisomo
Psalms103:9 Sadzatsutsana nao nthawi zanse; Ndipo sadzasunga mkwiyo wace kosatha.
Psalms103:10 Sanaticitira monga mwa zolakwa zathu
Psalms103:11 Pakuti monga m'mwamba mutalikira ndi dziko lapansi
Psalms103:12 Monga kum'mawa kutanimpha ndi kumadzulo
Psalms103:13 Monga atate acitira ana ace cifundo
Psalms103:14 Popeza adziwa mapangidwe athu; Akumbukila kuti ife ndife pfumbi.
Psalms103:15 Koma munthu
Psalms103:16 Pakuti mphepo ikapitapo pakhala palibe: Ndi malo ace salidziwanso.
Psalms103:17 Koma cifundo ca Yehova ndico coyambira nthawi yosayamba kufikira nthawi yosatha kwa iwo akumuopa Iye
Psalms103:18 Kwa iwo akusunga cipangano cace
Psalms103:19 Yehova anakhazika mpando wacifumu wace Kumwamba; Ndi ufumu wace ucita mphamvu ponsepo
Psalms103:20 Lemekezani Yehova
Psalms103:21 Lemekezani Yehova
Psalms103:22 Lemekezani Yehova
Psalms104:1 Lemekeza Yehova
Psalms104:2 Mubvala ulemu ndi cifumu. Amene mudzikuta nako kuunika monga ndi cobvala; Ndi kuyala thambo ngati nsaru yocinga;
Psalms104:3 Amene alumikiza mitanda ya zipinda zace m'madzi; Naika makongwa akhale agareta ace; Nayenda pa mapiko a mphepo;
Psalms104:4 Amene ayesa mphepo amithenga ace; Lawi la moto atumiki ace;
Psalms104:5 Anakhazika dziko lapansi pa maziko ace
Psalms104:6 Mudalikuta ndi nyanja ngati ndi cobvala; Madzi anafikira pamwamba pa mapiri
Psalms104:7 Pa kudzudzula kwanu anathawa; Anathawa msanga liu la bingu lanu;
Psalms104:8 Anakwera m'mapiri
Psalms104:9 Munaika malire kuti asapitirireko; Kuti asabwererenso kuphimba dziko lapansi.
Psalms104:10 Atumiza akasupe alowe m'makwawa; Ayenda pakati pa mapiri:
Psalms104:11 Zimamwamo nyama zonse za kuthengo; Mbidzi zipherako ludzu lao.
Psalms104:12 Mbalame za mlengalenga zifatsa pamenepo
Psalms104:13 Iye amwetsa mapiri mocokera m'zipinda zace: Dziko lakhuta zipatso za nchito zanu.
Psalms104:14 Ameretsa msipu ziudye ng'ombe
Psalms104:15 Ndi vinyo wokondweretsa mtima wa munthu
Psalms104:16 Mitengo ya Mulungu yadzala ndi madzi; Mikungudza ya ku Lebano imene anaioka;
Psalms104:17 M'mwemo mbalame zimanga zisa zao; Pokhala cumba mpa mitengo ya mikungudza
Psalms104:18 Mapiri atali ndiwo ayenera zinkhoma; Pamatanthwe mpothawirapo mbira.
Psalms104:19 Anaika mwezi nyengo zace; Dzuwa lidziwa polowera pace.
Psalms104:20 Muika mdima ndipo pali usiku; Pamenepo zituruka zirombo zonse za m'thengo.
Psalms104:21 Misona ya mkango ibangula potsata nyama yao
Psalms104:22 Poturuka dzuwa
Psalms104:23 Pamenepo munthu aturukira ku nchito yace
Psalms104:24 Nchito zanu zicurukadi
Psalms104:25 Nyanja siyo
Psalms104:26 M'mwemo muyenda zombo; Ndi livyatanu amene munamlenga aseweremo.
Psalms104:27 Izi zonse zikulindirirani
Psalms104:28 Cimene muzipatsa zigwira; Mufumbatula dzanja lanu
Psalms104:29 Mukabisa nkhope yanu
Psalms104:30 Potumizira mzimu wanu
Psalms104:31 Ulemerero wa Yehova ukhale kosatha; Yehova akondwere mu nchito zace;
Psalms104:32 Amene apenyerera pa dziko lapansi
Psalms104:33 Ndidzayimbira Yehova m'moyo mwanga: Ndidzayimbira Mulungu wanga zomlemekeza pokhala ndiripo.
Psalms104:34 Pomlingirira Iye pandikonde; Ndidzakondwera mwa Yehova.
Psalms104:35 Ocimwa athedwe ku dziko lapansi
Psalms105:1 Yamikani Yehova
Psalms105:2 Myimbireni
Psalms105:3 Mudzitamandire ndi dzina lace loyera: Mitima yao ya iwo ofunsira Yehova ikondwere.
Psalms105:4 Funani Yehova
Psalms105:5 Kumbukilani zodabwiza zace adazicita; Zizindikilo zace ndi maweruzo a pakamwa pace;
Psalms105:6 Inu mbeu za Abrahamu
Psalms105:7 Iye ndiye Yehova
Psalms105:8 Akumbukila cipangano cace kosatha
Psalms105:9 Cipanganoco anapangana ndi Abrahamu
Psalms105:10 Ndipo anaciimikira Yakobo
Psalms105:11 Ndi kunena kuti
Psalms105:12 Pokhala iwo anthu owerengeka
Psalms105:13 Nayendayenda kucokera mtundu wina kufikira mtundu wina
Psalms105:14 Sanalola munthu awasautse; Ndipo anadzudzula mafumu cifukwa ca iwowa;
Psalms105:15 Ndi kuti musamakhudza odzozedwa anga
Psalms105:16 Ndipo anaitana njala igwere dziko; Anatyola mcirikizo wonse wa mkate.
Psalms105:17 Anawatsogozeratu munthu; Anamgulitsa Yosefe akhale kapolo:
Psalms105:18 Anapweteka miyendo yace ndi matangadza; Anamgoneka m'unyolo;
Psalms105:19 Kufikira nyengo yakucitika maneno ace; Mau a Yehova anamuyesa.
Psalms105:20 Mfumuyo anatuma munthu nammasula; Woweruza mitundu ya anthu anamtsegulira.
Psalms105:21 Anamuika akhale woyang'anira nyumba yace
Psalms105:22 Amange nduna zace iye mwini
Psalms105:23 Pamenepo Israyeli analowa m'Aigupto; Ndi Yakobo anakhala mlendo m'dziko la Hamu.
Psalms105:24 Ndipo anacurukitsatu mtundu wa anthu ace
Psalms105:25 Anasanduliza mitima yao
Psalms105:26 Anatuma Mose mtumiki wace
Psalms105:27 Anaika pakati pao zizindikilo zace
Psalms105:28 Anatumiza mdima ndipo kunada; Ndipo sanapikisana nao mau ace.
Psalms105:29 Anasanduliza madzi ao akhale mwazi
Psalms105:30 Dziko lao linacuruka acule
Psalms105:31 Ananena
Psalms105:32 Anawapatsa mvula yamatalala
Psalms105:33 Ndipo anapanda mipesa yao
Psalms105:34 Ananena
Psalms105:35 Ndipo zinadya zitsamba zonse za m'dziko mwao
Psalms105:36 Ndipo Iye anapha acisamba onse m'dziko mwao Coyambira ca mphamvu yao yonse.
Psalms105:37 Ndipo anawaturutsa pamodzi ndi siliva ndi golidi: Ndi mwa mafuko ao munalibe mmodzi wokhumudwa.
Psalms105:38 Aigupto anakondwera pakucoka iwo; Popeza kuopsa kwao kudawagwera.
Psalms105:39 Anayala mtambo uwaphimbe; Ndi moto uunikire usiku
Psalms105:40 Anafunsa ndipo Iye anadzetsa zinziri. Nawakhuritsa mkate wakumwamba.
Psalms105:41 Anatsegula pathanthwe
Psalms105:42 Popeza anakumbukila mau ace oyera
Psalms105:43 Potero anaturutsa anthu ace ndi kusekerera
Psalms105:44 Ndipo anawapatsa maiko a amitundu; Iwo ndipo analanda zipatso za nchito ya anthu:
Psalms105:45 Kuti asamalire malemba ace
Psalms106:1 Haleluya. Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha.
Psalms106:2 Adzafotokoza ndani nchito zamphamvu za Yehova
Psalms106:3 Odala iwo amene asunga ciweruzo
Psalms106:4 Mundikumbukile
Psalms106:5 Kuti ndione cokomaco ca osankhika anu
Psalms106:6 Talakwa pamodzi ndi makolo athu; Tacita mphulupulu
Psalms106:7 Makolo athu sanadziwitsa zodabwiza zanu m'Aigupto; Sanakumbukila zacifundo zanu zaunyinji; Koma anapikisana ndi Inu kunyanja
Psalms106:8 Koma anawapulumutsa cifukwa ca dzina lace
Psalms106:9 Ndipo anadzudzula Nyanja Yofiira
Psalms106:10 Ndipo anawapulumutsa m'dzanja la iye amene anawada
Psalms106:11 Ndipo madziwo anamiza owasautsa; Sanatsala mmodzi yense.
Psalms106:12 Pamenepo anabvomereza mau ace; Anayimbira comlemekeza.
Psalms106:13 Koma anaiwala nchito zace msanga; Sanalindira uphungu wace:
Psalms106:14 Popeza analaka-lakatu kucidikhako
Psalms106:15 Ndipo anawapatsa copempha iwo; Koma anaondetsa mitima yao.
Psalms106:16 Ndipo kumisasa anacita nao nsanje Mose Ndi Aroni woyerayo wa Yehova.
Psalms106:17 Dziko lidayasama nilidameza Datani
Psalms106:18 Ndipo m'gulu mwao mudayaka moto; Lawi lace lidapsereza oipawo.
Psalms106:19 Anapanga mwana wa ng'ombe ku Horebu
Psalms106:20 M'mwemo anasintha ulemerero wao Ndi fanizo la ng'ombe Yakudya msipu.
Psalms106:21 Anaiwala Mulungu mpulumutsi wao
Psalms106:22 Zodabwiza m'dziko la Hamu
Psalms106:23 Potero Iye adati awaononge
Psalms106:24 Anapeputsanso dziko lofunika
Psalms106:25 Koma anadandaula m'mahema mwao
Psalms106:26 Potero anawasamulira dzanja lace
Psalms106:27 Kugwetsanso mbeu zao mwa amitundu
Psalms106:28 Ndipo anadzipatikiza ndi BaalaPeori
Psalms106:29 Ndipo anamkwiyitsa nazo zocita zao; Kotero kuti mliri unawagwera.
Psalms106:30 Pamenepo panauka Pinehasi
Psalms106:31 Ndipo adamuyesa iye wacilungamo
Psalms106:32 Anautsanso mkwiyo wace ku madzi a Meriba
Psalms106:33 Pakuti anawawitsa mzimu wace
Psalms106:34 Sanaononga mitunduyo ya anthu
Psalms106:35 Koma anasokonekerana nao amitundu
Psalms106:36 Ndipo anatumikira mafano ao
Psalms106:37 Ndipo anapereka ana ao amuna ndi akazi nsembe ya kwa ziwanda
Psalms106:38 Nakhetsa mwazi wosacimwa
Psalms106:39 Ndipo anadziipsa nazo nchito zao
Psalms106:40 Potero udayaka mkwiyo wa Yehova pa anthu ace
Psalms106:41 Ndipo anawapereka m'manja a amitundu; Ndipo odana nao anacita ufumu pa iwo.
Psalms106:42 Adani ao anawasautsanso
Psalms106:43 Iye anawalanditsa kawiri kawiri; Koma anapikisana ndi Iye mwa uphungu wao
Psalms106:44 Koma anapenya nsautso yao
Psalms106:45 Ndipo anawakumbukila cipangano cace
Psalms106:46 Ndipo anawacitira kuti apeze nsoni Pamaso pa onse amene adawamanga ndende.
Psalms106:47 Tipulumutseni
Psalms106:48 Wodala Yehova
Psalms107:1 Yamikani Yehova pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha.
Psalms107:2 Atere oomboledwa a Yehova
Psalms107:3 Nawasokolotsa kumaiko
Psalms107:4 Anasokera m'cipululu
Psalms107:5 Anamva njala ndi ludzu
Psalms107:6 Pamenepo anapfuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao
Psalms107:7 Ndipo anawatsogolera pa njira yolunjika
Psalms107:8 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace
Psalms107:9 Pakuti akhutitsa mtima wolakalaka
Psalms107:10 Iwo akukhala mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa
Psalms107:11 Popeza anapikisana nao mau a Mulungu
Psalms107:12 Kotero kuti anagonjetsa mtima wao ndi cobvuta; Iwowa anakhumudwa koma panalibe mthandizi.
Psalms107:13 Pamenepo anapfuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao
Psalms107:14 Anawaturutsa mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa
Psalms107:15 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace
Psalms107:16 Popeza adaswa zitseko zamkuwa
Psalms107:17 Anthu opusa azunzika cifukwa ca zolakwa zao
Psalms107:18 Mtima wao unyansidwa naco cakudya ciri conse; Ndipo ayandikira zipata za imfa.
Psalms107:19 Pamenepo apfuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao
Psalms107:20 Atumiza mau ace nawaciritsa
Psalms107:21 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace
Psalms107:22 Ndipo apereke nsembe zaciyamiko
Psalms107:23 Iwo akutsikira kunyanja nalowa m'zombo
Psalms107:24 Iwowa apenya nchito za Yehova
Psalms107:25 Popeza anena
Psalms107:26 Akwera kuthambo
Psalms107:27 Adzandira napambanitsa miyendo ngati munthu woledzeta
Psalms107:28 Pamenepo apfuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao
Psalms107:29 Asanduliza namondwe akhale bata
Psalms107:30 Pamenepo akondwera
Psalms107:31 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace
Psalms107:32 Amkwezenso mu msonkhano wa anthu
Psalms107:33 Asanduliza mitsinje ikhale cipululu
Psalms107:34 Dziko lazipatso
Psalms107:35 Asanduliza cipululu cikhale tha wale
Psalms107:36 Ndi apo akhalitsa anjala
Psalms107:37 Nafese m'minda
Psalms107:38 Ndipo awadalitsa
Psalms107:39 Koma acepanso
Psalms107:40 Atsanulira cimpepulo pa akulu
Psalms107:41 Koma aika waumphawi pamsanje posazunzika
Psalms107:42 Oongoka mtima adzaciona nadzasekera; Koma cosalungama conse citseka pakamwa pace.
Psalms107:43 Wokhala nazo nzeru asamalire izi
Psalms108:1 Wakhazikika mtima wanga
Psalms108:2 Galamukani
Psalms108:3 Ndidzakuyamikani mwa mitundu ya anthu
Psalms108:4 Pakuti cifundo canu ncacikuru kupitirira kumwamba
Psalms108:5 Kwezekani pamwamba pa thambo
Psalms108:6 Kuti okondedwa anu alanditsidwe
Psalms108:7 Mulungu analankhula m'ciyero cace; ndidzakondwerera: Ndidzagawa Sekemu; ndidzayesa muyeso cigwa ca Sukoti.
Psalms108:8 Gileadi ndi wanga: Manase ndi wanga; Ndi Efraimu ndiye mphamvu ya mutu wanga; Yuda ndiye wolamulira wanga.
Psalms108:9 Moabu ndiye mkhate wanga; Pa Edomu ndidzaponya nsapato yanga; Ndidzapfuulira Filistiya
Psalms108:10 Adzandifikitsa ndani m'mudzi wa m'linga? Adzanditsogolera ndani ku Edomu?
Psalms108:11 Si ndinu Mulungu
Psalms108:12 Tithandizeni mumsauko; Pakuti cipulumutso ca munthu ndi cabe.
Psalms108:13 Mwa Mulungu tidzacita molimbika mtima: Ndipo Iye adzapondereza otisautsa.
Psalms109:1 Mulungu wa cilemekezo canga
Psalms109:2 Pakuti pakamwa pa woipa ndi pakamwa pa cinyengo pananditsegukira; Anandilankhulira ndi m'kamwa mwa bodza.
Psalms109:3 Ndipo anandizinga ndi mau a udani
Psalms109:4 M'malo mwa cikondi canga andibwezera udani; Koma ine
Psalms109:5 Ndipo anandisenza coipa m'malo mwa cokoma
Psalms109:6 Muike munthu woipa akhale mkuru wace; Ndi mdani aime pa dzanja lamanja lace.
Psalms109:7 Ponenedwa mlandu wace aturuke wotsutsika; Ndi pemphero lace likhale ngati kucimwa.
Psalms109:8 Masiku ace akhale owerengeka; Wina alandire udindo wace.
Psalms109:9 Ana ace akhale amasiye
Psalms109:10 Ana ace akhale amcirakuyenda ndi opemphapempha; Afunefune zosowa zao kucokera m'mabwinja mwao.
Psalms109:11 Wokongoletsa agwire zonse ali nazo; Ndi alendo alande za nchito yace.
Psalms109:12 Pasakhale munthu wakumdtira cifundo; Kapena kucitira cokoma ana ace amasiye.
Psalms109:13 Zidzukulu zace zidulidwe; Dzina lao lifafanizidwe mu mbadwo ukudza.
Psalms109:14 Mphulupulu za makolo ace zikumbukike ndi Yehova; Ndi cimo la mai wace lisafafanizidwe.
Psalms109:15 Zikhale pamaso pa Yehova cikhalire
Psalms109:16 Cifukwa kuti sanakumbukila kucita cifundo
Psalms109:17 Inde
Psalms109:18 Anabvalanso temberero ngati maraya
Psalms109:19 Limkhalire ngati cobvala adzikuta naco
Psalms109:20 Ici cikhale mphotho ya otsutsana nane yowapatsa Yehova
Psalms109:21 Koma Inu
Psalms109:22 Pakuti ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi
Psalms109:23 Ndamuka ngati mthunzi womka m'tali Ndiingidwa kwina ndi kwina ngati dzombe.
Psalms109:24 Mabondo anga agwedezeka cifukwa ca kusala; Ndi mnofu wanga waonda posowa mafuta.
Psalms109:25 Ndiwakhaliranso cotonza; Pakundiona apukusa mutu.
Psalms109:26 Ndithandizeni Yehova
Psalms109:27 Kuti adziwe kuti ici ndi dzanja lanu; Kuti Inu Yehova munacicita.
Psalms109:28 Atemberere iwowa
Psalms109:29 Otsutsana nane abvale manyazi
Psalms109:30 Ndidzayamika Yehova kwakukuru pakamwa panga; Ndi pakati pa anthu aunyinji ndidzamlemekeza.
Psalms109:31 Popeza adzaima pa dzanja lamanja la waumphawi Kumpulumutsa kwa iwo akuweruza koipa moyo wace.
Psalms110:1 Yehova ananena kwa Ambuye wanga
Psalms110:2 Yehova adzatumiza ndodo ya mphamvu yanu kucokera ku Ziyoni; Citani ufumu pakati pa adani anu.
Psalms110:3 Anthu anu adzadzipereka eni ace tsiku la camuna canu: M'moyera mokometsetsa
Psalms110:4 Yehova walamulira
Psalms110:5 Yehova pa dzanja lamanja lako Adzaphwanya mafumu tsiku la mkwiyo wace.
Psalms110:6 Adzaweruza mwa amitundu
Psalms110:7 Adzamwa ku mtsinje wa panjira; Cifukwa cace adzaweramutsa mutu wace.
Psalms111:1 Haleluya. Ndidzayamika Yehova ndi mtima wonse
Psalms111:2 Nchito za Yehova nzazikuru
Psalms111:3 Cocita Iye nca ulemu
Psalms111:4 Anacita cokumbukitsa zodabwiza zace; Yehova ndiye wa cisomo ndi nsoni zokoma.
Psalms111:5 Anapatsa akumuopa Iye cakudya; Adzakumbukila cipangano cace kosatha.
Psalms111:6 Anaonetsera anthu ace mphamvu ya nchito zace
Psalms111:7 Nchito za manja ace ndizo caonadi ndi ciweruzo; Malangizo ace onse ndiwo okhulupirika.
Psalms111:8 Acirikizika ku nthawi za nthawi
Psalms111:9 Anatumizira anthu ace cipulumutso; Analamulira cipangano cace kosatha; Dzina lace ndilo loyera ndi loopedwa.
Psalms111:10 Kumuopa Yehova ndiko ciyambi ca nzeru; Onse akucita cotero ali naco cidziwitso cokoma; Cilemekezo cace cikhalitsa kosatha.
Psalms112:1 Haleluya. Wodala munthu wakuopa Yehova
Psalms112:2 Mbeu yace idzakhala yamphamvu pa dziko lapansi; Mbadwo wa oongoka mtima udzadalitsidwa.
Psalms112:3 M'nyumba mwace mudzakhala akatundu ndi cuma: Ndi cilungamo cace cikhala cikhalire.
Psalms112:4 Kuupika kuturukira oongoka mtima mumdima; Iye ndiye wacisomo; ndi wansoni ndi wolungama.
Psalms112:5 Wodala munthu wakudtira cifundo
Psalms112:6 Popeza sadzagwedezeka nthawi zonse: Wolunguna adzakumbukika ku nthawi yosatha.
Psalms112:7 Sadzaopa mbiri yoipa; Mtima wace ngwokhazikika
Psalms112:8 Mtima wace ngwocirikizika
Psalms112:9 Anagawagawa
Psalms112:10 Woipa adzaziona
Psalms113:1 Haleluya; Lemekezani
Psalms113:2 Lodala dzina la Yehova. Kuyambira tsopano kufikira kosatha.
Psalms113:3 Citurukire dzuwa kufikira kulowa kwace Lilemekezedwe dzina la Yehova.
Psalms113:4 Yehova akwezeka pamwamba pa amitundu onse
Psalms113:5 Akunga Yehova Mulungu wathu ndani? Amene akhala pamwamba patali
Psalms113:6 Nadzicepetsa apenye Zam'mwamba ndi za pa dziko lapansi.
Psalms113:7 Amene autsa wosauka lrumcotsa kupfumbi
Psalms113:8 Kuti amkhalitse pamodzi ndi akulu
Psalms113:9 Asungitsa nyumba mkazi wosaonamwana
Psalms114:1 M'mene Israyeli anaturuka ku Aigupto
Psalms114:2 Yuda anakhala malo ace oyera
Psalms114:3 Nyanjayo inaona
Psalms114:4 Mapiri anatumphatumpha ngati nkhosa zamphongo
Psalms114:5 Unathawanji nawe
Psalms114:6 Munatumpha-tumphiranji ngati nkhosa zamphongo
Psalms114:7 Unjenjemere
Psalms114:8 Amene anasanduliza thanthwe likhale thawale lamadzi
Psalms115:1 Kwa ife ai
Psalms115:2 Aneneranji amitundu
Psalms115:3 Koma Mulungu wathu ndiye ali m'mwamba; Acita ciri conse cimkonda.
Psalms115:4 Mafano ao ndiwo a siliva ndi golidi
Psalms115:5 Pakamwa ali napo
Psalms115:6 Makutu ali nao
Psalms115:7 Manja ali nao
Psalms115:8 Adzafanana nao iwo akuwapanga; Ndi onse akuwakhulupirira
Psalms115:9 Israyeli
Psalms115:10 Nyumba ya Aroni
Psalms115:11 Inu akuopa Yehova
Psalms115:12 Yehova watikumbukila; adzatidalitsa: Adzadalitsa nyumba ya Israyeli; Adzadalitsa nyumba ya Aroni.
Psalms115:13 Adzadalitsa iwo akuopa Yehova
Psalms115:14 Yehova akuonjezereni dalitso
Psalms115:15 Odalitsika inu a kwa Yehova
Psalms115:16 Kunena za kumwamba
Psalms115:17 Akufa salemekeza Yehova
Psalms115:18 Koma ife tidzalemekeza Yehova Kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi yonse. Haleluya.
Psalms116:1 Ndimkonda
Psalms116:2 Popeza amandicherera khutu lace
Psalms116:3 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga
Psalms116:4 Pamenepo ndinaitana dzina la Yehova; Ndikuti
Psalms116:5 Yehova ngwa cifundo ndi wolungama; Ndi Mulungu wathu ngwa nsoni.
Psalms116:6 Yehova asunga opusa; Ndidafoka ine
Psalms116:7 Ubwere moyo wanga ku mpumulo wako; Pakuti Yehova anakucitira cokoma.
Psalms116:8 Pakuti munalanditsa moyo wanga kuimfa
Psalms116:9 Ndidzayenda pamaso pa Yehova M'dziko la amoyo.
Psalms116:10 Ndinakhulupirira
Psalms116:11 Pofulumizidwa mtima ndinati ine
Psalms116:12 Ndidzabwezera Yehova ciani Cifukwa ca zokoma zace zonse anandicitira?
Psalms116:13 Ndidzanyamula cikho ca cipulumutso
Psalms116:14 Ndidzacitazowindazanga za kwa Yehova
Psalms116:15 Imfa ya okondedwa ace Nja mtengo wace pamaso pa Yehova.
Psalms116:16 Ndiloleni
Psalms116:17 Ndidzapereka kwa Inu nsembe yaciyamiko
Psalms116:18 Ndidzacita zowinda zanga za kwa Yehova
Psalms116:19 M'mabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova
Psalms117:1 Lemekezani Yehova
Psalms117:2 Pakuti cifundo cace ca pa ife ndi cacikuru; Ndi coonadi ca Yehova ncosatha. Haleluya.
Psalms118:1 Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha.
Psalms118:2 Anene tsono Israyeli
Psalms118:3 Anene tsono nyumba ya Aroni
Psalms118:4 Anene tsono iwo akuopa Yehova
Psalms118:5 M'mene ndinasautsika ndinaitanira pa Yehova; Anandiyankha Dandiika motakasuka Yehova.
Psalms118:6 Yehova ndi wanga; sindidzaopa; Adzandicitanji munthu?
Psalms118:7 Yehova ndi wanga
Psalms118:8 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma Koposa kukhulupirira munthu.
Psalms118:9 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma Koposa kukhulupirira akulu
Psalms118:10 Amitundu onse adandizinga
Psalms118:11 Adandizinga
Psalms118:12 Adandizinga ngati njuci; Anazima ngati moto waminga; Indedi
Psalms118:13 Kundikankha anandikankha ndikadagwa; Koma Yehova anandithandiza.
Psalms118:14 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga; Ndipo anakhala cipulumutso canga.
Psalms118:15 M'mahema a olungama muli liu lakupfuula mokondwera ndi la cipulumutso:
Psalms118:16 Dzanja lamanja la Yehova licita mwamphamvu.
Psalms118:17 Sindidzafa koma ndidzakhala ndi moyo
Psalms118:18 Kulanga anandilangadi Yehova: Koma sanandipereka kuimfa ai.
Psalms118:19 Nditsegulireni zipata za cilungamo; Ndidzalowamo
Psalms118:20 Cipata ca Yehova ndi ici; Olungama adzalowamo.
Psalms118:21 Ndidzakuyamikani
Psalms118:22 Mwala umene omangawo anaukana Wakhala mutu wa pangondya.
Psalms118:23 Ici cidzera kwa Yehova; Ncodabwiza ici pamaso pathu.
Psalms118:24 Tsiku ili ndilo adaliika Yehova; Tidzasekera ndi kukondwera m'mwemo.
Psalms118:25 Tikupemphani
Psalms118:26 Wodala wakudzayo m'dzina la Yehova; Takudalitsani kocokera m'nyumba ya Yehova.
Psalms118:27 Yehova ndiye Mulungu
Psalms118:28 Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga
Psalms118:29 Yamikani Yehova
Psalms119:1 Odala angwiro m'mayendedwe ao
Psalms119:2 Odala iwo akusunga mboni zace
Psalms119:3 Inde
Psalms119:4 Inu munatilamulira. Tisamalire malangizo anu ndi cangu
Psalms119:5 Ha! mwenzi zitakhazikika njira zanga Kuti ndisamalire malemba anu.
Psalms119:6 Pamenepo sindidzacita manyazi
Psalms119:7 Ndidzakuyanrikani ndi mtima woongoka
Psalms119:8 Ndidzasamalira malemba anu: Musandisiye ndithu.
Psalms119:9 Mnyamata adzayeretsa mayendedwe ace bwanji? Akawasamalira monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:10 Ndinakufunani ndi mtima wanga wonse; Ndisasokere kusiyana nao malamulo anu.
Psalms119:11 Ndinawabisa mau anu mumtima mwanga
Psalms119:12 Inu ndinu wodala Yehova; Ndiphunzitseni malemba anu.
Psalms119:13 Ndinafotokozera ndi milomo yanga Maweruzo onse a pakamwa panu
Psalms119:14 Ndinakondwera m'njira ya mboni zanu
Psalms119:15 Ndidzalingirira pa malangizo anu
Psalms119:16 Ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malemba anu; Sindidzaiwala mau anu
Psalms119:17 Mucitire cokoma mtumiki wanu kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; Ndipo ndidzasamalira mau anu.
Psalms119:18 Munditsegulire maso
Psalms119:19 Ine ndine mlendo pa dziko lapansi; Musandibisire malamulo anu.
Psalms119:20 Mtima wanga wasweka ndi kukhumba Maweruzo anu nyengo zonse.
Psalms119:21 Munadzudzula odzikuza otembereredwa
Psalms119:22 Mundicotsere cotonza
Psalms119:23 Nduna zomwe zinakhala zondineneza; Koma mtumiki wanu analingirira malemba anu.
Psalms119:24 Mboni zanu zomwe ndizo zondikondwetsa
Psalms119:25 Moyo wanga umamatika ndi pfumbi; Mundipatse moyo monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:26 Ndinafotokozera njira zanga
Psalms119:27 Mundizindikiritse njira ya malangizo anu; Kuti ndilingalire zodabwiza zanu.
Psalms119:28 Moyo wanga wasungunuka ndi cisoni: Mundilimbitse monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:29 Mundicotsere njira ya cinyengo; Nimundipatse mwacifundo cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:30 Ndinasankha njira yokhulupirika; Ndinaika maweruzo anu pamaso
Psalms119:31 Ndimamatika nazo mboni zanu; Musandicititse manyazi
Psalms119:32 Ndidzathamangira njira ya malamulo anu
Psalms119:33 Mundiphunzitse
Psalms119:34 Mundizindikiritse
Psalms119:35 Mundiyendetse mopita malamulo anu; Pakuti ndikondwera m'menemo.
Psalms119:36 Lingitsani mtima wanga ku mboni zanu
Psalms119:37 Mucititse mlubza maso anga ndisapenye zacabe
Psalms119:38 Limbitsirani mtumiki wanu mau anu
Psalms119:39 Mundipatutsire cotonza canga ndiciopaco; Popeza maweruzo anu ndi okoma.
Psalms119:40 Taonani
Psalms119:41 Ndipo cifundo canu cindidzere
Psalms119:42 Kuti ndikhale nao mau akuyankha wonditonza; Popeza ndikhulupirira mau anu.
Psalms119:43 Ndipo musandicotsere ndithu mau a coonadi pakamwa panga; Pakuti ndinayembekeza maweruzo anu.
Psalms119:44 Potero ndidzasamalira malamulo anu cisamalire Ku nthawi za nthawi.
Psalms119:45 Ndipo ndidzayenda mwaufulu; Popeza ndinafuna malangizo anu.
Psalms119:46 Ndidzalankhulanso za umboni wanu pamaso pa mafumu
Psalms119:47 Ndipo ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malamulo anu
Psalms119:48 Ndidzakwezanso manja anga ku malamulo anu
Psalms119:49 Kumbukilani mau a kwa mtumiki wanu
Psalms119:50 Citonthozo canga m'kuzunzika kwanga ndi ici; Pakuti mau anu anandipatsa moyo.
Psalms119:51 Odzikuza anandinyoza kwambiri: Koma sindinapatukanso naco cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:52 Ndinakumbukila maweruzo anu kuyambira kale
Psalms119:53 Ndinasumwa kwakukuru
Psalms119:54 Malemba anu anakhala nyimbo zanga M'nyumba ya ulendo wanga
Psalms119:55 Usiku ndinakumbukila dzina lanu
Psalms119:56 Ici ndinali naco
Psalms119:57 Yehova ndiye gawo langa: Ndinati ndidzasunga mau anu.
Psalms119:58 Ndinapemba pankhope panu ndi mtima wanga wonse: Mundicitire cifundo monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:59 Ndinaganizira njira zanga
Psalms119:60 Ndinafulumira
Psalms119:61 Anandikulunga nazo zingwe za oipa; Koma sindinaiwala cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:62 Pakati pa usiku ndidzauka kukuyamikani Cifukwa ca maweruzo anu olungama.
Psalms119:63 Ine ndine wakuyanjana nao onse akukuopani
Psalms119:64 Dziko lapansi lidzala naco cifundo canu
Psalms119:65 Munacitira mtumiki wanu cokoma
Psalms119:66 Mundiphunzitse cisiyanitso ndi nzeru; Pakuti ndinakhulupirira malamulo anu.
Psalms119:67 Ndisanazunzidwe ndinasokera; Koma tsopano ndisamalira mau anu.
Psalms119:68 Inu ndinu wabwino
Psalms119:69 Odzikuza anandipangira bodza: Ndidzasunga malangizo anu ndi mtima wanga wonse.
Psalms119:70 Mtima wao unona ngati mafuta; Koma ine ndikondwera naco cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:71 Kundikomera kuti ndinazunzidwa; Kuti ndiphunzire malemba anu.
Psalms119:72 Cilamulo ca pakamwa panu cindikomera Koposa golidi ndi siliva zikwi zikwi.
Psalms119:73 Manja anu anandilenga nandiumba; Mundizindikiritse
Psalms119:74 Iwo amene akuopani adzandiona ine nadzakondwera; Popeza ndayembekezera mau anu;
Psalms119:75 Ndidziwa kuti maweruzo anu ndiwo olungama
Psalms119:76 Cifundo canu cikhaletu cakunditonthoza
Psalms119:77 Nsoni zokoma zanu zindidzere
Psalms119:78 Odzikuza acite manyazi
Psalms119:79 Iwo akuopa Inu abwere kwa ine
Psalms119:80 Mtima wanga ukhale wangwiro m'malemba anu; Kuti ndisacite manyazi.
Psalms119:81 Moyo wanga unakomoka ndi kukhumba cipulumutso canu: Ndinayembekezera mau anu.
Psalms119:82 Maso anga anatha mphamvu ndi kukhumba mau anu
Psalms119:83 Popeza ndakhala ngati thumba lofukirira; Koma sindiiwala malemba anu.
Psalms119:84 Masiku a mtumiki wanu ndiwo angati? Mudzaweruza liti iwo akundilondola koipa?
Psalms119:85 Odzikuza anandikumbira mbuna
Psalms119:86 Malamulo anu onse ngokhulupirika; Andilondola nalo bodza; ndithandizeni.
Psalms119:87 Akadandithera pa dziko lapansi; Koma ine sindinasiya malangizo anu.
Psalms119:88 Mundipatse moyo monga mwa cifundo canu; Ndipo ndidzasamalira mboni ya pakamwa panu
Psalms119:89 Mau anu aikika kumwamba
Psalms119:90 Cikhulupiriko canu cifikira mibadwo mibadwo; Munakhazikitsa dziko lapansi
Psalms119:91 Kunena za maweruzo anu alimbikira kufikira lero; Pakuti onsewa ndiwo atumiki anu.
Psalms119:92 Cilamulo canu cikadapanda kukhala cikondweretso canga
Psalms119:93 Sindidzaiwala malangizo anu nthawi zonse; Popeza munandipatsa nao moyo.
Psalms119:94 Ine ndine wanu
Psalms119:95 Oipa anandilalira kundiononga; Koma ndizindikira mboni zanu.
Psalms119:96 Ndinapenya malekezero ace a ungwiro wonse; Koma lamulo lanu ndi lotakasuka ndithu.
Psalms119:97 Ha! Ndikondadi cilamulo canu; Ndilingiriramo ine tsiku lonse.
Psalms119:98 Malamulo anu andipatsa nzeru yakuposa adani anga; Pakuti akhala nane cikhalire.
Psalms119:99 Ndiri nayo nzeru yakuposa aphunzitsi anga onse; Pakuti ndilingalira mboni zanu.
Psalms119:100 Ndizindikira koposa okalamba Popeza ndinasunga malangizo anu.
Psalms119:101 Ndinaletsa mapazi anga njira iri yonse yoipa
Psalms119:102 Sindinapatukana nao maweruzo anu; Pakuti Inu munandiphunzitsa.
Psalms119:103 Mau anu azunadi powalawa ine! Koposa uci m'kamwa mwanga.
Psalms119:104 Malangizo anu andizindikiritsa; Cifukwa cace ndidana nao mayendedwe onse acinyengo
Psalms119:105 Mau anu ndiwo nyali ya ku mapazi anga
Psalms119:106 Ndinalumbira
Psalms119:107 Ndazunzika kwambiri: Ndipatseni moyo
Psalms119:108 Landirani
Psalms119:109 Moyo wanga ukhala m'dzanja langa cikhalire; Koma sindiiwala cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:110 Oipa anandichera msampha; Koma sindinasokera m'malangizo anu.
Psalms119:111 Ndinalandira mboni zanu zikhale colandira cosatha; Pakuti ndizo zokondweretsa mtima wanga.
Psalms119:112 Ndinalingitsa mtima wanga ucite malemba anu
Psalms119:113 Ndidana nao a mitima iwiri; Koma ndikonda cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:114 Inu ndinu pobisalapo panga
Psalms119:115 Mundicokere ocita zoipa inu; Kuti ndisunge malamulo a Mulungu wanga.
Psalms119:116 Mundicirikize monga mwa mau anu
Psalms119:117 Mundigwirizize ndipo ndidzapulumutsidwa
Psalms119:118 Mupepulaonseakusokeram'malemba anu; Popeza cinyengo cao ndi bodza.
Psalms119:119 Mucotsa oipa onse a pa dziko lapansi ngati mphala: Cifukwa cace ndikonda mboni zanu.
Psalms119:120 Thupi langa linjenjemera ndi kuopa Inu; Ndipo ndicita mantha nao maweruzo anu.
Psalms119:121 Ndinacita ciweruzo ndi cilungamo; Musandisiyira akundisautsa.
Psalms119:122 Mumkhalire cikole mtumiki wanucimkomere; Odzikuza asandisautse.
Psalms119:123 Maso anga anatha mphamvu pafuna cipulumutso canu
Psalms119:124 Mucitire mtumiki wanu monga mwa cifundo canu
Psalms119:125 Ine ndine mtumiki wanu
Psalms119:126 Yafika nyengo yakuti Yehova acite kanthu; Pakuti anaswa cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:127 Cifukwa cace ndikonda malamulo anu Koposa golidi
Psalms119:128 Cifukwa cace ndiyesa ngolunjika malangizo anu onse akunena zonse; Koma ndidana nazo njira zonse zonyenga.
Psalms119:129 Mboni zanu nzodabwiza; Cifukwa cace moyo wanga uzisunga
Psalms119:130 Potsegulira mau anu paunikira; Kuzindikiritsa opusa.
Psalms119:131 Ndinatsegula pakamwa panga
Psalms119:132 Munditembenukire
Psalms119:133 Kfiazikitsanimapaziangam'mau anu; Ndipo zisandigonjetse zopanda pace ziri zonse.
Psalms119:134 Mundiombole ku nsautso ya munthu: Ndipo ndidzasamalira malangizo anu.
Psalms119:135 Muwalitse nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu; Ndipo mundiphunzitse malemba anu.
Psalms119:136 Maso anga atsitsa mitsinje ya madzi
Psalms119:137 Inu ndinu wolungama
Psalms119:138 Mboni zanuzo mudazilamulira Ziri zolungama ndi zokhulupirika ndithu.
Psalms119:139 Cangu canga cinandithera
Psalms119:140 Mau anu ngoyera ndithu; Ndi mtumiki wanu awakonda.
Psalms119:141 Wamng'ono ine
Psalms119:142 Cilungamo canu ndico cilungamo cosatha; Ndi cilamulo canu ndico coonadi.
Psalms119:143 Kusautsika ndi kupsinjika kwandigwera; Koma malamulo anu ndiwo ondikondweretsa ine.
Psalms119:144 Mboni zanu ndizo zolungama kosatha; Mundizindikiritse izi
Psalms119:145 Ndinaitana ndi mtima wanga wonse; mundiyankhe
Psalms119:146 Ndinaitanira Inu; ndipulumutseni
Psalms119:147 Ndinapfuula kusanace: Ndinayembekezera mau anu.
Psalms119:148 Maso anga anakumika malonda a usiku
Psalms119:149 Imvani liu langa monga mwa cifundo canu; Mundipatse moyo monga mwa kuweruza kwanu
Psalms119:150 Otsata zaciwembu andiyandikira; Akhala kutali ndi cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:151 Inu muli pafupi
Psalms119:152 Kuyambira kale ndinadziwa mu mboni zanu
Psalms119:153 Penyani kuzunzika kwanga
Psalms119:154 Mundinenere mlandu wanga
Psalms119:155 Cipulumutso citalikira oipa; Popeza safuna malemba anu.
Psalms119:156 Zacifundo zanu ndi zazikuru
Psalms119:157 Ondilondola ndi ondisautsa ndiwoambiri; Koma sindinapatukana nazo mboni zanu.
Psalms119:158 Ndinapenya ocita monyenga
Psalms119:159 Penyani kuti ndikonda malangizo anu; Mundipatse moyo
Psalms119:160 Ciwerengero ca mau anu ndico coonadi; Ndi maweruzo anu olungama onse akhala kosatha.
Psalms119:161 Nduna zinandilondola kopanda cifukwa; Koma mtima wanga ucita mantha nao mau anu.
Psalms119:162 Ndikondwera nao mau anu
Psalms119:163 Ndidana nalo bodza ndi kunyansidwa nalo; Koma ndikonda cilamulo canu.
Psalms119:164 Ndikulemekezani kasanu ndi kawiri
Psalms119:165 Akukonda cilamulo canu ali nao mtendere wambiri; Ndipo alibe cokhumudwitsa.
Psalms119:166 Ndinayembekeza cipulumutso canu
Psalms119:167 Moyo wanga unasamalira mboni zanu; Ndipo ndizikonda kwambiri.
Psalms119:168 Ndinasamalira malangizo anu ndi mboni zanu; Popeza njira zanga zonse ziri pamaso panu
Psalms119:169 Kupfuula kwanga kuyandikire pamaso pano
Psalms119:170 Kupemba kwanga kudze pamaso panu; Mundilanditse monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:171 Milomo yanga iturutse cilemekezo; Popeza mundiphunzitsa malemba anu.

Psalms147:4 Awerenga nyenyezi momwe ziri; Azicha maina zonsezi.

Psalms147:6 Yehova agwiriziza ofatsa; Atsitsira oipa pansi.

Psalms147:9 Amene apatsa zoweta cakudya cao

Psalms147:11 Yehova akondwera nao akumuopa Iye
Psalms147:12 Yerusalemu
Psalms147:13 Popeza analimbitsa mipiringidzo ya zitseko zanu: Anadalitsa ana anu m'kati mwanu.
Psalms147:14 Ndiyeamene akhalitsamalireanu mumtendere; Akukhutitsani ndi tirigu wakuca bwino.
Psalms147:15 Atumiza lamulo lace ku dziko lapansi; Mau ace athamanga liwiro.
Psalms147:16 Apatsa cipale cofewa ngati ubweya; Awaza cisanu ngati phulusa.
Psalms147:17 Aponya matalala ace ngati zidutsu: Adzaima ndani pa kuzizira kwace?
Psalms147:18 Atumiza mau ace nazisungunula; Aombetsa mphepo yace
Psalms147:19 Aonetsa mau ace kwa Yakobo; Malemba ace
Psalms147:20 Sanatero nao anthu amtundu wina; Ndipo za maweruzo ace
Psalms148:1 Haleluya. Lemekezani Yehova kocokera kumwamba; Mlemekezeni m'misanje.
Psalms148:2 Mlemekezeni
Psalms148:3 Mlemekezeni
Psalms148:4 Mlemekezeni
Psalms148:5 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; Popeza analamulira
Psalms148:6 Anazikhazikanso ku nthawi za nthawi; Anazipatsa cilamulo cosatumphika.
Psalms148:7 Lemekezani Yehova kocokera ku dziko lapansi
Psalms148:8 Moto ndi matalala
Psalms148:9 Mapiri ndi zitunda zonse; Mitengo yazipatso ndi yamikungudza yonse:
Psalms148:10 Nyama za kuthengo ndi zoweta zonse; Zokwawa
Psalms148:11 Mafumu a padziko ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu; Zinduna ndi oweruza onse a padziko;
Psalms148:12 Anyamata ndiponso anamwali; Okalamba pamodzi ndi ana:
Psalms148:13 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; Pakuti dzina lace lokha ndi lokwezeka; Ulemerero wace uli pamwamba pa dziko lapansi ndi thambo.
Psalms148:14 Ndipo anakweza nyanga ya anthu ace
Psalms149:1 Haleluya
Psalms149:2 Akondwere Israyeli mwa Iye amene anamlenga; Ana a Ziyoni asekere mwa Mfumu yao.
Psalms149:3 Alemekeze dzina lace ndi kuthira mang'ombe; Amyimbire zomlemekeza ndi lingaka ndi zeze.
Psalms149:4 Popeza Yehova akondwera nao anthu ace; Adzakometsa ofatsa ndi cipulumutso
Psalms149:5 Okondedwa ace atumphe mokondwera m'ulemu: Apfuule mokondwera pamakama pao
Psalms149:6 Nyimbo zakukweza Mulungu zikhale pakamwa pao
Psalms149:7 Kubwezera cilango akunja
Psalms149:8 Kumanga mafumu ao ndi maunyolo
Psalms149:9 Kuwacitira ciweruzo colembedwaco: Ulemu wa okondedwa ace onse ndi uwu. Haleluya.
Psalms150:1 Haleluya
Psalms150:2 Mlemekezeni cifukwa ca nchito zace zolimba; Mlemekezeni monga mwa ukulu wace waunjinji.
Psalms150:3 Mlemekezeni ndi kulira kwa lipenga; Mlemekezeni ndi cisakasa ndi zeze.
Psalms150:4 Mlemekezeni ndi lingaka ndi kuthira mang'ombe: Mlemekezeni ndi zoyimbira za zingwe ndi citoliro.
Psalms150:5 Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zomveka: Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zoliritsa.
Psalms150:6 Zonse zakupuma zilemekeze Yehova. Haleluya.

Proverbs10:1 Mwana wanzeru akondweretsa atate; Koma mwana wopusa amvetsa amace cisoni.
Proverbs10:2 Cuma ca ucimo sicithangata: Koma cilungamo cipulumutsa kuimfa.
Proverbs10:3 Yehova samvetsa njala moyo wa wolungama; Koma amainga cifuniro ca wocimwa.
Proverbs10:4 Wocita ndi dzanja laulesi amasauka; Koma dzanja la akhama lilemeretsa.
Proverbs10:5 Wokolola m'malimwe ndi mwana wanzeru; Koma wogona pakututa ndi mwana wocititsa manyazi.
Proverbs10:6 Madalitso ali pamtu pa wolungama Koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa ciwawa.
Proverbs10:7 Amayesa wolungama wodala pamkumbukira; Koma dzina la oipa lidzabvunda.
Proverbs10:8 Mwini mtima wanzeru amalandira malamulo; Koma citsiru colongolola cidzagwa.
Proverbs10:9 Woyenda moongoka amayenda osatekeseka; Koma wokhotetsa njira zace adzadziwika.
Proverbs10:10 Wotsinzinira acititsa cisoni; Koma wodzudzula momveka acita mtendere.
Proverbs10:11 M'kamwa mwa wolungama ndi kasupe wa moyo; Koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa ciwawa.
Proverbs10:12 Udani upikisanitsa; Koma cikondi cikwirira zolakwa zonse.
Proverbs10:13 Nzeru ipezedwa m'milomo ya wozindikira; Koma wopusa pamsana pace ntyole.
Proverbs10:14 Anzeru akundika zomwe adziwa Koma m'kamwa mwa citsiru muononga tsopano lino.
Proverbs10:15 Cuma ca wolemera ndi mudzi wace wolimba; Koma umphawi wao uononga osauka.
Proverbs10:16 Nchito za wolungama zipatsa moyo; Koma phindu la oipa licimwitsa.
Proverbs10:17 Wosunga mwambo ali m'njira ya moyo; Koma wosiya cidzudzulo asocera.
Proverbs10:18 Wobisa udani ali ndi milomo yonama; Wonena ugogodi ndiye citsiru.
Proverbs10:19 Pocuruka mau zolakwa sizisoweka; Koma wokhala cete acita mwanzeru.
Proverbs10:20 Lilime la wolungama likunga siliva wosankhika; Koma mtima wa oipa uli wacabe.
Proverbs10:21 Milomo ya wolungama imadyetsa ambiri; Koma zitsiru zimafa posowa nzeru.

Proverbs10:23 Masewero a citsiru ndiwo kucita zoipa; Koma masewero a wozindikira ndiwo nzeru.

Proverbs17:5 Wocitira ciphwete aumphawi atonza Mlengi; Wokondwera ndi tsoka sadzapulumuka cilango.
Proverbs17:6 Zidzukulu ndizo korona wa okalamba; Ndipo ulemerero wa ana ndiwo atate ao.
Proverbs17:7 Mlomo wangwiro suyenera citsiru; Ngakhale mlomo wonama suyenera kalonga ndi pang'ono ponse.
Proverbs17:8 Wolandira cokometsera mlandu aciyesa ngale; Pali ponse popita iye acenjera.
Proverbs17:9 Wobisa colakwa afunitsa cikondano; Koma wobwereza-bwereza mau afetsa ubwenzi.
Proverbs17:10 Cidzudzulo cilowa m'kati mwa wozindikira
Proverbs17:11 Woipa amafuna kupanduka kokha; Koma adzamtumizira mthenga wankhanza.

Proverbs17:13 Wobwezera zabwino zoipa
Proverbs17:14 Ciyambi ca ndeu cifanana ndi kutsegulira madzi; Tsono kupikisana kusanayambe tasiya makani.
Proverbs17:15 Wokometsa mlandu wa wamphulupulu
Proverbs17:16 Kodi bwanji mtengo wogulira nzeru uli m'dzanja la citsiru
Proverbs17:17 Bwenzi limakonda nthawi zonse; Ndipo mbale anabadwira kuti akuthandize pooneka tsoka.
Proverbs17:18 Munthu wosowa nzeru apangana kulipirira wina
Proverbs17:19 Wokonda ndeu akonda kulakwa; Ndipo wotarikitsa khomo lace afunafuna kuonongeka.
Proverbs17:20 Wokhota mtima sadzapeza bwino Ndipo mwini lilime lokhota adzagwa m'zoipa.
Proverbs17:21 Wobala citsiru adzicititsa cisoni; Ndipo atate wa wopusa sakondwa.
Proverbs17:22 Mtima wosekerera uciritsa bwino Koma mzimu wosweka uphwetsa mafupa
Proverbs17:23 Munthu woipa alandira cokometsera mlandu coturutsa m'mfunga

Ecclesiastes2:20 Ndipo ndinatembenuka ndi kukhululuka za nchito zanga zonse ndasauka nazo kunja kuno.

Ecclesiastes3:8 mphindi yakukonda ndi mphindi yakudana; mphindi ya nkhondo ndi mphindi ya mtendere.

Ecclesiastes5:12 Tulo ta munthu wogwira nchito ntabwino

Ecclesiastes5:16 Icinso ndi coipa cowawa
Ecclesiastes5:17 Inde masiku ace onse amadya mumdima
Ecclesiastes5:18 Taonani
Ecclesiastes5:19 Inde yemwe Mulungu wamlemeretsa nampatsa cuma
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pakuti sadzakumbukira masiku a moyo wace kwambiri; cifukwa Mulungu ambvomereza m'cimwemwe ca mtima wace.
Ecclesiastes6:1 Pali coipa ndaciona kunja kuno cifalikira mwa anthu
Ecclesiastes6:2 munthu amene Mulungu wamlemeretsa nampatsa cuma ndi ulemu
Ecclesiastes6:3 Cinkana munthu akabala ana makumi khumi
Ecclesiastes6:4 pakuti ikudza mwacabe
Ecclesiastes6:5 Ngakhale dzuwa siliona ngakhale kulidziwa
Ecclesiastes6:6 akakhala ndi moyo zaka zikwi ziwiri
Ecclesiastes6:7 Nchito zace zonse munthu angogwirira m'kamwa mwace
Ecclesiastes6:8 Pakuti wanzeru ali ndi ciani coposa citsiru? Waumphawi wodziwa kuyenda pa maso pa amoyo ali ndi ciani?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kupenya kwa maso kuposa kukhumba kwa mtima; icinso ndi cabe ndi kungosautsa mtima.
Ecclesiastes6:10 Comwe cinalipo cachedwa dzina lace kale
Ecclesiastes6:11 Pokhala zinthu zambiri zingocurukitsa zacabe
Ecclesiastes6:12 Pakuti ndani adziwa comwe ciri cabwino kwa munthu ali ndi moyo masiku onse a moyo wace wacabe umene autsiriza ngati mthunzi? pakuti ndani adzauza munthu cimene cidzaoneka m'tsogolo mwace kunja kuno?
Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yabwino iposa zonunkhira zabwino; ndi tsiku lakumwalira liposa tsiku lakubadwa.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kunka ku nyumba ya maliro kupambana kunka ku nyumba ya madyerero; pakuti kujako ndi matsiriziro a anthu onse; ndipo omwe ali ndi moyo adzakumbukirapo.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Cisoni ciposa kuseka; pakuti nkhope yakugwa ikonza mtima.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mtima wa anzeru uli m'nyumba ya maliro; koma mtima wa zitsiru uli m'nyumba ya kuseka.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kumva cidzudzulo ca anzeru kupambana kumva nyimbo ya zitsiru.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Pakuti kuseka kwa citsiru kunga minga irikutetheka pansi pa mphika; icinso ndi cabe.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Indetu nsautso iyarutsa wanzeru; ndi mtulo uipitsa mtima.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Citsiriziro ca kanthu ciposa ciyambi cace; wofatsa mtima apambana wodzikuza mtima.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakangaze mumtima mwako kukwiya; pakuti mkwiyo ugona m'cifuwa ca zitsiru.
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usanene
Ecclesiastes7:11 Nzeru iri yabwino pamodzi ndi colowa; akuona dzuwa apindula nayo.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Pakuti nzeru icinjiriza monga ndalama zicinjiriza; koma kudziwa kupambana
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tapenya nchito ya Mulungu; pakuti ndani akhoza kulungamitsa comwe iye anacikhotetsa?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Tsiku la mwai kondwera
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ndaona zonsezi masiku anga acabe; pali wolungama angofa m'cilungamo cace
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usapambanitse kukhala wolungama; usakhale wanzeru koposa; bwanji ufuna kudziononga wekha?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usapambanitse kuipa
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kuli kwabwino kugwira ici; indetu
Ecclesiastes7:19 Nzeru ilimbitsa wanzeru koposa akuru khumi akulamulira m'mudzi.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Pakuti kulibe wolungama pansi pano amene acita zabwino osacimwa.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mau onsetu onenedwa usawalabadire; kuti usamve kapolo wako alikukutemberera;
Ecclesiastes7:22 pakuti kawiri kawiritu mtima wako udziwa kuti nawenso unatemberera ena.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ndayesa zonsezi ndi nzeru; ndinati
Ecclesiastes7:24 Cakutari ndi cakuyadi adzacipeza ndani?
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndinapotoka ndi mtima wanga womwe kudziwa ndi kusanthula ndi kufunafuna nzeru ndi malongosoledwe a zinthu
Ecclesiastes7:26 ndipo ndinapeza kanthu kowawa koposa imfa
Ecclesiastes7:27 Taonani
Ecclesiastes7:28 comwe moyo wanga ucifuna cifunire
Ecclesiastes7:29 Taonani
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndani akunga wanzeru? Ndani adziwa tanthauzo la mau? Nzeru ya munthu iwalitsa nkhope yace
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nditi
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usakangaze kumcokera; usaumirire kanthu koipa; pakuti iyeyo amacita comwe cimkonda.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Pakuti mau a mfumu ali ndi mphamvu; ndipo ndani anganene kwa iye
Ecclesiastes8:5 Wosunga cilamulo sadzadziwa kanthu koipa; ndipo mtima wa munthu wanzeru udziwa nyengo ndi maweruzo;
Ecclesiastes8:6 pakuti kanthu kali konse kali ndi nthawi yace ndi ciweruzo cace; popeza zoipa za munthu zimcurukira;
Ecclesiastes8:7 pakuti sadziwa cimene cidzakhala; pakuti ndani angamuuze nthawi yakuti cidzacitidwa?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kulibe munthu ali ndi mphamvu yolamulira mzimu ndi yakutsekereza mzimu; ngakhale mphamvu tsiku la imfa; munkhondo umo mulibe kumasuka; udio sudzapulumutsa akuzolowerana nao.
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zonsezi ndaziona ndi kuyang'anitsa mtima wanga nchito zonse zicitidwa pansi pano; nthawi yakuti wina apweteka mnzace pomlamulira.
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ndipo ndinaona oipa alikuikidwa m'manda ndi kupita; ndipo omwe anacita zolungama anacokera ku malo opatulika a ku mudzi nawaiwala; icinso ndi cabe.
Ecclesiastes8:11 Popeza sambwezera coipa cace posacedwa atamtsutsa munthu
Ecclesiastes8:12 Angakhale wocimwa acita zoipa zambirimbiri
Ecclesiastes8:13 koma woipa sadzapeza bwino ngakhale kutanimphitsa masiku ace ngati mthunzi; cifukwa saopa pamaso pa Mulungu.
Ecclesiastes8:14 Pali cinthu cacabe cimacitidwa pansi pano; cakuti alipo olungama amene aona zomwe ziyenera nchito za oipa
Ecclesiastes8:15 Pompo ndinatama kusekaseka
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pompo ndinapereka mtima wanga kudziwa nzeru
Ecclesiastes8:17 pamenepo ndinaona nchito zonse za Mulungu kuti anthu sangalondole nchito ziciddwa pansi pano; pakuti angakhale munthu ayesetsa kuzifunafuna koma sadzazipeza; indetu ngakhalenso wanzeru akati
Ecclesiastes9:1 Pakuti zonsezi ndinazisunga mumtima ndikalondoletu zonsezi; kuti olungama ndi anzeru ndi nchito zao ali m'manja a Mulungu; ngakhale kukonda ngakhale kudana anthu sadziwa; zonse ziri m'tsogolo mwao.
Ecclesiastes9:2 Zonse zigwera onse cimodzimodzi; kanthu kamodzi kangogwera wolungama ndi woipa; ngakhale wabwino ndi woyera ndi wodetsedwa: ngakhale wopereka nsembe ndi wosapereka konse; wabwino alingana ndi wocimwa; wolumbira ndi woopa lumbiro.
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ici ndi coipa m'zonse zicitidwa pansi pano
Ecclesiastes9:4 Pakuti woyang'ana ndi amoyo onse ali naco ciyembekezo; pakuti garu wamoyo aposa mkango wakufa.
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pakuti amoyo adziwa kuti tidzafa; koma akufa sadziwa kanthu bi
Ecclesiastes9:6 Cikondi cao ndi mdano wao ndi dumbo lao lomwe zatha tsopano; ndipo nthawi yamuyaya sagawa konse kanthu kali konse kacitidwa pansi pano.
Ecclesiastes9:7 Tiye
Ecclesiastes9:8 Zobvala zako zikhale zoyera masiku onse; mutu wako usasowe mafuta.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Khalani mokondwa ndi mkazi umkonda masiku onse a moyo wako wacabe
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ciri conse dzanja lako licipeza kucicita
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndinabweranso ndi kuzindikira pansi pano kuti omwe atamanga msanga sapambana m'liwiro
Ecclesiastes9:12 Pakuti munthu sadziwatu mphindi yace; monga nsomba zigwidwa m'ukonde woipa
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndaonanso nzeru pansi pano motero
Ecclesiastes9:14 panali mudzi waung'ono muli anthu owerengeka; ndipo inadzako mfumu yaikuru
Ecclesiastes9:15 koma anapezedwamo mwamuna wanzeru wosauka
Ecclesiastes9:16 Pamenepo ndinati
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mau a anzeru acete amveka koposa kupfuula kwa wolamulira mwa zitsiru.
Ecclesiastes9:18 Nzeru ipambana zida za nkhondo; koma wocimwa mmodzi aononga zabwino zambiri.

Isaiah1:1 MASOMPHENYA a Yesaya mwana wa Amozi
Isaiah1:2 Imvani
Isaiah1:3 Ng'ombe idziwa mwini wace
Isaiah1:4 Mtundu wocimwa inu
Isaiah1:5 Nanga bwanji mukali cimenyedwere kuti inu mulikupandukirabe? Mutu wonse ulikudwala
Isaiah1:6 Kucokera pansi pa phazi kufikira kumutu m'menemo mulibe cangwiro; koma mabala
Isaiah1:7 Dziko lanu liri bwinja; midzi yanu yatenthedwa ndi moto; dziko lanu alendo alimkudya pamaso panu; ndipo liri labwinja monga lagubuduzidwa ndi alendo.
Isaiah1:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni wasiyidwa ngati citando ca m'munda wamphesa
Isaiah1:9 Akadapanda Yehova wa makamu kutisiyira otsala ang'onong'ono ndithu
Isaiah1:10 Imvani mau a Yehova inu olamulira a Sodomu
Isaiah1:11 Nditani nazo nsembe zanu zocurukazo? ati Yehova; ndakhuta nazo nsembe zopsereza za nkhosa zamphongo ndi mafuta a nyama zonenepa; sindisekera ndi mwazi wa ng'ombe zamphongo
Isaiah1:12 Pakudzaonekera inu pamaso pa Ine
Isaiah1:13 Musadze nazonso
Isaiah1:14 Masiku anu okhala mwezi ndi nthawi za mapwando anu mtima wanga uzida; zindibvuta Ine; ndalema ndi kupirira nazo.
Isaiah1:15 Ndipo pamene mutambasula manja anu
Isaiah1:16 Sambani
Isaiah1:17 phunzirani kucita zabwino; funani ciweruzo; thandizani osautsidwa
Isaiah1:18 Tiyeni
Isaiah1:19 Ngati inu muli ofuna ndi omvera
Isaiah1:20 koma ngati mukana ndi kupanduka
Isaiah1:21 Mudzi wokhulupirika wasanduka wadama! wodzala ciweruzowo! cilungamo cinakhalamo koma tsopano ambanda.
Isaiah1:22 Siliva wako wasanduka mphala
Isaiah1:23 Akuru ako apanduka
Isaiah1:24 Cifukwa cace Yehova ati
Isaiah1:25 ndipo ndidzaikanso dzanja langa pa iwe
Isaiah1:26 ndidzabweza oweruza ako monga poyamba
Isaiah1:27 Ziyoni adzaomboledwa ndi ciweruzo
Isaiah1:28 Koma kupasula kwa olakwa ndi kwa ocimwa kudzakhala kumodzi
Isaiah1:29 Cifukwa adzakhala ndi manyazi
Isaiah1:30 Cifukwa mudzakhala ngati mtengo wathundu
Isaiah1:31 Ndimo wamphamvu adzakhala ngati cingwe cabwazi

Isaiah2:2 Ndipo padzakhala masiku otsiriza
Isaiah2:3 Ndipo anthu ambiri adzanka
Isaiah2:4 Iye adzaweruza pakati pa akunja
Isaiah2:5 Inu a nyumba ya Yakobo
Isaiah2:6 Cifukwa inu mwasiya anthu anu a nyumba ya Yakobo
Isaiah2:7 Dziko lao ladzala siliva ndi golidi
Isaiah2:8 Dziko lao ladzalanso mafano; iwo apembedza nchito ya manja ao ao
Isaiah2:9 Munthu wacabe agwada pansi
Isaiah2:10 Lowa m'phanga
Isaiah2:11 Maso a munthu akuyang'anira kumwamba adzatsitsidwa
Isaiah2:12 Cifukwa padzakhala tsiku la Yehova wa makamu pa zonse zonyada ndi zakudzikuza
Isaiah2:13 ndi pa mitengo yonse yamkungudza ya Lebano
Isaiah2:14 ndi pa mapiri onse atari
Isaiah2:15 ndi pa nsanja zazitari zonse
Isaiah2:16 ndi pa ngalawa zonse za Tarisi

Isaiah2:18 Ndimo mafano adzapita psiti.
Isaiah2:19 Anthu adzalowa m'mapanga a m'matanthwe

Isaiah2:21 kuti akalowe m'mapanga a m'matanthwe
Isaiah2:22 Siyani munthu
Isaiah3:1 Ndipo onani
Isaiah3:2 munthu wamphamvu

Isaiah3:4 Ndipo ndidzapereka ana
Isaiah3:5 Ndi anthu adzabvutidwa

Isaiah3:7 tsiku limenelo adzakweza mau ace
Isaiah3:8 Cifukwa kuti Yerusalemu wapasulidwa
Isaiah3:9 Maonekedwe a nkhope zao awacitira iwo mboni; ndipo amaonetsa ucimo wao monga Sodomu
Isaiah3:10 Nenani za wolungama
Isaiah3:11 Tsoka kwa woipa! kudzamuipira; cifukwa kuti mphotho ya manja ace idzapatsidwa kwa iye.
Isaiah3:12 Anthu anga awabvuta ndi ana
Isaiah3:13 Yehova aimirira kuti atsutsane
Isaiah3:14 Yehova adzalowa monenera mirandu ndi okalamba a anthu ace
Isaiah3:15 muti bwanji inu
Isaiah3:16 Komanso Yehova ati
Isaiah3:17 cifukwa cace Ambuye adzacita nkanambo pa liwombo la ana akazi a Ziyoni

Isaiah3:19 mbera
Isaiah3:20 ndi zisada
Isaiah3:21 mphete
Isaiah3:22 malaya a paphwando
Isaiah3:23 akalirole
Isaiah3:24 Ndipo padzakhala m'malo mwa zotsekemera mudzakhala zobvunda; ndi m'malo mwa lamba cingwe; ndipo m'malo mwa tsitsi labwino dazi; m'malo mwa cobvala ca pacifuwa mpango waciguduli; zipsera m'malo mwa ukoma.
Isaiah3:25 Amuna ako adzagwa ndi lupanga
Isaiah3:26 Ndipo zipata zace zidzalira maiko; ndipo iye adzakhala bwinja

Isaiah5:1 Ndiyimbire wokondedwa wanga nyimbo ya wokondedwa wanga ya munda wace wamphesa
Isaiah5:2 ndipo iye anakumba mcerenje kuzungulira kwete
Isaiah5:3 Ndipo tsopano
Isaiah5:4 Ndikanacitanso ciani ndi munda wanga wamphesa
Isaiah5:5 Ndipo tsopano ndidzakuuzani cimene nditi ndicite ndi munda wanga wamphesa; ndidzacotsapo chinga lace
Isaiah5:6 ndipo ndidzaupasula; sudzadzomboleredwa kapena kulimidwa; koma padzamera lunguzi ndi minga; ndidzalamuliranso mitambo kuti isabvumbwepo mvula.
Isaiah5:7 Cifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa Yehova wa makamu ndiwo banja la Israyeli
Isaiah5:8 Tsoka kwa iwo amene aphatikiza nyumba ndi nyumba
Isaiah5:9 M'makutu anga
Isaiah5:10 Cifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa madera khumi udzangobala mbiya imodzi
Isaiah5:11 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adzuka m'mamawa kuti atsate zakumwa zaukali; amene acezera usiku kufikira vinyo awaledzeretsal
Isaiah5:12 Ndipo zeze ndi mgoli
Isaiah5:13 Cifukwa cace anthu anga amuka m'nsinga
Isaiah5:14 Ndipo manda akuza cilakolako cace

Isaiah5:16 koma Yehova wa makamu wakwezedwa m'ciweruziro
Isaiah5:17 Pamenepo ana a nkhosa adzadyapo ngati m'busa mwao

Isaiah5:19 amene ati
Isaiah5:20 Tsoka kwa iwo amene ayesa zoipa zabwino
Isaiah5:21 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adziyesera anzeru ndi ocenjera!

Isaiah5:23 amene alungamitsa woipa pa cokometsera mlandu

Isaiah10:11 monga ndacitira Samariya ndi mafano ace

Isaiah15:4 Ndi Hesiboni apfuula zolimba

Isaiah16:9 Cifukwa cace ndidzalira ndi kulira kwa Yazeri

Isaiah16:11 Cifukwa cace m'mimba mwanga mulirira Moabu
Isaiah16:12 Ndipo padzakhala kuti pamene Moabu adzadzionetsa yekha
Isaiah16:13 Awa ndi mau amene Yehova adanena za Moabu nthawi zapitazo.
Isaiah16:14 Koma tsopano Yehova wanena

Isaiah18:4 Pakuti Yehova watero kwa ine
Isaiah18:5 Pakuti masika asanafike
Isaiah18:6 Adzasiyira mbalame zakulusa za m'mapiri ndi zirombo za dziko nthambizo

Isaiah19:1 Katundu wa Aigupto. Taonani
Isaiah19:2 Ndipo ndidzapikisanitsa Aaigupto; ndipo adzamenyana wina ndi mbale wace
Isaiah19:3 Ndipo mzimu wa Aigupto adzakhala wacabe pakati pace; ndipo Ine ndidzaononga uphungu wace; ndimo iwo adzafunafuna mafano ndi anyanga
Isaiah19:4 Ndipo ndidzapereka Aigupto m'manja mwa mbuye wankharwe; ndi mfumu yaukali idzawalamulira
Isaiah19:5 Ndipo madzi adzaphwa m'nyanja yaikuru
Isaiah19:6 Ndipo nyanja zidzanunkha; mitsinje ya Aigupto idzacepa
Isaiah19:7 Madambo ovandikana ndi Nile
Isaiah19:8 Asodzinso adzalira
Isaiah19:9 Komanso iwo amene agwira nchito yakupala bwazi
Isaiah19:10 Ndipo maziko ace adzasweka
Isaiah19:11 Akalonga a Zoani apusa ndithu; uphungu wa aphungu anzeru a Farao wasanduka wopulukira; bwanji iwe unena kwa Farao
Isaiah19:12 Nanga tsopano anzeru ali kuti? akuuze iwe tsopano; adziwe cimene Yehova wa makamu watsimikiza mtima kucitira Aigupto.
Isaiah19:13 Akalonga a Zoani apusa
Isaiah19:14 Yehova wasanganiza mzimu wa kusaweruzika pakati pace; ndipo iwo asoceretsa Aigupto m'nchito zonse zace
Isaiah19:15 Aigupto sadzakhala ndi nchito
Isaiah19:16 Tsiku limenelo Aigupto adzanga akazi; ndipo adzanthunthumira ndi kuopa
Isaiah19:17 Ndipo dziko la Yuda lidzaopsa Aigupto
Isaiah19:18 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala midzi isanu m'dziko la Aigupto yolankhula cinenero ca Kanani
Isaiah19:19 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala guwa la nsembe la Yehova pakati pa dziko la Aigupto
Isaiah19:20 Ndipo cidzakhala cizindikiro ndi mboni ya Yehova wa makamu m'dziko la Aigupto; pakuti iwo adzalirira kwa Yehova
Isaiah19:21 Ndipo Yehova adzadziwika kwa Aigupto
Isaiah19:22 Ndipo Yehova adzakantha Aigupto kukantha ndi kuciritsa; ndipo iwo adzabwerera kwa Yehova
Isaiah19:23 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala khwalala locokera m'Aigupto kunka ku Asuri
Isaiah19:24 Tsiku limenelo Israyeli ndi Aigupto ndi Asuri atatuwa
Isaiah19:25 pakuti Yehova wa makamu wadalitsa iwo

Isaiah20:6 Ndipo wokhala m'mphepete mwa nyanja muno adzati tsiku limenelo
Isaiah21:1 Katundu wa cipululu ca kunyanja. Monga akabvumvulu a kumwela apitirira
Isaiah21:2 Masomphenya obvuta aonetsedwa kwa ine; wogula malonda wonyenga amangonyenga

Isaiah21:4 Mtima wanga uguguda
Isaiah21:5 Iwo akonza pa gome lodyera

Isaiah22:1 Katundu wa cigwa ca masomphenya. Mwatani kuti mwakwera nonsenu pamacindwi?

Isaiah22:7 Ndipo panali kuti zigwa zako zosankhika zinadzala magareta

Isaiah22:9 Ndipo inu munaona kuti pa mudzi wa Davide panagumuka mipata yambiri; ndipo munasonkhanitsa pamodzi madzi a m'thamanda lakunsi.

Isaiah25:1 Yehova

Isaiah25:4 Cifukwa Inu mwakhala linga la aumphawi
Isaiah25:5 Monga kutentha m'malo ouma
Isaiah25:6 Ndipo m'phiri limendi Yehova wa makamu adzakonzera anthu ace onse phwando la zinthu zonona

Isaiah35:1 Cipululu ndi malo ouma adzakondwa; ndipo dziko loti se lidzasangalala ndi kuphuka ngati duwa.
Isaiah35:2 Lidzaphuka mocuruka ndi kusangalala
Isaiah35:3 Limbitsani manja opanda mphamvu
Isaiah35:4 Nenani kwa a mitima ya cinthenthe
Isaiah35:5 Pamenepo maso a akhungu adzatsegudwa

Isaiah51:22 atero Ambuye ako Yehova
Isaiah51:23 Ndidzaciika m'dzanja la iwo amene abvutitsa iwe; amene anena ku moyo wako
Isaiah52:1 Galamuka galamuka
Isaiah52:2 Dzisanse pfumbi; uka
Isaiah52:3 Pakuti atero Yehova
Isaiah52:4 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova atero
Isaiah52:5 Cifukwa cace kodi ndicitenji pano? ati Yehova; popeza anthu anga acotsedwa popanda kanthu? akuwalamulira awaliritsa
Isaiah52:6 Cifukwa cace anthu anga adzadziwa dzina langa; cifukwa cacersiku limenelo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine amene ndinena; taonani
Isaiah52:7 Ha
Isaiah52:8 Mau a alonda ako! akweza mau
Isaiah52:9 Kondwani zolimba
Isaiah52:10 Yehova wabvula mkono wace woyera pamaso pa amitundu onse; ndi malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzaona cipulumutso ca Mulungu wathu.
Isaiah52:11 Cokani inu
Isaiah52:12 Pakuti simudzacoka mofulumira
Isaiah52:13 Taonani
Isaiah52:14 Monga ambiri anazizwa ndi iwe Israyeli
Isaiah52:15 momwemonso Iye adzawazawaza mitundu yambiri; mafumu adzamtsekera Iye pakamwa pao; pakuti cimene sicinauzidwa kwa iwo adzaciona
Isaiah53:1 Ndani wamvera uthenga wathu? Ndi mkono wa Yehova wabvumbulukira yani?
Isaiah53:2 Pakuti ameneyo adzaphuka pamaso pace ngati mtengo wanthete
Isaiah53:3 Iye ananyozedwa ndi kukanidwa ndi anthu; munthu wazisoni
Isaiah53:4 Zoonadi Iye ananyamula zowawa zathu
Isaiah53:5 Koma Iye analasidwa cifukwa ca zolakwa zathu
Isaiah53:6 Tonse tasocera ngati nkhosa; tonse tayenda yense m'njira ya mwini yekha; ndipo Yehova anaika pa Iye mphulupulu ya ife tonse.
Isaiah53:7 Iye anatsenderezedwa koma anadzicepetsa yekha osatsegula pakamwa pace; ngati nkhosa yotsogoleredwa kukaphedwa
Isaiah53:8 Anacotsedwa ku cipsinjo ndi ciweruziro; ndipo ndani adzafotokoza nthawi ya moyo wace? pakuti walikhidwa kunja kuno; cifukwa ca kulakwa kwa anthu anga Iye anakhomedwa.
Isaiah53:9 Ndipo anaika manda ace pamodzi ndi oipa
Isaiah53:10 Koma kunakomera Yehova kumtundudza; anammvetsa zowawa; moyo wace ukapereka nsembe yoparamula
Isaiah53:11 Iye adzaona zotsatira mabvuto a moyo wace
Isaiah53:12 Cifukwa cace ndidzamgawira gawo ndi akuru; ndipo adzagawana ndi amphamvu zofunkha; pakuti Iye anathira moyo wace kuimfa; ndipo anawerengedwa pamodzi ndi olakwa; koma ananyamula macimo a ambiri
Isaiah54:1 Yimba
Isaiah54:2 Kuza malo a hema wako
Isaiah54:3 Pakuti iwe udzafalikira ponse pa dzanja lamanja ndi lamanzere
Isaiah54:4 Usaope
Isaiah54:5 Pakuti Mlengi wako ndiye mwamuna wako; Yehova wa makamu ndiye dzina lace; ndi Woyera wa Israyeli ndiye Mombolo wako; Iye adzachedwa Mulungu wa dziko lonse lapansi.
Isaiah54:6 Pakuti Yehova wakuitana iwe monga mkazi wakusiyidwa ndi wosauka m'mzimu
Isaiah54:7 Kamphindi kakang'ono ndakusiya iwe
Isaiah54:8 M'kukwiya kwa kusefukira ndinakubisira nkhope yanga kamphindi; koma ndi kukoma mtima kwa cikhalire ndidzakucitira cifundo
Isaiah54:9 Pakuti kumeneku kuli kwa Ine monga madzi a Nowa; pakuti monga ndinalumbira kuti madzi a Nowa sadzamizanso pa dziko lapansi
Isaiah54:10 Pakuti mapiri adzacoka
Isaiah54:11 Iwe wosautsidwa
Isaiah54:12 Ndipo ndidzamanga mazenera ako ndi miyala yofiira
Isaiah54:13 Ndipo ana ako onse adzaphunzitsidwa ndi Yehova; ndipo mtendere wa ana ako udzakhala waukulu.
Isaiah54:14 M'cilungamo iwe udzakhazikitsidwa
Isaiah54:15 Taona
Isaiah54:16 Taona
Isaiah54:17 Palibe cida cosulidwira iwe cidzapindula; ndipo lilime lonse limene lidzakangana nawe m'ciweruzo udzalitsutsa. Ici ndi colowa ca atumiki a Yehova

Isaiah57:3 Koma sendererani kuno cifupi

Isaiah57:5 Inu amene muutsa zilakolako zanu pakati pa mathundu
Isaiah57:6 Pakuti pa miyala yosalala ya m'cigwa pali gawo lako; iyo ndiyo gawo lako; ndiyo imene unaitsanulirira nsembe yothira
Isaiah57:7 Pamwamba pa phiri lalitaritari unayala mphasa yako; kumenekonso wakwera kukapereka nsembe.

Isaiah57:9 Ndipo unanka kwa mfumu
Isaiah57:10 Unatopa ndi njira yako yaitari; koma sunanene
Isaiah57:11 Ndipo ndi yani amene wamuopa ndi kucita naye mantha

Isaiah58:6 Kodi kumeneku si kusala kudya kumene ndinakusankha: kumasula nsinga za zoipa
Isaiah58:7 Kodi si ndiko kupatsa cakudya cako kwa anjala

Isaiah58:14 pomwepo udzakondwa mwa Yehova; ndipo Ine ndidzakuyendetsa pa misanje ya dziko lapansi; ndipo ndidzakudyetsa colowa ca kholo lako Yakobo; pakuti pakamwa pa Yehova pananenapo.

Isaiah61:1 Mzimu wa Ambuye Yehova uli pa ine; pakuti Yehova wandidzoza ine ndilalikire mau abwino kwa ofatsa; Iye wanditumiza ndikamange osweka mtima

Isaiah61:3 ndikakonzere iwo amene alira maliro m'Ziyoni

Isaiah61:5 Ndipo alendo adzaimirira ndi kudyetsa magulu ako
Isaiah61:6 Koma inu mudzachedwa ansembe a Yehova; anthu adzakuyesani inu atumiki a Mulungu wathu; inu mudzadya cuma ca amitundu

Isaiah66:1 Atero Yehova
Isaiah66:2 Pakuti zonsezi mkono wanga wazilenga
Isaiah66:3 Wakupha ng'ombe alingana ndi wakupha munthu; iye wapereka nsembe ya mwana wa nkhosa alingana ndi wotyola khosi la garu; wothira nsembe yaufa akunga wothira mwazi wa nkhumba; wofukiza conunkhira akunga wodalitsa fano; inde iwo asankha njira zao zao
Isaiah66:4 Inenso ndidzasankha zodzinyenga nazo
Isaiah66:5 Imvani mau a Yehova
Isaiah66:6 Mau a phokoso acokera m'mudzi
Isaiah66:7 Mkazi asanamve zowawa
Isaiah66:8 Ndani anamva kanthu kotereko? ndani anaona zinthu zoterezo? Kodi dziko lidzabadwa tsiku limodzi? Kodi mtundu udzabadwa modzidzimutsa? pakuti pamene Ziyoni anamva zowawa
Isaiah66:9 Kodi Ine ndidzafikitsira mkazi nthawi yakutula osamtulitsa? ati Yehova; kodi Ine amene ndibalitsa ndidzatseka mimba? ati Mulungu wako.
Isaiah66:10 Sangalalani inu pamodzi ndi Yerusalemu
Isaiah66:11 kuti mukayamwe ndi kukhuta ndi mabere a zitonthozo zace; kuti mukafinye mkaka ndi kukondwerera ndi unyinji wa ulemerero wace.

Isaiah66:13 Monga munthu amene amace amtonthoza mtima
Isaiah66:14 Ndipo mudzaciona

Isaiah66:17 Iwo amene adzipatulitsa nadziyeretsa
Isaiah66:18 Pakuti Ine ndidziwa nchito zao ndi maganizo ao; nthawi ikudza yakudzasonkhanitsa Ine a mitundu yonse ndi zinenedwe zonse
Isaiah66:19 Ndipo ndidzaika cizindikiro pakati pao
Isaiah66:20 Ndipo iwo adzatenga abale anu onse mwa amitundu onse akhale nsembe ya kwa Yehova; adzabwera nao pa akavalo
Isaiah66:21 Ndipo ena a iwo ndidzawatenga akhale ansembe ndi Alevi
Isaiah66:22 Pakuti monga m'mwamba mwatsopano ndi dziko lapansi latsopano limene ndidzalenga
Isaiah66:23 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti kuyambira pa mwezi wokhala kufikira ku unzace
Isaiah66:24 Ndipo iwo adzaturuka ndi kuyang'ana mitembo ya anthu amene andilakwira Ine

Jeremiah2:11 Kodi mtundu wa anthu unasintha milungu yao
Jeremiah2:12 Muzizwe pamenepo

Jeremiah2:15 Ana a mikango anambangulira iye
Jeremiah2:16 Ananso a Nofi ndi a Tahapanesi
Jeremiah2:17 Kodi sunadzicitira ici iwe wekha popeza unasiya Yehova Mulungu wako

Jeremiah2:19 Coipa cako cidzai kulanga iwe
Jeremiah2:20 Pakuti kale lomwe ndinatyola gori lako
Jeremiah2:21 Ndipo Ine ndinakuoka mpesa wangwiro
Jeremiah2:22 Pakuti ngakhale usamba ndi soda
Jeremiah2:23 Bwanji uti
Jeremiah2:24 mbidzi yozolowera m'cipululu

Jeremiah41:1 Ndipo panali mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri
Jeremiah41:2 Ndipo anauka Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya
Jeremiah41:3 Ismayeli naphanso Ayuda onse okhala naye Gedaliya pa Mizipa
Jeremiah41:4 Ndipo panali atapita masiku awiri atamupha Gedaliya
Jeremiah41:5 anadza anthu ocokera ku Sekemu
Jeremiah41:6 Ndipo Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya anaturuka m'Mizipa kukakomana nao
Jeremiah41:7 Ndipo panali
Jeremiah41:8 Koma mwa iwo anaoneka anthu khumi amene anati kwa Ismayeli
Jeremiah41:9 Ndipo dzenje moponyamo Ismayeli mitembo yonse ya anthu amene anawapha
Jeremiah41:10 Ndipo Ismayeli anatenga ndende otsala onse a anthu okhala m'Mizipa
Jeremiah41:11 Koma pamene Yohanani mwana wa Kareya
Jeremiah41:12 anatenga anthu onse
Jeremiah41:13 Ndipo panali pamene anthu onse amene anali ndi Ismayeli anaona Yohanani mwana wa Kareya
Jeremiah41:14 Ndipo anthu onse amene Ismayeli anatenga ndende kuwacotsa m'Mizipa anatembenuka nabwera
Jeremiah41:15 Koma Ismayeli mwana wace wa Netaniya anapulumuka Yohanani ndi anthu asanu ndi atatu
Jeremiah41:16 Ndipo Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya ndi akazembe onse a makamu amene anali naye
Jeremiah41:17 ndipo anacoka
Jeremiah41:18 cifukwa ca Akasidi; pakuti anawaopa

Jeremiah42:2 nati kwa Yeremiya mneneri

Jeremiah48:1 Za Moabu Atero Yehova wa makamu

Jeremiah48:4 Moabu waonongedwa; ang'ono ace amveketsa kulira.

Jeremiah48:39 Yasweka bwanji! Akuwa bwanji Moabu! Wapotoloka bwanji ndi manyazi! Comweco Moabu adzakhala coseketsa ndi coopsera onse omzungulira iye.

Jeremiah50:6 Anthu anga anakhala nkhosa zotayika; abusa ao anazisokeretsa pa mapiri onyenga; acoka kuphiri kunka kucitunda; aiwala malo ao akupuma.

Jeremiah50:14 Gubani ndi kuzungulira Babulo kumenyana naye

Jeremiah51:1 Yehova atero: Taonani
Jeremiah51:2 Ndipo ndidzatuma ku Babulo alendo
Jeremiah51:3 Wauta asakoke uta wace
Jeremiah51:4 Ndipo adzagwa ophedwa m'dziko la Akasidi
Jeremiah51:5 Pakuti Israyeli ndi Yuda sasiyidwa ndi Mulungu wao
Jeremiah51:6 Thawani pakati pa Babulo
Jeremiah51:7 Babulo wakhala cikho cagolidi m'dzanja la Yehova
Jeremiah51:8 Babulo wagwa dzidzidzi naonongedwa; mumkuwire iye; mutengere zowawa zace bvunguti
Jeremiah51:9 Tikadaciritsa Babulo koma sanacire; mumsiye iye
Jeremiah51:10 Yehova waturutsa cilungamo cathu; tiyeni tilalikire m'Ziyoni nchito ya Yehova Mulungu wathu.
Jeremiah51:11 Nolani mibvi; gwirani zolimba zikopa; Yehova waukitsa mtima wa mafumu a Amedi; cifukwa alingalirira Babulo kuti amuononge; pakuti ndi kubwezera cilango kwa Yehova; kubwezera cilango cifukwa ca Kacisi wace.
Jeremiah51:12 Muwakwezere mbendera makoma a Babulo
Jeremiah51:13 Iwe wokhala pa madzi ambiri
Jeremiah51:14 Yehova wa makamu walumbira pa Iye mwini
Jeremiah51:15 Iye analenga dziko lapansi ndi mphamvu yace
Jeremiah51:16 pamene Iye anena mau
Jeremiah51:17 Anthu onse ali opulukira ndi opanda nzeru; wakusula golidi acitidwa manyazi ndi fanizo lace losema; pakuti fanizo lace loyenga liri bodza
Jeremiah51:18 Ngwacabe
Jeremiah51:19 Gawo la Yakobo silifanafana ndi izo; pakuti Iye ndiye analenga zonse; Israyeli ndi mtundu wa colowa cace
Jeremiah51:20 Iwe ndiwe cibonga canga ndi zida zanga za nkhondo; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola amitundu
Jeremiah51:21 ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola kavalo ndi wakwera wace;
Jeremiah51:22 ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola gareta ndi iye wokweramo; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola mwamuna ndi mkazi; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola wokalamba ndi mnyamata; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola mnyamata ndi namwali;
Jeremiah51:23 ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola mbusa ndi zoweta zace; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola wakulima ndi gori la ng'ombe lace; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola akazembe ndi ziwanga
Jeremiah51:24 Ndipo ndidzabwezera Babulo ndi okhala m'Kasidi zoipa zao zonse anazicita m'Ziyoni pamaso panu
Jeremiah51:25 Taona
Jeremiah51:26 Ndipo sadzacotsa pa iwe mwala wa pangondya
Jeremiah51:27 Kwezani mbendera m'dziko
Jeremiah51:28 Konzerani amitundu amenyane ndi iye
Jeremiah51:29 Dziko linthunthumira ndi kuphwetekedwa
Jeremiah51:30 Olimba a ku Babulo akana kumenyana
Jeremiah51:31 Wamtokoma mmodzi adzathamanga kukakomana ndi mnzace
Jeremiah51:32 pamadooko patsekedwa
Jeremiah51:33 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo wandidya ine
Jeremiah51:35 Wokhala m'Ziyoni adzati
Jeremiah51:36 Cifukwa cace Yehova atero: Taona
Jeremiah51:37 Ndipo Babulo adzasanduka miunda
Jeremiah51:38 Adzabangula pamodzi ngati misona ya mikango; adzacita nthulu ngati ana a mikango.
Jeremiah51:39 Pamene atentha
Jeremiah51:40 Ndidzawagwetsa kuti aphedwe manga nkhosa zamphongo
Jeremiah51:41 Sesake wagwidwatul cimene dziko lonse lapansi linacitamanda calandidwa dzidzidzi Babulo wakhalatu bwinja pakati pa amitundu
Jeremiah51:42 Nyanja yakwera kufikira ku Babulo; wamira ndi mafunde ace aunyinji.
Jeremiah51:43 Midzi yace yakhala bwinja
Jeremiah51:44 Ndipo Ine ndiweruza Beli m'Babulo
Jeremiah51:45 Anthu anga
Jeremiah51:46 Mtima wanu usalefuke
Jeremiah51:47 Cifukwa cace
Jeremiah51:48 Pamenepo kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Jeremiah51:49 Monga Babulo wagwetsa ophedwa a Israyeli
Jeremiah51:50 Inu amene mwapulumuka kulupanga
Jeremiah51:51 Tiri ndi manyazi
Jeremiah51:52 Cifukwa cace
Jeremiah51:53 Ngakhale Babulo adzakwera kumwamba
Jeremiah51:54 Mau akupfuula ocokera ku Babulo
Jeremiah51:55 pakuti Yehova afunkha Babulo
Jeremiah51:56 pakuti wakufunkha wafika kwa iye
Jeremiah51:57 Ndipo ndidzaledzeretsa akuru ace ndi anzeru ace
Jeremiah51:58 Yehova wa makamu atero: Makoma otakata a Babulo adzagwetsedwa ndithu
Jeremiah51:59 Mau amene Yeremiya mneneri anauza Seraya mwana wa Neriya
Jeremiah51:60 Ndipo Yeremiya analemba m'buku coipa conse cimene cidzafika pa Babulo
Jeremiah51:61 Ndipo Yeremiya anati kwa Seraya
Jeremiah51:62 nuti
Jeremiah51:63 Ndipo padzakhala
Jeremiah51:64 nuti
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri kudza cimodzi pamene analowa ufumu wace; ndipo analamulira m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi kudza cimodzi; dzina la amace ndi Hamutala mwana wamkazi wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina.
Jeremiah52:2 Ndipo iye anacita zoipa pamaso pa Yehova
Jeremiah52:3 Pakuti zonse zinacitika m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda cifukwa ca mkwiyo wa Yehova
Jeremiah52:4 Ndipo panaoneka caka cacisanu ndi cinai ca ufumu wace mwezi wakhumi
Jeremiah52:5 Ndipo mudzi unazingidwa mpaka caka ca khumi ndi cimodzi ca mfumu Zedekiya.
Jeremiah52:6 Mwezi wacinai
Jeremiah52:7 Pamenepo anaboola mudzi
Jeremiah52:8 Koma nkhondo ya Akasidi inamtsata mfumu
Jeremiah52:9 Ndipo anamgwira iye
Jeremiah52:10 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babulo inapha ana a Zedekiya pamaso pace; niphanso akuru onse a Yuda m'Ribila.
Jeremiah52:11 Ndipo anakolowola maso a Zedekiya
Jeremiah52:12 Mwezi wacisanu
Jeremiah52:13 ndipo anatentha nyumba ya Yehova ndi nyumba ya mfumu
Jeremiah52:14 Ndipo nkhondo yonse ya Akasidi
Jeremiah52:15 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende anthu aumphawi
Jeremiah52:16 Koma Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anasiya aumphawi a padziko akhale akulima mphesa ndi akulima m'minda.
Jeremiah52:17 Ndi mizati yamkuwa imene inali m'nyumba ya Yehova
Jeremiah52:18 Ndiponso miphika
Jeremiah52:19 Ndi zikho
Jeremiah52:20 Nsanamira ziwirizo
Jeremiah52:21 Koma nsanamirazo
Jeremiah52:22 Ndipo korona wamkuwa anali pamwamba pace; utari wace wa korona mmodzi unali wa mikono isanu
Jeremiah52:23 Ndipo pambali pace panali makangaza makumi asanu ndi anai kudza asanu ndi limodzi; ndipo makangaza onse anali zana limodzi pamade pozungulira pace.
Jeremiah52:24 Ndipo kapitao wa alonda anatenga Seraya mkuru wansembe
Jeremiah52:25 ndipo m'mudzi anatenga kazembe amene anali woyang'anira anthu a nkhondo ndi amuna asanu ndi awiri a iwo akuona nkhope ya mfumu
Jeremiah52:26 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga iwo
Jeremiah52:27 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babulo anawakantha
Jeremiah52:28 Amenewa ndi anthu amene Nebukadirezara anatenga ndende: caka cacisanu ndi ciwiri
Jeremiah52:29 caka cakhumi ndi cisanu ndi citatu ca Nebukadirezara iye anatenga ndende kucokera m'Yerusalemu anthu mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi atatu ndi awiri;
Jeremiah52:30 caka ca makumi awiri ndi zitatu ca Nebukadirezara Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende Ayuda mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi anai ndi asanu; anthu onse anali zikwi zinai kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi.
Jeremiah52:31 Ndipo panali caka ca makumi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri ca undende wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah52:32 nanena naye bwino
Jeremiah52:33 Ndipo anapindula zobvala zace za m'ndende
Jeremiah52:34 Koma phoso lace mfumu ya ku Babulo sanaleka kumpatsa
Lamentations1:1 Ha! mudziwo unadzala anthu
Lamentations1:2 Uliralira usiku; misozi yace iri pa masaya ace; Mwa onse amene anaukonda mulibe mmodzi wakuutonthoza: Mabwenzi ace onse aucitira ziwembu
Lamentations1:3 Yuda watengedwa ndende cifukwa ca msauko ndi ukapolo waukuru; Akhala mwa amitundu
Lamentations1:4 M'njira za Ziyoni mulira posoweka akudzera msonkhano; Pa zipata zace zonse papasuka; ansembe ace onse ausa moyo; Anamwali ace asautsidwa; iye mwini namva zowawa.
Lamentations1:5 Amaliwongo ace asanduka akuru ace
Lamentations1:6 Ulemu wace wonse wamcokera mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; Akalonga ace asanduka nswala zosapeza busa
Lamentations1:7 M'masiku a msauko wace ndi kusocera kwace Yerusalemu ukumbukira zokondweretsa zace zonse zacikhalire; Pogwidwa anthu ace ndi mdaniyo popanda wakuupulumutsa
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu wacimwa kwambiri; cifukwa cace wasanduka cinthu conyansa; Onse akuulemekeza aupeputsa
Lamentations1:9 Udio wace unali m'nsaru zace; sunakumbukira citsiriziro cace; Cifukwa cace watsika mozizwitsa; ulibe wakuutonthoza; Taonani Yehova
Lamentations1:10 Amaliwongo atambasulira manja ao pa zokondweretsa zace zonse; Pakuti waona amitundu atalowa m'malo ace opatulika
Lamentations1:11 Anthu ace onse ausa moyo nafunafuna mkate; Ndi zokondweretsa zao agula zakudya kuti atsitsimutse moyo wao; Taonani
Lamentations1:12 Kodi muyesa cimeneci cabe
Lamentations1:13 Anatumiza moto wocokera kumwamba kulowa m'mafupa anga
Lamentations1:14 Gori la zolakwa zanga lamangidwa ndi dzanja lace; Zalukidwa
Lamentations1:15 Ambuye wapepula ngwazi zanga zonse pakati panga; Waitanira msonkhano pa ine kuti uphwanye anyamata anga
Lamentations1:16 Cifukwa ca zimenezi ndilira; diso langa
Lamentations1:17 Ziyoni atambasula manja ace
Lamentations1:18 Yehova ali wolungama; pakuti ndapikisana ndi m'kamwa mwace: Mudtvetu
Lamentations1:19 Ndinaitanaakundikondawokoma anandinyenga; Ansembe ndi akulu anga anamwalira m'mudzimu
Lamentations1:20 Onani
Lamentations1:21 Iwo anamva kuti ndiusa moyo
Lamentations1:22 Zoipa zao zonse zidze pamaso panu
Lamentations2:1 Ambuye waphimbatu ndi mtambo mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni
Lamentations2:2 Yehova wameza nyumba zonse za Yakobo osazicitira cisoni; Wagumula malinga a mwana wamkazi wa Yuda mwa ukali wace; Wawagwetsera pansi
Lamentations2:3 Pokwiya moopsya walikha nyanga zonse za Israyeli; Wabweza m'mbuyo dzanja lace lamanja pamaso pa adaniwo
Lamentations2:4 Wathifula uta wace ngati mdani
Lamentations2:5 Yehova wasanduka mdani
Lamentations2:6 Wacotsa mwamphamvu dindiro lace ngati la m'munda; Waononga mosonkhanira mwace; Yehova waiwalitsa anthu msonkhano ndi sabata m'Ziyoni; Wanyoza mfumu ndi wansembe mokwiya mwaukali.
Lamentations2:7 Ambuye wataya guwa lace la nsembe
Lamentations2:8 Yehova watsimikiza mtima kupasula linga la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; Watambalika cingwe
Lamentations2:9 Zipata zace zalowa pansi; waononga ndi kutyola mipiringidzo yace; Mfumu yace ndi akalonga ace ali pakati pa amitundu akusowa cilamulo; Inde
Lamentations2:10 Akulu a mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni akhala pansi natonthola; Aponya pfumbi pa mitu yao
Lamentations2:11 Maso anga alefuka ndi misozi
Lamentations2:12 Amati kwa amao
Lamentations2:13 Ndikucitire umboni wotani? ndikuyerekeze ndi ciani
Lamentations2:14 Aneneri ako anakuonera masomphenya acabe ndi opusa; Osaulula mphulupulu yako kuti abweze undende wako
Lamentations2:15 Onse opita panjira akuombera manja: Atsonya
Lamentations2:16 Adani ako onse ayasamira pa iwe

Lamentations3:34 Kupondereza andende onse a m'dziko

Lamentations3:36 Kukhotetsa mlandu wa munthu
Lamentations3:37 Ndani anganene
Lamentations3:38 Kodi m'kamwa mwa Wam'mwambamwamba simuturuka zobvuta ndi zabwino?
Lamentations3:39 Kodi munthu wamoyo adandauliranji pokhala m'zocimwa zace?
Lamentations3:40 Tisanthule ntiyese njira zathu ntibwerenso kwa Yehova.
Lamentations3:41 Titukulire mitima yathu ndi
Lamentations3:42 Ife tilakwa ndi kupikisana nanu
Lamentations3:43 Mwadzikuta ndi mkwiyo ndi kutilondola
Lamentations3:44 Mwadzikuta ndi mtambo kuti pemphero lathu lisapyolemo.
Lamentations3:45 Mwatiika pakati pa amitundu ngati zinyalala ndi za kudzala.
Lamentations3:46 Adani athu onse anatiyasamira
Lamentations3:47 Mantha ndi dzenje zitifikira
Lamentations3:48 M'diso mwanga mutsikamitsinje ya madzi cifukwa ca mwana wamkazi wa anthu amtundu wanga woonongedwa
Lamentations3:49 Diso langa lingotsanulira osaleka
Lamentations3:50 Kufikira Yehova adzazolika kumwamba ndi kuona;
Lamentations3:51 Diso langa limvetsa moyo wanga zowawa cifukwa ca ana akazi onse a m'mudzi mwanga.
Lamentations3:52 Ondida opanda cifukwa anandiinga ngati mbalame;
Lamentations3:53 Anaononga moyo wanga m'dzenje
Lamentations3:54 Madzi anayenda pamwamba pa mutu panga
Lamentations3:55 Ndinaitana dzina lanu
Lamentations3:56 Munamva mau anga; musabise khutu lanu popuma ndi popfuulaine.

Lamentations3:58 Ambuye munanenera moyo wanga mirandu yace; munaombola moyo wanga.
Lamentations3:59 Yehova
Lamentations3:60 Mwaona kubwezera kwao konse ndi zopangira zao zonse za pa ine.
Lamentations3:61 Mwamva citonzo cao
Lamentations3:62 Milomo ya akutsutsana nane ndi zolingalira zao za pa ine tsiku lonse.
Lamentations3:63 Taonani kukhala ndi kunyamuka kwao; ndine nyimbo yao.

Lamentations3:65 Muphimbe mtima wao ndi kuwatemberera;
Lamentations3:66 Mudzawalondola mokwiya ndi kuwaononga pansi pa thambo la Yehova.
