Ezekiel1:1 NDIPO kunali caka ca makumi atatu
Ezekiel1:2 Tsiku lacisanu la mwezi
Ezekiel1:3 anadzadi mau a Yehova kwa Ezekieli wansembe
Ezekiel1:4 Ndinapenya
Ezekiel1:5 Ndi m'kati mwace mudaoneka mafaniziro a zamoyo zinai. Ndipo maonekedwe ao ndiwo anafanana ndi munthu
Ezekiel1:6 ndi yense anali nazo nkhope zinai
Ezekiel1:7 Ndi mapazi ao anali mapazi oongoka
Ezekiel1:8 Zinali naonso manja a munthu pansi pa mapiko ao pa mbali zao zinai; ndipo zinaizi zinali nazo nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao.
Ezekiel1:9 Mapiko ao analumikizana; sizinatembenuka poyenda; ciri conse cinayenda ndi kulunjika kutsogoloko.
Ezekiel1:10 Mafaniziro a nkhope zao zinali nayo nkhope ya munthu; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya mkango pa mbali ya ku dzanja lamanja; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya ng'ombe pa mbali ya ku dzanja lamanzere; izi zinai zinali nayonso nkhope ya ciombankhanga.
Ezekiel1:11 Ndi nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao zinagawikana kumutu; ciri conse cinali nao mapiko awiri olumikizana
Ezekiel1:12 Ndipo zinayenda
Ezekiel1:13 Kunena za mafaniziro a zamoyozo
Ezekiel1:14 Ndipo zamoyozo zinathamanga ndi kubwerera
Ezekiel1:15 Ndipo pakupenyerera ine zamoyozo
Ezekiel1:16 Maonekedwe a njingazi ndi mapangidwe ao ananga mawalidwe a berulo; ndi izi zinai zinafanana mafaniziro ao; ndi maonekedwe ao ndi mapangidwe ao anali ngati njinga ziwiri zopingasitsana.
Ezekiel1:17 Poyenda zinayenda ku mbali zao zinai
Ezekiel1:18 Ndi mikombero yace inali yokuzika ndi yoopsa; ndi izi zinai zinali ndi mikombero yao yodzala ndi maso pozungulira pao.
Ezekiel1:19 Ndipo poyenda zamoyozo
Ezekiel1:20 Kuli konse mzimu ukuti umuke
Ezekiel1:21 Poyenda zija zinayenda izi
Ezekiel1:22 Ndi pa mitu ya zamoyozi panali cifaniziro ca thambo
Ezekiel1:23 Ndi pansi pa thambolo mapiko ao analunjikana
Ezekiel1:24 Ndipo pakuyenda izi ndinamva mkokomo wa mapiko ao
Ezekiel1:25 Ndipo panamveka mau pamwamba pa thambolo linali pamwamba pa mitu yao; pakuima izi zinagwetsa mapiko ao.
Ezekiel1:26 Ndi pamwamba pa thambo linali pamitu pao panali cifaniziro ca mpando wacifumu
Ezekiel1:27 Ndipo ndinapenya ngati citsulo cakupsa
Ezekiel1:28 Ngati maonekedwe a utawaleza uli m'mtambo tsiku la mvula

Ezekiel40:6 Pamenepo anafika ku cipata coloza kum'mawa
Ezekiel40:7 Ndi cipinda ca alonda
Ezekiel40:8 Anayesanso khonde la kucipata ku mbali ya kukacisi
Ezekiel40:9 Pamenepo anayesa khonde la kucipata mikono isanu ndi itatu
Ezekiel40:10 Ndi zipinda za alonda za ku cipata ca kum'mawa ndizo zitatu cakuno
Ezekiel40:11 Ndipo anayesa kupingasa kwa cipata pakhoma pace mikono khumi
Ezekiel40:12 ndi pakhomo pa zipinda za alonda panali kakhoma ka mkono umodzi cakuno
Ezekiel40:13 Ndipo anayesa cipata kuyambira ku tsindwi la cipinda ca alonda cimodzi
Ezekiel40:14 Anamanganso nsaaamira za mikono makumi asanu ndi limodzi; ndi bwalo la pakati pa cipata lidafikira kunsanamira.
Ezekiel40:15 Ndipo kuyambira pa khomo lolowera la cipata kufikira khomo la khonde la cipata m'katimo ndiko mikono makumi asanu.
Ezekiel40:16 Ndipo panali mazenera a made okhazikika pazipinda ndi m'makhoma a pakati pao
Ezekiel40:17 Pamenepo analowa nane ku bwalo lakunja

Ezekiel40:22 Ndi mazenera ace
Ezekiel40:23 Ndipo panali cipata ca bwalo lam'kati
Ezekiel40:24 Ndipo ananditsogolera kumka kumwela
Ezekiel40:25 Ndimo munali mazenera m'menemo
Ezekiel40:26 Ndipo panali makwerero asanu ndi awiri okwererapo
Ezekiel40:27 Ndipo panali cipata ca bwalo lam'kati cakulozakumwela
Ezekiel40:28 Pamenepo analowa nane pa cipata ca kumwela m'bwalo lam'kati
Ezekiel40:29 ndi zipinda zace
Ezekiel40:30 Ndipo panali zidundumwa pozungulirapo
Ezekiel40:31 Ndi zidundumwa zace zinaloza ku bwalo lakunja
Ezekiel40:32 Ndipo analowa ndine m'bwalo lam'kati kuloza kum'mawa
Ezekiel40:33 ndi zipindazace
Ezekiel40:34 Ndi zidundumwa zace zinaloza ku bwalo lakunja; ndi pa nsanamira zace panali akanjedza cakuno ndi cauko; ndipo pokwerera pace panali makwerero asanu ndi atatu.
Ezekiel40:35 Pamenepo anabwera nane ku cipata ca kumpoto
Ezekiel40:36 zipinda zace
Ezekiel40:37 Ndi nsanamira zace zinaloza ku bwalo lakunja; ndi pa nsanamira zace panali akanjedza cakuno ndi cauko; ndipo pokwerera pace panali makwerero asanu ndi atatu.
Ezekiel40:38 Ndipo pa nsanamira za pazipata panali kanyumba ndi citseko cace; pamenepo anatsuka nsembe vopsereza.
Ezekiel40:39 Ndipo m'khonde la pacipata munali magome awiri cakuno
Ezekiel40:40 Ndi ku mbali yina ya khonde kunja
Ezekiel40:41 Magome anai cakuno
Ezekiel40:42 Ndipo panali magome anai a nsembe yopsereza a miyala yosema
Ezekiel40:43 Ndi ziciri zangowe
Ezekiel40:44 Ndi kunja kwa cipata ca m'kati kunali tinyumba ta oyimba m'bwalo lam'kati
Ezekiel40:45 Ndipo anati kwa ine
Ezekiel40:46 Ndi kanyumba koloza kumpoto nka ansembe odikira guwa la nsembe
Ezekiel40:47 Ndipo anayesa bwalolo mikono zana m'litali mwace
Ezekiel40:48 Pamenepo anadza nane ku khonde la kacisi
Ezekiel40:49 M'litali mwace mwa khonde mikono makumi awiri

Ezekiel41:4 Anayesanso m'kati mwa Kacisi m'tsogolomo
Ezekiel41:5 Pamenepo anayesa khoma la nyumba
Ezekiel41:6 Ndipo zipinda za m'mphepete zinasanjikizana cina pa cinzace; zinatero makumi atatu mizere yonse itatu
Ezekiel41:7 Ndipo zipinda za m'mphepete zinakula m'kupingasa kwao
Ezekiel41:8 Ndinaonanso kuti kunyumba kunali ciunda pozungulira pace; maziko a zipinda za m'mphepete anafikira muyeso wa bango la mikono isanu ndi umodzi yaikuru.
Ezekiel41:9 Kucindikira kwa khoma la kuzipinda za m'mphepete kunja kwace kunali mikono isanu; ndipo mpata wace unali malo olowera m'zipinda za m'mphepete za kacisi.
Ezekiel41:10 Ndi pakati pa zipinda panali kupingasa kwa mikono makumi awiri
Ezekiel41:11 Ndi makomo a zipinda za m'mphepete analoza kumpatawo
Ezekiel41:12 Ndipo nyumba inali kutsogolo kwa mpata wa mbali ya kumadzulo inali ya mikono makumi asanu ndi awiri kupingasa kwace; ndi khoma la nyumbayo pozungulira pace linali la mikono isanu kucindikira kwace; ndi m'litali mwace mikono makumi asanu ndi anai.
Ezekiel41:13 Momwemo anayesa kacisi m'litali mwace mikono zana limodzi; ndi mpatawo
Ezekiel41:14 kupingasa kwace komwe kwa kukhomo kwa nyumba
Ezekiel41:15 Momwemo anayesa m'litali mwace nyumbayo inali kutsogolo kwace kwa mpata wokhala cakuno cace
Ezekiel41:16 ziundo
Ezekiel41:17 kufikira pamwamba pa khomo
Ezekiel41:18 Ndipo panalembedwapo ndi akerubi ndi akanjedza
Ezekiel41:19 nkhope ya munthu kuloza kukanjedza cakuno
Ezekiel41:20 Kuyambira pansi kufikira pamwamba pa khomo panalembedwa akerubi ndi akanjedza; linatero khoma la Kacisi.
Ezekiel41:21 Mphuthu za Kacisi zinali zamphwamphwa
Ezekiel41:22 Guwa la nsembe linali lamtengo
Ezekiel41:23 Ndipo Kacisi ndi malo opatulikitsa anali nazo zitseko ziwiri.
Ezekiel41:24 Ndipo pamakomopo panali zitseko zopatukana zotembenuzika
Ezekiel41:25 Ndipo panalembedwa pamenepo pa Izitseko za Kacisi akerubi ndi akanjedza
Ezekiel41:26 Ndipo panali mazenera a made okhazikika
Ezekiel42:1 Pamenepo anaturuka nane kumka ku bwalo la kunja

Ezekiel42:3 Pandunji pa mikono makumi awiri a bwalo lam'kati
Ezekiel42:4 Ndi kukhomo kwa zipinda anakonza poyendapo
Ezekiel42:5 Ndipo zipinda zapamwamba zinacepa
Ezekiel42:6 Pakuti zinasanjikizana pawiri
Ezekiel42:7 Ndipo linga linali kunialo
Ezekiel42:8 Pakuti kupingasa kwace kwa nyumba yazipinda inali m'bwalo lakunja
Ezekiel42:9 Ndipo pansi pa zipinda izi panali polowera mbali ya kum'mawa
Ezekiel42:10 M'kucindikira kwa linga la bwalo

Ezekiel43:1 Pamenepo anamuka nane ku cipata coloza kum'mawa
Ezekiel43:2 ndipo taonani

Ezekiel43:6 Ndipo ndinamva wina alikulankhula nane ali m'kacisi
Ezekiel43:7 Ndipo anati kwa ine

Ezekiel43:9 Ataye tsono cigololo cao ndi mitembo ya mafumu ao kutali kwa Ine
Ezekiel43:10 Wabadwa ndi munthu iwe
Ezekiel43:11 Ndipo ngati akacita manyazi nazo zonse anazicita

Ezekiel43:13 Ndipo miyeso ya guwa la nsembe
Ezekiel43:14 Ndi kuyambira kunsi kwace kunthaka
Ezekiel43:15 Ndi guwa lapamwamba mikono inai; ndi pamoto pa guwa padzaturuka nyanga zinai.

Ezekiel43:17 Ndi phaka
Ezekiel43:18 Ndipo anati kwa ine

Ezekiel43:20 Nutengeko mwazi wace
Ezekiel43:21 Utengenso ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo

Ezekiel44:24 Ndipo pakakhala mlandu

Daniel3:5 kuti pakumva inu mau a lipenga

Daniel11:1 Ndipo ine
Daniel11:2 Ndipo tsopano ndikufotokozera coonadi. Taona
Daniel11:3 Ndipo idzauka mfumu yamphamvu
Daniel11:4 Ndipo pakuuka iye ufumu wace udzatyoledwa
Daniel11:5 Ndipo mfumu ya kumwela
Daniel11:6 Ndipo pakutha zaka adzaphatikizana iwo; ndi mwana wamkazi wa mfumu ya kumwela adzafika kwa mfumu ya kumpoto
Daniel11:7 Koma apo pophukira mizu yace adzauka wina m'malo mwace
Daniel11:8 ndi milungu yao yomwe
Daniel11:9 Ndipo adzalowa m'ufumu wa mfumu ya kumwela
Daniel11:10 Ndi ana ace adzacita nkhondo
Daniel11:11 Ndi mfumu ya kumwela adzawawidwa mtima
Daniel11:12 Ndipo ataucotsa unyinjiwo udzakwezeka mtima wace; ndipo adzagwetsa zikwi makumi makumi
Daniel11:13 Ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzabwera
Daniel11:14 Ndipo nthawi zija ambiri adzaukira mfumu ya kumwela
Daniel11:15 Ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzadza
Daniel11:16 Koma iye amene amdzera kulimbana naye adzacita cifuniro cace ca iye mwini; palibe wakulimbika pamaso pace; ndipo adzaima m'dziko lokometsetsalo
Daniel11:17 Ndipo adzalimbitsa nkhope yace
Daniel11:18 Pambuyo pace adzatembenuzira nkhope yace kuzisumbu
Daniel11:19 Pamenepo adzatembenuzira nkhope yace ku malinga a dziko lace lace; koma adzakhumudwa
Daniel11:20 Ndipo m'malo mwace adzauka wina wakupititsa wamsonkho pa ulemerero wa ufumuwo; koma atatha masiku owerengeka adzatyoledwa iye
Daniel11:21 Ndi m'malo mwace adzauka munthu woluluka
Daniel11:22 Ndipo mwa mayendedwe ace a cigumula adzakokololedwa pamaso pace
Daniel11:23 Ndipo atapangana naye adzacita monyenga; pakuti adzakwera
Daniel11:24 Adzafika kacetecete ku minda yokometsetsa ya derali
Daniel11:25 Nadzautsa mphamvu yace ndi mtima wace ayambane ndi mfumu ya kumwela ndi khamu lalikuru la nkhondo; ndi mfumu ya kumwela ndi khamu lalikuru ndi lamphamvu ndithu; koma sadzaimika
Daniel11:26 Inde iwo akudyako cakudya cace adzamuononga; ndi ankhondo ace adzasefukira
Daniel11:27 Ndipo mafumu awa onse awiri mitima yao idzakumbuka kucita zoipa
Daniel11:28 Ndipo adzabwerera ku dziko lace ndi cuma cambiri; ndi mtima wace udzatsutsana ndi cipangano copatulika
Daniel11:29 Pa nthawi yoikika adzabwera
Daniel11:30 Pakuti zombo za ku Kitimu zidzafika kuyambana naye; cifukwa cace adzatenga nkhawa
Daniel11:31 Ndipo ankhondo adzamuimirira
Daniel11:32 Ndipo akucitira coipa cipanganoco iye adzawaipsa
Daniel11:33 Ndipo aphunzitsi a anthu adzalangiza ambiri
Daniel11:34 Ndipo pakugwa iwo adzathandizidwa ndi thandizo laling'ono; koma ambiri adzaphatikizana nao ndi mau osyasyalika.
Daniel11:35 Nadzagwa aphunzitsi ena kuwayesa ndi moto
Daniel11:36 Ndipo mfumu idzacita monga mwa cifuniro cace
Daniel11:37 Ndipo sidzasamalira milungu ya makolo ace
Daniel11:38 Koma kumalo kwace idzacitira ulemu mulungu wa malinga; ndi mulungu amene makolo ace sanaudziwa
Daniel11:39 Ndipo adzacita molimbana ndi malinga olimba koposa
Daniel11:40 Ndipo nthawi yotsiriza mfumu ya kumwela idzalimbana naye
Daniel11:41 Adzalowanso m'dziko lokometsetsalo ndi maiko ambiri adzapasuka; koma opulumuka dzanja lace ndi awa: Edomu
Daniel11:42 Adzatambalitsiranso dzanja lace kumaiko; dziko la Aigupto lomwe silidzapulumuka.
Daniel11:43 Ndipo adzacita mwamphamvu ndi cuma ca golidi
Daniel11:44 Koma mbiri yocokera kum'mawa ndi kumpoto idzambvuta; nadzaturuka iye ndi ukali waukuru kupha ndi kuononga konse ambiri.
Daniel11:45 Ndipo adzamanga mahema a nyumba yacifumu yace pakati pa nyanja yamcere ndi phiri lopatulika lofunika; koma adzafikira cimariziro cace wopanda wina wakumthandiza.

Hosea4:5 Ndipo udzakhumudwa usana

Hosea4:7 Monga anacuruka
Hosea4:8 Adyerera cimo la anthu anga
Hosea4:9 Ndipo kudzakhala monga anthu
Hosea4:10 Ndipo adzadya

Hosea4:18 Cakumwa cao casasa
Hosea4:19 Mphepo yamkulunga m'mapiko ace
Hosea5:1 Imvani ici

Hosea5:5 Ndipo kudzikuza kwa Israyeli kudzamcitira umboni pamaso pace; cifukwa cace Israyeli ndi Efraimu adzakhumudwa m'mphulupulu mwao; Yudanso adzakhumudwa pamodzi nao.
Hosea5:6 Adzamuka ndi zoweta zao zazing'ono ndi zazikuru kufunafuna Yehova: koma sadzampeza; Iye wadzibweza kuwacokera.

Hosea5:8 Ombani mphalasa m'Gibeya
Hosea5:9 Efraimu adzasanduka bwinja tsiku lakudzudzula; mwa mapfuko a Israyeli ndadziwitsa codzacitikadi.

Hosea7:1 M'mene ndiciritsa Israyeli

Amos7:1 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani
Amos7:2 Ndipo kunacitika m'mene lidatha kudya msipu wa dziko
Amos7:3 Ndipo Yehova anacileka. Sicidzacitika
Amos7:4 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani
Amos7:5 Pamenepo ndinati
Amos7:6 Ndipo Yehova anacileka. Ici comwe sicidiacitika
Amos7:7 Anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani
Amos7:8 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine
Amos7:9 ndi misanje ya Isake idzakhala bwinja; ndi malo opatulika a Israyeli adzapasuka; ndipo ndidzaukira nyumba ya Yerobiamu ndi lupanga.
Amos7:10 Pamenepo Amaziya wansembe wa ku Beteli anatumiza kwa Yerobiamu mfumu ya Israyeli
Amos7:11 Pakuti atero Amosi
Amos7:12 Amaziya anatinso kwa Amosi
Amos7:13 koma usaneneranso ku Beteli; pakuti pamenepo mpa malo opatulika a mfumu
Amos7:14 Pamenepo Amosi anayankha
Amos7:15 ndipo Yehova ananditenga ndirikutsata nkhosa
Amos7:16 Cifukwa cace tsono
Amos7:17 cifukwa cace atero Yehova
Amos8:1 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani
Amos8:2 Ndipo anati
Amos8:3 Koma nyimbo za kukacisi zidzasanduka kubuma tsiku ilo
Amos8:4 Tamverani ici
Amos8:5 Mwezi wokhala upita liti
Amos8:6 kuti tigule osauka ndi ndarama
Amos8:7 Yehova walumbira pali kudzikuza kwa Yakobo
Amos8:8 Kodi dziko silidzanjenjemera cifukwa ca ici
Amos8:9 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo
Amos8:10 Ndipo ndidzasanduliza madyerero anu
Amos8:11 Taonani
Amos8:12 Ndipo adzayendayenda peyupeyu kuyambira kunyanja kufikira kunyanja ndi kuyambira kumpoto kufikira kum'mawa; adzathamangathamanga kufunafuna mau a Yehova
Amos8:13 Tsiku lomwelo anamwali okongola ndi anyamata adzakomoka nalo ludzu.
Amos8:14 Iwo akulumbira ndi kuchula cimo la Samariya
Amos9:1 Ndinaona Ambuye alikuima pa guwa la nsembe
Amos9:2 Angakhale akumba mpaka kunsi kwa manda
Amos9:3 Angakhale abisala pamwamba pa Karimeli
Amos9:4 Angakhale alowa ndende pamaso pa adani ao
Amos9:5 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova wa makamu ndiye amene akhudza dziko
Amos9:6 ndiye amene amanga zipinda zace zosanja m'mwamba
Amos9:7 Kodi simukhala kwa Ine ngati ana a Kusi
Amos9:8 Taonani
Amos9:9 Pakuti taonani
Amos9:10 Ocimwa onse a anthu anga adzafa ndi lupanga
Amos9:11 Tsiku lomwelo ndidzautsa msasa wa Davide udagwawo
Amos9:12 kuti alandire otsala a Edomu akhale colowa cao
Amos9:13 Taonani akudza masiku
Amos9:14 Ndipo ndidzabwezanso undende wa anthu anga Israyeli
Amos9:15 Ndipo ndidzawaoka m'dziko mwao ndipo sadzazulidwanso m'dziko lao limene ndawapatsa
Obadiah1:1 MASOMPHENYA a Obadiya. Atero Ambuye Yehova za Edomu: Tamva mbiri yocokera kwa Yehova
Obadiah1:2 Taona
Obadiah1:3 Kudzikuza kwa mtima wako kwakunyenga
Obadiah1:4 Cinkana ukwera pamwamba peni peni ngati ciombankhanga
Obadiah1:5 Akakudzera akuba
Obadiah1:6 Ha! za Esau zasanthulidwa; ha! zobisika zace zafunidwa.
Obadiah1:7 Anthu onse a akupangana nawe anakuperekeza mpaka pamalire; anthu okhala ndi mtendere nawe anakunyenga
Obadiah1:8 Ati Yehova
Obadiah1:9 Ndipo amuna anu amphamvu adzatenga nkhawa
Obadiah1:10 Cifukwa ca ciwawa unamcitira mphwako Yakobo
Obadiah1:11 Tsiku lija unaima padera
Obadiah1:12 Koma usapenyerera tsiku la mphwako
Obadiah1:13 Usalowe m'mudzi wa anthu anga tsiku la tsoka lao
Obadiah1:14 Ndipo usaime pamphambano kuononga opulumuka ace; kapena kupereka otsala ace tsiku lakupsinjika.
Obadiah1:15 Pakuti tsiku la Yehova layandikira amitundu onse; monga unacita iwe
Obadiah1:16 Pakuti monga munamwa pa phiri langa lopatulika
Obadiah1:17 Koma m'phiri la Ziyoni mudzakhala opulumuka
Obadiah1:18 Ndipo nyumba ya Yakobo idzakhala moto
Obadiah1:19 Ndipo akumwela adzakhala nalo phiri la Esau colowa cao; ndi iwo a kucidikha adzakhala nalo dziko la Afilisti; ndipo adzakhala nayo minda ya Efraimu
Obadiah1:20 Ndipo andende a khamu ili la ana a Israyeli
Obadiah1:21 Ndipo apulumutsi adzakwera pa phiri la Ziyoni kuweruza phiri la Esau; ndipo ufumu udzakhala wace wa Yehova.
Jonah1:1 NDIPO mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yona mwana wa Amitai
Jonah1:2 Nyamuka
Jonah1:3 Koma Yona ananyamuka kuti athawire ku Tarisi
Jonah1:4 Koma Yehova anautsa cimphepo cacikuru panyanja
Jonah1:5 Pamenepo amarinyero anacita mantha
Jonah1:6 Ndipo mwini combo anadza kwa iye
Jonah1:7 Ndipo anati yense kwa mnzace
Jonah1:8 Pamenepo anati kwa iye
Jonah1:9 Ndipo ananena nao
Jonah1:10 Pamenepo amunawo anaopa kwambiri
Jonah1:11 Tsono anati kwa iye
Jonah1:12 Ndipo anati nao
Jonah1:13 Koma amunawo anapalasa kubwerera kumtunda
Jonah1:14 Pamenepo anapfuulira kwa Yehova
Jonah1:15 Momwemo ananyamula Yona
Jonah1:16 Ndipo amunawo anaopa Yehova ndi manthaakuru
Jonah1:17 Koma Yehova anaikiratu cinsomba cacikuru cimeze Yona; ndipo Yona anali m'miroba mwa nsombayi masiku atatu usana ndi usiku.
Jonah2:1 Pamenepo Yona anapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wace ali m'mimba mwa nsombayo.
Jonah2:2 Ndipo anati
Jonah2:3 Pakuti munandiponya mwakuya m'kati mwa nyanja
Jonah2:4 Ndipo ndinati
Jonah2:5 Madzi anandizinga mpaka moyo wanga
Jonah2:6 Ndinatsikira ku matsinde a mapiri
Jonah2:7 Pokomoka moyo wanga m'kati mwanga ndinakumbukila Yehova; Ndi pemphero langa linafikira Inu m'Kacisi wanu wopatulika.
Jonah2:8 Iwo osamalira mabodza opanda pace Ataya cifundo cao cao.
Jonah2:9 Koma ine ndidzakupherani Inu nsembe ndi mau akuyamika
Jonah2:10 Pamenepo Yehova analankhula ndi nsombayo
Jonah3:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yona nthawi yaciwiri
Jonah3:2 Nyamuka
Jonah3:3 Ndipo Yona ananyamuka
Jonah3:4 Ndipo Yona anayamba kulowa mudziwo ulendo wa tsiku limodzi
Jonah3:5 Ndipo anthu a Nineve anakhulupirira Mulungu
Jonah3:6 Pakuti mau awa anafikira mfumu ya Nineve
Jonah3:7 Ndipo analalikira
Jonah3:8 koma zipfundidwe ndi ciguduli munthu ndi nyama
Jonah3:9 Kaya
Jonah3:10 Ndipo Mulungu anaona nchito zao
Jonah4:1 Koma sikudakomera Yona konse
Jonah4:2 Ndipo anapemphera kwa Yehova
Jonah4:3 Ndipo tsopano
Jonah4:4 Ndipo Yehova anati
Jonah4:5 Pamenepo Yona anaturuka m'mudzi
Jonah4:6 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaikiratu msatsi
Jonah4:7 Koma Mulungu anauikira mphanzi pakuca m'mawa mwace
Jonah4:8 Ndipo kunali
Jonah4:9 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Yona
Jonah4:10 Ndipo Yehova anati
Jonah4:11 ndipo sindiyenera Ine kodi kucitira cifundo Nineve mudzi waukuru uwu; m'mene muli anthu oposa zikwi zana limodzi mphambu zikwi makumi awiri osadziwa kusiyanitsa pakati pa dzanja lao lamanja ndi lamanzere
Micah1:1 MAU a Yehova amene anadza kwa Mika wa ku Morese masiku a Yotamu
Micah1:2 Imvani
Micah1:3 Pakuti
Micah1:4 Ndi mapiri adzasungunuka pansi pa Iye
Micah1:5 Cicitika ici conse cifukwa ca kulakwa kwa Yakobo
Micah1:6 Cifukwa cace ndidzaika Samariya ngati mulu wa miyala ya m'munda
Micah1:7 Ndi mafano ace osema onse adzaphwanyika
Micah1:8 Cifukwa ca ici ndidzacita maliro
Micah1:9 Pakuti mabala ace ndi osapola; pakuti afikira ku Yuda; afikira ku cipata ca anthu anga
Micah1:10 Musacifotokoza m'Gati
Micah1:11 Pitiratu
Micah1:12 Pakuti wokhala m'Maroti alindira cokoma
Micah1:13 Manga gareta ku kavalo waliwiro
Micah1:14 Cifukwa cace pereka mphatso zolawirana kwa Moreseti Gati; nyumba za Akizibi zidzakhala cinthu cabodza kwa mafumu a Israyeli.
Micah1:15 Ndidzakutengeranso wokhala m'Maresa iwe
Micah1:16 Udziyeseze wadazi
Micah2:1 Tsoka iwo akulingirira cinyengo
Micah2:2 Ndipo akhumbira minda
Micah2:3 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova
Micah2:4 Tsiku ilo adzanena fanizo lakunena inu
Micah2:5 Cifukwa cace udzasowa woponya cingwe camaere m'msonkhano wa Yehova.
Micah2:6 Musamanenera
Micah2:7 Kodi adzati
Micah2:8 Koma ngakhale dzulo anthu anga anauka ngati mdani; mukwatula copfunda ku maraya a iwo opitirira mosatekeseka
Micah2:9 Muwataya akazi a anthu anga kunja kwa nyumba zao zokondweretsa; mucotsa ulemerero wanga kwa ana ao kosatha.
Micah2:10 Nyamukani
Micah2:11 Munthu akayenda ndi mtima wacinyengo ndi kunama
Micah2:12 Ndidzakumemezani ndithu
Micah2:13 Wotyola wakwera pamaso pao; iwo anatyola
Micah3:1 Ndipo ndinati
Micah3:2 inu amene mudana naco cokoma ndi kukondana naco coipa; inu akumyula khungu lao pathupi pao
Micah3:3 inu amene mukudyanso mnofu wa anthu anga; ndi kusenda khungu lao ndi kutyola mafupa ao; inde awaduladula ngati nyama yoti aphike
Micah3:4 Pamenepo adzapfuulira kwa Yehova
Micah3:5 Atero Yehova za aneneriakulakwitsa anthu anga; akuluma ndi mano ao
Micah3:6 cifukwa cace kudzakhala ngati usiku kwa inu

Micah3:8 Koma ine ndidzala nayo mphamvu mwa Mzimu ya Yehova
Micah3:9 Tamvanitu ici
Micah3:10 Amanga Ziyoni ndi mwazi
Micah3:11 Akuru ace aweruza cifukwa ca mphotho
Micah3:12 Momwemo Ziyoni adzalimidwa ngati: munda cifukwa ca inu
Micah4:1 Koma kudzacitika masiku otsiriza
Micah4:2 Ndipo amitundu ambiri adzamuka
Micah4:3 Ndipo Iye adzaweruza mwa mitundu yambiri ya anthu
Micah4:4 Koma adzakhala munthu yense patsinde pa mpesa wace
Micah4:5 Pakuti mitundu yonse ya anthu idzayenda
Micah4:6 Tsiku ilo
Micah4:7 ndipo wotsimphinayo ndidzamuyesa wotsala
Micah4:8 Ndipo iwe
Micah4:9 Tsono upfuulitsa cifukwa ninji? palibe mfumu mwa iwe kodi? watayika kodi mu uphungu wako
Micah4:10 Imva zowawa
Micah4:11 Ndipo tsopano amitundu ambiri asonkhana kuyambana nawe
Micah4:12 Koma sadziwa zolingirira za Yehova
Micah4:13 Nyamuka nupunthe
Micah5:1 Uzisonkhana tsopano magulu magulu
Micah5:2 Koma iwe
Micah5:3 Cifukwa cace Iye adzawapereka kufikira nthawi yoti wobalayo wabala; pamenepo otsala a abale ace adzabwera pamodzi ndi ana a Israyeli
Micah5:4 Ndipo adzaimirira
Micah5:5 Ndipo ameneyo adzakhala Mtendere; pamene a ku Asuri adzalowa m'dziko lathu
Micah5:6 Ndipo iwo adzatha dziko la Asuri ndi lupanga
Micah5:7 Ndipo otsala a Yakobo adzakhala pakati pa mitundu yambiri ya anthu
Micah5:8 Ndipo
Micah5:9 Dzanja lako likwezeke pamwamba pa iwo akuyambana nawe
Micah5:10 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku ilo
Micah5:11 ndipo ndidzaononga midzi ya m'dziko lako
Micah5:12 ndipo ndidzaononga zanyanga za m'dzanja lako; ndipo sudzakhalanso nao alosi;
Micah5:13 ndidzaononganso mafano ako osema
Micah5:14 Ndipo ndidzazula zifanizo zako m'kati mwako
Micah5:15 Ndipo ndidzabwezera amitundu osamvera cilango mu mkwiyo waukali.
Micah6:1 Tamverani tsono conena Yehova: Nyamuka
Micah6:2 Tamvani
Micah6:3 Anthu anga inu
Micah6:4 Pakuti ndinakukwezani kukuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto
Micah6:5 Anthu anga
Micah6:6 Ndidzafika kwa Yehova ndi ciani
Micah6:7 Kodi Yehova adzakondwera nazo nkhosa zamphongo zikwi
Micah6:8 Iye anakuuza
Micah6:9 Mau a Yehova aitana mudzi
Micah6:10 Kodi m'nyumba ya woipa mukali cuma cosalungama
Micah6:11 Kodi ndikhoza kuyera ndi miyeso yoipa
Micah6:12 Pakuti anthu ace olemera adzala ndi ciwawa
Micah6:13 Cifukwa cace Inenso ndakukantha ndi kukupweteketsa; ndakupulula cifukwa ca zocimwa zako.
Micah6:14 Udzadya koma osakhuta; ndi njala yako idzakhala pakati pako; ndipo udzacotsa koma osalanditsa; ndi ici wacilanditsa ndidzacipereka kulupanga.
Micah6:15 Udzafesa koma osaceka; udzaponda azitona koma osadzola mafuta; udzaponda mphesa koma osamwa vinyo.
Micah6:16 Pakuti asunga malemba a Omri
Micah7:1 Kalanga ine! pakuti ndikunga atapulula zipatso za m'mwamvu
Micah7:2 Watha wacifundo m'dziko
Micah7:3 Manja ao onse awiri agwira coipa kucicita ndi cangu; kalonga apempha
Micah7:4 Wokoma wa iwo akunga mitungwi; woongoka wao aipa koposa mpanda waminga; tsiku la alonda ako la kulangidwa kwako lafika
Micah7:5 Musakhulupirira bwenzi
Micah7:6 Pakuti mwana wamwamuna apeputsa atate
Micah7:7 Koma ine
Micah7:8 Usandiseka
Micah7:9 Ndidzasenza mkwiyo wa Yehova
Micah7:10 Pamenepo mdani wanga adzaciona
Micah7:11 Tsiku lakumanga malinga ako
Micah7:12 Tsiku lomwelo adzadza kwa iwe
Micah7:13 Koma dziko lidzakhala labwinja cifukwa ca iwo okhalamo
Micah7:14 Mudyetse anthu anu ndi ndodo yanu
Micah7:15 Monga masiku a kuturuka kwako m'dziko la Aigupto ndidzamuonetsa zodabwitsa.
Micah7:16 Amitundu adzaona nadzacita manyazi ndi mphamvu yao yonse; adzagwira pakamwa
Micah7:17 Adzanyambita pfumbi ngati njoka; ngati zokwawa za padziko
Micah7:18 Ndani Mulungu wofanana ndi Inu
Micah7:19 Adzabwera
Micah7:20 Mudzapatsa kwa Yakobo coonadi
Nahum1:1 KATUNDU wa Nineve. Buku la masomphenya a Nahumu wa ku Elikosi.
Nahum1:2 Yehova ndiye Mulungu wansanje
Nahum1:3 Yehova ndiye wolekerera mkwiyo
Nahum1:4 Adzudzula nyanja
Nahum1:5 Mapiri agwedezeka cifukwa ca Iye
Nahum1:6 Adzaima ndani pa kulunda kwace? ndipo adzakhalitsa ndani pa mkwiyo wace wotentha? ukali wace utsanulidwa ngati moto
Nahum1:7 Yehova ali wabwino
Nahum1:8 Koma ndi cigumula cosefukira adzatha konse malo ace
Nahum1:9 Mulingaliranji cotsutsana ndi Yehova? Iye adzatha psiti; nsautso siidzauka kawiri.
Nahum1:10 Pakuti cinkana akunga minga yoyangayanga
Nahum1:11 Mwa iwe waturuka wina wolingalira coipa cotsutsana ndi Yehova
Nahum1:12 Atero Yehova: Angakhale iwo ali ndi mphamvu yokwanira
Nahum1:13 Koma tsopano ndidzatyola ndi kukucotsera goli lace
Nahum1:14 Ndipo Yehova walamulira za iwe kuti asabzalidwenso ena a dzina lako; m'nyumba ya milungu yako ndidzacotsa fano losema ndi fano loyenga; ndidzakukonzerapo manda
Nahum1:15 Taonani pamapiri mapazi a iye wakulalikira uthenga wabwino
Nahum2:1 Wophwanyayo wakwera pamaso pako; sunga linga
Nahum2:2 Pakuti Yehova abwezeranso ukulu wace wa Yakobo ngati ukulu wace wa Israyeli; pakuti okhuthula anawakhuthula
Nahum2:3 Zikopa za amphamvu ace zasanduka zofiira
Nahum2:4 Magareta acita mkokomo m'miseu
Nahum2:5 Akumbukila omveka ace; akhumudwa m'kupita kwao
Nahum2:6 Pa zipata za mitsinje patseguka
Nahum2:7 Catsimikizika
Nahum2:8 Koma Nineve wakhala ciyambire cace ngati thamanda lamadzi; koma athawa. Imani
Nahum2:9 Funkhani siliva
Nahum2:10 Ndiye mopanda kanthu mwacemo ndi mwacabe
Nahum2:11 Iri kuti ngaka ya mikango
Nahum2:12 Mkangowo unamwetula zofikira ana ace
Nahum2:13 Taona
Nahum3:1 Tsoka mudzi wa mwazi! udzala nao mabodza ndi zacifwamba; zacifwamba sizidukiza.
Nahum3:2 Kumveka kwa cikoti
Nahum3:3 munthu wokwera pa kavalo
Nahum3:4 cifukwa ca ciwerewere cocuruka ca waciwerewere wokongola
Nahum3:5 Taona
Nahum3:6 Ndipo ndidzakuponyera zonyansa
Nahum3:7 Ndipo kudzali kuti onse akupenyerera iwe adzakuthawa
Nahum3:8 Kodi uli wabwino woposa No-Amoni
Nahum3:9 Kusi ndi Aigupto ndiwo mphamvu yace
Nahum3:10 Koma iye anatengedwa
Nahum3:11 Iwenso udzaledzera
Nahum3:12 Malinga ako onse adzanga mikuyu ndi nkhuyu zoyamba kupsa; akaigwedeza zingokugwa m'kamwa mwa wakudya.
Nahum3:13 Taona
Nahum3:14 Udzitungiretu madzi a nthawi yokumangira misasa
Nahum3:15 Pomwepo moto udzatha iwe; lupanga lidzakuononga; lidzatha iwe ngati cirimamine; udzicurukitse ngati cirimamine
Nahum3:16 Wacurukitsa amalonda ako koposa nyenyezi za kuthambo; cirimamine anyambita
Nahum3:17 Obvala korona ako akunga dzombe
Nahum3:18 Abusa ako aodzera
Nahum3:19 Palibe cakulunzitsa kutyoka kwako; bala lako liwawa; onse akumva mbiri yako akuombera manja; pakuti ndaniyo kuipa kwako sikunampitapitabe?
Habakkuk1:1 KATUNDU adamuona Habakuku
Habakkuk1:2 Yehova
Habakkuk1:3 Mundionetseranji zopanda pace
Habakkuk1:4 Pakuti cilamulo calekeka
Habakkuk1:5 Penyani mwa amitundu
Habakkuk1:6 Pakuti taonani
Habakkuk1:7 Ali oopsa
Habakkuk1:8 Akavalo ao aposa anyalugwe liwiro lao
Habakkuk1:9 Adzera ciwawa onsewo; nkhope zao zikhazikika zolunjika m'tsogolo; asonkhanitsa andende ngati mcenga
Habakkuk1:10 Inde anyoza mafumu
Habakkuk1:11 Pamenepo adzapitirira ngati mphepo
Habakkuk1:12 Si ndinu wacikhalire
Habakkuk1:13 Inu wa maso osalakwa
Habakkuk1:14 ndi kuyesa anthu ngati nsomba za m'nyanja
Habakkuk1:15 Aziwedza zonse ndi mbedza
Habakkuk1:16 Cifukwa cace aphera nsembe ukonde wace
Habakkuk1:17 Kodi m'mwemo adzakhuthula m'ukonde mwace osaleka kuphabe amitundu?
Habakkuk2:1 Ndidzaima pa dindiro langa ndi kudziika palinga
Habakkuk2:2 Ndipo Yehova anandiyankha nati
Habakkuk2:3 Pakuti masomphenyawo alindira nyengo yoikidwiratu
Habakkuk2:4 Taonani
Habakkuk2:5 Ndiponso vinyo ngwonyenga
Habakkuk2:6 Kodi sadzamnenera fanizo onsewo
Habakkuk2:7 Sadzauka kodi modzidzimuka iwo amene adzakuluma
Habakkuk2:8 Popeza iwe wafunkha amitundu ambiri
Habakkuk2:9 Tsoka iye wakupindulitsira nyumba yace phindu loipa
Habakkuk2:10 Wapangira nyumba yako camanyazi
Habakkuk2:11 Pakuti mwala wa m'khoma upfuula
Habakkuk2:12 Tsoka tye wakumanga mudzindi mwazi
Habakkuk2:13 Taonani
Habakkuk2:14 Pakuti dziko lapansi lidzadzazidwa ndi cidziwitso ca ulemerero wa Yehova
Habakkuk2:15 Tsoka wakuninkha mnzace cakumwa
Habakkuk2:16 Udzazidwa nao manyazi m'malo mwa ulemerero; imwa iwenso
Habakkuk2:17 Pakuti ciwawa cidacitikira Lebano cidzakukuta
Habakkuk2:18 Apindulanji nalo fano losema
Habakkuk2:19 Tsoka iye wakunena kwa mtengo
Habakkuk2:20 Koma Yehova ali m'Kacisi wace wopatulika; dziko lonse lapansi ale
Habakkuk3:1 Pemphero la Habakuku mneneri
Habakkuk3:2 Yehova
Habakkuk3:3 Mulungu anafuma ku Temani
Habakkuk3:4 Ndi kunyezimira kwace kunanga kuunika; Anali nayo mitsitsi ya dzuwa yoturuka m'dzanja lace. Ndi komweko kunabisika mphamvu yace.
Habakkuk3:5 Patsogolo pace panapita mliri
Habakkuk3:6 Anaimirira
Habakkuk3:7 Ndinaona mahema a Kusani ali mkusauka; Nsaru zocinga za dziko la Midyani zinanjenjemera.
Habakkuk3:8 Kodi Yehova anaipidwa nayo mitsinje? Mkwiyo wanu unali pamitsinje kodi
Habakkuk3:9 Munapombosola uta wanu; Malumbiro analumbirira mafuko anali mau oona. Munang'amba dziko lapansi ndi mitsinje.
Habakkuk3:10 Mapiri anakuonani
Habakkuk3:11 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zinaima njera mokhala mwao; Pa kuunika kwa mibvi yanu popita iyo. Pa kung'anipa kwa nthungo yanu yonyezimira.
Habakkuk3:12 Munaponda dziko ndi kulunda

Zechariah14:15 Momwemonso mliri wa pa akavalo
Zechariah14:16 Ndipo kudzacitika kuti otsala onse a amitundu onse anadzawo kulimbana ndi Yerusalemu
Zechariah14:17 Ndipo kudzacitika kuti ali yense wa mabanja a dziko wosakwera kumka ku Yerusalemu kulambira mfumu Yehova wa makamu
Zechariah14:18 Ndipo banja la ku Aigupto likapanda kukwera
Zechariah14:19 Ili ndi cimo la Aigupto
Zechariah14:20 Tsiku lomwelo padzaoneka pa miriu ya akavalo OPATULIKIRA YEHOVA; ndi mbiya za m'nyumba ya Yehova zidzanga mbale za ku guwa la nsembe.
Zechariah14:21 Inde mbiya zonse za m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda zidzakhala zopatulikira Yehova wa makamu; ndi onse akuphera nsembe adzafika nadzatengako

Malachi1:2 Ndakukondani
Malachi1:3 koma Esau ndinamuda

Malachi1:9 Ndipo tsopano
Malachi1:10 Mwenzi atakhala wina mwa inu wakutseka pamakomo
Malachi1:11 Pakuti kuyambira koturukira dzuwa kufikira kolowera kwace dzina langa lidzakhala lalikuru mwa amitundu; ndipo m'malo monse adzaperekera dzina langa cofukiza ndi copereka coona; pakuti dzina langa lidzakhala lalikuru mwa amitundu
Malachi1:12 Koma inu muliipsa
Malachi1:13 Mukutinso

Malachi2:1 Ndipo tsono
Malachi2:2 Mukapanda kumvera
Malachi2:3 Taonani
Malachi2:4 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti ndatumiza lamulo ili kwa inu
Malachi2:5 Cipangano canga cinali naye ca moyo ndi ca mtendere; ndipo ndinampatsa izi kuti aope; nandiopa
Malachi2:6 Cilamulo ca zoona cinali m'kamwa mwace
Malachi2:7 Pakuti milomo ya wansembe iyenera kusunga cidziwitso
Malachi2:8 Koma inu mwapambuka m'njira; mwakhumudwitsa ambiri m'cilamulo; mwaipsa cipangano ca Levi
Malachi2:9 Cifukwa cace Inenso ndakuikani onyozeka ndi ocepseka kwa anthu onse
Malachi2:10 Kodi sitiri naye Atate mmodzi ife tonse? sanatilenga kodi Mulungu mmodzi? Ticita monyengezana yense ndi mnzace cifukwa ninji
Malachi2:11 Yuda wacha monyenga
Malachi2:12 Yehova adzalikha munthu wakucita ici
Malachi2:13 Ndi ici mubwereza kucicita: mukuta guwa la nsembe la Yehova ndi misozi
Malachi2:14 Koma mukuti
Malachi2:15 Ndipo sanatero kodi wina womtsalira mzimu? Ndipo winayo anatero bwanji? Anatero pofuna mbeu ya Mulungu. Koma sungani mzimu wanu; ndipo asamcitire monyenga mkazi wa ubwana wace ndi mmodziyense.
Malachi2:16 Pakuti ndidana nako kuleka kumene
Malachi2:17 Mwalemetsa Yehova ndi mau anu. Koma mukuti
Malachi3:1 Taonani
Malachi3:2 Koma ndani adzapirira tsiku la kudza kwace? ndipo adzaima ndani pooneka Iye? pakuti adzanga moto wa woyenga

Malachi3:6 Pakuti Ine Yehova sindisinthika
Malachi3:7 Kuyambira masiku a makolo anu mwapambuka kuleka malemba anga osawasunga. Bwererani kudza kwa Ine
Malachi3:8 Kodi munthu adzalanda za Mulungu? ndipo inu mundilanda Ine. Koma mukuti
Malachi3:9 Mutembereredwa ndi temberero; pakuti mundilanda Ine
Malachi3:10 Mubwere nalo limodzi limodzi lonse la khumi
Malachi3:11 Ndipo ndidzadzudzula zolusa cifukwa ca inu

Malachi3:17 Ndipo adzakhala anga anga
Malachi3:18 Pamenepo mudzabwera ndi kuzindikira pakati pa wolungama ndi woipa

Matthew1:1 BUKU la kubadwa kwa Yesu Kristu
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu anabala Isake; ndi Isake anabala Yakobo; ndi Yakobo anabala Yuda ndi abale ace;
Matthew1:3 ndi Yuda anabala Farese ndi Zara mwa Tamare; ndi Farese anabala Ezronu; ndi Ezronu anabala Aramu;
Matthew1:4 ndi Aramu anabala Aminadabu; ndi Aminadabu anabala Naasoni; ndi Naasoni anabala Salimoni;
Matthew1:5 ndi Salimoni anabala Boazi mwa Rahabe; ndi Boazi anabala Obede mwa Rute; ndi Obede anabala Jese;
Matthew1:6 ndi Jese anabala Davide mfumuyo. Ndipo Davide anabala Solomo mwa mkazi wa Uriya;
Matthew1:7 ndi Solomo anabala Rehabiamu; ndi Rehabiamu anabala Abiya; ndi Abiya anabala Asa;
Matthew1:8 ndi Asa anabala Yosafate; ndi Yosafate anabala Yoramu; ndi Yoramu anabala Uziya;
Matthew1:9 ndi Uziya anabala Yotamu; ndi Yotamu anabala Ahazi; ndi Ahazi anabala Hezekiya;
Matthew1:10 ndi Hezekiya anabala Manase; ndi Manase anabala Amoni; ndi Amoni anabala Yosiya;
Matthew1:11 ndi Yosiya anabala Yekoniya ndi abale ace pa nthawi yakutengedwa kunka ku Babulo.
Matthew1:12 Ndipo pambuyo pace pa kutengedwako ku Babulo
Matthew1:13 ndi Zerubabele anabala Abiyudi; ndi Abiyudi anabala Eliyakimu; ndi Eliyakimu anabala Azoro;
Matthew1:14 ndi Azoro anabala Sadoki; ndi Sadoki anabala Akimu; ndi Akimu anabala Eliyudi;
Matthew1:15 ndi Eliyudi anabala Eleazara; ndi Eleazara anabala Matani; ndi Matani anabala Yakobo;
Matthew1:16 ndi Yakobo anabala Yosefe
Matthew1:17 Motero mibadwo yonse kuyambira pa Abrahamu kufikira kwa Davide ndiyo mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa Davide kufikira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babulo mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babulo kufikira kwa Kristu mibadwo khumi ndi inai.
Matthew1:18 Ndipo kubadwa kwace kwa Yesu Kristu kunali kotere: Amai wace Mariya anapalidwa ubwenzi ndi Yosefe
Matthew1:19 Koma Yosefe
Matthew1:20 Koma pakusinkhasinkha iye zinthu izi
Matthew1:21 Ndipo adzabala mwana wamwamuna
Matthew1:22 Ndipo zonsezi zinakhala kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi Ambuye mwa mneneri
Matthew1:23 Onani namwali adzaima
Matthew1:24 Ndipo Yosefe anauka tulo tace
Matthew1:25 ndipo sanamdziwa iye kufikira atabala rriwana wace; namucha dzina lace Yesu.

Mark15:18 ndipo anayamba kumlankhula Iye
Mark15:19 Ndipo anampanda Iye pamutu pace ndi bango
Mark15:20 Ndipo atatha kumnyoza anambvula cibakuwaco nambveka Iye zobvala zace. Ndipo anaturuka naye kuti akampacike Iye pamtanda.
Mark15:21 Ndipo anakangamiza wina wopitirirapo
Mark15:22 Ndipo anamtenga kunka naye ku malo Golgota
Mark15:23 Ndipo anampatsa vinyo wosanganiza ndi mure; koma Iye sanamlandira.
Mark15:24 Ndipo anampacika Iye
Mark15:25 Ndipo panali ora lacitatu
Mark15:26 Ndipo lembo la mlandu wace linalembedwa pamwamba
Mark15:27 Ndipo anapacika pamodzi ndi Iye acifwamba awiri; mmodzi ku dzanja lace lamanja ndi wina kulamanzere.[
Mark15:28 ]

Mark15:30 udzipulumutse mwini

Mark15:34 Ndipo pa ora lacisanu ndi cinai Yesu anapfuula ndi mau okweza

Acts28:31 ndi kulalikira Ufumu wa Mulungu
Romans1:1 PAULO
Romans1:2 umene iye analonjeza kale ndi mau a ananeri ace m'malembo oyera
Romans1:3 wakunena za Mwana wace
Romans1:4 amene anatsimikizidwa ndi mphamvu kuti ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu monga mwa Mzimu wa ciyero
Romans1:5 amene ife tinalandira naye cisomo ndi utumwi
Romans1:6 mwa amenewo muli inunso
Romans1:7 kwa onse a ku Roma
Romans1:8 Poyamba
Romans1:9 Pakuti Mulungu ali mboni yanga
Romans1:10 ngati nkutheka tsopano mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu
Romans1:11 Pakuti ndilakalaka kuonana ndinu
Romans1:12 ndiko
Romans1:13 Ndipo sindifuna kuti inu
Romans1:14 Ine ndiri wamangawa wa Ahelene ndi wa akunja
Romans1:15 Cotero
Romans1:16 Pakuti Uthenga Wabwino sundicititsa manyazi; pakuti uti mphamvu ya Mulungu yakupulumutsa munthu ali yense wakukhulupira; kuyambira Myuda
Romans1:17 Pakuti m'menemo caonetsedwa cilungamoca Mulungu cakucokera kucikhulupiriro kuloza kucikhulupiriro: monga kwalembedwa
Romans1:18 Pakuti mkwiyo wa Mulungu
Romans1:19 cifukwa codziwika ca Mulungu caonekera m'kati mwao; pakuti Mulungu anacionetsera kwa iwo.
Romans1:20 Pakuti cilengedwere dziko lapansi zaoneka bwino zosaoneka zace ndizo mphamvu yace yosatha ndi umulungu wace; popeza zazindikirika ndi zinthu zolengedwa
Romans1:21 cifukwa kuti
Romans1:22 Pakunena kuti ali anzeru
Romans1:23 nasandutsa ulemerero wa Mulungu wosaonongeka
Romans1:24 Cifukwa cace Mulungu anawapereka iwo m'zilakolako za mitima yao
Romans1:25 amenewo anasandutsa coonadi ca Mulungu cabodza napembedza
Romans1:26 Cifukwa ca ici Mulungu anawapereka iwo 1 ku zilakolako za manyazi; pakuti angakhale akazi ao anasandutsa macitidwe ao a cibadwidwe akhale macitidwe osalingana ndi cibadwidwe:
Romans1:27 ndipo cimodzimodzinso amuna anasiya macitidwe a cibadwidwe ca akazi
Romans1:28 Ndipo monga iwo anakana kukhala naye Mulungu m'cidziwitso cao
Romans1:29 anadzala ndi zosalungama zonse
Romans1:30 akazitape
Romans1:31 opanda nzeru
Romans1:32 amene ngakhale adziwa kuweruza kwace kwa Mulungu
Romans2:1 Cifukwa cace uli wopanda mau owiringula
Romans2:2 Ndipo tidziwa kuti kuweruza kwa Mulungu kuli koona pa iwo akucita zotere.
Romans2:3 Ndipo uganiza kodi
Romans2:4 Kapena upeputsa kodi kulemera kwa ubwino wace
Romans2:5 Koma kolingana ndi kuuma kwako
Romans2:6 amene adzabwezera munthu ali yense kolingana ndi nchito zace;
Romans2:7 kwa iwo amene afunafuna ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi cisaonongeko
Romans2:8 koma kwa iwo andeu
Romans2:9 nsautso ndi kuwawa mtima
Romans2:10 koma ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi mtendere kwa munthu ali yense wakucita zabwino
Romans2:11 pakuti Mulungu alibe tsankhu.
Romans2:12 Pakuti onse amene anacimwa opanda lamulo adzaonongeka opanda lamulo; ndi onse amene anacimwa podziwa lamulo adzaweruzidwa ndi lamulo;
Romans2:13 pakuti akumvaimva lamulo sakhala olungama pamaso pa Mulungu
Romans2:14 Pakuti pamene anthu a mitundu akukhala opanda lamulo
Romans2:15 popeza iwo aonetsa nchito ya lamulolo yolembedwa m'mitima yao
Romans2:16 tsiku limene Mulungu adzaweruza ndi Yesu Kristu zinsinsi za anthu
Romans2:17 Koma ngati iwe unenedwa Myuda
Romans2:18 nudziwa cifuniro cace
Romans2:19 nulimbika mumtima kuti iwe wekha uli wotsogolera wa akhungu
Romans2:20 wolangiza wa opanda nzeru
Romans2:21 ndiwe tsono wakuphunzitsa wina; kodi ulibe kudziphunzitsa mwini? iwe wakulalikira kuti munthu asabe
Romans2:22 Iwe wakunena kuti munthu asacite cigololo
Romans2:23 Iwe wakudzitamandira pacilamulo
Romans2:24 Pakuti dzina la Mulungu licitidwa mwano cifukwa ca inu
Romans2:25 Pakuti inde mdulidwe uli wabwino
Romans2:26 Cifukwa cace ngati wosadulidwa asunga zoikika za cilamulo
Romans2:27 Ndipo kusadulidwa
Romans2:28 Pakuti siali Myuda amene akhala wotere pamaso
Romans2:29 koma Myuda ndiye amene akhala wotere mumtima; ndipo mdulidwe uli wa mtima
Romans3:1 Ndipo potero Myuda aposa Dinji? Kapena mdulidwe upindulanji?
Romans3:2 Zambiri monse monse: coyamba
Romans3:3 Nanga bwanji ngati ena sanakhulupira? Kodi kusakhulupira kwao kuyesa cabe cikhulupiriko ca Mulungu?
Romans3:4 Msatero ai. Koma Mulungu akhale woona
Romans3:5 Koma ngati cosalungama cathu citsimikiza cilungamo ca Mulungu
Romans3:6 Msatero ai. Ngati kotero
Romans3:7 Pakuti ngati coonadi ca Mulungu cicurukitsa ulemerero wacecifukwa ca bodza langa
Romans3:8 Ndipo tilekerenji kunena
Romans3:9 Ndipo ciani tsono? kodi tiposa ife? Iai ndithu; pakuti tidawaneneza kale Ayuda ndi Ahelene omwe
Romans3:10 monga kwalembedwa
Romans3:11 Palibe mmodzi wakudziwitsa
Romans3:12 Onsewa apatuka
Romans3:13 M'mero mwao muli manda apululu; Ndi lilime lao amanyenga; Ululu wa mamba uli pansi pa milomo yao;
Romans3:14 M'kamwa mwao mudzala ndi zotemberera ndi zowawa;
Romans3:15 Miyendo yao icita liwiro kukhetsa mwazi;
Romans3:16 Kusakaza ndi kusauka kuli m'njira zao;
Romans3:17 Ndipo njira ya mtendere sanaidziwa;
Romans3:18 Kumuopa Mulungu kulibe pamaso pao.
Romans3:19 Ndipo tidziwa kuti zinthu ziri zonse cizinena cilamulo cizilankhulira iwo ali naco cilamulo; kuti pakamwa ponse patsekedwe
Romans3:20 cifukwa kuti pamaso pace palibe munthu adzayesedwa wolungama ndi Debito za lamulo; pakuti ucimo udziwika ndi lamulo.
Romans3:21 Koma tsopano cilungamo ca Mulungu caoneka copanda lamulo
Romans3:22 ndico cilungamo ca Mulungu cimene cicokera mwa cikhulupiriro ca pa Yesu Kristu kwa onse amene akhulupira; pakuti palibe kusiyana;
Romans3:23 pakuti onse anacimwa
Romans3:24 ndipo ayesedwa olungama kwaulere
Romans3:25 amene Mulungu anamuika poyera akhale cotetezera mwa cikhulupiriro ca m'mwazi wace
Romans3:26 kuti aonetse cilungamo cace m'nyengo yatsopano; kuti iye akhale wolungama
Romans3:27 Pamenepo kudzitama kuli kuti? Kwaletsedwa. Ndi lamulo lotani? La nchito kodi? lai; koma ndi lamulo la cikhulupiriro.
Romans3:28 Pakuti timuyesa munthu wohmgama cifukwa ca cikhulupiriro
Romans3:29 Kapena Mulungu ndiye wa Ayuda okha okha kodi? si wao wa amitundunso kodi? Bya
Romans3:30 ngatitu ndiye Mulungu mmodzi
Romans3:31 Potero kodi lamulo tiyesa cabe mwa cikhulupiriro? Msatero ai; koma tikhazikitsa lamulo.
Romans4:1 Ndipo tsono tidzanena kuti Abrahamu
Romans4:2 Pakuti ngati Abrahamu anayesedwa wolungama cifukwa ca nchito
Romans4:3 Pakuti lembo litani? Ndipo Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu
Romans4:4 Ndipo kwa iye amene agwira nchito
Romans4:5 Koma kwa iye amene sacita
Romans4:6 Monganso Davide anena za mdalitso wace wa munthu
Romans4:7 ndi kuti
Romans4:8 Wodala munthu amene Mulungu samwerengera ucimo.
Romans4:9 Mdalitso umenewu tsono uli kwa odulidwa kodi
Romans4:10 Tsono cinawerengedwa bwanji? m'mene iye anali wodulidwa kapena wosadulidwa? Si wodulidwa ai
Romans4:11 ndipo iye analandira cizindikilo ca mdulidwe
Romans4:12 ndiponso kholo la mdulidwe wa iwo amene siali a mdulidwe okha
Romans4:13 Pakuti lonjezo lakuti iye adzakhala wolowanyumba wa dziko lapansi silinapatsidwa kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yace mwa Lamulo
Romans4:14 Pakuti ngati iwo a lamulo akhala olowa nyumba
Romans4:15 pakuti cilamulo cicitira mkwiyo; koma pamene palibe lamulo
Romans4:16 Cifukwa cace cilungamo cicokera m'cikhulupiriro
Romans4:17 monga kwalembedwa: Ndinakukhazika iwe kholo la mitundu yambiri ya anthu pamaso pa Mulungu amene iye anamkhulupirira
Romans4:18 Amene anakhulupira nayembekeza zosayembekezeka
Romans4:19 Ndipo iye osafoka m'cikhulupiriro sanalabadira thupi lace
Romans4:20 ndipo poyang'anira lonjezo la Mulungu sanagwedezeka cifukwa ca kusakhulupirira
Romans4:21 nakhazikikanso mumtima kuti
Romans4:22 Cifukwa cace ici cinawerengedwa kwa iye cilungamo.
Romans4:23 Ndipo ici sicinalembedwa cifukwa caiye yekha yekha
Romans4:24 koma cifukwa ca ifenso
Romans4:25 amene anaperekedwa cifukwa ca zolakwazathu
Romans5:1 Popeza tsono tayesedwa olungama ndi cikhulupiriro
Romans5:2 amene ife tikhoza kulowa naye ndi cikhulupiriro m'cisomo ici m'mene tirikuunamo; ndipo tikondwera m'ciyembekezo ca ulemerero wa Mulungu.
Romans5:3 Ndipo si cotero cokha
Romans5:4 ndi cizolowezi cicita ciyembekezo:
Romans5:5 ndipo ciyembekezo sicicititsa manyazi; cifukwa cikondi ca Mulungu cinatsanulidwa m'mitima mwathu mwa Mzimu Woyera
Romans5:6 Pakuti pamene tinali cikhalire ofok a
Romans5:7 Pakuti ndi cibvuto munthu adzafera wina wolungama; pakuti kapena wina adzalimbika mtima kufera munthu wabwino.
Romans5:8 Koma g Mulungu atsimikiza kwa ife cikonai cace ca mwini yekha m'menemo
Romans5:9 Ndipo tsono popeza inayesedwa olungama ndi mwazi wace
Romans5:10 Pakuti ngati
Romans5:11 Ndipo si cotero cokha
Romans5:12 Cifukwa cace
Romans5:13 Pakuti kufikira nthawi ya lamulo ucimo unali m'dziko lapansi; koma ucimo suwerengedwa popanda lamulo.
Romans5:14 Komatu imfa inacita ufumu kuyambira kwa Adamu kufikira kwa Mose
Romans5:15 Koma mphatso yaulere siilingana ndi kulakwa. Pakuti ngati ambiriwo anafa cifukwa ca kulakwa kwammodziyo
Romans5:16 Ndipo mphatso siinadza monga mwa mmodzi wakucimwa
Romans5:17 Pakuti ngati
Romans5:18 Cifukwa cace
Romans5:19 Pakuti monga ndi kusamvera kwa munthu mmodzi ambiri anayesedwa ocimwa
Romans5:20 Ndipo lamulo linalowa moyenjezera
Romans5:21 kuti
Romans6:1 Cifukwa cace tidzatani? Tidzakhalabe m'ucimo kodi
Romans6:2 Msatero ai. Ife amene tiri akufa ku ucimo
Romans6:3 Kapena kodi simudziwa kuti ife tonse amene tinabatizidwa mwa Kristu Yesu; tinabatizidwa mu imfa yace?
Romans6:4 Cifukwa cace tinaikldwa m'manda pamodzi ndi iye mwa ubatizo kulowa muimfa; kuti monga Kristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa mwa ulemerero wa Atate
Romans6:5 Pakuti ngati ife tinakhala olumikizidwa ndi iye m'cifanizidwe ca imfa yace
Romans6:6 podziwa ici
Romans6:7 pakuti iye amene anafa anamasulidwa kuucimo.
Romans6:8 Koma ngati ife tinafa ndi Kristu
Romans6:9 podziwa kuti Kristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa
Romans6:10 Pakuti pakufa iye
Romans6:11 Cotero inunso mudziwerengere inu nokha ofafa ku ucimo
Romans6:12 Cifukwa cace musamalola ucimo ucite ufumu m'thupi lanu la imfa kumvera zofuna zace:
Romans6:13 ndipo musapereke ziwalo zanu kuucimo
Romans6:14 Pakuti ucimo sudzacita ufumu pa inu; popeza simuli a lamulo koma a cisomo.
Romans6:15 Ndipo ciani tsono? Tidzacimwa kodi cifukwa sitiri a lamulo
Romans6:16 Kodi simudziwa kuti kwa iye amene mudzipereka eni nokha kukhala akapolo ace akumvera iye
Romans6:17 Koma ayamikidwe Mulungu
Romans6:18 ndipo pamene munamasulidwa kuucimo
Romans6:19 Ndilankhula manenedwe a anthu
Romans6:20 Pakuti pamene inu munali aka polo a ucimo
Romans6:21 Ndipo munali nazo zobala zanji nthawi ija
Romans6:22 Koma tsopano
Romans6:23 Pakuti mphotho yace ya ucimo ndi imfa; koma mphatso yaulere ya Mulungu ndiyo moyo wosatha wa mwa Kristu Yesu Ambuye wathu.
Romans7:1 Nanga kodi simudziwa
Romans7:2 Pakuti mkazi wokwatidwa amangidwa ndi lamulo kwa mwamuna wace wamoyo; koma mwamunayo akafa
Romans7:3 Ndipo cifukwa cace
Romans7:4 Cotero
Romans7:5 Pakuti pamene tinali m'thupi
Romans7:6 Koma tsopano tinamasulidwa kucilamulo
Romans7:7 Pamenepo tidzatani? Kodi cilamulo ciri ucimo? Msatero ai. Koma ine sindikadazindikira ucimo
Romans7:8 koma ucimo
Romans7:9 Ndipo kale ine ndinali wamoyo popanda lamulo; koma pamene lamulo linadza
Romans7:10 Ndipo lamulo
Romans7:11 Pakuti ucimo
Romans7:12 Cotero cilamulo ciri coyera
Romans7:13 Ndipo tsopano cabwino cija cinandikhalira imfa kodi? Msatero ai. Koma ucimo
Romans7:14 Pakuti tidziwa kuti cilamulo ciri cauzimu; koma ine ndiri wathupi
Romans7:15 Pakuti cimene ndicita sindicidziwa; pakuti sindicita cimene ndifuna
Romans7:16 Koma ngati ndicita cimene sindicifuna
Romans7:17 Ndipo tsopano si ine ndicicita
Romans7:18 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti m'kati mwanga
Romans7:19 Pakuti cabwino cimene ndicifuna
Romans7:20 Koma ngati ndicita cimene sindicifuna
Romans7:21 Ndipo cotero odipeza lamulo ili
Romans7:22 Pakuti monga mwa munthu wa m'kati mwanga
Romans7:23 koma ndiona lamulo lina m'ziwalo zanga
Romans7:24 Munthu wosauka ine; adzandilanditsa ndani m'thupi la imfa iyi?
Romans7:25 Ndiyamika Mulungu
Romans8:1 Cifukwa cace tsopano iwo akukhala mwa Kristu Yesu alibe kutsutsidwa.
Romans8:2 Pakuti cilamulo ca mzimu wa moyo mwa Kristu Yesu candimasula ine ku lamulo la ucimo ndi la imfa.
Romans8:3 Pakuti cimene cilamulo sicinathe kucita
Romans8:4 kuti coikika cace ca cilamulo cikakwaniridwe mwa ife
Romans8:5 Pakuti iwo amene ali monga mwa thupi asamalira zinthu za thupi; koma iwo amene ali monga mwa mzimu
Romans8:6 pakuti cisamaliro ca thupi ciri imfa; koma cisamaliro ca mzimu ciri moyo ndi mtendere.
Romans8:7 Cifukwa cisamaliro ca thupi cidana ndi Mulungu; pakuti sicigonja ku cilamulo ca Mulungu
Romans8:8 Ndipo iwo amene ali m'thupi sangathe kukondweretsa Mulungu.
Romans8:9 Koma inu simuli m'thupi ai
Romans8:10 Ndipo ngati Kristu akhala mwa inu
Romans8:11 Koma ngati Mzimu wa iye amene adaukitsa Yesu kwa akufa akhalabe mwa inu
Romans8:12 Cifukwa cace
Romans8:13 pakuti ngati mukhala ndi moyo monga mwa thupi
Romans8:14 Pakuti onse amene atsogozedwa ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu
Romans8:15 Pakuti inu simunalandira mzimu wa ukapolo kucitanso mantha; koma munalandira mzimu waumwana
Romans8:16 Mzimu yekha acita umboni pamodzi ndi mzimu wathu
Romans8:17 ndipo ngati ana
Romans8:18 Pakuti ndiyesa kuti masauko a nyengo yatsopano sayenera kulinganizidwa ndi ulemerero umene udzaonetsedwa kwa ife.
Romans8:19 Pakuti ciyembekezetso ca colengedwa cilimilia bvumbulutso la ana a Molungu.
Romans8:20 Pakuti colengedwaco cagonietsedwa kuutsiru
Romans8:21 ndi ciyembekezo kuti colengedwa comwe cidzamasulidwa ku ukapolo wa cibvundi
Romans8:22 Pakuti tidziwa kuti colengedwa conse cibuula
Romans8:23 Ndipo si cotero cokha
Romans8:24 Pakuti ife tinapolumutsidwa ndi ciyembekezo; koma ciyembekezo cimene cioneka si ciri ciyembekezo ai; pa kuti ayembekezera ndani cimene acipenya?
Romans8:25 Koma ngati tiyembekezera cimene: siticipenya
Romans8:26 Ndipo momwemonso Mzimu athandiza kufoka kwathu; pakuti cimene tizipempha monga ciyenera
Romans8:27 ndipo iye amene asanthula m'mitima adziwa cimene acisamalira Mzimu
Romans8:28 Ndipo tidziwa kuti amene akonda Mulungu zinthu zonse zithandizana kuwacitira ubwino
Romans8:29 Cifukwa kuti iwo 1 amene iye anawadziwiratu
Romans8:30 ndipo amene iye anawalamuliratu
Romans8:31 Ndipo tidzatani ndi zinthu izi? 6 Ngati Mulungu ali ndi ife
Romans8:32 iye amene sanatimana Mwana wace wa iye yekha
Romans8:33 Ndani adzaneneza osankhidwa a Mulungu? 8 Mulungu ndiye ameneawayesa olungama;
Romans8:34 9 ndani adzawatsutsa? Kristu Yesu ndiye amene adafera
Romans8:35 Adzatisiyanitsa ndani ndi cikondi ca Kristu? nsautso kodi
Romans8:36 Monganso kwalembedwa
Romans8:37 Koma 13 m'zonsezi
Romans8:38 Pakuti ndakopeka mtima kuti ngakhale imfa
Romans8:39 ngakhale utali
Romans9:1 Ndinena zoona mwa Kristu
Romans9:2 kuti ndagwidwa ndi cisoni cacikuru ndi kuphwetekwa mtima kosaleka.
Romans9:3 Pakuti ndikadafunakuti ine ndekha nditembereredwe kundicotsa kwa Kristu cifukwa ca abale anga
Romans9:4 ndiwo Aisrayeli; ali nao umwana
Romans9:5 a iwo ali makolo
Romans9:6 Koma sikuli ngati mau a Mulungu anakhala cabe ai. Pakuti onse akucokera kwa a Israyeli siali Israyeli;
Romans9:7 kapena cifukwa ali mbeu ya Abrahamu
Romans9:8 Ndiko kuti
Romans9:9 Pakuti mau a lonjezo ndi amenewa
Romans9:10 Ndipo si cotero cokha
Romans9:11 pakuti anawo asanabadwe
Romans9:12 cotero kunanenedwa kwa uyo
Romans9:13 Inde monga kunalembedwa
Romans9:14 Ndipo tsono tidzatani? Kodi ciripo cosalungama ndi Mulungu? Msatero ai.
Romans9:15 Pakuti anati ndi Mose
Romans9:16 Cotero sicifuma kwa munthu amene afuna
Romans9:17 Pakuti lembo linena kwa Farao
Romans9:18 Cotero iye acitira cifundo amene iye afuna
Romans9:19 Pamenepo udzanena ndine kodi
Romans9:20 Koma munthu iwe
Romans9:21 Kodi kapena woumba mbiya sakutha kucita zace padothi
Romans9:22 Ndipo titani ngati Mulungu
Romans9:23 ndi kuti iye akadziwitse ulemerero wace waukuru pa zotengera zacifundo
Romans9:24 ndi ife amenenso iye anatiitana
Romans9:25 Monga atinso mwa Hoseya

Romans9:27 Ndipo Yesaya apfuula za Israyeli
Romans9:28 Pakuti Ambuye adzacita mau ace pa dziko lapansi
Romans9:29 Ndipo monga Yesaya anati kale

Romans10:1 Abale
Romans10:2 Pakuti ndiwacitira iwo umboni kuti a ali ndi cangu ca kwa Mulungu
Romans10:3 Pakuti pakusadziwa cilungamo ca Mulungu
Romans10:4 Pakuti Kristu ali cimariziroca lamulo kulinga kucilungamo kwa amene ali yense akhulupira
Romans10:5 Pakuti Mose walemba kuti munthu amene acita cilungamo ca m'lamulo
Romans10:6 Koma cilungamo ca cikhulupiriro citero
Romans10:7 kapena
Romans10:8 Koma citani? Mau ali pafupi ndiwe
Romans10:9 kuti ngati udzabvomereza m'kamwa mwako Yesu ndiye Ambuye
Romans10:10 pakuti ndi mtima munthu akhulupira kutengapo cilungamo; ndi m'kamwa abvomereza kutengapo cipulumutso
Romans10:11 Pakuti lembo litere
Romans10:12 Pakuti kulibe kusiyana Myuda ndi Mhelene; pakuti Yemweyo ali Ambuye wa onse
Romans10:13 pakuti
Romans10:14 Ndipo iwo adzaitana bwanji pa iye amene sanamkhulupirira? ndipo adzakhulupirira bwanji iye amene sanamva za iye? ndipo adzamva bwanji wopanda wolalikira?
Romans10:15 ndipo adzalalikira bwanji
Romans10:16 Koma sanamvera Uthenga Wabwino onsewo. Pakuti Yesaya anena
Romans10:17 Comweco cikhulupiriro cidza ndi mbiri
Romans10:18 Koma ine nditi
Romans10:19 Koma nditi
Romans10:20 Ndipo Yesaya alimbika mtima ndithu

Romans11:1 Cifukwa cace ndinena
Romans11:2 Mulungu sanataya anthu ace amene iye anawadziwiratu
Romans11:3 Ambuye
Romans11:4 Koma kuyankha kwa Mulungu kudatani kwa iye? Ndinadzisiyira ndekha anthu amunazikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri
Romans11:5 Coteronso nthawi yatsopano ciripo cotsalira monga mwa kusankha kwa cisomo.
Romans11:6 Koma ngati kuli ndi cisomo
Romans11:7 Ndipo ciani tsono? ici cimene Israyeli afunafuna sanacipeza; koma osankhidwawo anacipeza
Romans11:8 monga kunalembedwa kuti
Romans11:9 Ndipo Davide akuti
Romans11:10 Maso ao adetsedwe
Romans11:11 Cifukwa cace ndinena
Romans11:12 Ndipo ngati kulakwa kwao kwatengera dzikolapansi zolemera
Romans11:13 Koma ndilankhula ndi inu anthu amitundu. Popeza ine ndiri mtumwi wa anthu amitundu
Romans11:14 kuti ngati nkutheka ndikacititse nsanje amenewo a mtundu wanga; ndi kupulumutsa ena a iwo.
Romans11:15 Pakuti ngati kuwataya kwao kuli kuvanianitsa kwa dziko lapansi
Romans11:16 Ndipo ngati zoundukula ziri zopatulika
Romans11:17 Koma ngati nthambi zina zinathyoledwa
Romans11:18 usadzitama iwe wekha pa nthambizo: koma ngati udzitama wekha
Romans11:19 Ndipo kapena udzanena
Romans11:20 Cabwino; iwo anathyoledwa ndi kusakhulupirira kwao
Romans11:21 pakuti ngati Mulungu sanaleka nthambi za mtundu wace
Romans11:22 Cifukwa cace onani cifatso ndi kuuma mtima kwace kwa Mulungu: kwa iwo adagwa
Romans11:23 Ndipo iwonso

Galatians2:1 Pamenepo popita zaka khumi ndi zinai ndinakweranso kunka ku Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi Bamaba
Galatians2:2 Koma ndinakwera kunkako mobvumbulutsa; ndipo ndinawauza Uthenga Wabwino umene ndiulalikira kwa amitundu; koma m'tseri kwa iwo omveka
Galatians2:3 Komatu ngakhale Tito
Galatians2:4 ndico cifukwa ca abale onyenga olowezedwa m'tseri
Galatians2:5 Koma sitidawafumukira mowagonjera ngakhale ora limodzi; kuti coonadi ca Uthenga Wabwino cikhalebe ndi inu.

Philippians1:14 ndi kuti unyinji wa abale mwa Ambuye

Philippians1:26 kuti kudzitamandira kwanu kucuruke m'Kristu Yesu mwa ine
Philippians1:27 Cokhaci
Philippians1:28 osaopa adani m'kanthu konse
Philippians1:29 kuti kwapatsidwa kwa inu kwaufulu cifukwa ca Kristu

Philippians2:22 Koma muzindikira matsimikizidwe ace
Philippians2:23 Ameneyo ndithu tsono ndiyembekeza kumtuma posacedwa m'mene ndikapenyerera za kwa ine zidzatani;
Philippians2:24 koma ndikhulupirira mwa Ambuye kuti ine ndekhanso ndidzadza msanga.
Philippians2:25 Koma ndinayesa nkufunika kutuma kwa inu Epafrodito mbaleyo
Philippians2:26 popeza anali wolakalaka inu nonse
Philippians2:27 Pakutinso anadwaladi pafupi imfa; komatu Mulungu anamcitira cifundo; koma si iye yekha
Philippians2:28 Cifukwa cace ndamtuma iye cifulumizire
Philippians2:29 Cifukwa cace mumlandire mwa Ambuye
Philippians2:30 pakuti cifukwa lea nchito ya Kristu anafikira pafupi imfa
Philippians3:1 Cotsalira
Philippians3:2 Penyererani agaru
Philippians3:3 pakuti ife ndife mdulidwe
Philippians3:4 ndingakhale inenso ndiri nako kakukhulupirira m'thupi; ngati wina yense ayesa kukhulupirira m'thupi
Philippians3:5 wodulidwa tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu
Philippians3:6 monga mwa cangu
Philippians3:7 Komatu zonse zimene zinandipindulira
Philippians3:8 Komatu zeni zeninso ndiyesa zonse zikhale citayiko cifukwa ca mapambanidwe a cizindikiritso ca Kristu Yesu Ambuye wanga
Philippians3:9 ndi kupezedwa mwa iye
Philippians3:10 kuti ndimzindikire iye
Philippians3:11 ngati nkotheka ndikafikire kuuka kwa akufa.
Philippians3:12 Si kunena kuti ndinalandira kale
Philippians3:13 Abale
Philippians3:14 ndilondetsa polekezerapo
Philippians3:15 Tonsefe amene tsono tidakonzeka amphumphu
Philippians3:16 cokhaci
Philippians3:17 Abale khalani pamodzi akutsanza anga
Philippians3:18 Pakuti ambiri amayenda
Philippians3:19 citsiriziro cao ndico kuonongeka
Philippians3:20 Pakuti ufulu wathu uli Kumwamba; z kucokera komwenso tilindirira Mpulumutsi
Philippians3:21 amene adzasanduliza thupi lathu lopepulidwa
Philippians4:1 Potero
Philippians4:2 Ndidandaulira Euodiya
Philippians4:3 Inde
Philippians4:4 Kondwerani mwa Ambuye nthawi zonse: ndibwerezanso kutero
Philippians4:5 Kufatsa kwanu kuzindikirike ndi anthu onse. Ambuye ali pafupi.
Philippians4:6 Musadere nkhawa konse; komatu m'zonse ndi pemphero
Philippians4:7 Ndipo mtendere wa Mulungu wakupambana cidziwitso conse
Philippians4:8 Cotsalira
Philippians4:9 Zimenenso mudaziphunzira
Philippians4:10 Koma ndinakondwera mwa Ambuye kwakukuru
Philippians4:11 Si kuti ndinena monga mwa ciperewero
Philippians4:12 Ndadziwa ngakhale kupeputsidwa
Philippians4:13 Ndikhoza zonse mwa iye wondipatsa mphamvuyo.
Philippians4:14 Koma munacita bwino kuti munayanjana nane m'cisautso canga.
Philippians4:15 Koma mudziwanso inu nokha
Philippians4:16 pakuti m'Tesalonikanso munanditumizira pa cosowa canga kamodzi kapena kawiri.
Philippians4:17 Sikunena kuti nditsata coperekaco
Philippians4:18 Koma ndiri nazo zonse
Philippians4:19 Koma Mulungu wanga adzakwaniritsa cosowa canu ciri conse monga mwa cuma cace m'ulemerero mwa Kristu Yesu.
Philippians4:20 Ndipo kwa Mulungu ndi Atate wathu kukhale ulemerero ku nthawi za nthawi
Philippians4:21 Lankhulani woyera mtima ali yense mwa Kristu Yesu. Abalewo akukhala ndiine alankhula inu.
Philippians4:22 Oyera mtima onse alankhula inu
Philippians4:23 Cisomo ca Ambuye Yesu Kristu cikhale ndi mzimu wanu.
Colossians1:1 PAULO
Colossians1:2 kwa oyera mtima ndi abale okhulupirika mwa Kristu a m'Kolose: Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wocokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu.
Colossians1:3 Tiyamika Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu ndi kupempherera Inu nthawi zonse
Colossians1:4 popeza tidamva za cikhulupiriro canu ca mwa Kristu Yesu
Colossians1:5 cifukwa ca ciyembekezo cosungikira kwa inu m'Mwamba
Colossians1:6 umene udafikira kwa inu; monganso m'dziko lonse lapansi umabala zipatso
Colossians1:7 monga momwe munaphunzira kwa Epafra kapolo mnzathu wokondedwa
Colossians1:8 amenenso anatifotokozera cikondi canu mwa Mzimu.
Colossians1:9 Mwa ici ifenso
Colossians1:10 kuti mukayende koyenera Ambuye kukamkondweretsa monsemo
Colossians1:11 olimbikitsidwa m'cilimbiko conse
Colossians1:12 ndi kuyamika Atate
Colossians1:13 amene anatilanditsa ife ku ulamuliro wa mdima
Colossians1:14 amene tiri nao maomboledwe mwa iye
Colossians1:15 amene ali fanizo la Mulungu wosaonekayo
Colossians1:16 pakuti mwa iye
Colossians1:17 Ndipo iye ali woyamba wa zonse
Colossians1:18 Ndipo iye ali mutu wa thupi
Colossians1:19 Pakuti kunamkomera Atate kuti mwa iye cidzalo conse cikhalire
Colossians1:20 mwa Iyenso kuyanjanitsa zinthu zonse kwa iye mwini
Colossians1:21 Ndipo inu
Colossians1:22 m'thupi lace mwa imfayo
Colossians1:23 ngatitu mukhalabe m'cikhulupiriro
Colossians1:24 Tsopano 1 ndikondwera nazo zowawazo cifukwa ca inu
Colossians1:25 amene ndinakhala mtumiki wace
Colossians1:26 5 ndiwo cinsinsico cinabisika kuyambira pa nthawizo
Colossians1:27 kwa iwo amene Mulungu anafuna kuwazindikiritsa ici 6 cimene ciri cuma ca ulemerero wa cinsinsi pakati pa amitundu
Colossians1:28 amene timlalikira ife
Colossians1:29 kucita ici ndidzibvutitsa ndi kuyesetsa 9 monga mwa macitidwe ace akucita mwa ine ndi mphamvu.
Colossians2:1 Pakuti ndifuna kuti inu mudziwe nkhawa imene ndiri nayo cifukwa ca inu
Colossians2:2 kuti itonthozeke mitima yao
Colossians2:3 amene zolemera zonseza nzeru ndi cidziwitso zibisika mwa iye.
Colossians2:4 Ici ndinena
Colossians2:5 Pakuti ndingakhale ndiri kwina m'thupi
Colossians2:6 Cifukwa cace monga momwe munalandira Kristu Yesu Ambuye
Colossians2:7 ozika mizu ndi omangirika mwa iye
Colossians2:8 Penyani kuti pasakhale wina wakulanda inu ngati cuma
Colossians2:9 pakuti mwa iye cikhalira cidzalo ca Umulungu m'thupi
Colossians2:10 ndipo muli odzazidwa mwa iye
Colossians2:11 amenenso munadulidwa mwa iye ndi mdulidwe wosacitika ndi manja
Colossians2:12 popeza munaikidwa m'manda pamodzi ndi iye muubatizo
Colossians2:13 Ndipo inu
Colossians2:14 adatha kutifafanizira ca pa ifeco colembedwa m'zoikikazo
Colossians2:15 atabvula maukulu ndi maulamuliro
Colossians2:16 Cifukwa cace munthu aliyense asakuweruzeni inu m'cakudya
Colossians2:17 ndizo mthunzi wa zirinkudzazo; koma thupi ndi la Kristu.
Colossians2:18 Munthu ali yense asakunyengeni ndi kulanda mphotho yanu ndi kudzicepetsa mwini wace
Colossians2:19 kucokera kwa iye amene thupi lonse
Colossians2:20 Ngati munafa pamodzi ndi Kristu kusiyana nazo zoyambaza dziko lapansi
Colossians2:21 usaikapo dzanja
Colossians2:22 (ndizo zonse zakuonongedwa pocita nazo)
Colossians2:23 zimene ziri naotu manenedwe a nzeru m'kutumikira kwa cifuniro ca mwini wace

Colossians3:23 ciri conse mukacicita

Colossians4:1 Ambuye inu
Colossians4:2 Citani khama m'kupemphera
Colossians4:3 ndi kutipempherera ifenso pomwepo
Colossians4:4 kuti ndicionetse ici monga ndiyenera kulankhula.
Colossians4:5 Muyendere munzeru ndi iwo akunja

Colossians4:17 Ndipo nenani kwa Arkipo
Colossians4:18 Kulankhula ndi dzanja langa

1Thessalonians1:2 Tiyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse cifukwa ca inu nonse
1Thessalonians1:3 ndi kukumbukila kosalekeza nchito yanu ya cikhulupiriro
1Thessalonians1:4 podziwa
1Thessalonians1:5 kuti Vthenga Wabwino wathu sunadza kwa inu m'mau mokha
1Thessalonians1:6 Ndipo munayamba kukhala akutsanza athu

2Thessalonians1:1 PAULO
2Thessalonians1:2 Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu.
2Thessalonians1:3 Tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse cifukwa ca inu
2Thessalonians1:4 kotero kuti ife tokha tidzitamandira za inu m'Mipingo ya Mulungu
2Thessalonians1:5 ndico citsimikizo ca ciweruziro colungama ca Mulungu; kuti mu-kawerengedwe oyenera ufumu wa Mulungu
2Thessalonians1:6 popeza nkolungama kwa Mulungu kubwezera cisautso kwa iwo akucitira inu cisautso
2Thessalonians1:7 ndi kwa inu akumva cisautso mpumulo pamodzi ndi ire
2Thessalonians1:8 m'lawi lamoto
2Thessalonians1:9 amene adzamva cilango
2Thessalonians1:10 pamene adzadza kudzalemekezedwa mwa oyera mtima ace
2Thessalonians1:11 Kukatero tikupemphereraninso nthawi zonse
2Thessalonians1:12 kuti dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu lilemekezedwe mwa inu
2Thessalonians2:1 Ndipo tikupemphani
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti musamagwedezeka mtima msanga ndi kutaya maganizo anu
2Thessalonians2:3 munthu asakunyengeni konseko; kuti silifika
2Thessalonians2:4 amene atsutsana nazo
2Thessalonians2:5 Simukumbukila kodi
2Thessalonians2:6 Ndipo tsopano comletsa mucidziwa
2Thessalonians2:7 Pakuti cinsinsi ca kusayeruzika cayambadi kucita; cokhaci pali womletsa tsopano
2Thessalonians2:8 Ndipo pamenepo adzabvumbulutsidwa wosayeruzikayo
2Thessalonians2:9 ndiye amene kudza kwace kuli monga mwa macitidwe a Satana
2Thessalonians2:10 ndi m'cinyengo conse ca cosalungama kwa iwo akuonongeka
2Thessalonians2:11 Ndipo cifukwa cace Mulungu atumiza kwa iwo macitidwe a kusoceretsa
2Thessalonians2:12 kuti aweruzidwe onse amene sanakhulupirira coonadi
2Thessalonians2:13 Koma tiyenera ife tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse cifukwa: ca inu
2Thessalonians2:14 kumene aoaitanako inu mwa Uthenga Wabwino wathu
2Thessalonians2:15 Cifukwa cace tsono
2Thessalonians2:16 Ndipo Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu
2Thessalonians2:17 asangalatse mitima yanu
2Thessalonians3:1 Cotsalira
2Thessalonians3:2 ndi kuti tilanditsidwe m'manja a anthu osayenerandi oipa; pakuti si onse ali naco cikhulupiriro.
2Thessalonians3:3 Koma Ambuye ali wokhulupirika amene adzakukhazikitsani inu
2Thessalonians3:4 koma tikhulupirira mwa Ambuye za inu
2Thessalonians3:5 Ndipo Ambuye atsogolere bwino mitima yanu ilowe m'cikondi ca mulungu ndi m'cipiriro ca Kristu
2Thessalonians3:6 Ndipo tikulamulirani
2Thessalonians3:7 Pakuti mudziwa nokha m'mene muyenera kutitsanza ifemo; pakuti sitinakhala dwacedwace mwa inu;
2Thessalonians3:8 kapena sitinadya mkate cabe pa dzanja la munthu ali yense
2Thessalonians3:9 si cifukwa tiribe ulamuliro
2Thessalonians3:10 Pakutinso pamene tinali nanu tidakulamulirani ici
2Thessalonians3:11 Pakuti tikumva za ena mwa inu kuti ayenda dwacedwace
2Thessalonians3:12 Koma oterewa tiwalamulira ndi kuwadandaulira mwa Ambuye Y esu Kristu
2Thessalonians3:13 Kama inu
2Thessalonians3:14 Koma ngati wina samvera mau athu m'kalata uyu
2Thessalonians3:15 Koma musamuyese mdani
2Thessalonians3:16 Ndipo Ambuye wa mtendere yekha atipatse ife mtendere nthawi zonse
2Thessalonians3:17 Cilankhulo ndi dzanja langa Paulo; ndico cizindikilo m'kalata ali yense; ndiko kulemba kwanga.
2Thessalonians3:18 Cisomo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu cikhale ndi inu nonse.
1Timothy1:1 PAULO
1Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo mwana wanga weniweni m'cikhulupiriro: Cisomo
1Timothy1:3 Monga ndinakudandaulira iwe utsalire m'Efeso
1Timothy1:4 kapena asasamale nkhani zacabe
1Timothy1:5 koma citsirizo ca cilamuliro ndico cikondi cocokera mu mtima woyera ndi m'cikumbu mtima cokoma ndi cikhulupiriro cosanyenga;
1Timothy1:6 zimenezo
1Timothy1:7 pofuna kukhala aphunzitsi a lamulo ngakhale sadziwitsa zimene azmena
1Timothy1:8 Koma mudziwa kuti lamulo ndi labwino
1Timothy1:9 podziwa ici
1Timothy1:10 acigololo
1Timothy1:11 monga mwa Uthenga Wabwino wa ulemerero wa Mulungu wolemekezeka
1Timothy1:12 Ndimyamika iye wondipatsa ine mphamvu
1Timothy1:13 ndingakhale kale ndinali wamwano
1Timothy1:14 koma cisomo ca Ambuye wathu cidacurukatu pamodzi ndi cikhulupiriro ndi cikondi ciri mwa Kristu Yesu.
1Timothy1:15 Mauwa ali okhulupirika ndi oyenera konse kuti awalandire
1Timothy1:16 komatu mwa ici anandicitira cifundo
1Timothy1:17 Ndipo kwa Mfumu yosatha
1Timothy1:18 Lamulo ili ndipereka kwa iwe
1Timothy1:19 ndi kukhala naco cikhulupiriro ndi cikumbu mtima cokoma
1Timothy1:20 a iwo ali Humenayo ndi Alesandro
1Timothy2:1 Ndidandaulira tsono
1Timothy2:2 cifukwa ca mafumu ndi onse akucita ulamuliro kuti m'moyo mwathu tikakhale odika mtima
1Timothy2:3 Pakuti ici ncokoma ndi colandirika pamaso pa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu;
1Timothy2:4 amene afuna anthu onse apulumuke
1Timothy2:5 Pakuti pali Mulungu mmodzi
1Timothy2:6 amene anadzipereka yekha ciombolom'malo mwa onse; umboni m'nyengo zace;
1Timothy2:7 umene anandiika ine mlaliki wace ndi mtumwi (ndinena zoona
1Timothy2:8 Cifukwa cace ndifuna kuti amunawo apemphere pamalo ponse
1Timothy2:9 Momwemonso
1Timothy2:10 komatu (umo mokomera akazi akubvomereza kulemekeza Mulungu)
1Timothy2:11 Mkazi aphunzire akhale wacete m'kumvera konse.
1Timothy2:12 Koma sindilola ine kuti mkazi aphunzitse
1Timothy2:13 Pakuti Adamu anayamba kulengedwa
1Timothy2:14 ndipo Adamu sananyengedwa
1Timothy2:15 koma adzapulumutsidwa mwa kubala mwana
1Timothy3:1 Mauwa ali okhulupirika
1Timothy3:2 Ndipo kuyenera woyang'anira akhale wopanda cirema
1Timothy3:3 wosati woledzera
1Timothy3:4 woweruza bwino nyumba yace ya iye yekha
1Timothy3:5 Koma ngati munthu sadziwa kuweruza nyumba ya iye yekha
1Timothy3:6 Asakhale wophunza
1Timothy3:7 Kuyeneranso kuti iwo akunja adzakhoza kumcitira umboni wabwino; kuti ungamgwere mtonzo
1Timothy3:8 Momwemonso atumiki akhale olemekezeka
1Timothy3:9 okhala naco cinsinsi ca cikhulupiriro m'cikumbu mtima coona.
1Timothy3:10 Koma iwonso ayambe ayesedwe; pamenepo atumikire
1Timothy3:11 Momwemonso akazi akhale olemekezeka
1Timothy3:12 Atumiki akhale mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi
1Timothy3:13 Pakuti iwo akutumikira bwino adzitengera okha mbiri yabwino
1Timothy3:14 Izi ndikulembera ndi kuyembekeza kudza kwa iwe posacedwa
1Timothy3:15 kuti udziwe kuyenedwa kwace pokhala m'nyumba ya Mulungu
1Timothy3:16 Ndipo pobvomerezeka
1Timothy4:1 Koma Mzimu anena monenetsa
1Timothy4:2 m'maonekedwe onyenga a iwo onena mabodza
1Timothy4:3 akuletsa ukwati
1Timothy4:4 Pakuti colengedwa conse ca Mulungu ncabwino
1Timothy4:5 pakuti kayeretsedwa ndi Mau a Mulungu ndi kupemphera.
1Timothy4:6 Ngati ukumbutsa abale zinthu izi
1Timothy4:7 koma nkhani zacabe ndi za akazi okalamba ukane. Ndipo udzizoloweretse kucita cipembedzo;
1Timothy4:8 pakuti cizolowezi ca thupi cipindula pang'ono
1Timothy4:9 Okhulupirika mauwa ndi oyenera kulandiridwa konse.
1Timothy4:10 Pakuti kukalingako tlgwiritsa nchito ndi kuyesetsa
1Timothy4:11 Lamulira izi
1Timothy4:12 Munthu asapeputse ubwana wako; komatu khala citsanzo kwa iwo okhulupira
1Timothy4:13 Kufikira ndidza ine
1Timothy4:14 Usanyalapse mphatsoyo iri mwa iwe
1Timothy4:15 Izi uzisamalitse; mu izi ukhale; kuti kukula mtima kwako kuonekere kwa onse.
1Timothy4:16 Udzipenyerere wekha
1Timothy5:1 Mkulu usamdzudzule
1Timothy5:2 akazi akulu ngati amai; akazi ang'ono ngati alongo
1Timothy5:3 Citira ulemu amasiye amene ali amasiye ndithu.
1Timothy5:4 Koma ngati wamasiye wina ali nao ana kapena adzukulu
1Timothy5:5 Koma iye amene ali wamasiye ndithu
1Timothy5:6 Koma iye wakutsata zomkondweretsa
1Timothy5:7 Ndipo izi ulamulire
1Timothy5:8 Koma ngati wina sadzisungiratu mbumba yace ya iye yekha
1Timothy5:9 Asawerengedwe wamasiye ngati sanafikire zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi
1Timothy5:10 wa mbiri ya nchito zabwino; ngati walera ana
1Timothy5:11 Koma amasiyeang'ono uwakane; pakuti pamene ayambakumcitira Kristu cipongwe afuna kukwatiwa;
1Timothy5:12 pokhala naco citsutso
1Timothy5:13 Ndipo aphunziraponso kucita ulesi
1Timothy5:14 Cifukwa cace nditi akwatiwe amasiye ang'ono
1Timothy5:15 pakuti adayamba enakupatuka ndi kutsata Satana.
1Timothy5:16 Ngati mkazi wina wokhulupira ali nao amasiye
1Timothy5:17 Akuru akuweruza bwino ayesedwe oyenera ulemu wowirikiza
1Timothy5:18 Pakuti malembo ati
1Timothy5:19 Pa mkulu usalandire comnenera
1Timothy5:20 Iwo akucimwa uwadzudzule pamaso pa onse
1Timothy5:21 Ndikucitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu
1Timothy5:22 Usafulumira kuika manja pa munthu ali yense
1Timothy5:23 Usakhalenso wakumwa madzi okha
1Timothy5:24 Zocimwa za anthu ena ziri zooneka-kale
1Timothy5:25 Momwemonso pali nchito zokoma zinaonekera kale; ndipo zina zosati zotere sizikhoza kubisika.
1Timothy6:1 Onse amene ali akapolo a m'goli
1Timothy6:2 Ndipo iwo akukhala nao ambuye okhulupira
1Timothy6:3 Ngati munthu aphunzitsa zina
1Timothy6:4 iyeyo watukumuka
1Timothy6:5 makani opanda pace a anthu oipsika nzeru ndi ocotseka coonadi
1Timothy6:6 Koma cipembedzo pamodzi ndi kudekha cipindulitsa kwakukuru;
1Timothy6:7 pakuti sitinatenga kanthu polowa m'dziko lapansi
1Timothy6:8 koma pokhala nazo zakudya ndizopfunda
1Timothy6:9 Koma iwo akufuna kukhala acuma amagwa m'ciyesero ndi m'msampha
1Timothy6:10 Pakuti muzu wa zoipa zonse ndiwo cikondi ca pa ndalama; cimene ena pocikhumba
1Timothy6:11 Koma iwe
1Timothy6:12 Limba nayo nkhondo yabwino ya cikhulupiriro
1Timothy6:13 Ndikulamulira pamaso pa Mulungu
1Timothy6:14 kuti usunge lamulolo
1Timothy6:15 limene adzalionetsa m'nyengo za iye yekha
1Timothy6:16 amene iye yekha ali nao moyo wosatha
1Timothy6:17 Lamulira iwo acuma m'nthawi yino ya pansi pano
1Timothy6:18 kuti acite zabwino
1Timothy6:19 nadzikundikire okha maziko okoma ku nyengo ikudzayi
1Timothy6:20 Timoteo iwe
1Timothy6:21 cimene ena pocibvomereza 1 adalakwa ndi kutaya cikhulupiriro. Cisomo cikhale nanu.
2Timothy1:1 PAULO a mtumwi wa Kristu Yesu mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu
2Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo
2Timothy1:3 Ndiyamika Mulungu
2Timothy1:4 pokhumba usiku ndi usana kukuona iwe
2Timothy1:5 pokumbukila cikhulupiriro cosanyenga ciri mwa iwe
2Timothy1:6 Cifukwa cace ndikukumbutsa iwe ukoleze mphatso ya Mulungu
2Timothy1:7 Pakuti Mulungu sanatipatsa mzimu wa mantha; komatu wa mphamvu ndi cikondi ndi cidziletso.
2Timothy1:8 Potero usacite manyazi pa umboni wa Ambuye wathu
2Timothy1:9 amene anatipulumutsa ife
2Timothy1:10 koma caonetsedwa tsopano m'maonekedwe a Mpulumutsi wathu Kristu Yesu
2Timothy1:11 umene ndaikikapo mlaliki
2Timothy1:12 Cifukwa ca ideo ndinamva zowawa izi; komatu sindicita manyazi; pakuti ndimdziwa iye amene ndamkhulupirira
2Timothy1:13 Gwira citsanzo ca mau a moyo
2Timothy1:14 Cosungitsa cokomaca udikire mwa Mzimu Woyera amene akhalitsa mwa ife.
2Timothy1:15 Ici ucidziwa
2Timothy1:16 Ambuye acitire banja la Onesiforo cifundo; pakuti anatsitsimutsa ine kawiri kawiri
2Timothy1:17 komatu pokhala m'Roma iye anandifunafuna ine ndi khama
2Timothy1:18 (Ambuye ampatse iye apeze cifundo ndi Ambuye tsiku lijalo); ndi muja ananditumikira m'zinthu zambiri m'Efeso
2Timothy2:1 Ndipo iwe
2Timothy2:2 Ndipo zimene wazimva kwa ine mwa mboni zambiri
2Timothy2:3 Umve zowawa pamodzi nane monga msilikari wabwino wa Kristu Yesu.
2Timothy2:4 Msilikari sakodwa nazo nchito wamba
2Timothy2:5 Koma ngatinso wina ayesana nao m'makani a masewero
2Timothy2:6 Wam'munda wogwiritsitsa nchitoyo ayenera akhale woyamba kulandira zipatsozoo
2Timothy2:7 Lingirira cimene ndinena; pakuti Ambuye adzakupatsa cidziwitso m'zonse.
2Timothy2:8 Kumbukila Yesu Kristu
2Timothy2:9 m'menemo ndimva zowawa kufikira zomangira
2Timothy2:10 Mwa ici ndipirira zonse
2Timothy2:11 Okhulupirika mauwa: Pakuti ngati tidamwalira ndi iye
2Timothy2:12 ngati ttpirira
2Timothy2:13 ngati tikhala osakhulupirika
2Timothy2:14 Uwakumbutse izi
2Timothy2:15 Ucite cangu kudzionetsera kwa Mulungu wobvomerezeka
2Timothy2:16 Koma pewa nkhani zopanda pace; pakuti adzapitirira kutsata cisapembedzo
2Timothy2:17 ndipo mau ao adzanyeka cironda; a iwo ali Humenayo ndi Fileto;
2Timothy2:18 ndiwo amene adasokera kunena za coonadi
2Timothy2:19 Koma ndithu maziko a Mulungu aimika pokhazikika
2Timothy2:20 Koma m'nyumba yaikuru simuli zotengera za golidi ndi siliva zokha
2Timothy2:21 Ngati tsono munthu adziyeretsa yekha pa izi
2Timothy2:22 Koma thawa zilakolako za unyamata
2Timothy2:23 Koma mafunso opusa ndi opanda malango upewe
2Timothy2:24 Ndipo kapolo wa Ambuye sayenera kucita ndeu
2Timothy2:25 1 wolangiza iwo akutsutsana mofatsa; 2 ngati kapena Mulungu awapatse iwo citembenuziro
2Timothy2:26 ndipo 3 akadzipulumutse ku msampha wa mdierekezi
2Timothy3:1 Koma zindikira ici
2Timothy3:2 Pakuti anthu adzakhala odzikonda okha
2Timothy3:3 osayera mtima
2Timothy3:4 aciwembu
2Timothy3:5 akukhala nao maonekedwe a cipembedzo
2Timothy3:6 Pakuti mwa iwo akhala akukwawira m'nyumba
2Timothy3:7 ophunzira nthawi zonse
2Timothy3:8 Ndipo monga momwe Yane ndi Yambre anatsutsana naye Mose
2Timothy3:9 Koma sadzapitirirapo; pakuti kupusa kwao kudzaonekeratu kwa onse
2Timothy3:10 Koma iwe watsatatsata ciphunzitso canga
2Timothy3:11 mazunzo
2Timothy3:12 Ndipo onse akufuna kukhala opembedza m'moyo mwa Kristu Yesu
2Timothy3:13 Koma anthu oipa ndi onyenga
2Timothy3:14 Koma ukhalebe iwe mu izi zimene waziphunzira
2Timothy3:15 ndi kuti kuyambira ukhanda wako wadziwa malembo opatulika
2Timothy3:16 Lemba liri lonse adaliuzira Mulungu
2Timothy3:17 kuti munthu wa Mulungu akhale woyenera
2Timothy4:1 Ndikucitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Kristu Yesu
2Timothy4:2 lalikira mau; cita nao pa nthawi yace
2Timothy4:3 Pakuti idzafika nthawi imene sadzalola ciphunzitso colamitsa; komatu poyabwa m'khutu adzadziuniikitsa aphunzitsi monga mwa zilakolako za iwo okha:
2Timothy4:4 ndipo adzalubza dala pacoonadi
2Timothy4:5 Koma iwe
2Timothy4:6 Pakuti ndirimkuthiridwa nsembe tsopano
2Timothy4:7 Ndalimbana nako kulimbana kwabwino
2Timothy4:8 cotsalira wandiikira ine korona wa cilungamo
2Timothy4:9 Tayesetsa kudza kwa ine msanga:
2Timothy4:10 pakuti Dema wandisiya ine
2Timothy4:11 Luka yekha ali pamodzi ndi ine. Umtenge Marko
2Timothy4:12 Koma Tukiko ndamtuma ku Efeso.
2Timothy4:13 Copfunda cija ndinacisiya ku Trowa kwa Karpo
2Timothy4:14 Alesandro wosula mkuwa anandicitira zoipa zambiri: adzambwezera iye Ambuye monga mwa nchito zace;
2Timothy4:15 ameneyo iwenso ucenjere naye; pakuti anatsutsana nao mau athu.
2Timothy4:16 Pa codzikanira canga coyamba panalibe mmodzi anandithangata
2Timothy4:17 Koma Ambuye anaima nane nandipatsa mphamvu; kuti mwa ine cilalikiro cimveke konse konse
2Timothy4:18 Ambuye adzandilanditsa ku nchito yonse yoipa
2Timothy4:19 Lankhula Priska ndi Akula
2Timothy4:20 Erasto anakhalira m'Korinto; koma Trofimo ndamsiya wodwala ku Mileto.
2Timothy4:21 1 Tayesetsa kudza isanadze nyengo yacisanu. Akulankhula iwe Eubulo
2Timothy4:22 2 Ambuye akhale ndi mzimu wako. Cisomo cikhale nanu.
Titus1:1 PAULO
Titus1:2 m'ciyembekezo ca moyo wosatha
Titus1:3 koma pa nyengo za iye yekha anaonetsa mau ace muulalikiro
Titus1:4 kwa Tito
Titus1:5 Cifukwa ca ici ndinakusiya iwe m'Krete
Titus1:6 ngati wina ali wopanda cirema
Titus1:7 Pakuti woyang'anira ayenera kukhala wopanda cirema
Titus1:8 komatu wokonda kucereza alendo
Titus1:9 wogwira mau okhulupirika monga mwa ciphunzitso
Titus1:10 Pakuti alipo ambiri osamvera mau
Titus1:11 amene ayenera kutsekedwa pakamwa; ndiwo amene apasula mabanja banja lonse
Titus1:12 Wina wa mwa iwo
Titus1:13 Umboni uwu uli woona. Mwa ici uwadzudzule mokaripa
Titus1:14 osasamala nthanu zacabe za Ciyuda
Titus1:15 Zonse ziyera kwa iwo amene ayera mtima; koma kwa iwo odetsedwa ndi osakhulupira kulibe kanthu koyera; komatu zadetsedwa nzeru zao ndi cikumbu mtima cao.
Titus1:16 Abvomereza kuti adziwa Mulungu
Titus2:1 Koma iwe
Titus2:2 okalamba akhale odzisunga
