Titus2:4 kuti akalangize akazi ang one akonde amuna ao
Titus2:5 akhale odziletsa
Titus2:6 Momwemonso anyamata uwadandaulire akhale odziletsa;
Titus2:7 m'zonse udzionetsere wekha citsanzo ca nchito zabwino; m'ciphunzitse cako uonetsere cosabvunda
Titus2:8 mau olama osatsutsika; kuti iye wakutsutsana acite manyazi
Titus2:9 Akapolo amvere ambuye ao a iwo okha
Titus2:10 osatapa pa zao
Titus2:11 Pakuti caonekera cisomo ca Mulungu cakupulumutsa anthu onse
Titus2:12 ndi kutiphunzitsa ife kuti
Titus2:13 akulindira ciyembekezo eodala
Titus2:14 amene anadzipereka yekha m'malo mwa ife
Titus2:15 Izi lankhula
Titus3:1 Uwakumbutse iwo agonje kwa akulu
Titus3:2 asacitire mwano munthu ali yense
Titus3:3 Pakuti kale ifenso tinali opusa
Titus3:4 Koma pamene kukoma mtima
Titus3:5 zosati zocokera m'nchito za m'cilungamo
Titus3:6 amene anatsanulira pa ife mocurukira
Titus3:7 kuti poyesedwa olungama ndi cisomo ca Iyetu
Titus3:8 Okhulupirika mauwa
Titus3:9 koma pewa mafunso opusa
Titus3:10 Munthu wopatukira cikhulupiriro
Titus3:11 podziwa kuti worereyo wasandulika konse
Titus3:12 Pamene ndikatuma Artema kwa iwe
Titus3:13 Zena nkhoswe ya mirandu
Titus3:14 Ndipo anthu athu aphunzirenso asunge nchito zabwino zofunika
Titus3:15 Akulankhula iwe onse akukhala pamodzi ndi ine. Lankhula otikondawo m'cikhulupiriro. Cisomo cikhale ndi inu nonse.
Philemon1:1 PAULO
Philemon1:2 ndi kwa Apiya mlongoyo
Philemon1:3 Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu.
Philemon1:4 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga nthawi zonse
Philemon1:5 pakumva za cikondi cako ndi cikhulupiriro uli naco cakulinga kwa Ambuye Yesu
Philemon1:6 kuti ciyanjano ca cikhulupiriro cako cikakhale camphamvu podziwa cabwino ciri conse ciri mwa inu
Philemon1:7 Pakuti ndinali naco cimwemwe cambiri ndi cisangalatso pa cikondi cako
Philemon1:8 Momwemo
Philemon1:9 koma makamaka ndidandaulira mwa cikondi
Philemon1:10 ndikudandaulira cifukwa ca mwana wanga
Philemon1:11 amene kale sanakupindulira
Philemon1:12 amene ndi yemweyo ndakubwezera iwe
Philemon1:13 Ameneyo ndikadafuna ine kumsunga akhale nane
Philemon1:14 koma wopanda kudziwa mtima wako sindinafuna kucita kanthu; kuti ubwino wako usakhale monga mokakamiza
Philemon1:15 Pakuti kapena anasiyanitsidwa ndi iwe kanthawi cifukwa ca ici
Philemon1:16 osatinso monga kapolo
Philemon1:17 Ngati tsono undiyesa woyanjana nawe
Philemon1:18 Koma ngati anakulakwira kanthu
Philemon1:19 Ine Paulo ndicilemba ndi dzanja langa
Philemon1:20 Inde
Philemon1:21 Pokhulupirira kumvera kwako ndikulembera iwe
Philemon1:22 Koma undikonzerenso pogona; pakuti ndiyembekeza kuti mwa mapemphero anu ndidzapatsidwa kwa inu.
Philemon1:23 Epafra wandende mnzanga mwa Kristu Yesu akulankhula iwe;
Philemon1:24 ateronso
Philemon1:25 Cisomo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu cikhale pamodzi ndi mzimu wanu. Amen.
Hebrews1:1 KALE Mulungu analankhula ndi makolo mwa aneneri m'manenedwe ambiri ndi mosiyana-siyana
Hebrews1:2 koma pakutha pace pa masiku ano analankhula ndi ife ndi Mwana amene anamuika wolowa nyumba wa zonse
Hebrews1:3 ameneyo
Hebrews1:4 atakhala wakuposa angelo
Hebrews1:5 Pakuti kwa mngelo uti anati nthawi iri yonse
Hebrews1:6 Ndipo pamene atenganso wobadwa woyamba kulowa naye m'dziko
Hebrews1:7 Ndipo za angelo anenadi
Hebrews1:8 Koma ponena za Mwana
Hebrews1:9 Mwakonda cilungamo
Hebrews1:10 Ndipo
Hebrews1:11 Iyo idzatayika; komatu mukhalitsa; Ndipo iyo yonse idzasuka mongamaraya;
Hebrews1:12 Ndi monga copfunda mudzaipinda Monga maraya
Hebrews1:13 Koma za mngelo uti anati nthawi iri yonse
Hebrews1:14 Kodi siiri yonse mizimu yotumikira
Hebrews2:1 Mwa ici tiyenera kusamaliradi zimene tidazimvazi kuti kapena tingatengedwe ndi kusiyana nazo.
Hebrews2:2 Pakuti ngati mau adalankhulidwa ndi angelo adakhala okhazikika
Hebrews2:3 tidzapulumuka bwanji ife
Hebrews2:4 pocita umboni pamodzi nao Mulungunso ndi zizindikilo
Hebrews2:5 Pakuti sanagoniersera angelo dziko lirinkudza limene tinenali.
Hebrews2:6 Koma wina anacita umboni pena
Hebrews2:7 Munamcepsa pang'ono ndi angelo
Hebrews2:8 Mudagonjetsa zonse pansi pa mapaziace. Pakuti muja adagonietsa zonse kwa iye
Hebrews2:9 Koma timpenya iye amene adamcepsa pang'ono ndi angelo
Hebrews2:10 Pakuti kunamuyenera iye amene zonse ziri cifukwa ca iye
Hebrews2:11 Pakuti iye wakuyeretsa ndi iwo akuyeretsedwa acokera onse mwa mmodzi; cifukwa ca ici alibe manyazi kuwacha iwo abale
Hebrews2:12 ndi kuti
Hebrews2:13 Ndiponso
Hebrews2:14 Popeza tsono ana ndiwo a mwazi ndi nyama
Hebrews2:15 nakamasule iwo onse amene
Hebrews2:16 Pakuti ndithu salandira angelo
Hebrews2:17 Potero kudamuyenera kufanizidwa ndi abale m'zonse
Hebrews2:18 Pakuti popeza adamva zowawa
Hebrews3:1 Potero
Hebrews3:2 amene anakhala wokhulupirika kwa iye adamuikayo
Hebrews3:3 Pakuti ameneyo wayesedwa woyenera ulemerero woposa Mose
Hebrews3:4 Pakuti nyumba iri yonse iri naye wina woimanga; koma wozimanga zonse ndiye Mulungu.
Hebrews3:5 Ndipo Mosetu anali wokhulupirika m'nyumba yace yonse
Hebrews3:6 koma Kristu monga mwana
Hebrews3:7 Momwemo
Hebrews3:8 Musaumitse mitima yanu
Hebrews3:9 Cimene makolo anu anandiyesa naco
Hebrews3:10 Momwemo ndinakwiya nao mbadwouwu
Hebrews3:11 Monga ndinalumbira m'ukali wanga: Ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga!
Hebrews3:12 Tapenyani
Hebrews3:13 komatu dandauliranani nokha tsiku ndi tsiku
Hebrews3:14 pakuti takhala ife olandirana ndi Kristu
Hebrews3:15 umo anenamo
Hebrews3:16 Pakuti ndi ayani
Hebrews3:17 Koma anakwiya ndi ayani zaka makumi anai? Kodi si ndi awo adacimwawo
Hebrews3:18 Ndipo adawalumbirira ayani kuti asalowe mpumulo wace?
Hebrews3:19 Si awo kodiosamverawo? Ndipo tiona kuti sanakhoza kulowa cifukwa ca kusakhulupirira.
Hebrews4:1 Cifukwa cace tiope kuti kapena likatsala lonjezano lakulowa mpumulo wace
Hebrews4:2 Pakuti kwa ifenso walalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino
Hebrews4:3 Popeza ife amene takhulupira tilowa mpumulowo
Hebrews4:4 Pakuti wanena pena za tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri
Hebrews4:5 Ndipo m'menemonso

James1:1 YAKOBO
James1:2 Muciyese cimwemwe cokha
James1:3 pozindikira kuti ciyesedwe ca cikhulupiriro canu cicita cipiriro.
James1:4 Koma cipiriro cikhale nayo nchito yace yangwiro
James1:5 Koma wina wa inu ikamsowa nzeru
James1:6 Koma apemphe ndi cikhulupiriro
James1:7 Pakuti asayese munthu uyu kuti adzalandira kanthu kwa Ambuye;
James1:8 munthu wa mitima iwiri akhala wosinkhasinkha pa njira zace zonse.
James1:9 Koma mbale woluluka adzitamandire pa ukulu wace;
James1:10 pakuti adzapita monga duwa la udzu
James1:11 Pakuti laturuka dzuwa ndi kutentha kwace
James1:12 Wodala munthu wakupirira poyesedwa; pakuti pamene wabvomerezeka
James1:13 Munthu poyesedwa
James1:14 koma munthu ali yense ayesedwa pamene cilakolako cace ca iye mwini cimkokera
James1:15 Pamenepo cilakolakoco citaima
James1:16 Musanyengedwe
James1:17 Mphatso iri yonse yabwino
James1:18 Mwa cifuniro cace mwini anatibala ife ndi mau a coonadi
James1:19 Mudziwa
James1:20 Pakuti mkwiyo wa munthu sucita cilungamo ca Mulungu.
James1:21 Mwa ici
James1:22 Khalani akucita mau
James1:23 Pakuti ngati munthu ali wakumva mau wosati wakucita
James1:24 pakuti wadziyang'anira yekha nacoka
James1:25 Koma iye wakupenyerera m'lamulo langwiro
James1:26 Ngati wina adziyesera ali wopembedza Mulungu
James1:27 Mapembedzedwe oyera ndi osadetsa pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Atate ndiwo: z kuceza ndi ana amasiye ndi akazi amasiye m'cisautso cao
James2:1 Abate anga
James2:2 Pakuti akalowa m'sunagoge mwanu munthu wobvala mphete yagolidi
James2:3 ndipo mukapenyerera iye wobvala cokometsetsa
James2:4 kodi simunasiyanitsa mwa inu nokha
James2:5 Mverani
James2:6 Koma inu mumanyoza munthu wosauka. Kodi sakusautsani inu acuma
James2:7 Kodi sacitira mwano iwowa dzina lokomali muitanidwa nalo?
James2:8 Koma ngati mucita cikwanirire lamulolo lacifumu
James2:9 koma ngati musamala maonekedwe
James2:10 Pakuti amene ali yense angasunge malamulo onse
James2:11 Pakuti Iye wakuti
James2:12 Lankhulani motero
James2:13 Pakuti ciweruziro ciribe cifundo kwa iye amene sanacita cifundo; cifundo cidzitamandira kutsutsana naco ciweruziro.
James2:14 Cipindulocace nciani
James2:15 Mbale kapena mlongo akakbalawausiwa
James2:16 ndipo wina wa inu akanena nao
James2:17 Momwemonso cikhulupiriro
James2:18 Koma wina akati
James2:19 Ukhulupirira iwe kuti Mulungu ali mmodzi; ucita bwino; ziwanda zikhulupiranso

2Peter1:1 SIMONI Petro
2Peter1:2 Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere zicurukitsidwe m'cidziwitso ca Mulungu ndi Yesu Ambuye wathu.
2Peter1:3 Popeza mphamvu ya umulungu wace idatipatsa ife zonse za pamoyo ndi cipembedzo
2Peter1:4 mwa izi adatipatsa malonjezano a mtengo wace ndi akuru ndithu; kuti mwa izi mukakhale oyanjana nao umulungu wace
2Peter1:5 Ndipo mwa ici comwe
2Peter1:6 ndi pacodziletsa cipiriro;
2Peter1:7 ndi pacipiriro zipembedzo; ndi pactpembedzo cikondi ca pa abale; ndi pacikondi ca pa abale cikondi.
2Peter1:8 Pakuti izi zikakhala ndi inu
2Peter1:9 Pakuti iye wakusowa izi ali wakhungu
2Peter1:10 Momwemo abale
2Peter1:11 pakuti kotero kudzaonjezedwa kwa inu kolemerera khomo lakulowa ufumu wosatha wa Ambuye wathu ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Kristu.
2Peter1:12 Mwa ici sindidzaleka kukukumbutsani inu nthawi zonse za izi
2Peter1:13 Ndipo ndiciyesa cokoma
2Peter1:14 podziwa kuti kuleka kwa msasa wanga kuli pafupi
2Peter1:15 Koma ndidzacitanso cangu kosalekeza kuti nditacoka ine
2Peter1:16 Pakuti sitinatsata miyambi yacabe
2Peter1:17 Pakuti analandira kwa Mulungu Atate ulemu ndi ulemerero
2Peter1:18 ndipo mau awa ocokera Kumwamba tidawamva ife
2Peter1:19 Ndipo tiri nao mau a cinenero okhazikika koposa; amene mucita bwino powasamalira
2Peter1:20 ndi kudziwa ici poyamba
2Peter1:21 pakuti kale lonse cinenero sicinadza ndi cifuniro ca munthu; koma anthu a Mulungu

1John4:3 ndipo mzimu uli wonse umen subvomereza Yesu sucokera kwa Mulungu; ndipo uwu ndiwo mzirm wa wokana Kristu umene mudamvi kuti ukudza; ndipo ulimo m'dziko lapansi tsopano lomwe
1John4:4 Inu ndinu ocokera mwa Mulungu
1John4:5 mwa ici alankhula monga ocokera m'dziko lapansi
1John4:6 Ife ndife ocokera mwa Mu lungu; iye amene azindikira Mu lungu atimvera; iye wosacoken mwa Mulungu satimvera ife. Mo mwemo tizindikira mzimu wa coonadi

1John5:1 Yense wokhulupirira kuti Yesu ndiye Kristu wabadwa kucokera kwa Mulungu; ndipo yense wakukonda iye amene anabala akondanso iye amene anabadwa wocokera mwa iye.
1John5:2 Umo tizindikira kuti tikonda ana a Mulungu
1John5:3 Pakuti ici ndi cikondi ca Mulungu
1John5:4 Pakuti ciri conse cabadwa mwa Mulungu cililaka dziko lapansi; ndipo ici ndi cilako tililaka naco dziko lapansi
1John5:5 Koma ndani iye wolilaka dziko lapansi
1John5:6 iye ndiye amene adadza mwa madzi ndi mwazi; ndiye Yesu Kristu; wosati ndi madzi okha
1John5:7 Ndipo Mzimu ndiye wakucita umboni
1John5:8 Pakuti pali atatu akucita umboni
1John5:9 Ngati tilandira umboni wa anthu
1John5:10 Iye amene amkhulupirira Mwana wa Mulungu ali nao umboni mwa iye; ye wosakhulupirira Mulungu ananuyesa iye wonama; cifukwa sanakhulupirira umboni wa Mulungu anaucita wa Mwana wace.
1John5:11 Ndipo uwu ndi umboniwo
1John5:12 Iye wakukhala ndi Mwana ali nao moyo; wosakhala ndi Mwana wa Mulungu alibe moyo.
